authors_text: Peter Henderson,Xuechen Li,Dan Jurafsky,Tatsunori Hashimoto,Mark A. Lemley,Percy Liang
title: Foundation Models and Fair Use
title_zh: 基金会模型和合理使用
abstract: Existing foundation models are trained on copyrighted material. Deploying these models can pose both legal and ethical risks when data creators fail to receive appropriate attribution or compensation. In the United States and several other countries, copyrighted content may be used to build foundation models without incurring liability due to the fair use doctrine. However, there is a caveat: If the model produces output that is similar to copyrighted data, particularly in scenarios that affect the market of that data, fair use may no longer apply to the output of the model. In this work, we emphasize that fair use is not guaranteed, and additional work may be necessary to keep model development and deployment squarely in the realm of fair use. First, we survey the potential risks of developing and deploying foundation models based on copyrighted content. We review relevant U.S. case law, drawing parallels to existing and potential applications for generating text, source code, and visual art. Experiments confirm that popular foundation models can generate content considerably similar to copyrighted material. Second, we discuss technical mitigations that can help foundation models stay in line with fair use. We argue that more research is needed to align mitigation strategies with the current state of the law. Lastly, we suggest that the law and technical mitigations should co-evolve. For example, coupled with other policy mechanisms, the law could more explicitly consider safe harbors when strong technical tools are used to mitigate infringement harms. This co-evolution may help strike a balance between intellectual property and innovation, which speaks to the original goal of fair use. But we emphasize that the strategies we describe here are not a panacea and more work is needed to develop policies that address the potential harms of foundation models.

abstract_zh: 现有的基础模型是根据受版权保护的材料进行训练的。当数据创建者未能获得适当的归属或补偿时，部署这些模型可能会带来法律和道德风险。在美国和其他几个国家，受版权保护的内容可以用于构建基础模型，而不会因合理使用原则而承担责任。但是，有一个警告：如果模型生成的输出与受版权保护的数据类似，特别是在影响该数据市场的情况下，合理使用可能不再适用于模型的输出。在这项工作中，我们强调不能保证合理使用，可能需要进行额外的工作才能将模型开发和部署完全保持在合理使用的范围内。首先，我们调查了基于版权内容开发和部署基础模型的潜在风险。我们回顾了相关的美国判例法，与生成文本、源代码和视觉艺术的现有和潜在应用进行了比较。实验证实，流行的基础模型可以生成与受版权保护的材料非常相似的内容。其次，我们讨论可以帮助基础模型保持合理使用的技术缓解措施。我们认为需要更多的研究来使缓解策略与当前的法律状况保持一致。最后，我们建议法律和技术缓解措施应共同发展。例如，与其他政策机制相结合，当使用强大的技术工具来减轻侵权损害时，法律可以更明确地考虑安全港。这种共同进化可能有助于在知识产权和创新之间取得平衡，这也体现了合理使用的最初目标。但我们强调，我们在这里描述的策略并不是万能药，需要做更多的工作来制定解决基础模型潜在危害的政策。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于受版权保护内容训练基础模型的法律与伦理风险，并提出技术与法律协同发展的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型使用受版权保护的数据进行训练，可能引发法律和伦理争议，需明确合理使用范围以平衡知识产权与创新。
AI.method: 通过分析美国相关判例法、实验验证模型输出与版权内容的相似性，并提出技术性缓解措施与法律政策建议。
AI.result: 实验表明主流基础模型可生成与版权内容高度相似的输出，现有技术手段难以完全规避侵权风险，合理使用需额外努力。
AI.conclusion: 法律与技术需协同演进，通过安全港等政策机制结合技术工具，才能实现知识产权保护与创新的平衡。

authors_text: Hongyu Zhao,Kangrui Wang,Mo Yu,Hongyuan Mei
title: Explicit Planning Helps Language Models in Logical Reasoning
title_zh: 显式规划有助于语言模型进行逻辑推理
comment: EMNLP 2023 camera-ready; updated results on PrOntoQA with code bugs fixed
comments: EMNLP 2023 camera-ready; updated results on PrOntoQA with code bugs fixed
abstract: Language models have been shown to perform remarkably well on a wide range of natural language processing tasks. In this paper, we propose LEAP, a novel system that uses language models to perform multi-step logical reasoning and incorporates explicit planning into the inference procedure. Explicit planning enables the system to make more informed reasoning decisions at each step by looking ahead into their future effects. Moreover, we propose a training strategy that safeguards the planning process from being led astray by spurious features. Our full system significantly outperforms other competing methods on multiple standard datasets. When using small T5 models as its core selection and deduction components, our system performs competitively compared to GPT-3 despite having only about 1B parameters (i.e., 175 times smaller than GPT-3). When using GPT-3.5, it significantly outperforms chain-of-thought prompting on the challenging PrOntoQA dataset. We have conducted extensive empirical studies to demonstrate that explicit planning plays a crucial role in the system's performance.
summary: Language models have been shown to perform remarkably well on a wide range of natural language processing tasks. In this paper, we propose LEAP, a novel system that uses language models to perform multi-step logical reasoning and incorporates explicit planning into the inference procedure. Explicit planning enables the system to make more informed reasoning decisions at each step by looking ahead into their future effects. Moreover, we propose a training strategy that safeguards the planning process from being led astray by spurious features. Our full system significantly outperforms other competing methods on multiple standard datasets. When using small T5 models as its core selection and deduction components, our system performs competitively compared to GPT-3 despite having only about 1B parameters (i.e., 175 times smaller than GPT-3). When using GPT-3.5, it significantly outperforms chain-of-thought prompting on the challenging PrOntoQA dataset. We have conducted extensive empirical studies to demonstrate that explicit planning plays a crucial role in the system's performance.
abstract_zh: 语言模型已被证明在各种自然语言处理任务上都表现得非常好。在本文中，我们提出了 LEAP，这是一种使用语言模型执行多步逻辑推理并将显式规划纳入推理过程的新颖系统。明确的规划使系统能够通过展望未来的影响，在每一步做出更明智的推理决策。此外，我们提出了一种培训策略，可以保护规划过程不被虚假特征引入歧途。我们的完整系统在多个标准数据集上显着优于其他竞争方法。当使用小型T5模型作为其核心选择和推导组件时，尽管我们的系统只有大约1B个参数（即比GPT-3小175倍），但与GPT-3相比，其性能仍具有竞争力。当使用 GPT-3.5 时，它在具有挑战性的 PrOntoQA 数据集上显着优于思想链提示。我们进行了广泛的实证研究，证明显式规划在系统性能中起着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAP系统，通过引入显式规划机制提升语言模型在逻辑推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，但其在多步骤逻辑推理中仍存在局限性，需改进推理过程的规划能力。
AI.method: 设计包含显式规划的推理流程，结合前瞻性未来影响分析，并提出防止模型依赖虚假特征的训练策略。
AI.result: LEAP在多个标准数据集上显著优于现有方法，使用1B参数的T5模型时性能接近GPT-3，使用GPT-3.5时在PrOntoQA数据集上超越思维链提示法。
AI.conclusion: 显式规划机制是提升语言模型逻辑推理能力的关键因素，有效规划能显著增强推理决策质量。

authors_text: Mingjian Liang,Junjie Hu,Chenyu Bao,Hua Feng,Fuqin Deng,Tin Lun Lam
title: Explicit Attention-Enhanced Fusion for RGB-Thermal Perception Tasks
title_zh: RGB 热感知任务的显式注意力增强融合
abstract: Recently, RGB-Thermal based perception has shown significant advances. Thermal information provides useful clues when visual cameras suffer from poor lighting conditions, such as low light and fog. However, how to effectively fuse RGB images and thermal data remains an open challenge. Previous works involve naive fusion strategies such as merging them at the input, concatenating multi-modality features inside models, or applying attention to each data modality. These fusion strategies are straightforward yet insufficient. In this paper, we propose a novel fusion method named Explicit Attention-Enhanced Fusion (EAEF) that fully takes advantage of each type of data. Specifically, we consider the following cases: i) both RGB data and thermal data, ii) only one of the types of data, and iii) none of them generate discriminative features. EAEF uses one branch to enhance feature extraction for i) and iii) and the other branch to remedy insufficient representations for ii). The outputs of two branches are fused to form complementary features. As a result, the proposed fusion method outperforms state-of-the-art by 1.6\% in mIoU on semantic segmentation, 3.1\% in MAE on salient object detection, 2.3\% in mAP on object detection, and 8.1\% in MAE on crowd counting. The code is available at https://github.com/FreeformRobotics/EAEFNet.

However, how to effectively fuse RGB images and thermal data remains an open challenge. Specifically, we consider the following cases: i) both RGB data and thermal data, ii) only one of the types of data, and iii) none of them generate discriminative features. EAEF uses one branch to enhance feature extraction for i) and iii) and the other branch to remedy insufficient representations for ii). The outputs of two branches are fused to form complementary features. As a result, the proposed fusion method outperforms state-of-the-art by 1.6\% in mIoU on semantic segmentation, 3.1\% in MAE on salient object detection, 2.3\% in mAP on object detection, and 8.1\% in MAE on crowd counting. The code is available at https://github.com/FreeformRobotics/EAEFNet.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 RGB-Thermal 的感知已显示出显着的进步。当视觉相机遇到光照条件较差（例如弱光和雾气）时，热信息可以提供有用的线索。然而，如何有效融合 RGB 图像和热数据仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。以前的工作涉及朴素的融合策略，例如在输入处合并它们、在模型内连接多模态特征，或者对每个数据模态应用关注。这些融合策略很简单，但还不够。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为显式注意力增强融合（EAEF）的新型融合方法，该方法充分利用每种类型的数据。具体来说，我们考虑以下情况：i）RGB 数据和热数据，ii）仅其中一种数据类型，以及 iii）它们都不会生成判别性特征。 EAEF 使用一个分支来增强 i) 和 iii) 的特征提取，并使用另一分支来弥补 ii) 的表示不足。两个分支的输出被融合以形成互补特征。因此，所提出的融合方法在语义分割方面的 mIoU 方面优于现有技术 1.6\%，在显着目标检测方面的 MAE 方面优于现有技术 3.1\%，在目标检测方面的 mAP 方面优于现有技术 2.3\%，在人群计数方面的 MAE 方面优于现有技术 8.1\%。该代码可在 https://github.com/FreeformRobotics/EAEFNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为显式注意力增强融合（EAEF）的新方法，用于改进RGB-热成像感知任务中的多模态数据融合效果。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-热数据融合策略在光照恶劣环境下表现不足，无法充分利用两种模态的互补性，亟需更有效的融合方法。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络结构：第一分支增强双模态数据及无数据场景的特征提取，第二分支补全单模态数据的表示缺陷，最终通过特征融合生成互补信息。
AI.result: 在语义分割、显著性检测、目标检测和人群计数任务中分别提升1.6% mIoU、3.1% MAE、2.3% mAP和8.1% MAE，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: EAEF通过显式注意力机制有效解决了多模态数据融合难题，在多个感知任务中均取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Explicit Attention-Enhanced Fusion for RGB-Thermal Perception Tasks RGB 热感知任务的显式注意力增强融合 Recently, RGB-Thermal based perception has shown significant advances. Thermal information provides useful clues when visual cameras suffer from poor lighting conditions, such as low light and fog. However, how to effectively fuse RGB images and thermal data remains an open challenge. Previous works involve naive fusion strategies such as merging them at the input, concatenating multi-modality features inside models, or applying attention to each data modality. These fusion strategies are straightforward yet insufficient. In this paper, we propose a novel fusion method named Explicit Attention-Enhanced Fusion (EAEF) that fully takes advantage of each type of data. Specifically, we consider the following cases: i) both RGB data and thermal data, ii) only one of the types of data, and iii) none of them generate discriminative features. EAEF uses one branch to enhance feature extraction for i) and iii) and the other branch to remedy insufficient representations for ii). The outputs of two branches are fused to form complementary features. As a result, the proposed fusion method outperforms state-of-the-art by 1.6\% in mIoU on semantic segmentation, 3.1\% in MAE on salient object detection, 2.3\% in mAP on object detection, and 8.1\% in MAE on crowd counting. The code is available at https://github.com/FreeformRobotics/EAEFNet. 最近，基于 RGB-Thermal 的感知已显示出显着的进步。当视觉相机遇到光照条件较差（例如弱光和雾气）时，热信息可以提供有用的线索。然而，如何有效融合 RGB 图像和热数据仍然是一个悬而未决的挑战。以前的工作涉及朴素的融合策略，例如在输入处合并它们、在模型内连接多模态特征，或者对每个数据模态应用关注。这些融合策略很简单，但还不够。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为显式注意力增强融合（EAEF）的新型融合方法，该方法充分利用每种类型的数据。具体来说，我们考虑以下情况：i）RGB 数据和热数据，ii）仅其中一种数据类型，以及 iii）它们都不会生成判别性特征。 EAEF 使用一个分支来增强 i) 和 iii) 的特征提取，并使用另一分支来弥补 ii) 的表示不足。两个分支的输出被融合以形成互补特征。因此，所提出的融合方法在语义分割方面的 mIoU 方面优于现有技术 1.6\%，在显着目标检测方面的 MAE 方面优于现有技术 3.1\%，在目标检测方面的 mAP 方面优于现有技术 2.3\%，在人群计数方面的 MAE 方面优于现有技术 8.1\%。该代码可在 https://github.com/FreeformRobotics/EAEFNet 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为显式注意力增强融合（EAEF）的新方法，用于改进RGB-热成像感知任务中的多模态数据融合效果。 Mingjian Liang,Junjie Hu,Chenyu Bao,Hua Feng,Fuqin Deng,Tin Lun Lam cs.CV

authors_text: Chengxi Li,Kai Fan,Jiajun Bu,Boxing Chen,Zhongqiang Huang,Zhi Yu
title: Translate the Beauty in Songs: Jointly Learning to Align Melody and Translate Lyrics
title_zh: 翻译歌曲之美：共同学习旋律翻译歌词
abstract: Song translation requires both translation of lyrics and alignment of music notes so that the resulting verse can be sung to the accompanying melody, which is a challenging problem that has attracted some interests in different aspects of the translation process. In this paper, we propose Lyrics-Melody Translation with Adaptive Grouping (LTAG), a holistic solution to automatic song translation by jointly modeling lyrics translation and lyrics-melody alignment. It is a novel encoder-decoder framework that can simultaneously translate the source lyrics and determine the number of aligned notes at each decoding step through an adaptive note grouping module. To address data scarcity, we commissioned a small amount of training data annotated specifically for this task and used large amounts of augmented data through back-translation. Experiments conducted on an English-Chinese song translation data set show the effectiveness of our model in both automatic and human evaluation.
summary: Song translation requires both translation of lyrics and alignment of music notes so that the resulting verse can be sung to the accompanying melody, which is a challenging problem that has attracted some interests in different aspects of the translation process. In this paper, we propose Lyrics-Melody Translation with Adaptive Grouping (LTAG), a holistic solution to automatic song translation by jointly modeling lyrics translation and lyrics-melody alignment. It is a novel encoder-decoder framework that can simultaneously translate the source lyrics and determine the number of aligned notes at each decoding step through an adaptive note grouping module. To address data scarcity, we commissioned a small amount of training data annotated specifically for this task and used large amounts of augmented data through back-translation. Experiments conducted on an English-Chinese song translation data set show the effectiveness of our model in both automatic and human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 歌曲翻译需要翻译歌词和对齐音符，以便将生成的诗句与伴奏旋律一起演唱，这是一个具有挑战性的问题，引起了翻译过程不同方面的一些兴趣。在本文中，我们提出了带有自适应分组的歌词-旋律翻译（LTAG），这是一种通过联合建模歌词翻译和歌词-旋律对齐来自动歌曲翻译的整体解决方案。它是一种新颖的编码器-解码器框架，可以同时翻译源歌词并通过自适应音符分组模块确定每个解码步骤中对齐的音符数量。为了解决数据稀缺的问题，我们委托专门为此任务注释的少量训练数据，并通过反向翻译使用大量增强数据。在英汉歌曲翻译数据集上进行的实验表明了我们的模型在自动和人工评估方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合学习歌词翻译与旋律对齐的自动歌曲翻译方法。
AI.motivation: 现有歌曲翻译方法难以同时处理歌词翻译与旋律对齐，且面临数据稀缺挑战。
AI.method: 设计了基于编码器-解码器的LTAG框架，包含自适应分组模块实现同步翻译与音符对齐，并通过反向翻译增强数据。
AI.result: 在英中歌曲数据集上，模型在自动评估和人工评估中均表现出有效性。
AI.conclusion: LTAG为歌曲翻译提供了端到端解决方案，验证了联合建模与数据增强策略的有效性。

authors_text: Hyeonsoo Lee,Junha Kim,Eunkyung Park,Minjeong Kim,Taesoo Kim,Thijs Kooi
title: Enhancing Breast Cancer Risk Prediction by Incorporating Prior Images
title_zh: 通过结合先前的图像来增强乳腺癌风险预测
abstract: Recently, deep learning models have shown the potential to predict breast cancer risk and enable targeted screening strategies, but current models do not consider the change in the breast over time. In this paper, we present a new method, PRIME+, for breast cancer risk prediction that leverages prior mammograms using a transformer decoder, outperforming a state-of-the-art risk prediction method that only uses mammograms from a single time point. We validate our approach on a dataset with 16,113 exams and further demonstrate that it effectively captures patterns of changes from prior mammograms, such as changes in breast density, resulting in improved short-term and long-term breast cancer risk prediction. Experimental results show that our model achieves a statistically significant improvement in performance over the state-of-the-art based model, with a C-index increase from 0.68 to 0.73 (p < 0.05) on held-out test sets.
summary: Recently, deep learning models have shown the potential to predict breast cancer risk and enable targeted screening strategies, but current models do not consider the change in the breast over time. In this paper, we present a new method, PRIME+, for breast cancer risk prediction that leverages prior mammograms using a transformer decoder, outperforming a state-of-the-art risk prediction method that only uses mammograms from a single time point. We validate our approach on a dataset with 16,113 exams and further demonstrate that it effectively captures patterns of changes from prior mammograms, such as changes in breast density, resulting in improved short-term and long-term breast cancer risk prediction. Experimental results show that our model achieves a statistically significant improvement in performance over the state-of-the-art based model, with a C-index increase from 0.68 to 0.73 (p < 0.05) on held-out test sets.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习模型显示出预测乳腺癌风险并实现有针对性的筛查策略的潜力，但当前的模型没有考虑乳房随时间的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于乳腺癌风险预测的新方法 PRIME+，该方法利用变压器解码器利用先前的乳房 X 光照片，优于仅使用单个时间点的乳房 X 光照片的最先进的风险预测方法。我们在包含 16,113 次检查的数据集上验证了我们的方法，并进一步证明它可以有效捕获先前乳房 X 光检查的变化模式，例如乳房密度的变化，从而改善短期和长期乳腺癌风险预测。实验结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，我们的模型在性能上取得了统计学上的显着改进，在保留的测试集上 C 指数从 0.68 增加到 0.73 (p < 0.05)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的乳腺癌风险预测方法PRIME+，通过结合之前的乳腺X光图像来提高预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的乳腺癌风险预测模型仅使用单次时间点的乳腺X光图像，未能考虑乳腺随时间的变化，因此存在改进空间。
AI.method: 本文采用了一种基于Transformer解码器的新方法PRIME+，利用之前的乳腺X光图像进行风险预测。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在测试集上的C指数从0.68提高到0.73（p < 0.05），显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: PRIME+方法能够有效捕捉乳腺X光图像随时间变化的模式，如乳腺密度变化，从而显著提升短期和长期乳腺癌风险预测的性能。

result: 实验结果表明，该模型在测试集上的C指数从0.68提高到0.73（p < 0.05），显著优于现有最先进的方法。
conclusion: PRIME+方法能够有效捕捉乳腺X光图像随时间变化的模式，如乳腺密度变化，从而显著提升短期和长期乳腺癌风险预测的性能。
search_text: Enhancing Breast Cancer Risk Prediction by Incorporating Prior Images 通过结合先前的图像来增强乳腺癌风险预测 Recently, deep learning models have shown the potential to predict breast cancer risk and enable targeted screening strategies, but current models do not consider the change in the breast over time. In this paper, we present a new method, PRIME+, for breast cancer risk prediction that leverages prior mammograms using a transformer decoder, outperforming a state-of-the-art risk prediction method that only uses mammograms from a single time point. We validate our approach on a dataset with 16,113 exams and further demonstrate that it effectively captures patterns of changes from prior mammograms, such as changes in breast density, resulting in improved short-term and long-term breast cancer risk prediction. Experimental results show that our model achieves a statistically significant improvement in performance over the state-of-the-art based model, with a C-index increase from 0.68 to 0.73 (p < 0.05) on held-out test sets. 最近，深度学习模型显示出预测乳腺癌风险并实现有针对性的筛查策略的潜力，但当前的模型没有考虑乳房随时间的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于乳腺癌风险预测的新方法 PRIME+，该方法利用变压器解码器利用先前的乳房 X 光照片，优于仅使用单个时间点的乳房 X 光照片的最先进的风险预测方法。我们在包含 16,113 次检查的数据集上验证了我们的方法，并进一步证明它可以有效捕获先前乳房 X 光检查的变化模式，例如乳房密度的变化，从而改善短期和长期乳腺癌风险预测。实验结果表明，与最先进的模型相比，我们的模型在性能上取得了统计学上的显着改进，在保留的测试集上 C 指数从 0.68 增加到 0.73 (p < 0.05)。 本文提出了一种新的乳腺癌风险预测方法PRIME+，通过结合之前的乳腺X光图像来提高预测性能。 Hyeonsoo Lee,Junha Kim,Eunkyung Park,Minjeong Kim,Taesoo Kim,Thijs Kooi cs.CV

authors_text: Mehrdad Noori,Milad Cheraghalikhani,Ali Bahri,Gustavo A. Vargas Hakim,David Osowiechi,Ismail Ben Ayed,Christian Desrosiers
title: TFS-ViT: Token-Level Feature Stylization for Domain Generalization
title_zh: TFS-ViT：用于域泛化的令牌级特征样式化
abstract: Standard deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) lack the ability of generalizing to domains which have not been seen during training. This problem is mainly due to the common but often wrong assumption of such models that the source and target data come from the same i.i.d. distribution. Recently, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have shown outstanding performance for a broad range of computer vision tasks. However, very few studies have investigated their ability to generalize to new domains. This paper presents a first Token-level Feature Stylization (TFS-ViT) approach for domain generalization, which improves the performance of ViTs to unseen data by synthesizing new domains. Our approach transforms token features by mixing the normalization statistics of images from different domains. We further improve this approach with a novel strategy for attention-aware stylization, which uses the attention maps of class (CLS) tokens to compute and mix normalization statistics of tokens corresponding to different image regions. The proposed method is flexible to the choice of backbone model and can be easily applied to any ViT-based architecture with a negligible increase in computational complexity. Comprehensive experiments show that our approach is able to achieve state-of-the-art performance on five challenging benchmarks for domain generalization, and demonstrate its ability to deal with different types of domain shifts. The implementation is available at: https://github.com/Mehrdad-Noori/TFS-ViT_Token-level_Feature_Stylization.
summary: Standard deep learning models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) lack the ability of generalizing to domains which have not been seen during training. This problem is mainly due to the common but often wrong assumption of such models that the source and target data come from the same i.i.d. distribution. Recently, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have shown outstanding performance for a broad range of computer vision tasks. However, very few studies have investigated their ability to generalize to new domains. This paper presents a first Token-level Feature Stylization (TFS-ViT) approach for domain generalization, which improves the performance of ViTs to unseen data by synthesizing new domains. Our approach transforms token features by mixing the normalization statistics of images from different domains. We further improve this approach with a novel strategy for attention-aware stylization, which uses the attention maps of class (CLS) tokens to compute and mix normalization statistics of tokens corresponding to different image regions. The proposed method is flexible to the choice of backbone model and can be easily applied to any ViT-based architecture with a negligible increase in computational complexity. Comprehensive experiments show that our approach is able to achieve state-of-the-art performance on five challenging benchmarks for domain generalization, and demonstrate its ability to deal with different types of domain shifts. The implementation is available at: https://github.com/Mehrdad-Noori/TFS-ViT_Token-level_Feature_Stylization.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等标准深度学习模型缺乏泛化到训练期间未见过的领域的能力。这个问题主要是由于此类模型的常见但经常错误的假设，即源数据和目标数据来自相同的独立同分布。分配。最近，视觉变压器（ViTs）在广泛的计算机视觉任务中表现出了出色的性能。然而，很少有研究调查它们推广到新领域的能力。本文提出了第一个用于域泛化的令牌级特征样式化（TFS-ViT）方法，该方法通过合成新域来提高 ViT 对未见数据的性能。我们的方法通过混合来自不同域的图像的归一化统计来转换标记特征。我们通过一种新颖的注意感知风格化策略进一步改进了这种方法，该策略使用类（CLS）标记的注意图来计算和混合对应于不同图像区域的标记的归一化统计数据。所提出的方法对于主干模型的选择很灵活，并且可以轻松应用于任何基于 ViT 的架构，而计算复杂度的增加可以忽略不计。综合实验表明，我们的方法能够在五个具有挑战性的领域泛化基准上实现最先进的性能，并证明其处理不同类型的领域转移的能力。该实现位于：https://github.com/Mehrdad-Noori/TFS-ViT_Token-level_Feature_Stylization。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TFS-ViT方法，通过令牌级特征风格化提升视觉Transformer（ViT）在未见域上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN因假设数据同分布而难以处理域偏移，ViT虽性能优越但域泛化研究不足，需探索有效方法增强其跨域适应性。
AI.method: 通过混合不同域图像的归一化统计量重构令牌特征，并引入注意力感知风格化策略，利用CLS令牌的注意力图加权混合不同区域的特征统计量。
AI.result: 在五个域泛化基准测试中达到SOTA性能，有效应对多种域偏移类型，计算复杂度增加可忽略。
AI.conclusion: TFS-ViT通过灵活的令牌级风格化策略显著提升ViT的域泛化能力，为跨域视觉任务提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Masataka Kawai,Noriaki Ota,Shinsuke Yamaoka
title: Large-scale pretraining on pathological images for fine-tuning of small pathological benchmarks
title_zh: 对病理图像进行大规模预训练，以微调小型病理基准
abstract: Pretraining a deep learning model on large image datasets is a standard step before fine-tuning the model on small targeted datasets. The large dataset is usually general images (e.g. imagenet2012) while the small dataset can be specialized datasets that have different distributions from the large dataset. However, this 'large-to-small' strategy is not well-validated when the large dataset is specialized and has a similar distribution to small datasets. We newly compiled three hematoxylin and eosin-stained image datasets, one large (PTCGA200) and two magnification-adjusted small datasets (PCam200 and segPANDA200). Major deep learning models were trained with supervised and self-supervised learning methods and fine-tuned on the small datasets for tumor classification and tissue segmentation benchmarks. ResNet50 pretrained with MoCov2, SimCLR, and BYOL on PTCGA200 was better than imagenet2012 pretraining when fine-tuned on PTCGA200 (accuracy of 83.94%, 86.41%, 84.91%, and 82.72%, respectively). ResNet50 pre-trained on PTCGA200 with MoCov2 exceeded the COCOtrain2017-pretrained baseline and was the best in ResNet50 for the tissue segmentation benchmark (mIoU of 63.53% and 63.22%). We found re-training imagenet-pretrained models (ResNet50, BiT-M-R50x1, and ViT-S/16) on PTCGA200 improved downstream benchmarks.
summary: Pretraining a deep learning model on large image datasets is a standard step before fine-tuning the model on small targeted datasets. The large dataset is usually general images (e.g. imagenet2012) while the small dataset can be specialized datasets that have different distributions from the large dataset. However, this 'large-to-small' strategy is not well-validated when the large dataset is specialized and has a similar distribution to small datasets. We newly compiled three hematoxylin and eosin-stained image datasets, one large (PTCGA200) and two magnification-adjusted small datasets (PCam200 and segPANDA200). Major deep learning models were trained with supervised and self-supervised learning methods and fine-tuned on the small datasets for tumor classification and tissue segmentation benchmarks. ResNet50 pretrained with MoCov2, SimCLR, and BYOL on PTCGA200 was better than imagenet2012 pretraining when fine-tuned on PTCGA200 (accuracy of 83.94%, 86.41%, 84.91%, and 82.72%, respectively). ResNet50 pre-trained on PTCGA200 with MoCov2 exceeded the COCOtrain2017-pretrained baseline and was the best in ResNet50 for the tissue segmentation benchmark (mIoU of 63.53% and 63.22%). We found re-training imagenet-pretrained models (ResNet50, BiT-M-R50x1, and ViT-S/16) on PTCGA200 improved downstream benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 在大型图像数据集上预训练深度学习模型是在小型目标数据集上微调模型之前的标准步骤。大数据集通常是一般图像（例如 imagenet2012），而小数据集可以是与大数据集具有不同分布的专用数据集。然而，当大型数据集专门化并且与小型数据集具有相似的分布时，这种“从大到小”的策略并没有得到很好的验证。我们新编译了三个苏木精和伊红染色图像数据集，一个大数据集 (PTCGA200) 和两个放大倍数调整的小数据集 (PCam200 和 segPANDA200)。主要深度学习模型采用监督和自监督学习方法进行训练，并在肿瘤分类和组织分割基准的小数据集上进行微调。在 PTCGA200 上使用 MoCov2、SimCLR 和 BYOL 预训练的 ResNet50 在 PTCGA200 上进行微调时优于 imagenet2012 预训练（准确率分别为 83.94%、86.41%、84.91% 和 82.72%）。使用 MoCov2 在 PTCGA200 上预训练的 ResNet50 超过了 COCOtrain2017 预训练的基线，并且是组织分割基准 ResNet50 中最好的（mIoU 为 63.53% 和 63.22%）。我们发现在 PTCGA200 上重新训练 imagenet 预训练模型（ResNet50、BiT-M-R50x1 和 ViT-S/16）改进了下游基准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在病理图像上进行大规模预训练，以优化小型病理基准任务的微调效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用通用图像数据集（如ImageNet）预训练模型，但未验证当大型数据集与小型目标数据集分布相似时的预训练效果。
AI.method: 构建三个病理图像数据集（PTCGA200、PCam200、segPANDA200），采用监督学习和自监督学习（如MoCov2、SimCLR、BYOL）训练ResNet50等模型，并在小型数据集上微调以评估肿瘤分类和组织分割性能。
AI.result: PTCGA200预训练的ResNet50在PCam200上达到83.94%-86.41%准确率，优于ImageNet预训练；在组织分割任务中mIoU达63.53%，优于COCO预训练基线。
AI.conclusion: 在分布相似的专用数据集上预训练模型可提升下游病理任务性能，重新训练ImageNet模型也能增强基准表现。

We found re-training imagenet-pretrained models (ResNet50, BiT-M-R50x1, and ViT-S/16) on PTCGA200 improved downstream benchmarks. 在大型图像数据集上预训练深度学习模型是在小型目标数据集上微调模型之前的标准步骤。大数据集通常是一般图像（例如 imagenet2012），而小数据集可以是与大数据集具有不同分布的专用数据集。然而，当大型数据集专门化并且与小型数据集具有相似的分布时，这种“从大到小”的策略并没有得到很好的验证。我们新编译了三个苏木精和伊红染色图像数据集，一个大数据集 (PTCGA200) 和两个放大倍数调整的小数据集 (PCam200 和 segPANDA200)。主要深度学习模型采用监督和自监督学习方法进行训练，并在肿瘤分类和组织分割基准的小数据集上进行微调。在 PTCGA200 上使用 MoCov2、SimCLR 和 BYOL 预训练的 ResNet50 在 PTCGA200 上进行微调时优于 imagenet2012 预训练（准确率分别为 83.94%、86.41%、84.91% 和 82.72%）。使用 MoCov2 在 PTCGA200 上预训练的 ResNet50 超过了 COCOtrain2017 预训练的基线，并且是组织分割基准 ResNet50 中最好的（mIoU 为 63.53% 和 63.22%）。我们发现在 PTCGA200 上重新训练 imagenet 预训练模型（ResNet50、BiT-M-R50x1 和 ViT-S/16）改进了下游基准。 本文研究在病理图像上进行大规模预训练，以优化小型病理基准任务的微调效果。 Masataka Kawai,Noriaki Ota,Shinsuke Yamaoka cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiaqi Jin,Siwei Wang,Zhibin Dong,Xinwang Liu,En Zhu
title: Deep Incomplete Multi-view Clustering with Cross-view Partial Sample and Prototype Alignment
title_zh: 具有跨视图部分样本和原型对齐的深度不完全多视图聚类
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
comments: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
abstract: The success of existing multi-view clustering relies on the assumption of sample integrity across multiple views. However, in real-world scenarios, samples of multi-view are partially available due to data corruption or sensor failure, which leads to incomplete multi-view clustering study (IMVC). Although several attempts have been proposed to address IMVC, they suffer from the following drawbacks: i) Existing methods mainly adopt cross-view contrastive learning forcing the representations of each sample across views to be exactly the same, which might ignore view discrepancy and flexibility in representations; ii) Due to the absence of non-observed samples across multiple views, the obtained prototypes of clusters might be unaligned and biased, leading to incorrect fusion. To address the above issues, we propose a Cross-view Partial Sample and Prototype Alignment Network (CPSPAN) for Deep Incomplete Multi-view Clustering. Firstly, unlike existing contrastive-based methods, we adopt pair-observed data alignment as 'proxy supervised signals' to guide instance-to-instance correspondence construction among views. Then, regarding of the shifted prototypes in IMVC, we further propose a prototype alignment module to achieve incomplete distribution calibration across views. Extensive experimental results showcase the effectiveness of our proposed modules, attaining noteworthy performance improvements when compared to existing IMVC competitors on benchmark datasets.
summary: The success of existing multi-view clustering relies on the assumption of sample integrity across multiple views. However, in real-world scenarios, samples of multi-view are partially available due to data corruption or sensor failure, which leads to incomplete multi-view clustering study (IMVC). Although several attempts have been proposed to address IMVC, they suffer from the following drawbacks: i) Existing methods mainly adopt cross-view contrastive learning forcing the representations of each sample across views to be exactly the same, which might ignore view discrepancy and flexibility in representations; ii) Due to the absence of non-observed samples across multiple views, the obtained prototypes of clusters might be unaligned and biased, leading to incorrect fusion. To address the above issues, we propose a Cross-view Partial Sample and Prototype Alignment Network (CPSPAN) for Deep Incomplete Multi-view Clustering. Firstly, unlike existing contrastive-based methods, we adopt pair-observed data alignment as 'proxy supervised signals' to guide instance-to-instance correspondence construction among views. Then, regarding of the shifted prototypes in IMVC, we further propose a prototype alignment module to achieve incomplete distribution calibration across views. Extensive experimental results showcase the effectiveness of our proposed modules, attaining noteworthy performance improvements when compared to existing IMVC competitors on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有多视图聚类的成功依赖于跨多个视图的样本完整性的假设。然而，在现实场景中，由于数据损坏或传感器故障，多视图样本部分可用，这导致不完整的多视图聚类研究（IMVC）。尽管已经提出了几种解决IMVC的尝试，但它们都存在以下缺点：i）现有方法主要采用跨视图对比学习，强制跨视图的每个样本的表示完全相同，这可能会忽略视图差异和表示的灵活性； ii）由于缺乏跨多个视图的未观察到的样本，所获得的簇原型可能是未对齐和有偏差的，从而导致不正确的融合。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于深度不完整多视图聚类的跨视图部分样本和原型对齐网络（CPSPAN）。首先，与现有的基于对比的方法不同，我们采用成对观察的数据对齐作为“代理监督信号”来指导视图之间实例到实例的对应构建。然后，针对 IMVC 中移动的原型，我们进一步提出了原型对齐模块来实现跨视图的不完全分布校准。大量的实验结果展示了我们提出的模块的有效性，与基准数据集上现有的 IMVC 竞争对手相比，取得了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CPSPAN的深度不完全多视图聚类方法，用于处理因数据损坏或传感器故障导致的多视图样本不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的多视图聚类方法假设样本在多个视图中是完整的，但在实际场景中，多视图样本可能因数据损坏或传感器故障而部分缺失，导致不完全多视图聚类研究（IMVC）的挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为CPSPAN的网络，采用成对观测数据对齐作为'代理监督信号'，以指导视图间的实例对应关系构建，并提出原型对齐模块以实现视图间的不完整分布校准。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的模块在与现有IMVC方法的比较中取得了显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CPSPAN方法通过引入成对观测数据对齐和原型对齐模块，有效解决了IMVC中的视图差异和原型偏差问题，显著提升了聚类性能。

authors_text: Tong Zhao,Andrea Tagliabue,Jonathan P. How
title: Efficient Deep Learning of Robust, Adaptive Policies using Tube MPC-Guided Data Augmentation
title_zh: 使用 Tube MPC 引导的数据增强对稳健、自适应策略进行高效深度学习
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. IROS23 final version, with page numbers added
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures. IROS23 final version, with page numbers added
abstract: The deployment of agile autonomous systems in challenging, unstructured environments requires adaptation capabilities and robustness to uncertainties. Existing robust and adaptive controllers, such as those based on model predictive control (MPC), can achieve impressive performance at the cost of heavy online onboard computations. Strategies that efficiently learn robust and onboard-deployable policies from MPC have emerged, but they still lack fundamental adaptation capabilities. In this work, we extend an existing efficient Imitation Learning (IL) algorithm for robust policy learning from MPC with the ability to learn policies that adapt to challenging model/environment uncertainties. The key idea of our approach consists in modifying the IL procedure by conditioning the policy on a learned lower-dimensional model/environment representation that can be efficiently estimated online. We tailor our approach to the task of learning an adaptive position and attitude control policy to track trajectories under challenging disturbances on a multirotor. Evaluations in simulation show that a high-quality adaptive policy can be obtained in about $1.3$ hours. We additionally empirically demonstrate rapid adaptation to in- and out-of-training-distribution uncertainties, achieving a $6.1$ cm average position error under wind disturbances that correspond to about $50\%$ of the weight of the robot, and that are $36\%$ larger than the maximum wind seen during training.
summary: The deployment of agile autonomous systems in challenging, unstructured environments requires adaptation capabilities and robustness to uncertainties. Existing robust and adaptive controllers, such as those based on model predictive control (MPC), can achieve impressive performance at the cost of heavy online onboard computations. Strategies that efficiently learn robust and onboard-deployable policies from MPC have emerged, but they still lack fundamental adaptation capabilities. In this work, we extend an existing efficient Imitation Learning (IL) algorithm for robust policy learning from MPC with the ability to learn policies that adapt to challenging model/environment uncertainties. The key idea of our approach consists in modifying the IL procedure by conditioning the policy on a learned lower-dimensional model/environment representation that can be efficiently estimated online. We tailor our approach to the task of learning an adaptive position and attitude control policy to track trajectories under challenging disturbances on a multirotor. Evaluations in simulation show that a high-quality adaptive policy can be obtained in about $1.3$ hours. We additionally empirically demonstrate rapid adaptation to in- and out-of-training-distribution uncertainties, achieving a $6.1$ cm average position error under wind disturbances that correspond to about $50\%$ of the weight of the robot, and that are $36\%$ larger than the maximum wind seen during training.
abstract_zh: 在充满挑战的非结构化环境中部署敏捷自主系统需要适应能力和对不确定性的鲁棒性。现有的鲁棒自适应控制器，例如基于模型预测控制（MPC）的控制器，可以以大量在线板载计算为代价实现令人印象深刻的性能。有效地从 MPC 学习强大且可部署的策略的策略已经出现，但它们仍然缺乏基本的适应能力。在这项工作中，我们扩展了现有的高效模仿学习 (IL) 算法，用于从 MPC 进行稳健的策略学习，并能够学习适应具有挑战性的模型/环境不确定性的策略。我们方法的关键思想在于通过将策略调整到可以有效在线估计的学习的低维模型/环境表示来修改 IL 过程。我们根据学习自适应位置和姿态控制策略的任务定制我们的方法，以跟踪多旋翼飞行器上具有挑战性的干扰下的轨迹。模拟评估表明，在大约 1.3 美元小时内可以获得高质量的自适应策略。我们还根据经验证明了对训练内外分布不确定性的快速适应，在风扰动下实现了 $6.1$ cm 的平均位置误差，相当于机器人重量的约 $50\%$，比训练期间看到的最大风大 $36\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模仿学习与数据增强的方法，通过学习低维环境表示来训练鲁棒自适应策略，提升多旋翼飞行器在复杂扰动下的轨迹跟踪能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MPC的控制器计算开销大，而基于学习的策略缺乏对模型/环境不确定性的基本适应能力，需开发高效且具备自适应性的控制策略。
AI.method: 改进模仿学习算法，使策略依赖于在线可估计的低维模型表示，并针对多旋翼控制任务设计数据增强机制，结合管状MPC框架生成训练数据。
AI.result: 仿真显示1.3小时内可训练出高质量策略，在50%机体重量级风扰动下实现6.1cm平均位置误差，适应超出训练分布36%的风扰动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合模型先验与数据驱动优势，在保证计算效率的同时实现对未知扰动的快速适应，为实际自主系统部署提供可行方案。

We additionally empirically demonstrate rapid adaptation to in- and out-of-training-distribution uncertainties, achieving a $6.1$ cm average position error under wind disturbances that correspond to about $50\%$ of the weight of the robot, and that are $36\%$ larger than the maximum wind seen during training. 在充满挑战的非结构化环境中部署敏捷自主系统需要适应能力和对不确定性的鲁棒性。现有的鲁棒自适应控制器，例如基于模型预测控制（MPC）的控制器，可以以大量在线板载计算为代价实现令人印象深刻的性能。有效地从 MPC 学习强大且可部署的策略的策略已经出现，但它们仍然缺乏基本的适应能力。在这项工作中，我们扩展了现有的高效模仿学习 (IL) 算法，用于从 MPC 进行稳健的策略学习，并能够学习适应具有挑战性的模型/环境不确定性的策略。我们方法的关键思想在于通过将策略调整到可以有效在线估计的学习的低维模型/环境表示来修改 IL 过程。我们根据学习自适应位置和姿态控制策略的任务定制我们的方法，以跟踪多旋翼飞行器上具有挑战性的干扰下的轨迹。模拟评估表明，在大约 1.3 美元小时内可以获得高质量的自适应策略。我们还根据经验证明了对训练内外分布不确定性的快速适应，在风扰动下实现了 $6.1$ cm 的平均位置误差，相当于机器人重量的约 $50\%$，比训练期间看到的最大风大 $36\%$。 本文提出一种结合模仿学习与数据增强的方法，通过学习低维环境表示来训练鲁棒自适应策略，提升多旋翼飞行器在复杂扰动下的轨迹跟踪能力。 Tong Zhao,Andrea Tagliabue,Jonathan P. How cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Peijie Dong,Lujun Li,Zimian Wei
title: DisWOT: Student Architecture Search for Distillation WithOut Training
title_zh: DisWOT：无需培训的学生架构搜索蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an effective training strategy to improve the lightweight student models under the guidance of cumbersome teachers. However, the large architecture difference across the teacher-student pairs limits the distillation gains. In contrast to previous adaptive distillation methods to reduce the teacher-student gap, we explore a novel training-free framework to search for the best student architectures for a given teacher. Our work first empirically show that the optimal model under vanilla training cannot be the winner in distillation. Secondly, we find that the similarity of feature semantics and sample relations between random-initialized teacher-student networks have good correlations with final distillation performances. Thus, we efficiently measure similarity matrixs conditioned on the semantic activation maps to select the optimal student via an evolutionary algorithm without any training. In this way, our student architecture search for Distillation WithOut Training (DisWOT) significantly improves the performance of the model in the distillation stage with at least 180$\times$ training acceleration. Additionally, we extend similarity metrics in DisWOT as new distillers and KD-based zero-proxies. Our experiments on CIFAR, ImageNet and NAS-Bench-201 demonstrate that our technique achieves state-of-the-art results on different search spaces. Our project and code are available at https://lilujunai.github.io/DisWOT-CVPR2023/.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an effective training strategy to improve the lightweight student models under the guidance of cumbersome teachers. However, the large architecture difference across the teacher-student pairs limits the distillation gains. In contrast to previous adaptive distillation methods to reduce the teacher-student gap, we explore a novel training-free framework to search for the best student architectures for a given teacher. Our work first empirically show that the optimal model under vanilla training cannot be the winner in distillation. Secondly, we find that the similarity of feature semantics and sample relations between random-initialized teacher-student networks have good correlations with final distillation performances. Thus, we efficiently measure similarity matrixs conditioned on the semantic activation maps to select the optimal student via an evolutionary algorithm without any training. In this way, our student architecture search for Distillation WithOut Training (DisWOT) significantly improves the performance of the model in the distillation stage with at least 180$\times$ training acceleration. Additionally, we extend similarity metrics in DisWOT as new distillers and KD-based zero-proxies. Our experiments on CIFAR, ImageNet and NAS-Bench-201 demonstrate that our technique achieves state-of-the-art results on different search spaces. Our project and code are available at https://lilujunai.github.io/DisWOT-CVPR2023/.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是在繁琐的教师指导下改进轻量级学生模型的有效训练策略。然而，师生对之间巨大的架构差异限制了蒸馏增益。与之前缩小师生差距的自适应蒸馏方法相比，我们探索了一种新颖的免训练框架来为给定教师寻找最佳的学生架构。我们的工作首先凭经验表明，普通训练下的最优模型不可能成为蒸馏的赢家。其次，我们发现随机初始化的师生网络之间的特征语义和样本关系的相似性与最终的蒸馏性能具有良好的相关性。因此，我们可以有效地测量以语义激活图为条件的相似度矩阵，以通过进化算法选择最佳学生，而无需任何训练。通过这种方式，我们的学生架构搜索 Distillation Without Training (DisWOT) 显着提高了模型在蒸馏阶段的性能，并实现了至少 180$\times$ 的训练加速。此外，我们将 DisWOT 中的相似性度量扩展为新的蒸馏器和基于 KD 的零代理。我们在 CIFAR、ImageNet 和 NAS-Bench-201 上的实验表明，我们的技术在不同的搜索空间上实现了最先进的结果。我们的项目和代码可在 https://lilujunai.github.io/DisWOT-CVPR2023/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的蒸馏学生架构搜索框架DisWOT，通过分析教师-学生网络的特征语义相似性和样本关系，直接搜索最优学生架构。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏因教师-学生架构差异大导致效果受限，而现有自适应蒸馏方法仍需训练过程。作者发现直接训练的最优模型未必适合蒸馏，需重新设计架构搜索策略。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生网络的语义激活图计算相似性矩阵，利用进化算法直接搜索最优学生架构，无需训练过程，并将相似性度量扩展为新型蒸馏器和零样本代理。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet和NAS-Bench-201上取得SOTA结果，训练加速达180倍，验证了方法的有效性和高效性。
AI.conclusion: DisWOT通过解耦架构搜索与训练过程，为知识蒸馏提供了高效且性能优越的新范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Niluthpol Chowdhury Mithun,Kshitij Minhas,Han-Pang Chiu,Taragay Oskiper,Mikhail Sizintsev,Supun Samarasekera,Rakesh Kumar
title: Cross-View Visual Geo-Localization for Outdoor Augmented Reality
title_zh: 户外增强现实的跨视角视觉地理定位
abstract: Precise estimation of global orientation and location is critical to ensure a compelling outdoor Augmented Reality (AR) experience. We address the problem of geo-pose estimation by cross-view matching of query ground images to a geo-referenced aerial satellite image database. Recently, neural network-based methods have shown state-of-the-art performance in cross-view matching. However, most of the prior works focus only on location estimation, ignoring orientation, which cannot meet the requirements in outdoor AR applications. We propose a new transformer neural network-based model and a modified triplet ranking loss for joint location and orientation estimation. Experiments on several benchmark cross-view geo-localization datasets show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance. Furthermore, we present an approach to extend the single image query-based geo-localization approach by utilizing temporal information from a navigation pipeline for robust continuous geo-localization. Experimentation on several large-scale real-world video sequences demonstrates that our approach enables high-precision and stable AR insertion.
summary: Precise estimation of global orientation and location is critical to ensure a compelling outdoor Augmented Reality (AR) experience. We address the problem of geo-pose estimation by cross-view matching of query ground images to a geo-referenced aerial satellite image database. Recently, neural network-based methods have shown state-of-the-art performance in cross-view matching. However, most of the prior works focus only on location estimation, ignoring orientation, which cannot meet the requirements in outdoor AR applications. We propose a new transformer neural network-based model and a modified triplet ranking loss for joint location and orientation estimation. Experiments on several benchmark cross-view geo-localization datasets show that our model achieves state-of-the-art performance. Furthermore, we present an approach to extend the single image query-based geo-localization approach by utilizing temporal information from a navigation pipeline for robust continuous geo-localization. Experimentation on several large-scale real-world video sequences demonstrates that our approach enables high-precision and stable AR insertion.
abstract_zh: 精确估计全球方向和位置对于确保引人注目的户外增强现实 (AR) 体验至关重要。我们通过将查询地面图像与地理参考航空卫星图像数据库进行交叉视图匹配来解决地理姿态估计问题。最近，基于神经网络的方法在跨视图匹配方面表现出了最先进的性能。然而，现有的工作大多只关注位置估计，忽略方向，无法满足户外AR应用的要求。我们提出了一种新的基于变压器神经网络的模型和改进的三元组排名损失，用于联合位置和方向估计。对几个基准跨视图地理定位数据集的实验表明，我们的模型实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们提出了一种方法，通过利用导航管道中的时间信息来扩展基于单图像查询的地理定位方法，以实现鲁棒的连续地理定位。对几个大规模现实世界视频序列的实验表明，我们的方法能够实现高精度和稳定的 AR 插入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨视角视觉地理定位方法，用于提升户外增强现实（AR）中的全局方向与位置估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注位置估计而忽略方向，无法满足户外AR对六自由度姿态估计的需求。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的神经网络模型与改进三元组排序损失函数，结合时序信息实现联合定位与方向估计。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和真实视频序列测试中达到SOTA性能，实现高精度稳定的AR内容插入。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了户外AR场景下的跨视角地理定位难题，为实时高精度AR应用提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Guanghui Lan,Alexander Shapiro
title: Numerical Methods for Convex Multistage Stochastic Optimization
title_zh: 凸多级随机优化的数值方法
abstract: Optimization problems involving sequential decisions in a stochastic environment were studied in Stochastic Programming (SP), Stochastic Optimal Control (SOC) and Markov Decision Processes (MDP). In this paper we mainly concentrate on SP and SOC modelling approaches. In these frameworks there are natural situations when the considered problems are convex. Classical approach to sequential optimization is based on dynamic programming. It has the problem of the so-called ``Curse of Dimensionality", in that its computational complexity increases exponentially with increase of dimension of state variables. Recent progress in solving convex multistage stochastic problems is based on cutting planes approximations of the cost-to-go (value) functions of dynamic programming equations. Cutting planes type algorithms in dynamical settings is one of the main topics of this paper. We also discuss Stochastic Approximation type methods applied to multistage stochastic optimization problems. From the computational complexity point of view, these two types of methods seem to be complimentary to each other. Cutting plane type methods can handle multistage problems with a large number of stages, but a relatively smaller number of state (decision) variables. On the other hand, stochastic approximation type methods can only deal with a small number of stages, but a large number of decision variables.
summary: Optimization problems involving sequential decisions in a stochastic environment were studied in Stochastic Programming (SP), Stochastic Optimal Control (SOC) and Markov Decision Processes (MDP). In this paper we mainly concentrate on SP and SOC modelling approaches. In these frameworks there are natural situations when the considered problems are convex. Classical approach to sequential optimization is based on dynamic programming. It has the problem of the so-called ``Curse of Dimensionality", in that its computational complexity increases exponentially with increase of dimension of state variables. Recent progress in solving convex multistage stochastic problems is based on cutting planes approximations of the cost-to-go (value) functions of dynamic programming equations. Cutting planes type algorithms in dynamical settings is one of the main topics of this paper. We also discuss Stochastic Approximation type methods applied to multistage stochastic optimization problems. From the computational complexity point of view, these two types of methods seem to be complimentary to each other. Cutting plane type methods can handle multistage problems with a large number of stages, but a relatively smaller number of state (decision) variables. On the other hand, stochastic approximation type methods can only deal with a small number of stages, but a large number of decision variables.
abstract_zh: 在随机规划（SP）、随机最优控制（SOC）和马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中研究了涉及随机环境中顺序决策的优化问题。在本文中，我们主要关注 SP 和 SOC 建模方法。在这些框架中，自然会出现所考虑的问题是凸的情况。顺序优化的经典方法基于动态规划。它存在所谓的“维数诅咒”问题，即其计算复杂度随着状态变量维数的增加而呈指数级增加。解决凸多级随机问题的最新进展是基于动态规划方程的成本函数（值）的割平面近似。动态设置中的割平面类型算法是本文的主要主题之一。我们还讨论了应用于多阶段随机优化问题的随机逼近类型方法。从计算复杂度的角度来看，这两类方法似乎是互补的。割平面型方法可以处理阶段数较多但状态（决策）变量数量相对较少的多阶段问题，而随机逼近型方法只能处理阶段数较少但决策变量较多的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究凸型多阶段随机优化问题的数值方法，重点探讨基于动态规划的切割平面算法和随机逼近方法。
AI.motivation: 动态规划方法在处理多阶段随机优化问题时面临维度灾难，传统方法难以高效求解大规模问题，需寻找替代算法。
AI.method: 提出切割平面近似动态规划成本函数的方法，并分析随机逼近方法在多阶段问题中的适用性，比较两者在计算复杂度上的互补性。
AI.result: 切割平面方法适用于阶段数多但决策变量少的问题，随机逼近方法则适合阶段数少但决策变量多的场景，两者形成互补。
AI.conclusion: 结合切割平面与随机逼近方法可有效解决不同规模的凸型多阶段随机优化问题，为实际应用提供算法选择依据。

search_text: Numerical Methods for Convex Multistage Stochastic Optimization 凸多级随机优化的数值方法 Optimization problems involving sequential decisions in a stochastic environment were studied in Stochastic Programming (SP), Stochastic Optimal Control (SOC) and Markov Decision Processes (MDP). In this paper we mainly concentrate on SP and SOC modelling approaches. In these frameworks there are natural situations when the considered problems are convex. Classical approach to sequential optimization is based on dynamic programming. It has the problem of the so-called ``Curse of Dimensionality", in that its computational complexity increases exponentially with increase of dimension of state variables. Recent progress in solving convex multistage stochastic problems is based on cutting planes approximations of the cost-to-go (value) functions of dynamic programming equations. Cutting planes type algorithms in dynamical settings is one of the main topics of this paper. We also discuss Stochastic Approximation type methods applied to multistage stochastic optimization problems. From the computational complexity point of view, these two types of methods seem to be complimentary to each other. Cutting plane type methods can handle multistage problems with a large number of stages, but a relatively smaller number of state (decision) variables. On the other hand, stochastic approximation type methods can only deal with a small number of stages, but a large number of decision variables. 在随机规划（SP）、随机最优控制（SOC）和马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中研究了涉及随机环境中顺序决策的优化问题。在本文中，我们主要关注 SP 和 SOC 建模方法。在这些框架中，自然会出现所考虑的问题是凸的情况。顺序优化的经典方法基于动态规划。它存在所谓的“维数诅咒”问题，即其计算复杂度随着状态变量维数的增加而呈指数级增加。解决凸多级随机问题的最新进展是基于动态规划方程的成本函数（值）的割平面近似。动态设置中的割平面类型算法是本文的主要主题之一。我们还讨论了应用于多阶段随机优化问题的随机逼近类型方法。从计算复杂度的角度来看，这两类方法似乎是互补的。割平面型方法可以处理阶段数较多但状态（决策）变量数量相对较少的多阶段问题，而随机逼近型方法只能处理阶段数较少但决策变量较多的问题。 本文主要研究凸型多阶段随机优化问题的数值方法，重点探讨基于动态规划的切割平面算法和随机逼近方法。 Guanghui Lan,Alexander Shapiro math.OC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Qingzhong Chen,Shilun Cai,Crystal Cai,Zefang Yu,Dahong Qian,Suncheng Xiang
title: Colo-SCRL: Self-Supervised Contrastive Representation Learning for Colonoscopic Video Retrieval
title_zh: Colo-SCRL：结肠镜视频检索的自监督对比表征学习
abstract: Colonoscopic video retrieval, which is a critical part of polyp treatment, has great clinical significance for the prevention and treatment of colorectal cancer. However, retrieval models trained on action recognition datasets usually produce unsatisfactory retrieval results on colonoscopic datasets due to the large domain gap between them. To seek a solution to this problem, we construct a large-scale colonoscopic dataset named Colo-Pair for medical practice. Based on this dataset, a simple yet effective training method called Colo-SCRL is proposed for more robust representation learning. It aims to refine general knowledge from colonoscopies through masked autoencoder-based reconstruction and momentum contrast to improve retrieval performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to employ the contrastive learning paradigm for medical video retrieval. Empirical results show that our method significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in the colonoscopic video retrieval task.
summary: Colonoscopic video retrieval, which is a critical part of polyp treatment, has great clinical significance for the prevention and treatment of colorectal cancer. However, retrieval models trained on action recognition datasets usually produce unsatisfactory retrieval results on colonoscopic datasets due to the large domain gap between them. To seek a solution to this problem, we construct a large-scale colonoscopic dataset named Colo-Pair for medical practice. Based on this dataset, a simple yet effective training method called Colo-SCRL is proposed for more robust representation learning. It aims to refine general knowledge from colonoscopies through masked autoencoder-based reconstruction and momentum contrast to improve retrieval performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to employ the contrastive learning paradigm for medical video retrieval. Empirical results show that our method significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in the colonoscopic video retrieval task.
abstract_zh: 结肠镜视频检索是息肉治疗的关键环节，对于结直肠癌的防治具有重要的临床意义。然而，由于动作识别数据集上训练的检索模型在结肠镜数据集上训练的检索结果通常不令人满意，因为它们之间存在较大的域差距。为了寻求解决这个问题的方法，我们构建了一个名为 Colo-Pair 的大规模结肠镜数据集，用于医疗实践。基于该数据集，提出了一种简单而有效的训练方法，称为 Colo-SCRL，以实现更鲁棒的表示学习。它的目的是通过基于掩码自动编码器的重建和动量对比来提炼结肠镜检查的一般知识，以提高检索性能。据我们所知，这是首次尝试采用对比学习范式进行医学视频检索。实证结果表明，我们的方法在结肠镜视频检索任务中显着优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Colo-SCRL方法，通过自监督对比学习提升结肠镜视频检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型因动作识别数据集与结肠镜数据域差距大，导致结肠镜视频检索效果不佳，需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建结肠镜数据集Colo-Pair，采用基于掩码自编码器的重建与动量对比学习，实现更鲁棒的表示学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在结肠镜视频检索任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Colo-SCRL是首个将对比学习应用于医疗视频检索的尝试，有效缩小了域差距并提升了检索性能。

authors_text: Seongyeon Park,Myungseo Song,Bohyung Kim,Tae-Hyun Oh
title: Unsupervised Pre-Training For Data-Efficient Text-to-Speech On Low Resource Languages
title_zh: 针对低资源语言的数据高效文本到语音的无监督预训练
abstract: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) models can synthesize natural human speech when trained on large amounts of transcribed speech. However, collecting such large-scale transcribed data is expensive. This paper proposes an unsupervised pre-training method for a sequence-to-sequence TTS model by leveraging large untranscribed speech data. With our pre-training, we can remarkably reduce the amount of paired transcribed data required to train the model for the target downstream TTS task. The main idea is to pre-train the model to reconstruct de-warped mel-spectrograms from warped ones, which may allow the model to learn proper temporal assignment relation between input and output sequences. In addition, we propose a data augmentation method that further improves the data efficiency in fine-tuning. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in low-resource language scenarios, achieving outstanding performance compared to competing methods. The code and audio samples are available at: https://github.com/cnaigithub/SpeechDewarping
summary: Neural text-to-speech (TTS) models can synthesize natural human speech when trained on large amounts of transcribed speech. However, collecting such large-scale transcribed data is expensive. This paper proposes an unsupervised pre-training method for a sequence-to-sequence TTS model by leveraging large untranscribed speech data. With our pre-training, we can remarkably reduce the amount of paired transcribed data required to train the model for the target downstream TTS task. The main idea is to pre-train the model to reconstruct de-warped mel-spectrograms from warped ones, which may allow the model to learn proper temporal assignment relation between input and output sequences. In addition, we propose a data augmentation method that further improves the data efficiency in fine-tuning. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in low-resource language scenarios, achieving outstanding performance compared to competing methods. The code and audio samples are available at: https://github.com/cnaigithub/SpeechDewarping
abstract_zh: 当接受大量转录语音训练时，神经文本转语音 (TTS) 模型可以合成自然的人类语音。然而，收集如此大规模的转录数据是昂贵的。本文提出了一种利用大量未转录语音数据的序列到序列 TTS 模型的无监督预训练方法。通过预训练，我们可以显着减少为目标下游 TTS 任务训练模型所需的配对转录数据量。主要思想是预训练模型以从扭曲的梅尔谱图重建去扭曲的梅尔谱图，这可以使模型学习输入和输出序列之间正确的时间分配关系。此外，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，进一步提高了微调中的数据效率。我们凭经验证明了我们提出的方法在资源匮乏的语言场景中的有效性，与竞争方法相比，取得了出色的性能。代码和音频示例可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/cnaigithub/SpeechDewarping

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督预训练方法，用于在低资源语言上实现数据高效的文本到语音合成。
AI.motivation: 神经文本到语音模型需要大量转录数据，但收集成本高昂，尤其在低资源语言场景下难以获取足够数据。
AI.method: 通过无监督预训练让模型重建去扭曲的mel频谱图，学习输入输出序列的时序关系，并结合数据增强提升微调效率。
AI.result: 在低资源语言实验中，该方法显著优于现有技术，且代码与音频样本已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该预训练方法有效降低低资源语言TTS对标注数据的依赖，提升模型性能。

search_text: Unsupervised Pre-Training For Data-Efficient Text-to-Speech On Low Resource Languages 针对低资源语言的数据高效文本到语音的无监督预训练 Neural text-to-speech (TTS) models can synthesize natural human speech when trained on large amounts of transcribed speech. However, collecting such large-scale transcribed data is expensive. This paper proposes an unsupervised pre-training method for a sequence-to-sequence TTS model by leveraging large untranscribed speech data. With our pre-training, we can remarkably reduce the amount of paired transcribed data required to train the model for the target downstream TTS task. The main idea is to pre-train the model to reconstruct de-warped mel-spectrograms from warped ones, which may allow the model to learn proper temporal assignment relation between input and output sequences. In addition, we propose a data augmentation method that further improves the data efficiency in fine-tuning. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method in low-resource language scenarios, achieving outstanding performance compared to competing methods. The code and audio samples are available at: https://github.com/cnaigithub/SpeechDewarping 当接受大量转录语音训练时，神经文本转语音 (TTS) 模型可以合成自然的人类语音。然而，收集如此大规模的转录数据是昂贵的。本文提出了一种利用大量未转录语音数据的序列到序列 TTS 模型的无监督预训练方法。通过预训练，我们可以显着减少为目标下游 TTS 任务训练模型所需的配对转录数据量。主要思想是预训练模型以从扭曲的梅尔谱图重建去扭曲的梅尔谱图，这可以使模型学习输入和输出序列之间正确的时间分配关系。此外，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，进一步提高了微调中的数据效率。我们凭经验证明了我们提出的方法在资源匮乏的语言场景中的有效性，与竞争方法相比，取得了出色的性能。代码和音频示例可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/cnaigithub/SpeechDewarping 本文提出一种无监督预训练方法，用于在低资源语言上实现数据高效的文本到语音合成。 Seongyeon Park,Myungseo Song,Bohyung Kim,Tae-Hyun Oh eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Phillip Guan,Eric Penner,Joel Hegland,Benjamin Letham,Douglas Lanman
title: Perceptual Requirements for World-Locked Rendering in AR and VR
title_zh: AR 和 VR 中世界锁定渲染的感知要求
abstract: Stereoscopic, head-tracked display systems can show users realistic, world-locked virtual objects and environments. However, discrepancies between the rendering pipeline and physical viewing conditions can lead to perceived instability in the rendered content resulting in reduced immersion and, potentially, visually-induced motion sickness. Precise requirements to achieve perceptually stable world-locked rendering (WLR) are unknown due to the challenge of constructing a wide field of view, distortion-free display with highly accurate head and eye tracking. We present a system capable of rendering virtual objects over real-world references without perceivable drift under such constraints. This platform is used to study acceptable errors in render camera position for WLR in augmented and virtual reality scenarios, where we find an order of magnitude difference in perceptual sensitivity. We conclude with an analytic model which examines changes to apparent depth and visual direction in response to camera displacement errors.
summary: Stereoscopic, head-tracked display systems can show users realistic, world-locked virtual objects and environments. However, discrepancies between the rendering pipeline and physical viewing conditions can lead to perceived instability in the rendered content resulting in reduced immersion and, potentially, visually-induced motion sickness. Precise requirements to achieve perceptually stable world-locked rendering (WLR) are unknown due to the challenge of constructing a wide field of view, distortion-free display with highly accurate head and eye tracking. We present a system capable of rendering virtual objects over real-world references without perceivable drift under such constraints. This platform is used to study acceptable errors in render camera position for WLR in augmented and virtual reality scenarios, where we find an order of magnitude difference in perceptual sensitivity. We conclude with an analytic model which examines changes to apparent depth and visual direction in response to camera displacement errors.
abstract_zh: 立体头部跟踪显示系统可以向用户展示真实的、世界锁定的虚拟对象和环境。然而，渲染管道和物理观看条件之间的差异可能会导致渲染内容的不稳定性，从而导致沉浸感降低，并可能导致视觉诱发的晕动病。由于构建具有高精度头部和眼睛跟踪的宽视场、无失真显示器的挑战，实现感知稳定的世界锁定渲染 (WLR) 的精确要求尚不清楚。我们提出了一个系统，能够在现实世界的参考上渲染虚拟对象，而在这种限制下不会出现可感知的漂移。该平台用于研究增强现实和虚拟现实场景中 WLR 渲染相机位置的可接受误差，我们发现感知灵敏度存在数量级差异。我们得出一个分析模型，该模型检查视深度和视觉方向随相机位移误差的变化。

AI.tldr: 研究AR和VR中实现感知稳定的世界锁定渲染（WLR）所需的感知要求，分析相机位置误差对视觉感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有立体头显系统因渲染与物理条件的差异导致内容不稳定，可能引发沉浸感下降或视觉眩晕，但精确的WLR标准因技术限制尚未明确。
AI.method: 开发无感知漂移的渲染系统，通过实验量化AR/VR场景中相机位置误差的可接受范围，并建立数学模型分析位移误差对深度和视角的影响。
AI.result: 发现AR与VR场景中人类对相机位置误差的感知敏感度存在数量级差异，为系统设计提供关键误差阈值参考。
AI.conclusion: 提出基于视觉感知的WLR误差模型，为AR/VR系统优化渲染精度与用户体验提供理论依据。

authors_text: Pittawat Taveekitworachai,Febri Abdullah,Mury F. Dewantoro,Ruck Thawonmas,Julian Togelius,Jochen Renz
title: ChatGPT4PCG Competition: Character-like Level Generation for Science Birds
title_zh: ChatGPT4PCG 竞赛：科学鸟类的类角色关卡生成
comment: This paper accepted for presentation at IEEE CoG 2023 is made available for participants of ChatGPT4PCG Competition (https://chatgpt4pcg.github.io/) and readers interested in relevant areas. In this PDF version, the affiliation symbol of Julian Togelius has been revised
comments: This paper accepted for presentation at IEEE CoG 2023 is made available for participants of ChatGPT4PCG Competition (https://chatgpt4pcg.github.io/) and readers interested in relevant areas. In this PDF version, the affiliation symbol of Julian Togelius has been revised
abstract: This paper presents the first ChatGPT4PCG Competition at the 2023 IEEE Conference on Games. The objective of this competition is for participants to create effective prompts for ChatGPT--enabling it to generate Science Birds levels with high stability and character-like qualities--fully using their creativity as well as prompt engineering skills. ChatGPT is a conversational agent developed by OpenAI. Science Birds is selected as the competition platform because designing an Angry Birds-like level is not a trivial task due to the in-game gravity; the quality of the levels is determined by their stability. To lower the entry barrier to the competition, we limit the task to the generation of capitalized English alphabetical characters. We also allow only a single prompt to be used for generating all the characters. Here, the quality of the generated levels is determined by their stability and similarity to the given characters. A sample prompt is provided to participants for their reference. An experiment is conducted to determine the effectiveness of several modified versions of this sample prompt on level stability and similarity by testing them on several characters. To the best of our knowledge, we believe that ChatGPT4PCG is the first competition of its kind and hope to inspire enthusiasm for prompt engineering in procedural content generation.
summary: This paper presents the first ChatGPT4PCG Competition at the 2023 IEEE Conference on Games. The objective of this competition is for participants to create effective prompts for ChatGPT--enabling it to generate Science Birds levels with high stability and character-like qualities--fully using their creativity as well as prompt engineering skills. ChatGPT is a conversational agent developed by OpenAI. Science Birds is selected as the competition platform because designing an Angry Birds-like level is not a trivial task due to the in-game gravity; the quality of the levels is determined by their stability. To lower the entry barrier to the competition, we limit the task to the generation of capitalized English alphabetical characters. We also allow only a single prompt to be used for generating all the characters. Here, the quality of the generated levels is determined by their stability and similarity to the given characters. A sample prompt is provided to participants for their reference. An experiment is conducted to determine the effectiveness of several modified versions of this sample prompt on level stability and similarity by testing them on several characters. To the best of our knowledge, we believe that ChatGPT4PCG is the first competition of its kind and hope to inspire enthusiasm for prompt engineering in procedural content generation.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 2023 年 IEEE 游戏大会上的首届 ChatGPT4PCG 竞赛。本次比赛的目的是让参赛者充分发挥自己的创造力和提示工程技能，为 ChatGPT 创建有效的提示，使其能够生成具有高稳定性和角色品质的 Science Birds 关卡。 ChatGPT 是 OpenAI 开发的对话代理。之所以选择《科学鸟》作为竞赛平台，是因为考虑到游戏中的重力，设计类似《愤怒的小鸟》的关卡并不是一件容易的事；关卡的质量取决于其稳定性。为了降低竞争的进入门槛，我们将任务限制为大写英文字母字符的生成。我们还允许仅使用单个提示来生成所有字符。在这里，生成的关卡的质量取决于它们的稳定性以及与给定字符的相似性。提供示例提示供参与者参考。进行了一项实验，通过在多个字符上进行测试来确定此示例提示的几个修改版本在级别稳定性和相似性方面的有效性。据我们所知，我们相信 ChatGPT4PCG 是此类竞赛中的第一个，并希望激发人们对程序内容生成中的快速工程的热情。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在2023年IEEE游戏会议上的首个ChatGPT4PCG竞赛，旨在通过设计有效提示词，使ChatGPT生成具有高稳定性和字符特征的Science Birds关卡。
AI.motivation: 由于Science Birds关卡设计受重力影响复杂且稳定性要求高，作者希望通过简化任务（仅生成大写字母）并限制单提示词使用，降低参赛门槛，推动提示工程在程序化内容生成（PCG）中的应用。
AI.method: 提供参考提示词并测试其修改版本在不同字符上的稳定性与相似性，要求参赛者通过创意和提示工程设计单次提示词生成所有字符关卡。
AI.result: 竞赛验证了修改后提示词对关卡稳定性与字符相似性的影响，确认了ChatGPT在PCG中的潜力，并成为同类竞赛的首次尝试。
AI.conclusion: 该竞赛为提示工程在PCG领域的应用提供了新方向，展示了通过优化提示词可有效生成符合要求的程序化内容。

authors_text: Canyu Zhang,Zhenyao Wu,Xinyi Wu,Ziyu Zhao,Song Wang
title: Few-Shot 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation via Stratified Class-Specific Attention Based Transformer Network
title_zh: 通过基于分层类特定注意的 Transformer 网络进行少样本 3D 点云语义分割
abstract: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation aims to group all points into different semantic categories, which benefits important applications such as point cloud scene reconstruction and understanding. Existing supervised point cloud semantic segmentation methods usually require large-scale annotated point clouds for training and cannot handle new categories. While a few-shot learning method was proposed recently to address these two problems, it suffers from high computational complexity caused by graph construction and inability to learn fine-grained relationships among points due to the use of pooling operations. In this paper, we further address these problems by developing a new multi-layer transformer network for few-shot point cloud semantic segmentation. In the proposed network, the query point cloud features are aggregated based on the class-specific support features in different scales. Without using pooling operations, our method makes full use of all pixel-level features from the support samples. By better leveraging the support features for few-shot learning, the proposed method achieves the new state-of-the-art performance, with 15\% less inference time, over existing few-shot 3D point cloud segmentation models on the S3DIS dataset and the ScanNet dataset.
summary: 3D point cloud semantic segmentation aims to group all points into different semantic categories, which benefits important applications such as point cloud scene reconstruction and understanding. Existing supervised point cloud semantic segmentation methods usually require large-scale annotated point clouds for training and cannot handle new categories. While a few-shot learning method was proposed recently to address these two problems, it suffers from high computational complexity caused by graph construction and inability to learn fine-grained relationships among points due to the use of pooling operations. In this paper, we further address these problems by developing a new multi-layer transformer network for few-shot point cloud semantic segmentation. In the proposed network, the query point cloud features are aggregated based on the class-specific support features in different scales. Without using pooling operations, our method makes full use of all pixel-level features from the support samples. By better leveraging the support features for few-shot learning, the proposed method achieves the new state-of-the-art performance, with 15\% less inference time, over existing few-shot 3D point cloud segmentation models on the S3DIS dataset and the ScanNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 3D点云语义分割旨在将所有点分为不同的语义类别，这有利于点云场景重建和理解等重要应用。现有的监督点云语义分割方法通常需要大规模注释点云进行训练，并且无法处理新类别。虽然最近提出了少样本学习方法来解决这两个问题，但它由于图构造而导致计算复杂度较高，并且由于使用池化操作而无法学习点之间的细粒度关系。在本文中，我们通过开发一种新的用于少样本点云语义分割的多层变压器网络来进一步解决这些问题。在所提出的网络中，查询点云特征是基于不同尺度的特定于类的支持特征来聚合的。在不使用池化操作的情况下，我们的方法充分利用了支持样本中的所有像素级特征。通过更好地利用少样本学习的支持功能，所提出的方法实现了新的最先进的性能，与 S3DIS 数据集和 ScanNet 数据集上现有的少样本 3D 点云分割模型相比，推理时间减少了 15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层类别特定注意力的Transformer网络，用于解决少样本3D点云语义分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督方法依赖大量标注数据且无法处理新类别，少样本方法因图构建和池化操作导致计算复杂度高且难以学习细粒度点关系。
AI.method: 设计多层Transformer网络，通过不同尺度的类别特定支持特征聚合查询点云特征，避免池化操作以充分利用支持样本的像素级特征。
AI.result: 在S3DIS和ScanNet数据集上达到新的最先进性能，推理时间比现有方法减少15%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用支持特征，显著提升了少样本3D点云分割的准确性和效率。

search_text: Few-Shot 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation via Stratified Class-Specific Attention Based Transformer Network 通过基于分层类特定注意的 Transformer 网络进行少样本 3D 点云语义分割 3D point cloud semantic segmentation aims to group all points into different semantic categories, which benefits important applications such as point cloud scene reconstruction and understanding. authors_text: Rashmi Ranjan Bhuyan,Adel Javanmard,Sungchul Kim,Gourab Mukherjee,Ryan A. Rossi,Tong Yu,Handong Zhao
title: Structured Dynamic Pricing: Optimal Regret in a Global Shrinkage Model
title_zh: 结构化动态定价：全局收缩模型中的最优遗憾
abstract: We consider dynamic pricing strategies in a streamed longitudinal data set-up where the objective is to maximize, over time, the cumulative profit across a large number of customer segments. We consider a dynamic model with the consumers' preferences as well as price sensitivity varying over time. Building on the well-known finding that consumers sharing similar characteristics act in similar ways, we consider a global shrinkage structure, which assumes that the consumers' preferences across the different segments can be well approximated by a spatial autoregressive (SAR) model. In such a streamed longitudinal set-up, we measure the performance of a dynamic pricing policy via regret, which is the expected revenue loss compared to a clairvoyant that knows the sequence of model parameters in advance. We propose a pricing policy based on penalized stochastic gradient descent (PSGD) and explicitly characterize its regret as functions of time, the temporal variability in the model parameters as well as the strength of the auto-correlation network structure spanning the varied customer segments. Our regret analysis results not only demonstrate asymptotic optimality of the proposed policy but also show that for policy planning it is essential to incorporate available structural information as policies based on unshrunken models are highly sub-optimal in the aforementioned set-up. We conduct simulation experiments across a wide range of regimes as well as real-world networks based studies and report encouraging performance for our proposed method.
summary: We consider dynamic pricing strategies in a streamed longitudinal data set-up where the objective is to maximize, over time, the cumulative profit across a large number of customer segments. We consider a dynamic model with the consumers' preferences as well as price sensitivity varying over time. Building on the well-known finding that consumers sharing similar characteristics act in similar ways, we consider a global shrinkage structure, which assumes that the consumers' preferences across the different segments can be well approximated by a spatial autoregressive (SAR) model. In such a streamed longitudinal set-up, we measure the performance of a dynamic pricing policy via regret, which is the expected revenue loss compared to a clairvoyant that knows the sequence of model parameters in advance. We propose a pricing policy based on penalized stochastic gradient descent (PSGD) and explicitly characterize its regret as functions of time, the temporal variability in the model parameters as well as the strength of the auto-correlation network structure spanning the varied customer segments. Our regret analysis results not only demonstrate asymptotic optimality of the proposed policy but also show that for policy planning it is essential to incorporate available structural information as policies based on unshrunken models are highly sub-optimal in the aforementioned set-up. We conduct simulation experiments across a wide range of regimes as well as real-world networks based studies and report encouraging performance for our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在流式纵向数据设置中采用动态定价策略，其目标是随着时间的推移最大化大量客户群的累积利润。我们考虑一个动态模型，其中消费者的偏好以及价格敏感性随时间变化。基于众所周知的发现，即具有相似特征的消费者以相似的方式行事，我们考虑了全局收缩结构，该结构假设不同细分市场的消费者偏好可以通过空间自回归（SAR）模型很好地近似。在这种流式纵向设置中，我们通过遗憾来衡量动态定价策略的性能，遗憾是与提前知道模型参数序列的洞察者相比的预期收入损失。我们提出了一种基于惩罚随机梯度下降（PSGD）的定价策略，并将其遗憾明确地描述为时间的函数、模型参数的时间变异性以及跨越不同客户群的自相关网络结构的强度。我们的遗憾分析结果不仅证明了拟议政策的渐近最优性，而且还表明，对于政策规划来说，纳入可用的结构信息至关重要，因为基于未缩小模型的政策在上述设置中是高度次优的。我们在各种制度以及基于现实世界网络的研究中进行了模拟实验，并报告了我们提出的方法的令人鼓舞的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在流式纵向数据设置下，如何通过动态定价策略最大化跨客户群体的累计利润，并提出基于全局收缩结构的定价方法。
AI.motivation: 传统动态定价方法未充分考虑消费者偏好和价格敏感性的时变特性及跨群体结构关联，导致策略次优。需结合结构性信息提升定价效果。
AI.method: 基于空间自回归模型构建全局收缩结构，提出带惩罚的随机梯度下降（PSGD）定价策略，量化分析其随时间、参数时变性及自相关网络强度的遗憾（regret）表现。
AI.result: 理论证明所提策略渐近最优，模拟及真实网络实验显示其显著优于无收缩模型方法，验证了结构信息整合的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 动态定价需融合跨群体结构信息，本文方法通过全局收缩模型和PSGD有效平衡探索与利用，为实际应用提供理论支持与算法框架。

authors_text: Minghan Zhu,Shizhong Han,Hong Cai,Shubhankar Borse,Maani Ghaffari,Fatih Porikli
title: 4D Panoptic Segmentation as Invariant and Equivariant Field Prediction
title_zh: 4D 全景分割作为不变和等变场预测
abstract: In this paper, we develop rotation-equivariant neural networks for 4D panoptic segmentation. 4D panoptic segmentation is a benchmark task for autonomous driving that requires recognizing semantic classes and object instances on the road based on LiDAR scans, as well as assigning temporally consistent IDs to instances across time. We observe that the driving scenario is symmetric to rotations on the ground plane. Therefore, rotation-equivariance could provide better generalization and more robust feature learning. Specifically, we review the object instance clustering strategies and restate the centerness-based approach and the offset-based approach as the prediction of invariant scalar fields and equivariant vector fields. Other sub-tasks are also unified from this perspective, and different invariant and equivariant layers are designed to facilitate their predictions. Through evaluation on the standard 4D panoptic segmentation benchmark of SemanticKITTI, we show that our equivariant models achieve higher accuracy with lower computational costs compared to their non-equivariant counterparts. Moreover, our method sets the new state-of-the-art performance and achieves 1st place on the SemanticKITTI 4D Panoptic Segmentation leaderboard.
summary: In this paper, we develop rotation-equivariant neural networks for 4D panoptic segmentation. 4D panoptic segmentation is a benchmark task for autonomous driving that requires recognizing semantic classes and object instances on the road based on LiDAR scans, as well as assigning temporally consistent IDs to instances across time. We observe that the driving scenario is symmetric to rotations on the ground plane. Therefore, rotation-equivariance could provide better generalization and more robust feature learning. Specifically, we review the object instance clustering strategies and restate the centerness-based approach and the offset-based approach as the prediction of invariant scalar fields and equivariant vector fields. Other sub-tasks are also unified from this perspective, and different invariant and equivariant layers are designed to facilitate their predictions. Through evaluation on the standard 4D panoptic segmentation benchmark of SemanticKITTI, we show that our equivariant models achieve higher accuracy with lower computational costs compared to their non-equivariant counterparts. Moreover, our method sets the new state-of-the-art performance and achieves 1st place on the SemanticKITTI 4D Panoptic Segmentation leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们开发了用于 4D 全景分割的旋转等变神经网络。 4D 全景分割是自动驾驶的一项基准任务，需要基于 LiDAR 扫描识别道路上的语义类别和对象实例，并为不同时间的实例分配时间一致的 ID。我们观察到驾驶场景与地平面上的旋转对称。因此，旋转等方差可以提供更好的泛化和更鲁棒的特征学习。具体来说，我们回顾了对象实例聚类策略，并将基于中心的方法和基于偏移的方法重申为不变标量场和等变向量场的预测。其他子任务也从这个角度统一起来，设计了不同的不变层和等变层以方便它们的预测。通过对 SemanticKITTI 标准 4D 全景分割基准的评估，我们表明，与非等变模型相比，我们的等变模型以更低的计算成本实现了更高的精度。此外，我们的方法设定了新的最先进的性能，并在 SemanticKITTI 4D 全景分割排行榜上获得第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出旋转等变神经网络，用于自动驾驶中的4D全景分割任务，通过LiDAR扫描数据实现语义分类和实例跟踪。
AI.motivation: 驾驶场景在地面平面具有旋转对称性，利用旋转等变性可提升模型泛化能力与特征学习鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将实例聚类策略重构为不变标量场与等变向量场预测，设计多类不变/等变层统一处理子任务。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI基准测试中，等变模型较非等变版本精度更高且计算成本更低，取得4D全景分割 leaderboard第一名。
