search_text: 3D Video Object Detection with Learnable Object-Centric Global Optimization 具有可学习的以对象为中心的全局优化的 3D 视频对象检测 We explore long-term temporal visual correspondence-based optimization for 3D video object detection in this work. Visual correspondence refers to one-to-one mappings for pixels across multiple images. Correspondence-based optimization is the cornerstone for 3D scene reconstruction but is less studied in 3D video object detection, because moving objects violate multi-view geometry constraints and are treated as outliers during scene reconstruction. We address this issue by treating objects as first-class citizens during correspondence-based optimization. In this work, we propose BA-Det, an end-to-end optimizable object detector with object-centric temporal correspondence learning and featuremetric object bundle adjustment. Empirically, we verify the effectiveness and efficiency of BA-Det for multiple baseline 3D detectors under various setups. Our BA-Det achieves SOTA performance on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset (WOD) with only marginal computation cost. Our code is available at https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/BA-Det. 在这项工作中，我们探索了基于长期时间视觉对应的 3D 视频对象检测优化。视觉对应是指多个图像之间像素的一对一映射。基于对应的优化是 3D 场景重建的基石，但在 3D 视频对象检测中研究较少，因为移动对象违反了多视图几何约束，并在场景重建期间被视为异常值。我们通过在基于对应的优化过程中将对象视为一等公民来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BA-Det，一种端到端可优化的对象检测器，具有以对象为中心的时间对应学习和特征对象束调整。根据经验，我们验证了 BA-Det 在各种设置下对多个基线 3D 探测器的有效性和效率。我们的 BA-Det 在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 上实现了 SOTA 性能，且计算成本极低。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/BA-Det 获取。 本文提出了一种基于可学习对象中心全局优化的3D视频目标检测方法BA-Det，通过处理移动物体在多视图几何中的挑战，提升检测性能。 Jiawei He,Yuntao Chen,Naiyan Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Yuhan Liu,Amna Liaqat,Andrés Monroy-Hernández
title: Should Policymakers be Involved? Understanding the Opinions and Needs for Independent Food Delivery Platforms in the United States regarding Public Policy
title_zh: 政策制定者应该参与吗？了解美国独立外卖平台对公共政策的看法和需求
comment: Accepted by CHI'23 workshop Designing Technology and Policy Simultaneously: Towards A Research Agenda and New Practice
comments: Accepted by CHI'23 workshop Designing Technology and Policy Simultaneously: Towards A Research Agenda and New Practice
abstract: Mainstream food delivery platforms, like DoorDash and Uber Eats, have been the locus of fierce policy debates about their unfair business and labor practices. At the same time, hundreds of independent food delivery services provide alternative opportunities to many communities across the U.S. We surveyed operators of independent food delivery platforms to learn about their perception of the role of public policy. We found conflicting opinions on whether and how policy should interact with their businesses, ranging from not wanting policymakers to interfere to articulating specific policies that would curtail mainstream platforms' business practices. We provide insights for technologists and policymakers interested in the sociotechnical challenges of local marketplaces.
summary: Mainstream food delivery platforms, like DoorDash and Uber Eats, have been the locus of fierce policy debates about their unfair business and labor practices. At the same time, hundreds of independent food delivery services provide alternative opportunities to many communities across the U.S. We surveyed operators of independent food delivery platforms to learn about their perception of the role of public policy. We found conflicting opinions on whether and how policy should interact with their businesses, ranging from not wanting policymakers to interfere to articulating specific policies that would curtail mainstream platforms' business practices. We provide insights for technologists and policymakers interested in the sociotechnical challenges of local marketplaces.
abstract_zh: DoorDash 和 Uber Eats 等主流食品配送平台因其不公平的商业和劳工行为而引发了激烈的政策争论。与此同时，数百个独立食品配送服务为美国许多社区提供了替代机会。我们调查了独立食品配送平台的运营商，以了解他们对公共政策作用的看法。我们发现，关于政策是否以及如何与其业务互动存在相互矛盾的观点，从不希望政策制定者干预到制定会限制主流平台商业实践的具体政策。我们为对当地市场的社会技术挑战感兴趣的技术专家和政策制定者提供见解。

AI.tldr: 调查美国独立外卖平台运营商对公共政策介入的看法，发现其意见分歧。
AI.motivation: 探讨独立平台在政策争议中的角色，为政策制定和技术专家提供见解。
AI.method: 通过调查独立外卖平台运营商，收集他们对政策介入的看法和需求。
AI.result: 发现运营商对政策介入存在分歧，部分希望限制主流平台，部分反对干预。
AI.conclusion: 为政策制定者和技术专家提供本地市场社会技术挑战的见解，强调政策干预的复杂性。

authors_text: Jiawei He,Zehao Huang,Naiyan Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: Learnable Graph Matching: A Practical Paradigm for Data Association
title_zh: 可学习的图形匹配：数据关联的实用范例
comment: Accepted by TPAMI 2024. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.16178
comments: Accepted by TPAMI 2024. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.16178
abstract: Data association is at the core of many computer vision tasks, e.g., multiple object tracking, image matching, and point cloud registration. however, current data association solutions have some defects: they mostly ignore the intra-view context information; besides, they either train deep association models in an end-to-end way and hardly utilize the advantage of optimization-based assignment methods, or only use an off-the-shelf neural network to extract features. In this paper, we propose a general learnable graph matching method to address these issues. Especially, we model the intra-view relationships as an undirected graph. Then data association turns into a general graph matching problem between graphs. Furthermore, to make optimization end-to-end differentiable, we relax the original graph matching problem into continuous quadratic programming and then incorporate training into a deep graph neural network with KKT conditions and implicit function theorem. In MOT task, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on several MOT datasets. For image matching, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on a popular indoor dataset, ScanNet. For point cloud registration, we also achieve competitive results. Code will be available at https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/GMTracker.
summary: Data association is at the core of many computer vision tasks, e.g., multiple object tracking, image matching, and point cloud registration. however, current data association solutions have some defects: they mostly ignore the intra-view context information; besides, they either train deep association models in an end-to-end way and hardly utilize the advantage of optimization-based assignment methods, or only use an off-the-shelf neural network to extract features. In this paper, we propose a general learnable graph matching method to address these issues. Especially, we model the intra-view relationships as an undirected graph. Then data association turns into a general graph matching problem between graphs. Furthermore, to make optimization end-to-end differentiable, we relax the original graph matching problem into continuous quadratic programming and then incorporate training into a deep graph neural network with KKT conditions and implicit function theorem. In MOT task, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on several MOT datasets. For image matching, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on a popular indoor dataset, ScanNet. For point cloud registration, we also achieve competitive results. Code will be available at https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/GMTracker.
abstract_zh: 数据关联是许多计算机视觉任务的核心，例如多对象跟踪、图像匹配和点云配准。然而，当前的数据关联解决方案存在一些缺陷：它们大多忽略视图内上下文信息；此外，它们要么以端到端的方式训练深度关联模型，而几乎没有利用基于优化的分配方法的优势，要么仅使用现成的神经网络来提取特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的可学习图匹配方法来解决这些问题。特别是，我们将视图内关系建模为无向图。那么数据关联就变成了图之间的一般图匹配问题。此外，为了使优化端到端可微分，我们将原始图匹配问题放松为连续二次规划，然后将训练结合到具有 KKT 条件和隐函数定理的深度图神经网络中。在 MOT 任务中，我们的方法在多个 MOT 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。对于图像匹配，我们的方法在流行的室内数据集 ScanNet 上优于最先进的方法。对于点云配准，我们也取得了有竞争力的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/GMTracker 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可学习的图匹配方法，用于解决计算机视觉中的数据关联问题，如多目标跟踪、图像匹配和点云配准。
AI.motivation: 现有数据关联方法忽视了单视角上下文信息，且未能有效结合端到端训练与基于优化的分配方法，或仅依赖预训练神经网络提取特征。
AI.method: 将单视角关系建模为无向图，将数据关联转化为图匹配问题，并通过连续二次规划松弛原问题，结合KKT条件和隐函数定理将其集成到深度图神经网络中。
AI.result: 在MOT任务中达到SOTA性能，在ScanNet数据集上超越现有方法，在点云配准任务中表现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效融合图匹配与深度学习，为数据关联提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

Then data association turns into a general graph matching problem between graphs. Furthermore, to make optimization end-to-end differentiable, we relax the original graph matching problem into continuous quadratic programming and then incorporate training into a deep graph neural network with KKT conditions and implicit function theorem. In MOT task, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on several MOT datasets. For image matching, our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on a popular indoor dataset, ScanNet. For point cloud registration, we also achieve competitive results. Code will be available at https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/GMTracker. 数据关联是许多计算机视觉任务的核心，例如多对象跟踪、图像匹配和点云配准。然而，当前的数据关联解决方案存在一些缺陷：它们大多忽略视图内上下文信息；此外，它们要么以端到端的方式训练深度关联模型，而几乎没有利用基于优化的分配方法的优势，要么仅使用现成的神经网络来提取特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用的可学习图匹配方法来解决这些问题。特别是，我们将视图内关系建模为无向图。那么数据关联就变成了图之间的一般图匹配问题。此外，为了使优化端到端可微分，我们将原始图匹配问题放松为连续二次规划，然后将训练结合到具有 KKT 条件和隐函数定理的深度图神经网络中。在 MOT 任务中，我们的方法在多个 MOT 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。对于图像匹配，我们的方法在流行的室内数据集 ScanNet 上优于最先进的方法。对于点云配准，我们也取得了有竞争力的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/jiaweihe1996/GMTracker 获取。 本文提出一种可学习的图匹配方法，用于解决计算机视觉中的数据关联问题，如多目标跟踪、图像匹配和点云配准。 Jiawei He,Zehao Huang,Naiyan Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Susung Hong,Donghoon Ahn,Seungryong Kim
title: Debiasing Scores and Prompts of 2D Diffusion for View-consistent Text-to-3D Generation
title_zh: 用于视图一致的文本到 3D 生成的去偏分数和 2D 扩散提示
abstract: Existing score-distilling text-to-3D generation techniques, despite their considerable promise, often encounter the view inconsistency problem. One of the most notable issues is the Janus problem, where the most canonical view of an object (\textit{e.g}., face or head) appears in other views. In this work, we explore existing frameworks for score-distilling text-to-3D generation and identify the main causes of the view inconsistency problem -- the embedded bias of 2D diffusion models. Based on these findings, we propose two approaches to debias the score-distillation frameworks for view-consistent text-to-3D generation. Our first approach, called score debiasing, involves cutting off the score estimated by 2D diffusion models and gradually increasing the truncation value throughout the optimization process. Our second approach, called prompt debiasing, identifies conflicting words between user prompts and view prompts using a language model, and adjusts the discrepancy between view prompts and the viewing direction of an object. Our experimental results show that our methods improve the realism of the generated 3D objects by significantly reducing artifacts and achieve a good trade-off between faithfulness to the 2D diffusion models and 3D consistency with little overhead. Our project page is available at~\url{https://susunghong.github.io/Debiased-Score-Distillation-Sampling/}.
summary: Existing score-distilling text-to-3D generation techniques, despite their considerable promise, often encounter the view inconsistency problem. One of the most notable issues is the Janus problem, where the most canonical view of an object (\textit{e.g}., face or head) appears in other views. In this work, we explore existing frameworks for score-distilling text-to-3D generation and identify the main causes of the view inconsistency problem -- the embedded bias of 2D diffusion models. Based on these findings, we propose two approaches to debias the score-distillation frameworks for view-consistent text-to-3D generation. Our first approach, called score debiasing, involves cutting off the score estimated by 2D diffusion models and gradually increasing the truncation value throughout the optimization process. Our second approach, called prompt debiasing, identifies conflicting words between user prompts and view prompts using a language model, and adjusts the discrepancy between view prompts and the viewing direction of an object. Our experimental results show that our methods improve the realism of the generated 3D objects by significantly reducing artifacts and achieve a good trade-off between faithfulness to the 2D diffusion models and 3D consistency with little overhead. Our project page is available at~\url{https://susunghong.github.io/Debiased-Score-Distillation-Sampling/}.
abstract_zh: 现有的乐谱提取文本到 3D 生成技术尽管前景广阔，但经常遇到视图不一致的问题。最值得注意的问题之一是 Janus 问题，其中对象的最规范视图（\textit{例如，面部或头部）出现在其他视图中。在这项工作中，我们探索了现有的分数蒸馏文本到 3D 生成框架，并确定了视图不一致问题的主要原因——2D 扩散模型的嵌入偏差。基于这些发现，我们提出了两种方法来消除分数蒸馏框架的偏差，以实现视图一致的文本到 3D 生成。我们的第一种方法称为分数去偏，涉及切断二维扩散模型估计的分数，并在整个优化过程中逐渐增加截断值。我们的第二种方法称为提示去偏差，使用语言模型识别用户提示和视图提示之间的冲突单词，并调整视图提示和对象的观看方向之间的差异。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法通过显着减少伪影来提高生成的 3D 对象的真实感，并以很少的开销实现 2D 扩散模型的忠实度和 3D 一致性之间的良好权衡。我们的项目页面位于~\url{https://susunghong.github.io/Debiased-Score-Distillation-Sampling/}。

AI.tldr: 本文针对文本到3D生成中的视角不一致问题，提出两种去偏方法（得分去偏和提示去偏）以提升生成结果的视角一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于得分蒸馏的文本到3D生成技术存在视角不一致问题（如Janus问题），主要由2D扩散模型的嵌入偏差导致。
AI.method: 1. 得分去偏：通过截断2D扩散模型的得分并逐步增加截断值；2. 提示去偏：利用语言模型识别冲突词并调整视角提示与物体方向的差异。
AI.result: 显著减少生成伪影，提升3D物体真实性，在2D模型忠实度与3D一致性间取得平衡，计算开销小。
AI.conclusion: 两种去偏方法有效缓解视角不一致问题，为生成视角一致的文本到3D模型提供了可行方案。

search_text: Debiasing Scores and Prompts of 2D Diffusion for View-consistent Text-to-3D Generation 用于视图一致的文本到 3D 生成的去偏分数和 2D 扩散提示 Existing score-distilling text-to-3D generation techniques, despite their considerable promise, often encounter the view inconsistency problem. One of the most notable issues is the Janus problem, where the most canonical view of an object (\textit{e.g}., face or head) appears in other views. In this work, we explore existing frameworks for score-distilling text-to-3D generation and identify the main causes of the view inconsistency problem -- the embedded bias of 2D diffusion models. Based on these findings, we propose two approaches to debias the score-distillation frameworks for view-consistent text-to-3D generation. Our first approach, called score debiasing, involves cutting off the score estimated by 2D diffusion models and gradually increasing the truncation value throughout the optimization process. Our second approach, called prompt debiasing, identifies conflicting words between user prompts and view prompts using a language model, and adjusts the discrepancy between view prompts and the viewing direction of an object. Our experimental results show that our methods improve the realism of the generated 3D objects by significantly reducing artifacts and achieve a good trade-off between faithfulness to the 2D diffusion models and 3D consistency with little overhead. authors_text: Xiaorui Sun
title: Faster Isomorphism for $p$-Groups of Class 2 and Exponent $p$
title_zh: $p$ 的更快同构 - 2 类和指数 $p$ 的群
abstract: The group isomorphism problem determines whether two groups, given by their Cayley tables, are isomorphic. For groups with order $n$, an algorithm with $n^{(\log n + O(1))}$ running time, attributed to Tarjan, was proposed in the 1970s [Mil78]. Despite the extensive study over the past decades, the current best group isomorphism algorithm has an $n^{(1 / 4 + o(1))\log n}$ running time [Ros13]. The isomorphism testing for $p$-groups of (nilpotent) class 2 and exponent $p$ has been identified as a major barrier to obtaining an $n^{o(\log n)}$ time algorithm for the group isomorphism problem. Although the $p$-groups of class 2 and exponent $p$ have much simpler algebraic structures than general groups, the best-known isomorphism testing algorithm for this group class also has an $n^{O(\log n)}$ running time. In this paper, we present an isomorphism testing algorithm for $p$-groups of class 2 and exponent $p$ with running time $n^{O((\log n)^{5/6})}$ for any prime $p > 2$. Our result is based on a novel reduction to the skew-symmetric matrix tuple isometry problem [IQ19]. To obtain the reduction, we develop several tools for matrix space analysis, including a matrix space individualization-refinement method and a characterization of the low rank matrix spaces.
summary: The group isomorphism problem determines whether two groups, given by their Cayley tables, are isomorphic. For groups with order $n$, an algorithm with $n^{(\log n + O(1))}$ running time, attributed to Tarjan, was proposed in the 1970s [Mil78]. Despite the extensive study over the past decades, the current best group isomorphism algorithm has an $n^{(1 / 4 + o(1))\log n}$ running time [Ros13]. The isomorphism testing for $p$-groups of (nilpotent) class 2 and exponent $p$ has been identified as a major barrier to obtaining an $n^{o(\log n)}$ time algorithm for the group isomorphism problem. Although the $p$-groups of class 2 and exponent $p$ have much simpler algebraic structures than general groups, the best-known isomorphism testing algorithm for this group class also has an $n^{O(\log n)}$ running time. In this paper, we present an isomorphism testing algorithm for $p$-groups of class 2 and exponent $p$ with running time $n^{O((\log n)^{5/6})}$ for any prime $p > 2$. Our result is based on a novel reduction to the skew-symmetric matrix tuple isometry problem [IQ19]. To obtain the reduction, we develop several tools for matrix space analysis, including a matrix space individualization-refinement method and a characterization of the low rank matrix spaces.
abstract_zh: 群同构问题确定由凯莱表给出的两个群是否同构。对于阶数 $n$ 的群，Tarjan 在 20 世纪 70 年代提出了一种运行时间为 $n^{(\log n + O(1))}$ 的算法 [Mil78]。尽管过去几十年进行了广泛的研究，但当前最好的群同构算法的运行时间为 $n^{(1 / 4 + o(1))\log n}$ [Ros13]。 （幂等）2 类和指数 $p$ 的 $p$ 群的同构测试已被确定为获得群同构问题的 $n^{o(\log n)}$ 时间算法的主要障碍。尽管第 2 类和指数 $p$ 的 $p$ 群的代数结构比一​​般群简单得多，但该群类最著名的同构测试算法也有 $n^{O(\log n)}$ 运行时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 2 类 $p$ 组和指数 $p$ 的同构测试算法，对于任何素数 $p > 2$，运行时间为 $n^{O((\log n)^{5/6})}$。我们的结果基于对斜对称矩阵元组等距问题的新颖简化[IQ19]。为了获得简化，我们开发了几种用于矩阵空间分析的工具，包括矩阵空间个性化细化方法和低秩矩阵空间的表征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究$p$群（幂零类2且指数为$p$）的同构判定问题，提出一种更快的判定算法。
AI.motivation: 群同构问题是计算群论的核心难题，而$p$群（类2且指数$p$）被视作实现$n^{o(\log n)}$时间算法的关键障碍。现有算法时间复杂度过高，亟需突破。
AI.method: 通过将问题归约到斜对称矩阵元组等距问题，并发展了矩阵空间分析工具，包括矩阵空间个体化-精化方法和低秩矩阵空间刻画。
AI.result: 对于任意素数$p>2$，提出了运行时间为$n^{O((\log n)^{5/6})}$的同构判定算法，显著优于此前$n^{O(\log n)}$的算法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为突破群同构问题的指数障碍提供了新思路，并通过矩阵空间分析技术推进了$p$群同构判定的理论下界。

authors_text: Sohyun Lee,Jaesung Rim,Boseung Jeong,Geonu Kim,Byungju Woo,Haechan Lee,Sunghyun Cho,Suha Kwak
title: Human Pose Estimation in Extremely Low-Light Conditions
title_zh: 极弱光条件下的人体姿势估计
abstract: We study human pose estimation in extremely low-light images. This task is challenging due to the difficulty of collecting real low-light images with accurate labels, and severely corrupted inputs that degrade prediction quality significantly. To address the first issue, we develop a dedicated camera system and build a new dataset of real low-light images with accurate pose labels. Thanks to our camera system, each low-light image in our dataset is coupled with an aligned well-lit image, which enables accurate pose labeling and is used as privileged information during training. We also propose a new model and a new training strategy that fully exploit the privileged information to learn representation insensitive to lighting conditions. Our method demonstrates outstanding performance on real extremely low light images, and extensive analyses validate that both of our model and dataset contribute to the success.
summary: We study human pose estimation in extremely low-light images. This task is challenging due to the difficulty of collecting real low-light images with accurate labels, and severely corrupted inputs that degrade prediction quality significantly. To address the first issue, we develop a dedicated camera system and build a new dataset of real low-light images with accurate pose labels. Thanks to our camera system, each low-light image in our dataset is coupled with an aligned well-lit image, which enables accurate pose labeling and is used as privileged information during training. We also propose a new model and a new training strategy that fully exploit the privileged information to learn representation insensitive to lighting conditions. Our method demonstrates outstanding performance on real extremely low light images, and extensive analyses validate that both of our model and dataset contribute to the success.
abstract_zh: 我们研究极弱光图像中的人体姿势估计。这项任务具有挑战性，因为很难收集具有准确标签的真实低光图像，并且输入严重损坏，从而显着降低预测质量。为了解决第一个问题，我们开发了一个专用的相机系统，并构建了一个具有准确姿势标签的真实低光图像的新数据集。得益于我们的相机系统，数据集中的每个低光图像都与对齐的明亮图像相结合，这使得准确的姿势标记成为可能，并在训练期间用作特权信息。我们还提出了一种新模型和新的训练策略，充分利用特权信息来学习对光照条件不敏感的表示。我们的方法在真实的极低光图像上展示了出色的性能，并且广泛的分析验证了我们的模型和数据集都有助于成功。

AI.tldr: 本文研究极低光照条件下的人体姿态估计问题，提出新数据集和模型以解决数据获取困难和输入质量差的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有低光照图像数据集缺乏准确标注，且严重降质的输入显著影响姿态估计精度，亟需改进数据采集与模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 开发专用相机系统构建带精确标注的低光照数据集，利用配对的正常光照图像作为特权信息，设计新型模型与训练策略以学习光照不变的特征表示。
AI.result: 方法在真实极低光照图像上取得优异性能，实验验证模型与数据集均对提升效果有显著贡献。
AI.conclusion: 通过定制化数据采集和特权信息引导的模型训练，有效解决了低光照姿态估计的难题，推动了相关研究进展。

authors_text: Tsachi Blau,Roy Ganz,Chaim Baskin,Michael Elad,Alex M. Bronstein
title: Class-Conditioned Transformation for Enhanced Robust Image Classification
title_zh: 用于增强鲁棒图像分类的类条件转换
abstract: Robust classification methods predominantly concentrate on algorithms that address a specific threat model, resulting in ineffective defenses against other threat models. Real-world applications are exposed to this vulnerability, as malicious attackers might exploit alternative threat models. In this work, we propose a novel test-time threat model agnostic algorithm that enhances Adversarial-Trained (AT) models. Our method operates through COnditional image transformation and DIstance-based Prediction (CODIP) and includes two main steps: First, we transform the input image into each dataset class, where the input image might be either clean or attacked. Next, we make a prediction based on the shortest transformed distance. The conditional transformation utilizes the perceptually aligned gradients property possessed by AT models and, as a result, eliminates the need for additional models or additional training. Moreover, it allows users to choose the desired balance between clean and robust accuracy without training. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results demonstrated through extensive experiments on various models, AT methods, datasets, and attack types. Notably, applying CODIP leads to substantial robust accuracy improvement of up to $+23\%$, $+20\%$, $+26\%$, and $+22\%$ on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet and Flowers datasets, respectively.
summary: Robust classification methods predominantly concentrate on algorithms that address a specific threat model, resulting in ineffective defenses against other threat models. Real-world applications are exposed to this vulnerability, as malicious attackers might exploit alternative threat models. In this work, we propose a novel test-time threat model agnostic algorithm that enhances Adversarial-Trained (AT) models. Our method operates through COnditional image transformation and DIstance-based Prediction (CODIP) and includes two main steps: First, we transform the input image into each dataset class, where the input image might be either clean or attacked. Next, we make a prediction based on the shortest transformed distance. The conditional transformation utilizes the perceptually aligned gradients property possessed by AT models and, as a result, eliminates the need for additional models or additional training. Moreover, it allows users to choose the desired balance between clean and robust accuracy without training. The proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results demonstrated through extensive experiments on various models, AT methods, datasets, and attack types. Notably, applying CODIP leads to substantial robust accuracy improvement of up to $+23\%$, $+20\%$, $+26\%$, and $+22\%$ on CIFAR10, CIFAR100, ImageNet and Flowers datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒分类方法主要集中于针对特定威胁模型的算法，导致对其他威胁模型的防御无效。现实世界的应用程序容易受到此漏洞的影响，因为恶意攻击者可能会利用替代威胁模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的测试时威胁模型不可知算法，可以增强对抗训练（AT）模型。我们的方法通过条件图像转换和基于距离的预测（CODIP）进行操作，包括两个主要步骤：首先，我们将输入图像转换为每个数据集类，其中输入图像可能是干净的或受到攻击的。接下来，我们根据最短变换距离进行预测。条件转换利用了 AT 模型所具有的感知对齐梯度属性，因此消除了对额外模型或额外训练的需要。此外，它允许用户在无需培训的情况下选择干净准确度和稳健准确度之间所需的平衡。通过对各种模型、AT 方法、数据集和攻击类型的大量实验证明，所提出的方法取得了最先进的结果。值得注意的是，应用 CODIP 可以在 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet 和 Flowers 数据集上分别实现高达 $+23\%$、$+20\%$、$+26\%$ 和 $+22\%$ 的显着稳健精度提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在测试时无需额外训练即可增强对抗训练模型鲁棒性的算法CODIP，通过类条件图像变换和基于距离的预测提升图像分类的抗攻击能力。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒分类方法针对特定威胁模型设计，难以防御其他威胁模型，导致实际应用中存在安全漏洞。
AI.method: CODIP方法包含两个步骤：1) 将输入图像转换为每个数据集类别的感知对齐梯度表示；2) 基于最短转换距离进行预测，无需额外模型或训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、CIFAR100、ImageNet和Flowers数据集上，CODIP分别实现+23%、+20%、+26%和+22%的鲁棒准确率提升，达到当时最优效果。
AI.conclusion: CODIP通过利用对抗训练模型的感知对齐梯度特性，在无需额外训练的情况下实现了跨威胁模型的鲁棒性提升，为实际部署提供了灵活的防御方案。

authors_text: Jaeseok Jeong,Mingi Kwon,Youngjung Uh
title: Training-free Content Injection using h-space in Diffusion Models
title_zh: 在扩散模型中使用 h 空间进行免训练内容注入
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) synthesize high-quality images in various domains. However, controlling their generative process is still hazy because the intermediate variables in the process are not rigorously studied. Recently, the bottleneck feature of the U-Net, namely $h$-space, is found to convey the semantics of the resulting image. It enables StyleCLIP-like latent editing within DMs. In this paper, we explore further usage of $h$-space beyond attribute editing, and introduce a method to inject the content of one image into another image by combining their features in the generative processes. Briefly, given the original generative process of the other image, 1) we gradually blend the bottleneck feature of the content with proper normalization, and 2) we calibrate the skip connections to match the injected content. Unlike custom-diffusion approaches, our method does not require time-consuming optimization or fine-tuning. Instead, our method manipulates intermediate features within a feed-forward generative process. Furthermore, our method does not require supervision from external networks. The code is available at https://curryjung.github.io/InjectFusion/
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) synthesize high-quality images in various domains. However, controlling their generative process is still hazy because the intermediate variables in the process are not rigorously studied. Recently, the bottleneck feature of the U-Net, namely $h$-space, is found to convey the semantics of the resulting image. It enables StyleCLIP-like latent editing within DMs. In this paper, we explore further usage of $h$-space beyond attribute editing, and introduce a method to inject the content of one image into another image by combining their features in the generative processes. Briefly, given the original generative process of the other image, 1) we gradually blend the bottleneck feature of the content with proper normalization, and 2) we calibrate the skip connections to match the injected content. Unlike custom-diffusion approaches, our method does not require time-consuming optimization or fine-tuning. Instead, our method manipulates intermediate features within a feed-forward generative process. Furthermore, our method does not require supervision from external networks. The code is available at https://curryjung.github.io/InjectFusion/
abstract_zh: 扩散模型 (DM) 合成各个领域的高质量图像。然而，控制它们的生成过程仍然是模糊的，因为过程中的中间变量没有得到严格的研究。最近，发现 U-Net 的瓶颈特征，即 $h$-space，可以传达结果图像的语义。它可以在 DM 中实现类似 StyleCLIP 的潜在编辑。在本文中，我们探索了除属性编辑之外的 $h$-space 的进一步使用，并介绍了一种通过在生成过程中组合图像的特征将一幅图像的内容注入另一幅图像的方法。简而言之，考虑到另一张图像的原始生成过程，1）我们逐渐将内容的瓶颈特征与适当的归一化相融合，2）我们校准跳跃连接以匹配注入的内容。与定制扩散方法不同，我们的方法不需要耗时的优化或微调。相反，我们的方法在前馈生成过程中操纵中间特征。此外，我们的方法不需要外部网络的监督。代码可在 https://curryjung.github.io/InjectFusion/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练即可在扩散模型中实现内容注入的方法，通过结合h-space空间中的图像特征完成图像内容的融合。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型生成过程难以控制，且内容编辑方法通常需要训练或外部监督，而h-space已被证明能携带图像语义，因此探索其更高效的利用方式具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过逐步混合目标图像的h-space特征并进行归一化处理，同时校准跳过连接以匹配注入内容，在前馈生成过程中直接操作中间特征实现内容注入。
AI.result: 方法无需优化或外部监督即可实现跨图像内容注入，实验表明在多个场景下能有效融合图像内容并保持生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于h-space的训练自由内容注入方法，为扩散模型的可控生成提供了新思路，展示了中间特征直接操作的潜力。

search_text: Training-free Content Injection using h-space in Diffusion Models 在扩散模型中使用 h 空间进行免训练内容注入 Diffusion models (DMs) synthesize high-quality images in various domains. However, controlling their generative process is still hazy because the intermediate variables in the process are not rigorously studied. Recently, the bottleneck feature of the U-Net, namely $h$-space, is found to convey the semantics of the resulting image. It enables StyleCLIP-like latent editing within DMs. In this paper, we explore further usage of $h$-space beyond attribute editing, and introduce a method to inject the content of one image into another image by combining their features in the generative processes. Briefly, given the original generative process of the other image, 1) we gradually blend the bottleneck feature of the content with proper normalization, and 2) we calibrate the skip connections to match the injected content. Unlike custom-diffusion approaches, our method does not require time-consuming optimization or fine-tuning. Instead, our method manipulates intermediate features within a feed-forward generative process. Furthermore, our method does not require supervision from external networks. The code is available at https://curryjung.github.io/InjectFusion/ 扩散模型 (DM) 合成各个领域的高质量图像。然而，控制它们的生成过程仍然是模糊的，因为过程中的中间变量没有得到严格的研究。最近，发现 U-Net 的瓶颈特征，即 $h$-space，可以传达结果图像的语义。它可以在 DM 中实现类似 StyleCLIP 的潜在编辑。在本文中，我们探索了除属性编辑之外的 $h$-space 的进一步使用，并介绍了一种通过在生成过程中组合图像的特征将一幅图像的内容注入另一幅图像的方法。简而言之，考虑到另一张图像的原始生成过程，1）我们逐渐将内容的瓶颈特征与适当的归一化相融合，2）我们校准跳跃连接以匹配注入的内容。与定制扩散方法不同，我们的方法不需要耗时的优化或微调。相反，我们的方法在前馈生成过程中操纵中间特征。此外，我们的方法不需要外部网络的监督。代码可在 https://curryjung.github.io/InjectFusion/ 获取 本文提出一种无需训练即可在扩散模型中实现内容注入的方法，通过结合h-space空间中的图像特征完成图像内容的融合。 Jaeseok Jeong,Mingi Kwon,Youngjung Uh cs.CV

authors_text: Meshaiel Alsheail,Dmitry Alexandrovskz,Kathrin Gerling
title: Designing for Disengagement: Challenges and Opportunities for Game Design to Support Children's Exit From Play
title_zh: 脱离游戏设计：支持儿童退出游戏的游戏设计的挑战和机遇
abstract: Games research and industry have developed a solid understanding of how to design engaging, playful experiences that draws players in for hours and causes them to lose their sense of time. While these designs can provide enjoyable experiences, many individuals -- especially children -- may find it challenging to regulate their playing time, and often they struggle to turn off the game. In turn, this affords external regulation of children's playing behavior by limiting playing time or encouraging alternative activities, which frequently leads to conflicts between parents and the children. Here, we see an opportunity for game design to address player disengagement through design, facilitating a timely and autonomous exit from play. Hence, while most research and practitioners design for maximizing player engagement, we argue for a perspective shift towards disengagement as a design tool that allows for unobtrusive and smooth exits from the game. We advocate that interweaving disengagement into the game design could reduce friction within families, allowing children to finish game sessions more easily, facilitate a sense of autonomy, and support an overall healthier relationship with games. In this position paper, we outline a research agenda that examines how game design can address player disengagement, what challenges exist in the specific context of games for children, and how such approaches can be reconciled with the experiential, artistic, and commercial goals of games.
summary: Games research and industry have developed a solid understanding of how to design engaging, playful experiences that draws players in for hours and causes them to lose their sense of time. While these designs can provide enjoyable experiences, many individuals -- especially children -- may find it challenging to regulate their playing time, and often they struggle to turn off the game. In turn, this affords external regulation of children's playing behavior by limiting playing time or encouraging alternative activities, which frequently leads to conflicts between parents and the children. Here, we see an opportunity for game design to address player disengagement through design, facilitating a timely and autonomous exit from play. Hence, while most research and practitioners design for maximizing player engagement, we argue for a perspective shift towards disengagement as a design tool that allows for unobtrusive and smooth exits from the game. We advocate that interweaving disengagement into the game design could reduce friction within families, allowing children to finish game sessions more easily, facilitate a sense of autonomy, and support an overall healthier relationship with games. In this position paper, we outline a research agenda that examines how game design can address player disengagement, what challenges exist in the specific context of games for children, and how such approaches can be reconciled with the experiential, artistic, and commercial goals of games.
abstract_zh: 游戏研究和行业已经对如何设计引人入胜、有趣的体验形成了深入的了解，这些体验能够吸引玩家几个小时并让他们失去时间感。虽然这些设计可以提供愉快的体验，但许多人（尤其是儿童）可能会发现调节自己的游戏时间具有挑战性，并且常常难以关闭游戏。反过来，这通过限制玩耍时间或鼓励其他活动来对儿童的玩耍行为进行外部调节，这常常导致父母和孩子之间的冲突。在这里，我们看到了游戏设计的一个机会，可以通过设计来解决玩家脱离游戏的问题，促进玩家及时、自主地退出游戏。因此，虽然大多数研究和实践者的设计都是为了最大限度地提高玩家参与度，但我们主张将视角转变为脱离参与，将其作为一种设计工具，允许不引人注目且顺利地退出游戏。我们主张将脱离参与融入游戏设计中可以减少家庭内部的摩擦，让孩子更轻松地完成游戏过程，促进自主感，并支持与游戏建立整体更健康的关系。在这篇立场文件中，我们概述了一个研究议程，探讨游戏设计如何解决玩家脱离问题、儿童游戏的特定环境中存在哪些挑战，以及这些方法如何与游戏的体验、艺术和商业目标相协调。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将游戏设计从最大化玩家参与度转向融入‘脱离参与’机制，以帮助儿童自主结束游戏会话。
AI.motivation: 当前游戏设计过度强调吸引玩家，导致儿童难以自主停止游戏，引发家庭冲突，需通过设计支持健康的游戏习惯。
AI.method: 通过立场论文形式，提出研究议程，探讨儿童游戏场景中‘脱离参与’设计的挑战与机遇。
AI.result: 构建了将‘脱离参与’纳入游戏设计的研究框架，旨在减少家庭摩擦并促进儿童自主性。
AI.conclusion: 游戏设计需平衡参与与脱离机制，以实现更健康的玩家体验与家庭关系。

While these designs can provide enjoyable experiences, many individuals -- especially children -- may find it challenging to regulate their playing time, and often they struggle to turn off the game. In turn, this affords external regulation of children's playing behavior by limiting playing time or encouraging alternative activities, which frequently leads to conflicts between parents and the children. Here, we see an opportunity for game design to address player disengagement through design, facilitating a timely and autonomous exit from play. Hence, while most research and practitioners design for maximizing player engagement, we argue for a perspective shift towards disengagement as a design tool that allows for unobtrusive and smooth exits from the game. We advocate that interweaving disengagement into the game design could reduce friction within families, allowing children to finish game sessions more easily, facilitate a sense of autonomy, and support an overall healthier relationship with games. authors_text: Chittesh Thavamani,Mengtian Li,Francesco Ferroni,Deva Ramanan
title: Learning to Zoom and Unzoom
title_zh: 学习缩放和取消缩放
comment: CVPR 2023. Code and additional visuals available at https://tchittesh.github.io/lzu/
comments: CVPR 2023. Code and additional visuals available at https://tchittesh.github.io/lzu/
abstract: Many perception systems in mobile computing, autonomous navigation, and AR/VR face strict compute constraints that are particularly challenging for high-resolution input images. Previous works propose nonuniform downsamplers that "learn to zoom" on salient image regions, reducing compute while retaining task-relevant image information. However, for tasks with spatial labels (such as 2D/3D object detection and semantic segmentation), such distortions may harm performance. In this work (LZU), we "learn to zoom" in on the input image, compute spatial features, and then "unzoom" to revert any deformations. To enable efficient and differentiable unzooming, we approximate the zooming warp with a piecewise bilinear mapping that is invertible. LZU can be applied to any task with 2D spatial input and any model with 2D spatial features, and we demonstrate this versatility by evaluating on a variety of tasks and datasets: object detection on Argoverse-HD, semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, and monocular 3D object detection on nuScenes. Interestingly, we observe boosts in performance even when high-resolution sensor data is unavailable, implying that LZU can be used to "learn to upsample" as well.
summary: Many perception systems in mobile computing, autonomous navigation, and AR/VR face strict compute constraints that are particularly challenging for high-resolution input images. Previous works propose nonuniform downsamplers that "learn to zoom" on salient image regions, reducing compute while retaining task-relevant image information. However, for tasks with spatial labels (such as 2D/3D object detection and semantic segmentation), such distortions may harm performance. In this work (LZU), we "learn to zoom" in on the input image, compute spatial features, and then "unzoom" to revert any deformations. To enable efficient and differentiable unzooming, we approximate the zooming warp with a piecewise bilinear mapping that is invertible. LZU can be applied to any task with 2D spatial input and any model with 2D spatial features, and we demonstrate this versatility by evaluating on a variety of tasks and datasets: object detection on Argoverse-HD, semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, and monocular 3D object detection on nuScenes. Interestingly, we observe boosts in performance even when high-resolution sensor data is unavailable, implying that LZU can be used to "learn to upsample" as well.
abstract_zh: 移动计算、自主导航和 AR/VR 中的许多感知系统都面临着严格的计算限制，这对于高分辨率输入图像来说尤其具有挑战性。之前的工作提出了非均匀下采样器，可以“学习缩放”显着图像区域，减少计算量，同时保留与任务相关的图像信息。然而，对于具有空间标签的任务（例如 2D/3D 对象检测和语义分割），这种扭曲可能会损害性能。在这项工作（LZU）中，我们“学习放大”输入图像，计算空间特征，然后“取消缩放”以恢复任何变形。为了实现高效且可微的缩放，我们使用可逆的分段双线性映射来近似缩放扭曲。 LZU 可以应用于任何具有 2D 空间输入的任务和任何具有 2D 空间特征的模型，我们通过评估各种任务和数据集来展示这种多功能性：Argoverse-HD 上的对象检测、Cityscapes 上的语义分割以及 nuScenes 上的单目 3D 对象检测。有趣的是，即使高分辨率传感器数据不可用，我们也观察到性能的提升，这意味着 LZU 也可以用于“学习上采样”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LZU的方法，通过学习在输入图像上进行缩放和还原操作，以在计算受限的场景下高效处理高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高分辨率图像时通过非均匀下采样保留关键信息，但会导致空间标签任务（如目标检测和语义分割）性能下降，需解决缩放变形带来的影响。
AI.method: LZU通过可逆的分段双线性映射近似缩放变换，先对输入图像进行缩放以聚焦关键区域，计算空间特征后还原变形，实现高效可微的反缩放。
AI.result: LZU在Argoverse-HD、Cityscapes和nuScenes等数据集上验证了有效性，即使在无高分辨率传感器数据时仍能提升性能，表明其具备上采样能力。
AI.conclusion: LZU为各类2D空间输入任务提供了通用解决方案，通过缩放与反缩放机制平衡计算效率与任务性能，具有广泛适用性。

ai_content_json.method: LZU通过可逆的分段双线性映射近似缩放变换，先对输入图像进行缩放以聚焦关键区域，计算空间特征后还原变形，实现高效可微的反缩放。
ai_content_json.result: LZU在Argoverse-HD、Cityscapes和nuScenes等数据集上验证了有效性，即使在无高分辨率传感器数据时仍能提升性能，表明其具备上采样能力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: LZU为各类2D空间输入任务提供了通用解决方案，通过缩放与反缩放机制平衡计算效率与任务性能，具有广泛适用性。

result: LZU在Argoverse-HD、Cityscapes和nuScenes等数据集上验证了有效性，即使在无高分辨率传感器数据时仍能提升性能，表明其具备上采样能力。
conclusion: LZU为各类2D空间输入任务提供了通用解决方案，通过缩放与反缩放机制平衡计算效率与任务性能，具有广泛适用性。
search_text: Learning to Zoom and Unzoom 学习缩放和取消缩放 Many perception systems in mobile computing, autonomous navigation, and AR/VR face strict compute constraints that are particularly challenging for high-resolution input images. Previous works propose nonuniform downsamplers that "learn to zoom" on salient image regions, reducing compute while retaining task-relevant image information. However, for tasks with spatial labels (such as 2D/3D object detection and semantic segmentation), such distortions may harm performance. In this work (LZU), we "learn to zoom" in on the input image, compute spatial features, and then "unzoom" to revert any deformations. To enable efficient and differentiable unzooming, we approximate the zooming warp with a piecewise bilinear mapping that is invertible. LZU can be applied to any task with 2D spatial input and any model with 2D spatial features, and we demonstrate this versatility by evaluating on a variety of tasks and datasets: object detection on Argoverse-HD, semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, and monocular 3D object detection on nuScenes. Interestingly, we observe boosts in performance even when high-resolution sensor data is unavailable, implying that LZU can be used to "learn to upsample" as well. 移动计算、自主导航和 AR/VR 中的许多感知系统都面临着严格的计算限制，这对于高分辨率输入图像来说尤其具有挑战性。之前的工作提出了非均匀下采样器，可以“学习缩放”显着图像区域，减少计算量，同时保留与任务相关的图像信息。然而，对于具有空间标签的任务（例如 2D/3D 对象检测和语义分割），这种扭曲可能会损害性能。在这项工作（LZU）中，我们“学习放大”输入图像，计算空间特征，然后“取消缩放”以恢复任何变形。为了实现高效且可微的缩放，我们使用可逆的分段双线性映射来近似缩放扭曲。 LZU 可以应用于任何具有 2D 空间输入的任务和任何具有 2D 空间特征的模型，我们通过评估各种任务和数据集来展示这种多功能性：Argoverse-HD 上的对象检测、Cityscapes 上的语义分割以及 nuScenes 上的单目 3D 对象检测。有趣的是，即使高分辨率传感器数据不可用，我们也观察到性能的提升，这意味着 LZU 也可以用于“学习上采样”。 本文提出一种名为LZU的方法，通过学习在输入图像上进行缩放和还原操作，以在计算受限的场景下高效处理高分辨率图像。 Chittesh Thavamani,Mengtian Li,Francesco Ferroni,Deva Ramanan cs.CV

authors_text: Quan Sun,Yuxin Fang,Ledell Wu,Xinlong Wang,Yue Cao
title: EVA-CLIP: Improved Training Techniques for CLIP at Scale
title_zh: EVA-CLIP：改进的大规模 CLIP 培训技术
comment: To Rei and the moon. Code & Models: https://github.com/baaivision/EVA/tree/master/EVA-CLIP
comments: To Rei and the moon. Code & Models: https://github.com/baaivision/EVA/tree/master/EVA-CLIP
abstract: Contrastive language-image pre-training, CLIP for short, has gained increasing attention for its potential in various scenarios. In this paper, we propose EVA-CLIP, a series of models that significantly improve the efficiency and effectiveness of CLIP training. Our approach incorporates new techniques for representation learning, optimization, and augmentation, enabling EVA-CLIP to achieve superior performance compared to previous CLIP models with the same number of parameters but significantly smaller training costs. Notably, our largest 5.0B-parameter EVA-02-CLIP-E/14+ with only 9 billion seen samples achieves 82.0 zero-shot top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K val. A smaller EVA-02-CLIP-L/14+ with only 430 million parameters and 6 billion seen samples achieves 80.4 zero-shot top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K val. To facilitate open access and open research, we release the complete suite of EVA-CLIP to the community at https://github.com/baaivision/EVA/tree/master/EVA-CLIP.
summary: Contrastive language-image pre-training, CLIP for short, has gained increasing attention for its potential in various scenarios. In this paper, we propose EVA-CLIP, a series of models that significantly improve the efficiency and effectiveness of CLIP training. Our approach incorporates new techniques for representation learning, optimization, and augmentation, enabling EVA-CLIP to achieve superior performance compared to previous CLIP models with the same number of parameters but significantly smaller training costs. Notably, our largest 5.0B-parameter EVA-02-CLIP-E/14+ with only 9 billion seen samples achieves 82.0 zero-shot top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K val. A smaller EVA-02-CLIP-L/14+ with only 430 million parameters and 6 billion seen samples achieves 80.4 zero-shot top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K val. To facilitate open access and open research, we release the complete suite of EVA-CLIP to the community at https://github.com/baaivision/EVA/tree/master/EVA-CLIP.
abstract_zh: 对比语言图像预训练，简称CLIP，因其在各种场景中的潜力而受到越来越多的关注。在本文中，我们提出了 EVA-CLIP，这是一系列显着提高 CLIP 训练效率和效果的模型。我们的方法结合了表示学习、优化和增强的新技术，使 EVA-CLIP 与之前的 CLIP 模型相比能够实现卓越的性能，参数数量相同，但训练成本却显着降低。值得注意的是，我们最大的 5.0B 参数 EVA-02-CLIP-E/14+ 仅使用 90 亿个可见样本，在 ImageNet-1K 验证上实现了 82.0 零样本 top-1 精度。较小的 EVA-02-CLIP-L/14+ 仅具有 4.3 亿个参数和 60 亿个可见样本，在 ImageNet-1K 验证上实现了 80.4 的零样本 top-1 精度。为了促进开放获取和开放研究，我们向社区发布了完整的 EVA-CLIP 套件：https://github.com/baaivision/EVA/tree/master/EVA-CLIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVA-CLIP系列模型，通过改进训练技术提升CLIP的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 为提高CLIP模型的训练效率和性能，同时降低训练成本，本文提出改进方法。
AI.method: 采用新的表示学习、优化和数据增强技术，优化模型结构和训练流程。
AI.result: EVA-02-CLIP-E/14+在ImageNet-1K验证集上达到82.0零样本top-1精度，参数量50亿但训练样本仅90亿；较小的EVA-02-CLIP-L/14+参数量4.3亿，训练样本60亿，精度80.4。
AI.conclusion: EVA-CLIP在保持参数量级的同时显著提升性能并降低训练成本，开源促进研究。

authors_text: Taoran Yi,Jiemin Fang,Xinggang Wang,Wenyu Liu
title: Generalizable Neural Voxels for Fast Human Radiance Fields
title_zh: 用于快速人类辐射场的可推广神经体素
abstract: Rendering moving human bodies at free viewpoints only from a monocular video is quite a challenging problem. The information is too sparse to model complicated human body structures and motions from both view and pose dimensions. Neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown great power in novel view synthesis and have been applied to human body rendering. However, most current NeRF-based methods bear huge costs for both training and rendering, which impedes the wide applications in real-life scenarios. In this paper, we propose a rendering framework that can learn moving human body structures extremely quickly from a monocular video. The framework is built by integrating both neural fields and neural voxels. Especially, a set of generalizable neural voxels are constructed. With pretrained on various human bodies, these general voxels represent a basic skeleton and can provide strong geometric priors. For the fine-tuning process, individual voxels are constructed for learning differential textures, complementary to general voxels. Thus learning a novel body can be further accelerated, taking only a few minutes. Our method shows significantly higher training efficiency compared with previous methods, while maintaining similar rendering quality. The project page is at https://taoranyi.com/gneuvox .
summary: Rendering moving human bodies at free viewpoints only from a monocular video is quite a challenging problem. The information is too sparse to model complicated human body structures and motions from both view and pose dimensions. Neural radiance fields (NeRF) have shown great power in novel view synthesis and have been applied to human body rendering. However, most current NeRF-based methods bear huge costs for both training and rendering, which impedes the wide applications in real-life scenarios. In this paper, we propose a rendering framework that can learn moving human body structures extremely quickly from a monocular video. The framework is built by integrating both neural fields and neural voxels. Especially, a set of generalizable neural voxels are constructed. With pretrained on various human bodies, these general voxels represent a basic skeleton and can provide strong geometric priors. For the fine-tuning process, individual voxels are constructed for learning differential textures, complementary to general voxels. Thus learning a novel body can be further accelerated, taking only a few minutes. Our method shows significantly higher training efficiency compared with previous methods, while maintaining similar rendering quality. The project page is at https://taoranyi.com/gneuvox .
abstract_zh: 仅从单眼视频中以自由视点渲染移动的人体是一个相当具有挑战性的问题。这些信息太稀疏，无法从视图和姿势维度对复杂的人体结构和运动进行建模。神经辐射场（NeRF）在新颖的视图合成中显示出强大的能力，并已应用于人体渲染。然而，目前大多数基于 NeRF 的方法在训练和渲染方面都承受着巨大的成本，这阻碍了在现实生活场景中的广泛应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种渲染框架，可以从单目视频中极快地学习移动的人体结构。该框架是通过集成神经场和神经体素构建的。特别是，构建了一组可概括的神经体素。通过对各种人体进行预训练，这些一般体素代表了基本骨架，并且可以提供强大的几何先验。对于微调过程，构建单个体素来学习差异纹理，与一般体素互补。因此，学习新身体的速度可以进一步加快，只需几分钟。与以前的方法相比，我们的方法显示出明显更高的训练效率，同时保持相似的渲染质量。项目页面位于 https://taoranyi.com/gneuvox 。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通用神经体素的快速人体辐射场框架，通过单目视频实现动态人体的高效渲染。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法在训练和渲染成本过高，难以满足实际应用场景需求，需提升人体动态建模效率。
AI.method: 融合神经场与神经体素技术，预训练通用体素提供几何先验，结合个体体素学习纹理细节，加速模型训练。
AI.result: 相比现有方法训练效率提升显著，在保持渲染质量的同时将新人体建模时间缩短至数分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过通用体素与个性化体素协同学习，在效率与质量间取得平衡，适用于实际动态人体渲染场景。

The project page is at https://taoranyi.com/gneuvox . 仅从单眼视频中以自由视点渲染移动的人体是一个相当具有挑战性的问题。这些信息太稀疏，无法从视图和姿势维度对复杂的人体结构和运动进行建模。神经辐射场（NeRF）在新颖的视图合成中显示出强大的能力，并已应用于人体渲染。然而，目前大多数基于 NeRF 的方法在训练和渲染方面都承受着巨大的成本，这阻碍了在现实生活场景中的广泛应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种渲染框架，可以从单目视频中极快地学习移动的人体结构。该框架是通过集成神经场和神经体素构建的。特别是，构建了一组可概括的神经体素。通过对各种人体进行预训练，这些一般体素代表了基本骨架，并且可以提供强大的几何先验。对于微调过程，构建单个体素来学习差异纹理，与一般体素互补。因此，学习新身体的速度可以进一步加快，只需几分钟。与以前的方法相比，我们的方法显示出明显更高的训练效率，同时保持相似的渲染质量。项目页面位于 https://taoranyi.com/gneuvox 。 本文提出一种基于通用神经体素的快速人体辐射场框架，通过单目视频实现动态人体的高效渲染。 Taoran Yi,Jiemin Fang,Xinggang Wang,Wenyu Liu cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Daniel Widdowson,Vitaliy Kurlin
title: Recognizing Rigid Patterns of Unlabeled Point Clouds by Complete and Continuous Isometry Invariants with no False Negatives and no False Positives
title_zh: 通过完整且连续的等距不变量识别未标记点云的刚性模式，没有假阴性和假阳性
comment: This conference version is for CVPR (Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition), https://cvpr2023.thecvf.com. The latest file is http://kurlin.org/projects/cloud-isometry-spaces/distance-based-invariants.pdf. The extended versions of sections 3-4 with all proofs and big examples are at arXiv:2303.14161 for metric spaces, arXiv:2303.13486 for Euclidean spaces. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.13486, arXiv:2303.14161
comments: This conference version is for CVPR (Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition), https://cvpr2023.thecvf.com. The latest file is http://kurlin.org/projects/cloud-isometry-spaces/distance-based-invariants.pdf. The extended versions of sections 3-4 with all proofs and big examples are at arXiv:2303.14161 for metric spaces, arXiv:2303.13486 for Euclidean spaces. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.13486, arXiv:2303.14161
abstract: Rigid structures such as cars or any other solid objects are often represented by finite clouds of unlabeled points. The most natural equivalence on these point clouds is rigid motion or isometry maintaining all inter-point distances. Rigid patterns of point clouds can be reliably compared only by complete isometry invariants that can also be called equivariant descriptors without false negatives (isometric clouds having different descriptions) and without false positives (non-isometric clouds with the same description). Noise and motion in data motivate a search for invariants that are continuous under perturbations of points in a suitable metric. We propose the first continuous and complete invariant of unlabeled clouds in any Euclidean space. For a fixed dimension, the new metric for this invariant is computable in a polynomial time in the number of points.
summary: Rigid structures such as cars or any other solid objects are often represented by finite clouds of unlabeled points. The most natural equivalence on these point clouds is rigid motion or isometry maintaining all inter-point distances. Rigid patterns of point clouds can be reliably compared only by complete isometry invariants that can also be called equivariant descriptors without false negatives (isometric clouds having different descriptions) and without false positives (non-isometric clouds with the same description). Noise and motion in data motivate a search for invariants that are continuous under perturbations of points in a suitable metric. We propose the first continuous and complete invariant of unlabeled clouds in any Euclidean space. For a fixed dimension, the new metric for this invariant is computable in a polynomial time in the number of points.
abstract_zh: 汽车或任何其他固体物体等刚性结构通常由未标记点的有限云表示。这些点云上最自然的等价物是保持所有点间距离的刚性运动或等距。点云的刚性模式只能通过完整的等距不变量进行可靠的比较，这些不变量也可以称为等变描述符，没有误报（具有不同描述的等距云）和误报（具有相同描述的非等距云）。数据中的噪声和运动激发了对在适当度量的点扰动下连续的不变量的搜索。我们提出了任何欧几里得空间中第一个连续且完全的无标记云不变量。对于固定维度，该不变量的新度量可以在点数的多项式时间内计算。

AI.tldr: 设计一种无误报和漏报的完整连续等距不变量，用于识别未标记点云中的刚性结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理噪声和运动干扰时存在误报或漏报问题，需开发对扰动连续且能准确区分等距与非等距点云的不变量。
AI.method: 提出任意欧几里得空间中首个连续且完整的未标记点云不变量，其度量在固定维度下可多项式时间计算。
AI.result: 实现首个无误报漏报的连续完整不变量，计算复杂度为多项式时间，适用于任意维度欧几里得空间。
AI.conclusion: 解决了刚性点云比较中的关键难题，为鲁棒形状分析提供理论基础与高效计算方法。

authors_text: Yifei Yin,Chen Guo,Manuel Kaufmann,Juan Jose Zarate,Jie Song,Otmar Hilliges
title: Hi4D: 4D Instance Segmentation of Close Human Interaction
title_zh: Hi4D：近距离人类交互的 4D 实例分割
abstract: We propose Hi4D, a method and dataset for the automatic analysis of physically close human-human interaction under prolonged contact. Robustly disentangling several in-contact subjects is a challenging task due to occlusions and complex shapes. Hence, existing multi-view systems typically fuse 3D surfaces of close subjects into a single, connected mesh. To address this issue we leverage i) individually fitted neural implicit avatars; ii) an alternating optimization scheme that refines pose and surface through periods of close proximity; and iii) thus segment the fused raw scans into individual instances. From these instances we compile Hi4D dataset of 4D textured scans of 20 subject pairs, 100 sequences, and a total of more than 11K frames. Hi4D contains rich interaction-centric annotations in 2D and 3D alongside accurately registered parametric body models. We define varied human pose and shape estimation tasks on this dataset and provide results from state-of-the-art methods on these benchmarks.
summary: We propose Hi4D, a method and dataset for the automatic analysis of physically close human-human interaction under prolonged contact. Robustly disentangling several in-contact subjects is a challenging task due to occlusions and complex shapes. Hence, existing multi-view systems typically fuse 3D surfaces of close subjects into a single, connected mesh. To address this issue we leverage i) individually fitted neural implicit avatars; ii) an alternating optimization scheme that refines pose and surface through periods of close proximity; and iii) thus segment the fused raw scans into individual instances. From these instances we compile Hi4D dataset of 4D textured scans of 20 subject pairs, 100 sequences, and a total of more than 11K frames. Hi4D contains rich interaction-centric annotations in 2D and 3D alongside accurately registered parametric body models. We define varied human pose and shape estimation tasks on this dataset and provide results from state-of-the-art methods on these benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Hi4D，一种用于自动分析长时间接触下身体亲密的人与人互动的方法和数据集。由于遮挡和复杂的形状，强有力地解开几个接触的对象是一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，现有的多视图系统通常将近距离主体的 3D 表面融合到单个连接的网格中。为了解决这个问题，我们利用 i) 单独拟合的神经隐式化身； ii) 交替优化方案，通过紧密接近的时间段来细化姿态和表面； iii) 因此将融合的原始扫描分割成单独的实例。从这些实例中，我们编译了 20 个主题对、100 个序列以及总共超过 11K 帧的 4D 纹理扫描的 Hi4D 数据集。 Hi4D 包含丰富的以交互为中心的 2D 和 3D 注释以及准确注册的参数化人体模型。我们在此数据集上定义了各种人体姿势和形状估计任务，并提供了这些基准上最先进方法的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hi4D方法及数据集，用于对长时间接触的近距离人类交互进行4D实例分割，解决现有系统无法分离接触人体的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多视角系统因遮挡和复杂形状难以分离接触人体，通常将多个接触者表面融合为单一网格，导致无法准确分析个体交互。
AI.method: 采用个体拟合的神经隐式化身、交替优化方案（通过近距离时段优化姿态与表面）及实例分割技术，构建包含4D纹理扫描的Hi4D数据集。
AI.result: Hi4D包含20对受试者、100个序列、11K帧的4D数据，提供2D/3D注释及参数化人体模型，并评估了最新方法在姿态与形状估计任务上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了接触人体的精确分割，为人类交互分析提供了新基准，推动了4D实例分割领域的发展。

authors_text: Benjamin Moseley,Heather Newman,Kirk Pruhs
title: Online $k$-Median with Consistent Clusters
title_zh: 具有一致聚类的在线 $k$-中值
abstract: We consider the online $k$-median clustering problem in which $n$ points arrive online and must be irrevocably assigned to a cluster on arrival. As there are lower bound instances that show that an online algorithm cannot achieve a competitive ratio that is a function of $n$ and $k$, we consider a beyond worst-case analysis model in which the algorithm is provided a priori with a predicted budget $B$ that upper bounds the optimal objective value. We give an algorithm that achieves a competitive ratio that is exponential in the the number $k$ of clusters, and show that the competitive ratio of every algorithm must be linear in $k$. To the best of our knowledge this is the first investigation in the literature that considers cluster consistency using competitive analysis.
summary: We consider the online $k$-median clustering problem in which $n$ points arrive online and must be irrevocably assigned to a cluster on arrival. As there are lower bound instances that show that an online algorithm cannot achieve a competitive ratio that is a function of $n$ and $k$, we consider a beyond worst-case analysis model in which the algorithm is provided a priori with a predicted budget $B$ that upper bounds the optimal objective value. We give an algorithm that achieves a competitive ratio that is exponential in the the number $k$ of clusters, and show that the competitive ratio of every algorithm must be linear in $k$. To the best of our knowledge this is the first investigation in the literature that considers cluster consistency using competitive analysis.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在线 $k$ 中值聚类问题，其中 $n$ 点在线到达，并且必须在到达时不可撤销地分配给集群。由于存在下限实例表明在线算法无法实现作为 $n$ 和 $k$ 函数的竞争比，因此我们考虑超越最坏情况分析模型，其中先验地向算法提供预测预算 $B$，该预算是最佳目标值的上限。我们给出了一种算法，其竞争比在簇数 $k$ 中呈指数关系，并表明每个算法的竞争比必须在 $k$ 中呈线性关系。据我们所知，这是文献中首次使用竞争分析来考虑集群一致性的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线k-中位聚类问题，在超越最坏情况分析模型下，通过引入预测预算B设计算法并分析其竞争比。
AI.motivation: 传统在线算法无法达到与n和k无关的竞争比，需通过引入先验预算B改进分析模型，并探索聚类一致性问题。
AI.method: 提出基于预算B的算法，其竞争比为k的指数函数，并证明所有算法的竞争比必须线性于k。
AI.result: 算法实现指数级竞争比，证明线性下界，首次在文献中通过竞争分析研究聚类一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在线聚类问题提供新分析框架，填补文献空白，未来可进一步优化算法或扩展模型。

search_text: Online $k$-Median with Consistent Clusters 具有一致聚类的在线 $k$-中值 We consider the online $k$-median clustering problem in which $n$ points arrive online and must be irrevocably assigned to a cluster on arrival. As there are lower bound instances that show that an online algorithm cannot achieve a competitive ratio that is a function of $n$ and $k$, we consider a beyond worst-case analysis model in which the algorithm is provided a priori with a predicted budget $B$ that upper bounds the optimal objective value. We give an algorithm that achieves a competitive ratio that is exponential in the the number $k$ of clusters, and show that the competitive ratio of every algorithm must be linear in $k$. To the best of our knowledge this is the first investigation in the literature that considers cluster consistency using competitive analysis. 我们考虑在线 $k$ 中值聚类问题，其中 $n$ 点在线到达，并且必须在到达时不可撤销地分配给集群。由于存在下限实例表明在线算法无法实现作为 $n$ 和 $k$ 函数的竞争比，因此我们考虑超越最坏情况分析模型，其中先验地向算法提供预测预算 $B$，该预算是最佳目标值的上限。我们给出了一种算法，其竞争比在簇数 $k$ 中呈指数关系，并表明每个算法的竞争比必须在 $k$ 中呈线性关系。据我们所知，这是文献中首次使用竞争分析来考虑集群一致性的研究。 本文研究在线k-中位聚类问题，在超越最坏情况分析模型下，通过引入预测预算B设计算法并分析其竞争比。 Benjamin Moseley,Heather Newman,Kirk Pruhs cs.DS

authors_text: Kunyang Sun,Wei Lin,Haoqin Shi,Zhengming Zhang,Yongming Huang,Horst Bischof
title: AIR-DA: Adversarial Image Reconstruction for Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: AIR-DA：用于无监督域自适应目标检测的对抗性图像重建
comment: Accepted at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters 2023
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptive object detection is a challenging vision task where object detectors are adapted from a label-rich source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Recent advances prove the efficacy of the adversarial based domain alignment where the adversarial training between the feature extractor and domain discriminator results in domain-invariance in the feature space. However, due to the domain shift, domain discrimination, especially on low-level features, is an easy task. This results in an imbalance of the adversarial training between the domain discriminator and the feature extractor. In this work, we achieve a better domain alignment by introducing an auxiliary regularization task to improve the training balance. Specifically, we propose Adversarial Image Reconstruction (AIR) as the regularizer to facilitate the adversarial training of the feature extractor. We further design a multi-level feature alignment module to enhance the adaptation performance. Our evaluations across several datasets of challenging domain shifts demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms all previous methods, of both one- and two-stage, in most settings.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptive object detection is a challenging vision task where object detectors are adapted from a label-rich source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Recent advances prove the efficacy of the adversarial based domain alignment where the adversarial training between the feature extractor and domain discriminator results in domain-invariance in the feature space. However, due to the domain shift, domain discrimination, especially on low-level features, is an easy task. This results in an imbalance of the adversarial training between the domain discriminator and the feature extractor. In this work, we achieve a better domain alignment by introducing an auxiliary regularization task to improve the training balance. Specifically, we propose Adversarial Image Reconstruction (AIR) as the regularizer to facilitate the adversarial training of the feature extractor. We further design a multi-level feature alignment module to enhance the adaptation performance. Our evaluations across several datasets of challenging domain shifts demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms all previous methods, of both one- and two-stage, in most settings.
abstract_zh: 无监督域自适应对象检测是一项具有挑战性的视觉任务，其中对象检测器从富含标签的源域适应到未标记的目标域。最近的进展证明了基于对抗性的域对齐的有效性，其中特征提取器和域鉴别器之间的对抗性训练导致特征空间中的域不变性。然而，由于领域的转移，领域区分，特别是低级特征的区分，是一项容易的任务。这导致域鉴别器和特征提取器之间的对抗训练不平衡。在这项工作中，我们通过引入辅助正则化任务来改善训练平衡，从而实现更好的域对齐。具体来说，我们提出对抗性图像重建（AIR）作为正则化器，以促进特征提取器的对抗性训练。我们进一步设计了多级特征对齐模块来增强适应性能。我们对具有挑战性的域转移的多个数据集进行的评估表明，在大多数情况下，所提出的方法优于所有先前的一阶段和两阶段方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIR-DA方法，通过对抗图像重建和多级特征对齐模块，解决无监督域适应目标检测中的域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗域对齐方法在低级特征上易导致判别器与特征提取器训练不平衡，影响域适应效果。
AI.method: 引入对抗图像重建（AIR）作为正则化项，结合多级特征对齐模块，增强特征提取器的对抗训练平衡性。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的域偏移数据集上，该方法在多数设置中优于所有现有单阶段和双阶段方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过对抗训练平衡与多级特征对齐，AIR-DA有效提升了无监督域适应目标检测的性能。

authors_text: Junkai Deng,Fei Hou,Xuhui Chen,Wencheng Wang,Ying He
title: 2S-UDF: A Novel Two-stage UDF Learning Method for Robust Non-watertight Model Reconstruction from Multi-view Images
title_zh: 2S-UDF：一种新颖的两阶段 UDF 学习方法，用于从多视图图像重建鲁棒非水密模型
abstract: Recently, building on the foundation of neural radiance field, various techniques have emerged to learn unsigned distance fields (UDF) to reconstruct 3D non-watertight models from multi-view images. Yet, a central challenge in UDF-based volume rendering is formulating a proper way to convert unsigned distance values into volume density, ensuring that the resulting weight function remains unbiased and sensitive to occlusions. Falling short on these requirements often results in incorrect topology or large reconstruction errors in resulting models. This paper addresses this challenge by presenting a novel two-stage algorithm, 2S-UDF, for learning a high-quality UDF from multi-view images. Initially, the method applies an easily trainable density function that, while slightly biased and transparent, aids in coarse reconstruction. The subsequent stage then refines the geometry and appearance of the object to achieve a high-quality reconstruction by directly adjusting the weight function used in volume rendering to ensure that it is unbiased and occlusion-aware. Decoupling density and weight in two stages makes our training stable and robust, distinguishing our technique from existing UDF learning approaches. Evaluations on the DeepFashion3D, DTU, and BlendedMVS datasets validate the robustness and effectiveness of our proposed approach. In both quantitative metrics and visual quality, the results indicate our superior performance over other UDF learning techniques in reconstructing 3D non-watertight models from multi-view images. Our code is available at https://bitbucket.org/jkdeng/2sudf/.
summary: Recently, building on the foundation of neural radiance field, various techniques have emerged to learn unsigned distance fields (UDF) to reconstruct 3D non-watertight models from multi-view images. Yet, a central challenge in UDF-based volume rendering is formulating a proper way to convert unsigned distance values into volume density, ensuring that the resulting weight function remains unbiased and sensitive to occlusions. Falling short on these requirements often results in incorrect topology or large reconstruction errors in resulting models. This paper addresses this challenge by presenting a novel two-stage algorithm, 2S-UDF, for learning a high-quality UDF from multi-view images. Initially, the method applies an easily trainable density function that, while slightly biased and transparent, aids in coarse reconstruction. The subsequent stage then refines the geometry and appearance of the object to achieve a high-quality reconstruction by directly adjusting the weight function used in volume rendering to ensure that it is unbiased and occlusion-aware. Decoupling density and weight in two stages makes our training stable and robust, distinguishing our technique from existing UDF learning approaches. Evaluations on the DeepFashion3D, DTU, and BlendedMVS datasets validate the robustness and effectiveness of our proposed approach. In both quantitative metrics and visual quality, the results indicate our superior performance over other UDF learning techniques in reconstructing 3D non-watertight models from multi-view images. Our code is available at https://bitbucket.org/jkdeng/2sudf/.
abstract_zh: 最近，在神经辐射场的基础上，出现了各种学习无符号距离场（UDF）的技术，以从多视图图像重建 3D 非水密模型。然而，基于 UDF 的体积渲染的一个核心挑战是制定一种正确的方法将无符号距离值转换为体积密度，确保生成的权重函数保持无偏且对遮挡敏感。达不到这些要求通常会导致结果模型中出现不正确的拓扑或较大的重建错误。本文通过提出一种新颖的两阶段算法 2S-UDF 来解决这一挑战，用于从多视图图像中学习高质量的 UDF。最初，该方法应用易于训练的密度函数，虽然略有偏差且透明，但有助于粗略重建。然后，后续阶段通过直接调整体渲染中使用的权重函数来细化对象的几何形状和外观，以实现高质量的重建，以确保其无偏差和遮挡感知。两个阶段中密度和权重的解耦使我们的训练稳定且稳健，这将我们的技术与现有的 UDF 学习方法区分开来。对 DeepFashion3D、DTU 和 BlendedMVS 数据集的评估验证了我们提出的方法的稳健性和有效性。在定量指标和视觉质量方面，结果表明我们在从多视图图像重建 3D 非水密模型方面优于其他 UDF 学习技术。我们的代码可在 https://bitbucket.org/jkdeng/2sudf/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为2S-UDF的两阶段算法，用于从多视角图像中学习高质量的无符号距离场（UDF），以实现鲁棒的非封闭三维模型重建。
AI.motivation: 基于神经辐射场的UDF学习方法在将无符号距离值转换为体积密度时存在偏差和遮挡敏感性不足的问题，导致重建模型拓扑错误或误差较大。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段使用易训练的密度函数进行粗略重建，第二阶段直接调整体积渲染的权重函数，实现无偏且遮挡感知的几何与外观优化。
AI.result: 在DeepFashion3D、DTU和BlendedMVS数据集上验证，2S-UDF在定量指标和视觉质量上均优于现有UDF方法，且训练稳定。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦密度与权重的两阶段设计，2S-UDF有效解决了UDF重建中的偏差和遮挡问题，为非封闭模型重建提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Evaluations on the DeepFashion3D, DTU, and BlendedMVS datasets validate the robustness and effectiveness of our proposed approach. In both quantitative metrics and visual quality, the results indicate our superior performance over other UDF learning techniques in reconstructing 3D non-watertight models from multi-view images. Our code is available at https://bitbucket.org/jkdeng/2sudf/. 最近，在神经辐射场的基础上，出现了各种学习无符号距离场（UDF）的技术，以从多视图图像重建 3D 非水密模型。然而，基于 UDF 的体积渲染的一个核心挑战是制定一种正确的方法将无符号距离值转换为体积密度，确保生成的权重函数保持无偏且对遮挡敏感。达不到这些要求通常会导致结果模型中出现不正确的拓扑或较大的重建错误。本文通过提出一种新颖的两阶段算法 2S-UDF 来解决这一挑战，用于从多视图图像中学习高质量的 UDF。最初，该方法应用易于训练的密度函数，虽然略有偏差且透明，但有助于粗略重建。然后，后续阶段通过直接调整体渲染中使用的权重函数来细化对象的几何形状和外观，以实现高质量的重建，以确保其无偏差和遮挡感知。两个阶段中密度和权重的解耦使我们的训练稳定且稳健，这将我们的技术与现有的 UDF 学习方法区分开来。对 DeepFashion3D、DTU 和 BlendedMVS 数据集的评估验证了我们提出的方法的稳健性和有效性。在定量指标和视觉质量方面，结果表明我们在从多视图图像重建 3D 非水密模型方面优于其他 UDF 学习技术。我们的代码可在 https://bitbucket.org/jkdeng/2sudf/ 获取。 本文提出了一种名为2S-UDF的两阶段算法，用于从多视角图像中学习高质量的无符号距离场（UDF），以实现鲁棒的非封闭三维模型重建。 Junkai Deng,Fei Hou,Xuhui Chen,Wencheng Wang,Ying He cs.CV

authors_text: Jian Liang,Ran He,Tieniu Tan
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Test-Time Adaptation under Distribution Shifts
title_zh: 分布变化下测试时间适应的综合调查
comment: Discussions, comments, and questions are all welcomed in \url{https://github.com/tim-learn/awesome-test-time-adaptation}
comments: Discussions, comments, and questions are all welcomed in \url{https://github.com/tim-learn/awesome-test-time-adaptation}
abstract: Machine learning methods strive to acquire a robust model during the training process that can effectively generalize to test samples, even in the presence of distribution shifts. However, these methods often suffer from performance degradation due to unknown test distributions. Test-time adaptation (TTA), an emerging paradigm, has the potential to adapt a pre-trained model to unlabeled data during testing, before making predictions. Recent progress in this paradigm has highlighted the significant benefits of using unlabeled data to train self-adapted models prior to inference. In this survey, we categorize TTA into several distinct groups based on the form of test data, namely, test-time domain adaptation, test-time batch adaptation, and online test-time adaptation. For each category, we provide a comprehensive taxonomy of advanced algorithms and discuss various learning scenarios. Furthermore, we analyze relevant applications of TTA and discuss open challenges and promising areas for future research. For a comprehensive list of TTA methods, kindly refer to \url{https://github.com/tim-learn/awesome-test-time-adaptation}.
summary: Machine learning methods strive to acquire a robust model during the training process that can effectively generalize to test samples, even in the presence of distribution shifts. However, these methods often suffer from performance degradation due to unknown test distributions. Test-time adaptation (TTA), an emerging paradigm, has the potential to adapt a pre-trained model to unlabeled data during testing, before making predictions. Recent progress in this paradigm has highlighted the significant benefits of using unlabeled data to train self-adapted models prior to inference. In this survey, we categorize TTA into several distinct groups based on the form of test data, namely, test-time domain adaptation, test-time batch adaptation, and online test-time adaptation. For each category, we provide a comprehensive taxonomy of advanced algorithms and discuss various learning scenarios. Furthermore, we analyze relevant applications of TTA and discuss open challenges and promising areas for future research. For a comprehensive list of TTA methods, kindly refer to \url{https://github.com/tim-learn/awesome-test-time-adaptation}.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法努力在训练过程中获得稳健的模型，即使存在分布变化，该模型也可以有效地推广到测试样本。然而，这些方法常常由于未知的测试分布而导致性能下降。测试时间适应 (TTA) 是一种新兴范例，有可能在进行预测之前在测试期间使预训练模型适应未标记的数据。这一范式的最新进展凸显了在推理之前使用未标记数据来训练自适应模型的显着好处。在本次调查中，我们根据测试数据的形式将TTA分为几个不同的组，即测试时域适应、测试时批量适应和在线测试时适应。对于每个类别，我们提供了高级算法的全面分类，并讨论了各种学习场景。此外，我们分析了 TTA 的相关应用，并讨论了未来研究的开放挑战和有前景的领域。有关 TTA 方法的完整列表，请参阅 \url{https://github.com/tim-learn/awesome-test-time-adaptation}。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了测试时适应（TTA）方法，针对分布偏移问题，系统分类了TTA的三大类方法并讨论其应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在面对未知测试分布时性能下降，TTA通过利用测试阶段的未标记数据提升模型适应性，成为解决分布偏移的重要方向。
AI.method: 将TTA分为测试时域适应、测试时批量适应和在线测试时适应三类，总结每类方法的算法框架与学习场景，并分析其应用场景与技术挑战。
AI.result: 构建了TTA方法的全面分类体系，梳理了主流算法及适用场景，指出了当前研究的不足与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: TTA通过动态适应测试数据分布显著提升模型鲁棒性，但其在复杂场景下的泛化能力、计算效率及理论分析仍是未来研究的关键问题。

authors_text: Patrick Rockenschaub,Adam Hilbert,Tabea Kossen,Falk von Dincklage,Vince Istvan Madai,Dietmar Frey
title: From Single-Hospital to Multi-Centre Applications: Enhancing the Generalisability of Deep Learning Models for Adverse Event Prediction in the ICU
title_zh: 从单医院到多中心应用：增强 ICU 不良事件预测深度学习模型的通用性
abstract: Deep learning (DL) can aid doctors in detecting worsening patient states early, affording them time to react and prevent bad outcomes. While DL-based early warning models usually work well in the hospitals they were trained for, they tend to be less reliable when applied at new hospitals. This makes it difficult to deploy them at scale. Using carefully harmonised intensive care data from four data sources across Europe and the US (totalling 334,812 stays), we systematically assessed the reliability of DL models for three common adverse events: death, acute kidney injury (AKI), and sepsis. We tested whether using more than one data source and/or explicitly optimising for generalisability during training improves model performance at new hospitals. We found that models achieved high AUROC for mortality (0.838-0.869), AKI (0.823-0.866), and sepsis (0.749-0.824) at the training hospital. As expected, performance dropped at new hospitals, sometimes by as much as -0.200. Using more than one data source for training mitigated the performance drop, with multi-source models performing roughly on par with the best single-source model. This suggests that as data from more hospitals become available for training, model robustness is likely to increase, lower-bounding robustness with the performance of the most applicable data source in the training data. Dedicated methods promoting generalisability did not noticeably improve performance in our experiments.
summary: Deep learning (DL) can aid doctors in detecting worsening patient states early, affording them time to react and prevent bad outcomes. While DL-based early warning models usually work well in the hospitals they were trained for, they tend to be less reliable when applied at new hospitals. This makes it difficult to deploy them at scale. Using carefully harmonised intensive care data from four data sources across Europe and the US (totalling 334,812 stays), we systematically assessed the reliability of DL models for three common adverse events: death, acute kidney injury (AKI), and sepsis. We tested whether using more than one data source and/or explicitly optimising for generalisability during training improves model performance at new hospitals. We found that models achieved high AUROC for mortality (0.838-0.869), AKI (0.823-0.866), and sepsis (0.749-0.824) at the training hospital. As expected, performance dropped at new hospitals, sometimes by as much as -0.200. Using more than one data source for training mitigated the performance drop, with multi-source models performing roughly on par with the best single-source model. This suggests that as data from more hospitals become available for training, model robustness is likely to increase, lower-bounding robustness with the performance of the most applicable data source in the training data. Dedicated methods promoting generalisability did not noticeably improve performance in our experiments.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 可以帮助医生及早发现病情恶化的患者，让他们有时间做出反应并防止出现不良后果。虽然基于深度学习的早期预警模型通常在接受培训的医院中效果良好，但在新医院应用时往往不太可靠。这使得大规模部署它们变得困难。使用来自欧洲和美国四个数据源（总计 334,812 次住院）的精心协调的重症监护数据，我们系统地评估了 DL 模型针对三种常见不良事件的可靠性：死亡、急性肾损伤 (AKI) 和脓毒症。我们测试了在训练期间使用多个数据源和/或明确优化通用性是否可以提高新医院的模型性能。我们发现模型在训练医院的死亡率 (0.838-0.869)、AKI (0.823-0.866) 和败血症 (0.749-0.824) 方面实现了较高的 AUROC。正如预期的那样，新医院的绩效下降，有时高达 -0.200。使用多个数据源进行训练可以缓解性能下降，多源模型的性能与最佳单源模型大致相当。这表明，随着更多医院的数据可用于训练，模型的稳健性可能会随着训练数据中最适用的数据源的性能而增加，下限稳健性也随之增加。在我们的实验中，促进通用性的专用方法并没有显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究如何通过多中心数据提升深度学习模型在ICU不良事件预测中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在训练医院表现良好，但难以推广到新医院，限制了其大规模部署。论文旨在探索多数据源和泛化优化方法是否能缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 利用欧洲和美国四个数据源的334,812例ICU病例数据，对比单源与多源训练模型在不同医院的性能，评估泛化优化方法的效果。
AI.result: 训练医院模型AUC较高（死亡0.838-0.869，AKI 0.823-0.866，脓毒症0.749-0.824），但新医院性能下降最多达0.200；多源模型性能优于单源模型，但专门优化泛化的方法未显著提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 多源数据训练可提升模型鲁棒性，但专用泛化方法效果有限，未来需更多医院数据以增强模型泛化能力。

Using more than one data source for training mitigated the performance drop, with multi-source models performing roughly on par with the best single-source model. This suggests that as data from more hospitals become available for training, model robustness is likely to increase, lower-bounding robustness with the performance of the most applicable data source in the training data. Dedicated methods promoting generalisability did not noticeably improve performance in our experiments. 深度学习 (DL) 可以帮助医生及早发现病情恶化的患者，让他们有时间做出反应并防止出现不良后果。虽然基于深度学习的早期预警模型通常在接受培训的医院中效果良好，但在新医院应用时往往不太可靠。这使得大规模部署它们变得困难。使用来自欧洲和美国四个数据源（总计 334,812 次住院）的精心协调的重症监护数据，我们系统地评估了 DL 模型针对三种常见不良事件的可靠性：死亡、急性肾损伤 (AKI) 和脓毒症。我们测试了在训练期间使用多个数据源和/或明确优化通用性是否可以提高新医院的模型性能。我们发现模型在训练医院的死亡率 (0.838-0.869)、AKI (0.823-0.866) 和败血症 (0.749-0.824) 方面实现了较高的 AUROC。正如预期的那样，新医院的绩效下降，有时高达 -0.200。使用多个数据源进行训练可以缓解性能下降，多源模型的性能与最佳单源模型大致相当。这表明，随着更多医院的数据可用于训练，模型的稳健性可能会随着训练数据中最适用的数据源的性能而增加，下限稳健性也随之增加。在我们的实验中，促进通用性的专用方法并没有显着提高性能。 该论文研究如何通过多中心数据提升深度学习模型在ICU不良事件预测中的泛化能力。 Patrick Rockenschaub,Adam Hilbert,Tabea Kossen,Falk von Dincklage,Vince Istvan Madai,Dietmar Frey cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Fengjiao Zou,Jennifer Ogle,Weimin Jin,Patrick Gerard,Daniel Petty,Andrew Robb
title: Pedestrian Behavior Interacting with Autonomous Vehicles: Role of AV Operation and Signal Indication and Roadway Infrastructure
title_zh: 与自动驾驶车辆交互的行人行为：自动驾驶汽车操作和信号指示以及道路基础设施的作用
abstract: Interacting with pedestrians is challenging for Autonomous vehicles (AVs). This study evaluates how AV operations /associated signaling and roadway infrastructure affect pedestrian behavior in virtual reality. AVs were designed with different operations and signal indications, including negotiating with no signal, negotiating with a yellow signal, and yellow/blue negotiating/no-yield indications. Results show that AV signal significantly impacts pedestrians' accepted gap, walking time, and waiting time. Pedestrians chose the largest open gap between cars with AV showing no signal, and had the slowest crossing speed with AV showing a yellow signal indication. Roadway infrastructure affects pedestrian walking time and waiting time.
summary: Interacting with pedestrians is challenging for Autonomous vehicles (AVs). This study evaluates how AV operations /associated signaling and roadway infrastructure affect pedestrian behavior in virtual reality. AVs were designed with different operations and signal indications, including negotiating with no signal, negotiating with a yellow signal, and yellow/blue negotiating/no-yield indications. Results show that AV signal significantly impacts pedestrians' accepted gap, walking time, and waiting time. Pedestrians chose the largest open gap between cars with AV showing no signal, and had the slowest crossing speed with AV showing a yellow signal indication. Roadway infrastructure affects pedestrian walking time and waiting time.
abstract_zh: 对于自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 来说，与行人互动是一项挑战。这项研究评估了自动驾驶操作/相关信号和道路基础设施如何影响虚拟现实中的行人行为。自动驾驶汽车设计有不同的操作和信号指示，包括无信号协商、黄色信号协商以及黄色/蓝色协商/不让步指示。结果表明，AV信号显着影响行人的接受间隙、行走时间和等待时间。行人选择在 AV 无信号的车辆之间最大的间隙过马路，并在 AV 显示黄色信号指示的情况下以最慢的速度过马路。道路基础设施影响行人步行时间和等待时间。

AI.tldr: 研究自动驾驶车辆（AV）的操作、信号指示及道路基础设施对行人行为的影响，通过虚拟现实实验评估其交互效果。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆与行人互动存在挑战，需明确AV操作信号及道路设施如何影响行人行为，以提升交互安全与效率。
AI.method: 通过虚拟现实实验，设计不同AV操作模式（无信号、黄灯信号、黄蓝协商/不礼让）及道路基础设施，观察行人行为反应。
AI.result: AV信号显著影响行人接受间隙、行走速度及等待时间；无信号时行人选择最大车距，黄灯信号下行走速度最慢；道路基础设施也影响行走和等待时间。
AI.conclusion: AV信号设计与道路基础设施优化对提升行人交互安全性至关重要，需结合行人行为特征进行系统设计。
