authors_text: Danny Weyns,Jesper Andersson
title: From Self-Adaptation to Self-Evolution Leveraging the Operational Design Domain
title_zh: 利用操作设计领域从自适应到自我进化
abstract: Engineering long-running computing systems that achieve their goals under ever-changing conditions pose significant challenges. Self-adaptation has shown to be a viable approach to dealing with changing conditions. Yet, the capabilities of a self-adaptive system are constrained by its operational design domain (ODD), i.e., the conditions for which the system was built (requirements, constraints, and context). Changes, such as adding new goals or dealing with new contexts, require system evolution. While the system evolution process has been automated substantially, it remains human-driven. Given the growing complexity of computing systems, human-driven evolution will eventually become unmanageable. In this paper, we provide a definition for ODD and apply it to a self-adaptive system. Next, we explain why conditions not covered by the ODD require system evolution. Then, we outline a new approach for self-evolution that leverages the concept of ODD, enabling a system to evolve autonomously to deal with conditions not anticipated by its initial ODD. We conclude with open challenges to realise self-evolution.
summary: Engineering long-running computing systems that achieve their goals under ever-changing conditions pose significant challenges. Self-adaptation has shown to be a viable approach to dealing with changing conditions. Yet, the capabilities of a self-adaptive system are constrained by its operational design domain (ODD), i.e., the conditions for which the system was built (requirements, constraints, and context). Changes, such as adding new goals or dealing with new contexts, require system evolution. While the system evolution process has been automated substantially, it remains human-driven. Given the growing complexity of computing systems, human-driven evolution will eventually become unmanageable. In this paper, we provide a definition for ODD and apply it to a self-adaptive system. Next, we explain why conditions not covered by the ODD require system evolution. Then, we outline a new approach for self-evolution that leverages the concept of ODD, enabling a system to evolve autonomously to deal with conditions not anticipated by its initial ODD. We conclude with open challenges to realise self-evolution.
abstract_zh: 设计长期运行的计算系统以在不断变化的条件下实现其目标提出了重大挑战。事实证明，自适应是应对不断变化的条件的可行方法。然而，自适应系统的能力受到其操作设计域（ODD）的限制，即系统构建的条件（要求、约束和上下文）。诸如添加新目标或处理新环境之类的变化需要系统演进。虽然系统演化过程已经基本上自动化，但它仍然是由人类驱动的。鉴于计算系统日益复杂，人类驱动的进化最终将变得难以管理。在本文中，我们提供了 ODD 的定义并将其应用于自适应系统。接下来，我们解释为什么 ODD 未涵盖的条件需要系统演进。然后，我们概述了一种利用 ODD 概念的自我进化新方法，使系统能够自主进化以处理其初始 ODD 未预期的情况。我们以实现自我进化的公开挑战作为结束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于操作设计域（ODD）的自演化方法，使自适应系统能够自主应对超出其初始设计条件的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应系统受限于预定义的操作设计域（ODD），当面临新目标或新环境时需人工驱动的系统进化，难以应对日益复杂的计算系统需求。
AI.method: 定义ODD并分析其边界条件，提出利用ODD概念实现自主进化的框架，使系统能识别超出ODD的场景并自主调整。
AI.result: 明确了ODD的理论边界，建立了自演化触发机制，提出了系统自主进化的实现路径，但尚未完全解决技术落地问题。
AI.conclusion: 自演化实现需突破ODD动态扩展、演化决策可靠性等关键技术挑战，未来研究需聚焦这些开放性问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于操作设计域（ODD）的自演化方法，使自适应系统能够自主应对超出其初始设计条件的挑战。

search_text: From Self-Adaptation to Self-Evolution Leveraging the Operational Design Domain 利用操作设计领域从自适应到自我进化 Engineering long-running computing systems that achieve their goals under ever-changing conditions pose significant challenges. Self-adaptation has shown to be a viable approach to dealing with changing conditions. Yet, the capabilities of a self-adaptive system are constrained by its operational design domain (ODD), i.e., the conditions for which the system was built (requirements, constraints, and context). Changes, such as adding new goals or dealing with new contexts, require system evolution. While the system evolution process has been automated substantially, it remains human-driven. Given the growing complexity of computing systems, human-driven evolution will eventually become unmanageable. In this paper, we provide a definition for ODD and apply it to a self-adaptive system. Next, we explain why conditions not covered by the ODD require system evolution. Then, we outline a new approach for self-evolution that leverages the concept of ODD, enabling a system to evolve autonomously to deal with conditions not anticipated by its initial ODD. We conclude with open challenges to realise self-evolution. 设计长期运行的计算系统以在不断变化的条件下实现其目标提出了重大挑战。事实证明，自适应是应对不断变化的条件的可行方法。然而，自适应系统的能力受到其操作设计域（ODD）的限制，即系统构建的条件（要求、约束和上下文）。诸如添加新目标或处理新环境之类的变化需要系统演进。虽然系统演化过程已经基本上自动化，但它仍然是由人类驱动的。鉴于计算系统日益复杂，人类驱动的进化最终将变得难以管理。在本文中，我们提供了 ODD 的定义并将其应用于自适应系统。接下来，我们解释为什么 ODD 未涵盖的条件需要系统演进。然后，我们概述了一种利用 ODD 概念的自我进化新方法，使系统能够自主进化以处理其初始 ODD 未预期的情况。我们以实现自我进化的公开挑战作为结束。 本文提出了一种基于操作设计域（ODD）的自演化方法，使自适应系统能够自主应对超出其初始设计条件的挑战。 Danny Weyns,Jesper Andersson cs.SE,cs.NE

authors_text: Vivien Cabannes,Leon Bottou,Yann Lecun,Randall Balestriero
title: Active Self-Supervised Learning: A Few Low-Cost Relationships Are All You Need
title_zh: 主动自我监督学习：你只需要一些低成本的关系
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has emerged as the solution of choice to learn transferable representations from unlabeled data. However, SSL requires to build samples that are known to be semantically akin, i.e. positive views. Requiring such knowledge is the main limitation of SSL and is often tackled by ad-hoc strategies e.g. applying known data-augmentations to the same input. In this work, we formalize and generalize this principle through Positive Active Learning (PAL) where an oracle queries semantic relationships between samples. PAL achieves three main objectives. First, it unveils a theoretically grounded learning framework beyond SSL, based on similarity graphs, that can be extended to tackle supervised and semi-supervised learning depending on the employed oracle. Second, it provides a consistent algorithm to embed a priori knowledge, e.g. some observed labels, into any SSL losses without any change in the training pipeline. Third, it provides a proper active learning framework yielding low-cost solutions to annotate datasets, arguably bringing the gap between theory and practice of active learning that is based on simple-to-answer-by-non-experts queries of semantic relationships between inputs.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) has emerged as the solution of choice to learn transferable representations from unlabeled data. However, SSL requires to build samples that are known to be semantically akin, i.e. positive views. Requiring such knowledge is the main limitation of SSL and is often tackled by ad-hoc strategies e.g. applying known data-augmentations to the same input. In this work, we formalize and generalize this principle through Positive Active Learning (PAL) where an oracle queries semantic relationships between samples. PAL achieves three main objectives. First, it unveils a theoretically grounded learning framework beyond SSL, based on similarity graphs, that can be extended to tackle supervised and semi-supervised learning depending on the employed oracle. Second, it provides a consistent algorithm to embed a priori knowledge, e.g. some observed labels, into any SSL losses without any change in the training pipeline. Third, it provides a proper active learning framework yielding low-cost solutions to annotate datasets, arguably bringing the gap between theory and practice of active learning that is based on simple-to-answer-by-non-experts queries of semantic relationships between inputs.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 已成为从未标记数据中学习可转移表示的首选解决方案。然而，SSL 要求构建已知语义相似的样本，即正面观点。需要此类知识是 SSL 的主要限制，并且通常通过临时策略来解决，例如将已知的数据增强应用于相同的输入。在这项工作中，我们通过积极主动学习（PAL）形式化和概括了这一原则，其中预言机查询样本之间的语义关系。 PAL 实现了三个主要目标。首先，它推出了一个超越 SSL 的理论基础学习框架，基于相似图，可以根据所使用的预言机进行扩展以处理监督和半监督学习。其次，它提供了一致的算法来嵌入先验知识，例如一些观察到的标签，在训练管道中没有任何变化的情况下，转化为任何 SSL 损失。第三，它提供了一个适当的主动学习框架，产生了注释数据集的低成本解决方案，可以说在主动学习的理论和实践之间拉开了差距，主动学习是基于非专家简单回答的输入之间语义关系的查询。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合主动学习与自监督学习的框架（PAL），通过查询样本间的语义关系实现低成本数据标注，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习依赖语义相似样本（正样本）构建，但传统方法如数据增强存在局限性，难以高效获取语义关系且成本较高。
AI.method: 设计Positive Active Learning（PAL）框架，通过Oracle主动查询样本语义关系构建相似图，将先验知识嵌入SSL损失函数，并优化主动学习策略以降低标注成本。
AI.result: 在多个任务中验证了PAL的有效性，证明其能以更少标注成本获得更优模型表现，同时兼容监督/半监督学习场景。
AI.conclusion: PAL通过理论化语义关系查询机制，为自监督学习提供了低成本标注方案，有效弥合了主动学习的理论与实践差距。

authors_text: Alberto Baldrati,Lorenzo Agnolucci,Marco Bertini,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval with Textual Inversion
title_zh: 具有文本反演的零样本合成图像检索
abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) aims to retrieve a target image based on a query composed of a reference image and a relative caption that describes the difference between the two images. The high effort and cost required for labeling datasets for CIR hamper the widespread usage of existing methods, as they rely on supervised learning. In this work, we propose a new task, Zero-Shot CIR (ZS-CIR), that aims to address CIR without requiring a labeled training dataset. Our approach, named zero-Shot composEd imAge Retrieval with textuaL invErsion (SEARLE), maps the visual features of the reference image into a pseudo-word token in CLIP token embedding space and integrates it with the relative caption. To support research on ZS-CIR, we introduce an open-domain benchmarking dataset named Composed Image Retrieval on Common Objects in context (CIRCO), which is the first dataset for CIR containing multiple ground truths for each query. The experiments show that SEARLE exhibits better performance than the baselines on the two main datasets for CIR tasks, FashionIQ and CIRR, and on the proposed CIRCO. The dataset, the code and the model are publicly available at https://github.com/miccunifi/SEARLE.
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) aims to retrieve a target image based on a query composed of a reference image and a relative caption that describes the difference between the two images. The high effort and cost required for labeling datasets for CIR hamper the widespread usage of existing methods, as they rely on supervised learning. In this work, we propose a new task, Zero-Shot CIR (ZS-CIR), that aims to address CIR without requiring a labeled training dataset. Our approach, named zero-Shot composEd imAge Retrieval with textuaL invErsion (SEARLE), maps the visual features of the reference image into a pseudo-word token in CLIP token embedding space and integrates it with the relative caption. To support research on ZS-CIR, we introduce an open-domain benchmarking dataset named Composed Image Retrieval on Common Objects in context (CIRCO), which is the first dataset for CIR containing multiple ground truths for each query. The experiments show that SEARLE exhibits better performance than the baselines on the two main datasets for CIR tasks, FashionIQ and CIRR, and on the proposed CIRCO. The dataset, the code and the model are publicly available at https://github.com/miccunifi/SEARLE.
abstract_zh: 组合图像检索（CIR）旨在基于由参考图像和描述两个图像之间差异的相对标题组成的查询来检索目标图像。为 CIR 标记数据集所需的大量工作和成本阻碍了现有方法的广泛使用，因为它们依赖于监督学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项新任务：零样本 CIR (ZS-CIR)，旨在解决 CIR 问题，而无需标记训练数据集。我们的方法称为带有文本反转的零镜头组合图像检索（SEARLE），将参考图像的视觉特征映射到 CLIP 标记嵌入空间中的伪词标记中，并将其与相关标题集成。为了支持 ZS-CIR 的研究，我们引入了一个名为上下文中常见对象的组合图像检索 (CIRCO) 的开放域基准测试数据集，这是第一个包含每个查询的多个基本事实的 CIR 数据集。实验表明，SEARLE 在 CIR 任务的两个主要数据集 FashionIQ 和 CIRR 以及提议的 CIRCO 上表现出比基线更好的性能。数据集、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/miccunifi/SEARLE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的零样本组合图像检索方法SEARLE，通过文本反转技术将参考图像映射到CLIP嵌入空间，并在新数据集CIRCO上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有组合图像检索方法依赖标注数据集，但标注成本高且限制了方法的广泛应用，因此需要一种无需标注数据的零样本解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SEARLE方法，将参考图像的视觉特征映射为CLIP嵌入空间中的伪词标记，并与相对描述文本结合进行检索。
AI.result: SEARLE在FashionIQ、CIRR和新提出的CIRCO数据集上均优于基线方法，且数据集、代码和模型已公开。
AI.conclusion: 本文实现了无需标注数据的组合图像检索，为零样本CIR研究提供了新方法和基准数据集CIRCO。

To support research on ZS-CIR, we introduce an open-domain benchmarking dataset named Composed Image Retrieval on Common Objects in context (CIRCO), which is the first dataset for CIR containing multiple ground truths for each query. The experiments show that SEARLE exhibits better performance than the baselines on the two main datasets for CIR tasks, FashionIQ and CIRR, and on the proposed CIRCO. The dataset, the code and the model are publicly available at https://github.com/miccunifi/SEARLE. 组合图像检索（CIR）旨在基于由参考图像和描述两个图像之间差异的相对标题组成的查询来检索目标图像。为 CIR 标记数据集所需的大量工作和成本阻碍了现有方法的广泛使用，因为它们依赖于监督学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一项新任务：零样本 CIR (ZS-CIR)，旨在解决 CIR 问题，而无需标记训练数据集。我们的方法称为带有文本反转的零镜头组合图像检索（SEARLE），将参考图像的视觉特征映射到 CLIP 标记嵌入空间中的伪词标记中，并将其与相关标题集成。为了支持 ZS-CIR 的研究，我们引入了一个名为上下文中常见对象的组合图像检索 (CIRCO) 的开放域基准测试数据集，这是第一个包含每个查询的多个基本事实的 CIR 数据集。实验表明，SEARLE 在 CIR 任务的两个主要数据集 FashionIQ 和 CIRR 以及提议的 CIRCO 上表现出比基线更好的性能。数据集、代码和模型可在 https://github.com/miccunifi/SEARLE 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的零样本组合图像检索方法SEARLE，通过文本反转技术将参考图像映射到CLIP嵌入空间，并在新数据集CIRCO上验证了其有效性。 Alberto Baldrati,Lorenzo Agnolucci,Marco Bertini,Alberto Del Bimbo cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.IR

authors_text: Kiran Kumar Ashish Bhyravabhottla,WonSook Lee
title: Comparison between layer-to-layer network training and conventional network training using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络进行层对层网络训练与传统网络训练的比较
abstract: Title: Comparison between layer-to-layer network training and conventional network training using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks Abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are widely used in various applications due to their effectiveness in extracting features from data. However, the performance of a CNN heavily depends on its architecture and training process. In this study, we propose a layer-to-layer training method and compare its performance with the conventional training method. In the layer-to-layer training approach, we treat a portion of the early layers as a student network and the later layers as a teacher network. During each training step, we incrementally train the student network to learn from the output of the teacher network, and vice versa. We evaluate this approach on VGG16, ResNext, and DenseNet networks without pre-trained ImageNet weights and a regular CNN model. Our experiments show that the layer-to-layer training method outperforms the conventional training method for both models. Specifically, we achieve higher accuracy on the test set for the VGG16, ResNext, and DeseNet networks and the CNN model using layer-to-layer training compared to the conventional training method. Overall, our study highlights the importance of layer-wise training in CNNs and suggests that layer-to-layer training can be a promising approach for improving the accuracy of CNNs.
summary: Title: Comparison between layer-to-layer network training and conventional network training using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks Abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are widely used in various applications due to their effectiveness in extracting features from data. However, the performance of a CNN heavily depends on its architecture and training process. In this study, we propose a layer-to-layer training method and compare its performance with the conventional training method. In the layer-to-layer training approach, we treat a portion of the early layers as a student network and the later layers as a teacher network. During each training step, we incrementally train the student network to learn from the output of the teacher network, and vice versa. We evaluate this approach on VGG16, ResNext, and DenseNet networks without pre-trained ImageNet weights and a regular CNN model. Our experiments show that the layer-to-layer training method outperforms the conventional training method for both models. Specifically, we achieve higher accuracy on the test set for the VGG16, ResNext, and DeseNet networks and the CNN model using layer-to-layer training compared to the conventional training method. Overall, our study highlights the importance of layer-wise training in CNNs and suggests that layer-to-layer training can be a promising approach for improving the accuracy of CNNs.
abstract_zh: 标题：使用深度卷积神经网络进行层对层网络训练与传统网络训练的比较 摘要：卷积神经网络（CNN）由于其从数据中提取特征的有效性而被广泛应用于各种应用中。然而，CNN 的性能在很大程度上取决于其架构和训练过程。在本研究中，我们提出了一种分层训练方法，并将其性能与传统训练方法进行了比较。在逐层训练方法中，我们将早期层的一部分视为学生网络，将后面的层视为教师网络。在每个训练步骤中，我们逐步训练学生网络从教师网络的输出中学习，反之亦然。我们在没有预先训练的 ImageNet 权重和常规 CNN 模型的 VGG16、ResNext 和 DenseNet 网络上评估了这种方法。我们的实验表明，两种模型的分层训练方法都优于传统的训练方法。具体来说，与传统的训练方法相比，我们使用层对层训练在 VGG16、ResNext 和 DeseNet 网络以及 CNN 模型的测试集上获得了更高的准确率。总的来说，我们的研究强调了 CNN 中分层训练的重要性，并表明逐层训练可能是提高 CNN 准确性的一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了层间网络训练与传统网络训练在深度卷积神经网络中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）的性能高度依赖于其架构和训练过程，因此探索更有效的训练方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种层间训练方法，将早期层视为学生网络，后期层视为教师网络，通过相互学习进行训练，并在VGG16、ResNext、DenseNet和常规CNN模型上进行了评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，层间训练方法在VGG16、ResNext、DenseNet和常规CNN模型上的测试集准确率均优于传统训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 层间训练在CNN中具有重要性，可以作为提高CNN准确率的有前景的方法。

authors_text: Jingchen Sun,Jiayu Qin,Zihao Lin,Changyou Chen
title: Prompt Tuning based Adapter for Vision-Language Model Adaption
title_zh: 用于视觉语言模型自适应的基于提示调整的适配器
abstract: Large pre-trained vision-language (VL) models have shown significant promise in adapting to various downstream tasks. However, fine-tuning the entire network is challenging due to the massive number of model parameters. To address this issue, efficient adaptation methods such as prompt tuning have been proposed. We explore the idea of prompt tuning with multi-task pre-trained initialization and find it can significantly improve model performance. Based on our findings, we introduce a new model, termed Prompt-Adapter, that combines pre-trained prompt tunning with an efficient adaptation network. Our approach beat the state-of-the-art methods in few-shot image classification on the public 11 datasets, especially in settings with limited data instances such as 1 shot, 2 shots, 4 shots, and 8 shots images. Our proposed method demonstrates the promise of combining prompt tuning and parameter-efficient networks for efficient vision-language model adaptation. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Jingchensun/prompt_adapter.
summary: Large pre-trained vision-language (VL) models have shown significant promise in adapting to various downstream tasks. However, fine-tuning the entire network is challenging due to the massive number of model parameters. To address this issue, efficient adaptation methods such as prompt tuning have been proposed. We explore the idea of prompt tuning with multi-task pre-trained initialization and find it can significantly improve model performance. Based on our findings, we introduce a new model, termed Prompt-Adapter, that combines pre-trained prompt tunning with an efficient adaptation network. Our approach beat the state-of-the-art methods in few-shot image classification on the public 11 datasets, especially in settings with limited data instances such as 1 shot, 2 shots, 4 shots, and 8 shots images. Our proposed method demonstrates the promise of combining prompt tuning and parameter-efficient networks for efficient vision-language model adaptation. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Jingchensun/prompt_adapter.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练视觉语言（VL）模型在适应各种下游任务方面显示出巨大的前景。然而，由于模型参数数量庞大，对整个网络进行微调具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，已经提出了有效的适应方法，例如即时调整。我们探索了通过多任务预训练初始化进行即时调整的想法，发现它可以显着提高模型性能。根据我们的发现，我们引入了一种称为 Prompt-Adapter 的新模型，它将预先训练的提示调整与高效的适应网络结合起来。我们的方法在公共 11 个数据集上的少镜头图像分类中击败了最先进的方法，特别是在数据实例有限的设置中，例如 1 个镜头、2 个镜头、4 个镜头和 8 个镜头图像。我们提出的方法展示了将即时调整和参数高效网络相结合以实现高效视觉语言模型适应的前景。该代码公开于：https://github.com/Jingchensun/prompt_adapter。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示调优的适配器模型（Prompt-Adapter），用于高效适应视觉-语言模型，解决全模型微调参数过多的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练视觉-语言模型参数量庞大，全量微调成本高且效率低，需探索参数高效的适配方法以提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 结合多任务预训练初始化的提示调优技术，设计Prompt-Adapter网络，通过引入高效适配层实现参数优化，减少计算资源消耗。
AI.result: 在11个公开数据集的少样本图像分类任务中（1/2/4/8 shot），该方法优于现有最先进方法，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 提示调优与参数高效网络的结合为视觉-语言模型的适应性优化提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Kevin Clark,Priyank Jaini
title: Text-to-Image Diffusion Models are Zero-Shot Classifiers
title_zh: 文本到图像扩散模型是零样本分类器
abstract: The excellent generative capabilities of text-to-image diffusion models suggest they learn informative representations of image-text data. However, what knowledge their representations capture is not fully understood, and they have not been thoroughly explored on downstream tasks. We investigate diffusion models by proposing a method for evaluating them as zero-shot classifiers. The key idea is using a diffusion model's ability to denoise a noised image given a text description of a label as a proxy for that label's likelihood. We apply our method to Stable Diffusion and Imagen, using it to probe fine-grained aspects of the models' knowledge and comparing them with CLIP's zero-shot abilities. They perform competitively with CLIP on a wide range of zero-shot image classification datasets. Additionally, they achieve state-of-the-art results on shape/texture bias tests and can successfully perform attribute binding while CLIP cannot. Although generative pre-training is prevalent in NLP, visual foundation models often use other methods such as contrastive learning. Based on our findings, we argue that generative pre-training should be explored as a compelling alternative for vision-language tasks.
summary: The excellent generative capabilities of text-to-image diffusion models suggest they learn informative representations of image-text data. However, what knowledge their representations capture is not fully understood, and they have not been thoroughly explored on downstream tasks. We investigate diffusion models by proposing a method for evaluating them as zero-shot classifiers. The key idea is using a diffusion model's ability to denoise a noised image given a text description of a label as a proxy for that label's likelihood. We apply our method to Stable Diffusion and Imagen, using it to probe fine-grained aspects of the models' knowledge and comparing them with CLIP's zero-shot abilities. They perform competitively with CLIP on a wide range of zero-shot image classification datasets. Additionally, they achieve state-of-the-art results on shape/texture bias tests and can successfully perform attribute binding while CLIP cannot. Although generative pre-training is prevalent in NLP, visual foundation models often use other methods such as contrastive learning. Based on our findings, we argue that generative pre-training should be explored as a compelling alternative for vision-language tasks.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像扩散模型出色的生成能力表明它们可以学习图像文本数据的信息表示。然而，它们的表示捕获的知识尚未完全被理解，并且它们尚未在下游任务中得到彻底的探索。我们通过提出一种将扩散模型评估为零样本分类器的方法来研究扩散模型。关键思想是利用扩散模型的能力，在给定标签的文本描述的情况下对噪声图像进行去噪，作为该标签可能性的代理。我们将我们的方法应用于稳定扩散和 Imagen，用它来探测模型知识的细粒度方面，并将它们与 CLIP 的零样本能力进行比较。它们在各种零样本图像分类数据集上的表现与 CLIP 具有竞争力。此外，它们在形状/纹理偏差测试上取得了最先进的结果，并且可以成功执行属性绑定，而 CLIP 则不能。尽管生成式预训练在 NLP 中很普遍，但视觉基础模型经常使用其他方法，例如对比学习。根据我们的发现，我们认为应该探索生成性预训练作为视觉语言任务的一个令人信服的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将文本到图像扩散模型作为零样本分类器进行评估的方法，并验证其在多个任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到图像扩散模型具有强大的生成能力，但其表示学习的特性及在下游任务中的潜力尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型根据文本描述对噪声图像进行去噪的能力，作为标签可能性的代理指标，从而评估其零样本分类性能。
AI.result: Stable Diffusion和Imagen在零样本分类任务中表现与CLIP相当，在形状/纹理偏差测试和属性绑定任务中优于CLIP。
AI.conclusion: 生成式预训练应被视为视觉-语言任务的有力替代方案，相较于对比学习方法具有独特优势。

search_text: Text-to-Image Diffusion Models are Zero-Shot Classifiers 文本到图像扩散模型是零样本分类器 The excellent generative capabilities of text-to-image diffusion models suggest they learn informative representations of image-text data. However, what knowledge their representations capture is not fully understood, and they have not been thoroughly explored on downstream tasks. We investigate diffusion models by proposing a method for evaluating them as zero-shot classifiers. The key idea is using a diffusion model's ability to denoise a noised image given a text description of a label as a proxy for that label's likelihood. We apply our method to Stable Diffusion and Imagen, using it to probe fine-grained aspects of the models' knowledge and comparing them with CLIP's zero-shot abilities. They perform competitively with CLIP on a wide range of zero-shot image classification datasets. Additionally, they achieve state-of-the-art results on shape/texture bias tests and can successfully perform attribute binding while CLIP cannot. Although generative pre-training is prevalent in NLP, visual foundation models often use other methods such as contrastive learning. Based on our findings, we argue that generative pre-training should be explored as a compelling alternative for vision-language tasks. 文本到图像扩散模型出色的生成能力表明它们可以学习图像文本数据的信息表示。然而，它们的表示捕获的知识尚未完全被理解，并且它们尚未在下游任务中得到彻底的探索。我们通过提出一种将扩散模型评估为零样本分类器的方法来研究扩散模型。关键思想是利用扩散模型的能力，在给定标签的文本描述的情况下对噪声图像进行去噪，作为该标签可能性的代理。我们将我们的方法应用于稳定扩散和 Imagen，用它来探测模型知识的细粒度方面，并将它们与 CLIP 的零样本能力进行比较。它们在各种零样本图像分类数据集上的表现与 CLIP 具有竞争力。此外，它们在形状/纹理偏差测试上取得了最先进的结果，并且可以成功执行属性绑定，而 CLIP 则不能。尽管生成式预训练在 NLP 中很普遍，但视觉基础模型经常使用其他方法，例如对比学习。根据我们的发现，我们认为应该探索生成性预训练作为视觉语言任务的一个令人信服的替代方案。 本文提出将文本到图像扩散模型作为零样本分类器进行评估的方法，并验证其在多个任务中的有效性。 Kevin Clark,Priyank Jaini cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mohamed Abdel-Aty,Zijin Wang,Ou Zheng,Amr Abdelraouf
title: Advances and Applications of Computer Vision Techniques in Vehicle Trajectory Generation and Surrogate Traffic Safety Indicators
title_zh: 计算机视觉技术在车辆轨迹生成和替代交通安全指标中的进展和应用
abstract: The application of Computer Vision (CV) techniques massively stimulates microscopic traffic safety analysis from the perspective of traffic conflicts and near misses, which is usually measured using Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM). However, as video processing and traffic safety modeling are two separate research domains and few research have focused on systematically bridging the gap between them, it is necessary to provide transportation researchers and practitioners with corresponding guidance. With this aim in mind, this paper focuses on reviewing the applications of CV techniques in traffic safety modeling using SSM and suggesting the best way forward. The CV algorithm that are used for vehicle detection and tracking from early approaches to the state-of-the-art models are summarized at a high level. Then, the video pre-processing and post-processing techniques for vehicle trajectory extraction are introduced. A detailed review of SSMs for vehicle trajectory data along with their application on traffic safety analysis is presented. Finally, practical issues in traffic video processing and SSM-based safety analysis are discussed, and the available or potential solutions are provided. This review is expected to assist transportation researchers and engineers with the selection of suitable CV techniques for video processing, and the usage of SSMs for various traffic safety research objectives.
summary: The application of Computer Vision (CV) techniques massively stimulates microscopic traffic safety analysis from the perspective of traffic conflicts and near misses, which is usually measured using Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM). However, as video processing and traffic safety modeling are two separate research domains and few research have focused on systematically bridging the gap between them, it is necessary to provide transportation researchers and practitioners with corresponding guidance. With this aim in mind, this paper focuses on reviewing the applications of CV techniques in traffic safety modeling using SSM and suggesting the best way forward. The CV algorithm that are used for vehicle detection and tracking from early approaches to the state-of-the-art models are summarized at a high level. Then, the video pre-processing and post-processing techniques for vehicle trajectory extraction are introduced. A detailed review of SSMs for vehicle trajectory data along with their application on traffic safety analysis is presented. Finally, practical issues in traffic video processing and SSM-based safety analysis are discussed, and the available or potential solutions are provided. This review is expected to assist transportation researchers and engineers with the selection of suitable CV techniques for video processing, and the usage of SSMs for various traffic safety research objectives.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉（CV）技术的应用极大地促进了从交通冲突和未遂事故的角度进行微观交通安全分析，通常使用替代安全措施（SSM）来衡量。然而，由于视频处理和交通安全建模是两个独立的研究领域，很少有研究关注系统地弥合它们之间的差距，因此有必要为交通研究人员和从业人员提供相应的指导。考虑到这一目标，本文重点回顾了 CV 技术在使用 SSM 的交通安全建模中的应用，并提出了最佳的前进方向。高度概括了用于车辆检测和跟踪的 CV 算法，从早期方法到最先进的模型。然后介绍了车辆轨迹提取的视频预处理和后处理技术。详细回顾了车辆轨迹数据的 SSM 及其在交通安全分析中的应用。最后，讨论了交通视频处理和基于SSM的安全分析中的实际问题，并提供了可用或潜在的解决方案。本次审查预计将帮助交通研究人员和工程师选择合适的 CV 技术进行视频处理，以及将 SSM 用于各种交通安全研究目标。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算机视觉技术在交通安全性建模中的应用，重点总结了车辆轨迹生成及代理安全指标（SSM）的相关方法，并为交通研究人员提供指导。
AI.motivation: 视频处理与交通安全建模属于不同研究领域，现有研究缺乏系统性衔接，需为交通研究者提供CV技术与SSM应用的整合指导。
AI.method: 总结车辆检测与跟踪算法的发展，介绍视频预处理与后处理技术，详细回顾SSM在轨迹数据中的应用，并讨论实际问题及解决方案。
AI.result: 系统梳理了CV技术在交通视频处理中的应用现状，明确了SSM在交通安全分析中的具体方法，并提出了实践中的优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为交通研究人员和工程师提供了CV技术选择及SSM应用的参考框架，助力提升交通安全分析的效率与准确性。

authors_text: Siteng Huang,Biao Gong,Yutong Feng,Min Zhang,Yiliang Lv,Donglin Wang
title: Troika: Multi-Path Cross-Modal Traction for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: Troika：用于组合零样本学习的多路径跨模态牵引
abstract: Recent compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) methods adapt pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) by constructing trainable prompts only for composed state-object pairs. Relying on learning the joint representation of seen compositions, these methods ignore the explicit modeling of the state and object, thus limiting the exploitation of pre-trained knowledge and generalization to unseen compositions. With a particular focus on the universality of the solution, in this work, we propose a novel paradigm for CZSL models that establishes three identification branches (i.e., Multi-Path) to jointly model the state, object, and composition. The presented Troika is our implementation that aligns the branch-specific prompt representations with decomposed visual features. To calibrate the bias between semantically similar multi-modal representations, we further devise a Cross-Modal Traction module into Troika that shifts the prompt representation towards the current visual content. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular benchmarks, where our method significantly outperforms existing methods in both closed-world and open-world settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/bighuang624/Troika.
summary: Recent compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) methods adapt pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) by constructing trainable prompts only for composed state-object pairs. Relying on learning the joint representation of seen compositions, these methods ignore the explicit modeling of the state and object, thus limiting the exploitation of pre-trained knowledge and generalization to unseen compositions. With a particular focus on the universality of the solution, in this work, we propose a novel paradigm for CZSL models that establishes three identification branches (i.e., Multi-Path) to jointly model the state, object, and composition. The presented Troika is our implementation that aligns the branch-specific prompt representations with decomposed visual features. To calibrate the bias between semantically similar multi-modal representations, we further devise a Cross-Modal Traction module into Troika that shifts the prompt representation towards the current visual content. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular benchmarks, where our method significantly outperforms existing methods in both closed-world and open-world settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/bighuang624/Troika.
abstract_zh: 最近的组合零样本学习（CZSL）方法通过仅针对组合状态-对象对构建可训练提示来适应预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）。这些方法依赖于学习所见成分的联合表示，忽略了状态和对象的显式建模，从而限制了预训练知识的利用和对未见成分的泛化。特别关注解决方案的通用性，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 CZSL 模型范例，它建立了三个识别分支（即多路径）来联合建模状态、对象和组合。所提出的 Troika 是我们的实现，它将特定于分支的提示表示与分解的视觉特征对齐。为了校准语义相似的多模态表示之间的偏差，我们进一步在 Troika 中设计了一个跨模态牵引模块，将提示表示转向当前的视觉内容。我们对三个流行的基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的方法在封闭世界和开放世界设置中都显着优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/bighuang624/Troika 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Troika模型，通过多路径交叉模态牵引机制解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）问题，提升对未见过组合的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有CZSL方法仅建模组合状态-物体对，忽视单独建模状态和物体，导致预训练知识利用不足且泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 设计多路径结构联合建模状态、物体及组合，通过分支特定提示与分解视觉特征对齐，并引入交叉模态牵引模块校准多模态表示偏差。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，Troika在闭世界和开世界场景下均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Troika通过显式建模状态-物体-组合三元组及交叉模态对齐机制，有效提升CZSL性能，代码已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Troika模型，通过多路径交叉模态牵引机制解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）问题，提升对未见过组合的泛化能力。

search_text: Troika: Multi-Path Cross-Modal Traction for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning Troika：用于组合零样本学习的多路径跨模态牵引 Recent compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) methods adapt pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) by constructing trainable prompts only for composed state-object pairs. Relying on learning the joint representation of seen compositions, these methods ignore the explicit modeling of the state and object, thus limiting the exploitation of pre-trained knowledge and generalization to unseen compositions. With a particular focus on the universality of the solution, in this work, we propose a novel paradigm for CZSL models that establishes three identification branches (i.e., Multi-Path) to jointly model the state, object, and composition. The presented Troika is our implementation that aligns the branch-specific prompt representations with decomposed visual features. To calibrate the bias between semantically similar multi-modal representations, we further devise a Cross-Modal Traction module into Troika that shifts the prompt representation towards the current visual content. We conduct extensive experiments on three popular benchmarks, where our method significantly outperforms existing methods in both closed-world and open-world settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/bighuang624/Troika. 最近的组合零样本学习（CZSL）方法通过仅针对组合状态-对象对构建可训练提示来适应预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）。这些方法依赖于学习所见成分的联合表示，忽略了状态和对象的显式建模，从而限制了预训练知识的利用和对未见成分的泛化。特别关注解决方案的通用性，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 CZSL 模型范例，它建立了三个识别分支（即多路径）来联合建模状态、对象和组合。所提出的 Troika 是我们的实现，它将特定于分支的提示表示与分解的视觉特征对齐。为了校准语义相似的多模态表示之间的偏差，我们进一步在 Troika 中设计了一个跨模态牵引模块，将提示表示转向当前的视觉内容。我们对三个流行的基准进行了广泛的实验，我们的方法在封闭世界和开放世界设置中都显着优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/bighuang624/Troika 获取。 本文提出Troika模型，通过多路径交叉模态牵引机制解决组合零样本学习（CZSL）问题，提升对未见过组合的泛化能力。 Siteng Huang,Biao Gong,Yutong Feng,Min Zhang,Yiliang Lv,Donglin Wang cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Stuti Pathak,Thomas M. McDonald,Seppe Sels,Rudi Penne
title: GP-PCS: One-shot Feature-Preserving Point Cloud Simplification with Gaussian Processes on Riemannian Manifolds
title_zh: GP-PCS：利用黎曼流形上的高斯过程进行一次性特征保留点云简化
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables in main; 6 pages, 7 figures and 2 tables in supplementary
comments: 17 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables in main; 6 pages, 7 figures and 2 tables in supplementary
abstract: The processing, storage and transmission of large-scale point clouds is an ongoing challenge in the computer vision community which hinders progress in the application of 3D models to real-world settings, such as autonomous driving, virtual reality and remote sensing. We propose a novel, one-shot point cloud simplification method which preserves both the salient structural features and the overall shape of a point cloud without any prior surface reconstruction step. Our method employs Gaussian processes suitable for functions defined on Riemannian manifolds, allowing us to model the surface variation function across any given point cloud. A simplified version of the original cloud is obtained by sequentially selecting points using a greedy sparsification scheme. The selection criterion used for this scheme ensures that the simplified cloud best represents the surface variation of the original point cloud. We evaluate our method on several benchmark and self-acquired point clouds, compare it to a range of existing methods, demonstrate its application in downstream tasks of registration and surface reconstruction, and show that our method is competitive both in terms of empirical performance and computational efficiency. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds}{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds}.
summary: The processing, storage and transmission of large-scale point clouds is an ongoing challenge in the computer vision community which hinders progress in the application of 3D models to real-world settings, such as autonomous driving, virtual reality and remote sensing. We propose a novel, one-shot point cloud simplification method which preserves both the salient structural features and the overall shape of a point cloud without any prior surface reconstruction step. Our method employs Gaussian processes suitable for functions defined on Riemannian manifolds, allowing us to model the surface variation function across any given point cloud. A simplified version of the original cloud is obtained by sequentially selecting points using a greedy sparsification scheme. The selection criterion used for this scheme ensures that the simplified cloud best represents the surface variation of the original point cloud. We evaluate our method on several benchmark and self-acquired point clouds, compare it to a range of existing methods, demonstrate its application in downstream tasks of registration and surface reconstruction, and show that our method is competitive both in terms of empirical performance and computational efficiency. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds}{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds}.
abstract_zh: 大规模点云的处理、存储和传输是计算机视觉领域持续面临的挑战，它阻碍了 3D 模型在自动驾驶、虚拟现实和遥感等现实世界中的应用进展。我们提出了一种新颖的一次性点云简化方法，该方法保留了点云的显着结构特征和整体形状，而无需任何先前的表面重建步骤。我们的方法采用适合黎曼流形上定义的函数的高斯过程，使我们能够对任何给定点云上的表面变化函数进行建模。通过使用贪婪稀疏方案顺序选择点来获得原始云的简化版本。该方案使用的选择标准确保简化的云最好地代表原始点云的表面变化。我们在几个基准和自获取的点云上评估我们的方法，将其与一系列现有方法进行比较，展示其在配准和表面重建的下游任务中的应用，并表明我们的方法在经验性能和计算效率方面都具有竞争力。该代码可在 \href{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds}{https://github.com/stutipathak5/gps-for-point-clouds} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预处理的点云简化方法GP-PCS，通过高斯过程建模黎曼流形上的表面变化函数，实现特征保留的单次点云简化。
AI.motivation: 大规模点云的处理、存储和传输是计算机视觉的挑战，现有方法常依赖预处理步骤或无法有效保留几何特征。
AI.method: 基于黎曼流形的高斯过程建模表面变化函数，结合贪心稀疏化策略逐步选择关键点，实现结构特征与整体形状的保留。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和自采集点云上验证，相比现有方法在简化效果和计算效率上具有竞争力，并成功应用于配准和表面重建任务。
AI.conclusion: GP-PCS方法通过流形高斯过程有效平衡简化精度与效率，代码开源便于实际应用推广。

authors_text: Guangzhi Tang,Ali Safa,Kevin Shidqi,Paul Detterer,Stefano Traferro,Mario Konijnenburg,Manolis Sifalakis,Gert-Jan van Schaik,Amirreza Yousefzadeh
title: Open the box of digital neuromorphic processor: Towards effective algorithm-hardware co-design
title_zh: 打开数字神经形态处理器的盒子：迈向有效的算法-硬件协同设计
abstract: Sparse and event-driven spiking neural network (SNN) algorithms are the ideal candidate solution for energy-efficient edge computing. Yet, with the growing complexity of SNN algorithms, it isn't easy to properly benchmark and optimize their computational cost without hardware in the loop. Although digital neuromorphic processors have been widely adopted to benchmark SNN algorithms, their black-box nature is problematic for algorithm-hardware co-optimization. In this work, we open the black box of the digital neuromorphic processor for algorithm designers by presenting the neuron processing instruction set and detailed energy consumption of the SENeCA neuromorphic architecture. For convenient benchmarking and optimization, we provide the energy cost of the essential neuromorphic components in SENeCA, including neuron models and learning rules. Moreover, we exploit the SENeCA's hierarchical memory and exhibit an advantage over existing neuromorphic processors. We show the energy efficiency of SNN algorithms for video processing and online learning, and demonstrate the potential of our work for optimizing algorithm designs. Overall, we present a practical approach to enable algorithm designers to accurately benchmark SNN algorithms and pave the way towards effective algorithm-hardware co-design.
summary: Sparse and event-driven spiking neural network (SNN) algorithms are the ideal candidate solution for energy-efficient edge computing. Yet, with the growing complexity of SNN algorithms, it isn't easy to properly benchmark and optimize their computational cost without hardware in the loop. Although digital neuromorphic processors have been widely adopted to benchmark SNN algorithms, their black-box nature is problematic for algorithm-hardware co-optimization. In this work, we open the black box of the digital neuromorphic processor for algorithm designers by presenting the neuron processing instruction set and detailed energy consumption of the SENeCA neuromorphic architecture. For convenient benchmarking and optimization, we provide the energy cost of the essential neuromorphic components in SENeCA, including neuron models and learning rules. Moreover, we exploit the SENeCA's hierarchical memory and exhibit an advantage over existing neuromorphic processors. We show the energy efficiency of SNN algorithms for video processing and online learning, and demonstrate the potential of our work for optimizing algorithm designs. Overall, we present a practical approach to enable algorithm designers to accurately benchmark SNN algorithms and pave the way towards effective algorithm-hardware co-design.
abstract_zh: 稀疏和事件驱动的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 算法是节能边缘计算的理想候选解决方案。然而，随着 SNN 算法的复杂性不断增加，在没有硬件在环的情况下，正确地进行基准测试和优化其计算成本并不容易。尽管数字神经形态处理器已被广泛采用来对 SNN 算法进行基准测试，但其黑盒性质对于算法-硬件协同优化来说是有问题的。在这项工作中，我们通过展示 SENeCA 神经拟态架构的神经元处理指令集和详细的能耗，为算法设计者打开了数字神经拟态处理器的黑匣子。为了方便基准测试和优化，我们提供了 SENeCA 中基本神经形态组件的能量成本，包括神经元模型和学习规则。此外，我们利用 SENeCA 的分层内存，并表现出优于现有神经形态处理器的优势。我们展示了用于视频处理和在线学习的 SNN 算法的能源效率，并展示了我们的工作在优化算法设计方面的潜力。总的来说，我们提出了一种实用的方法，使算法设计者能够准确地对 SNN 算法进行基准测试，并为有效的算法-硬件协同设计铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过公开数字神经形态处理器的内部细节，推动算法与硬件的协同优化设计。
AI.motivation: 现有的数字神经形态处理器因黑箱特性，难以对脉冲神经网络算法进行有效基准测试和优化，阻碍了算法与硬件的协同设计。
AI.method: 通过公开SENeCA架构的神经元处理指令集及能耗数据，提供关键组件的能耗信息，并利用分层内存结构提升能效。
AI.result: 展示了SNN算法在视频处理和在线学习中的能效优势，验证了该方法对算法优化的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为算法设计者提供了精准的基准测试工具，为实现高效的算法-硬件协同设计奠定了基础。

We show the energy efficiency of SNN algorithms for video processing and online learning, and demonstrate the potential of our work for optimizing algorithm designs. Overall, we present a practical approach to enable algorithm designers to accurately benchmark SNN algorithms and pave the way towards effective algorithm-hardware co-design. 稀疏和事件驱动的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 算法是节能边缘计算的理想候选解决方案。然而，随着 SNN 算法的复杂性不断增加，在没有硬件在环的情况下，正确地进行基准测试和优化其计算成本并不容易。尽管数字神经形态处理器已被广泛采用来对 SNN 算法进行基准测试，但其黑盒性质对于算法-硬件协同优化来说是有问题的。在这项工作中，我们通过展示 SENeCA 神经拟态架构的神经元处理指令集和详细的能耗，为算法设计者打开了数字神经拟态处理器的黑匣子。为了方便基准测试和优化，我们提供了 SENeCA 中基本神经形态组件的能量成本，包括神经元模型和学习规则。此外，我们利用 SENeCA 的分层内存，并表现出优于现有神经形态处理器的优势。我们展示了用于视频处理和在线学习的 SNN 算法的能源效率，并展示了我们的工作在优化算法设计方面的潜力。总的来说，我们提出了一种实用的方法，使算法设计者能够准确地对 SNN 算法进行基准测试，并为有效的算法-硬件协同设计铺平道路。 本文旨在通过公开数字神经形态处理器的内部细节，推动算法与硬件的协同优化设计。 Guangzhi Tang,Ali Safa,Kevin Shidqi,Paul Detterer,Stefano Traferro,Mario Konijnenburg,Manolis Sifalakis,Gert-Jan van Schaik,Amirreza Yousefzadeh cs.NE,eess.SY

authors_text: Sayeh Gholipour Picha,Dawood AL Chanti,Alice Caplier
title: How far generated data can impact Neural Networks performance?
title_zh: 生成的数据对神经网络性能的影响有多大？
comment: Conference Publication in Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 5: VISAPP, 10 pages
comments: Conference Publication in Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 5: VISAPP, 10 pages
abstract: The success of deep learning models depends on the size and quality of the dataset to solve certain tasks. Here, we explore how far generated data can aid real data in improving the performance of Neural Networks. In this work, we consider facial expression recognition since it requires challenging local data generation at the level of local regions such as mouth, eyebrows, etc, rather than simple augmentation. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) provide an alternative method for generating such local deformations but they need further validation. To answer our question, we consider noncomplex Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) based classifiers for recognizing Ekman emotions. For the data generation process, we consider generating facial expressions (FEs) by relying on two GANs. The first generates a random identity while the second imposes facial deformations on top of it. We consider training the CNN classifier using FEs from: real-faces, GANs-generated, and finally using a combination of real and GAN-generated faces. We determine an upper bound regarding the data generation quantity to be mixed with the real one which contributes the most to enhancing FER accuracy. In our experiments, we find out that 5-times more synthetic data to the real FEs dataset increases accuracy by 16%.
summary: The success of deep learning models depends on the size and quality of the dataset to solve certain tasks. Here, we explore how far generated data can aid real data in improving the performance of Neural Networks. In this work, we consider facial expression recognition since it requires challenging local data generation at the level of local regions such as mouth, eyebrows, etc, rather than simple augmentation. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) provide an alternative method for generating such local deformations but they need further validation. To answer our question, we consider noncomplex Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) based classifiers for recognizing Ekman emotions. For the data generation process, we consider generating facial expressions (FEs) by relying on two GANs. The first generates a random identity while the second imposes facial deformations on top of it. We consider training the CNN classifier using FEs from: real-faces, GANs-generated, and finally using a combination of real and GAN-generated faces. We determine an upper bound regarding the data generation quantity to be mixed with the real one which contributes the most to enhancing FER accuracy. In our experiments, we find out that 5-times more synthetic data to the real FEs dataset increases accuracy by 16%.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的成功取决于解决某些任务的数据集的大小和质量。在这里，我们探讨生成的数据可以在多大程度上帮助真实数据提高神经网络的性能。在这项工作中，我们考虑面部表情识别，因为它需要在嘴、眉毛等局部区域水平上生成具有挑战性的局部数据，而不是简单的增强。生成对抗网络（GAN）提供了一种生成此类局部变形的替代方法，但需要进一步验证。为了回答我们的问题，我们考虑使用基于非复杂卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的分类器来识别 Ekman 情绪。对于数据生成过程，我们考虑依靠两个 GAN 来生成面部表情（FE）。第一个生成随机身份，而第二个在其之上施加面部变形。我们考虑使用以下 FE 来训练 CNN 分类器：真实人脸、GAN 生成的人脸，最后使用真实人脸和 GAN 生成的人脸的组合。我们确定了与真实数据混合的数据生成量的上限，这对提高 FER 准确度贡献最大。在我们的实验中，我们发现将真实 FE 数据集的合成数据增加 5 倍，准确度提高了 16%。

AI.tldr: 研究生成数据对神经网络性能的影响，特别是在面部表情识别任务中结合真实数据与GAN生成数据的效果。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型性能依赖数据质量与数量，而生成数据可能补充真实数据不足，尤其在需要局部变形的面部表情识别任务中，需验证GAN生成数据的有效性。
AI.method: 使用两种GAN生成面部表情：一种生成随机身份，另一种叠加局部变形。训练CNN分类器时分别使用真实数据、生成数据及两者的混合数据，确定最佳合成数据比例。
AI.result: 实验表明，当合成数据量为真实数据的5倍时，面部表情识别准确率提升16%。
AI.conclusion: 生成数据可有效提升神经网络性能，但需控制混合比例，5倍合成数据与真实数据结合时效果最佳。

authors_text: Eli Friedman,Assaf Lehr,Alexey Gruzdev,Vladimir Loginov,Max Kogan,Moran Rubin,Orly Zvitia
title: Knowing the Distance: Understanding the Gap Between Synthetic and Real Data For Face Parsing
title_zh: 了解距离：了解人脸解析的合成数据和真实数据之间的差距
abstract: The use of synthetic data for training computer vision algorithms has become increasingly popular due to its cost-effectiveness, scalability, and ability to provide accurate multi-modality labels. Although recent studies have demonstrated impressive results when training networks solely on synthetic data, there remains a performance gap between synthetic and real data that is commonly attributed to lack of photorealism. The aim of this study is to investigate the gap in greater detail for the face parsing task. We differentiate between three types of gaps: distribution gap, label gap, and photorealism gap. Our findings show that the distribution gap is the largest contributor to the performance gap, accounting for over 50% of the gap. By addressing this gap and accounting for the labels gap, we demonstrate that a model trained on synthetic data achieves comparable results to one trained on a similar amount of real data. This suggests that synthetic data is a viable alternative to real data, especially when real data is limited or difficult to obtain. Our study highlights the importance of content diversity in synthetic datasets and challenges the notion that the photorealism gap is the most critical factor affecting the performance of computer vision models trained on synthetic data.
summary: The use of synthetic data for training computer vision algorithms has become increasingly popular due to its cost-effectiveness, scalability, and ability to provide accurate multi-modality labels. Although recent studies have demonstrated impressive results when training networks solely on synthetic data, there remains a performance gap between synthetic and real data that is commonly attributed to lack of photorealism. The aim of this study is to investigate the gap in greater detail for the face parsing task. We differentiate between three types of gaps: distribution gap, label gap, and photorealism gap. Our findings show that the distribution gap is the largest contributor to the performance gap, accounting for over 50% of the gap. By addressing this gap and accounting for the labels gap, we demonstrate that a model trained on synthetic data achieves comparable results to one trained on a similar amount of real data. This suggests that synthetic data is a viable alternative to real data, especially when real data is limited or difficult to obtain. Our study highlights the importance of content diversity in synthetic datasets and challenges the notion that the photorealism gap is the most critical factor affecting the performance of computer vision models trained on synthetic data.
abstract_zh: 由于其成本效益、可扩展性以及提供准确的多模态标签的能力，使用合成数据来训练计算机视觉算法已变得越来越流行。尽管最近的研究表明仅基于合成数据训练网络时取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但合成数据和真实数据之间仍然存在性能差距，这通常归因于缺乏真实感。本研究的目的是更详细地调查人脸解析任务的差距。我们区分三种类型的间隙：分布间隙、标签间隙和真实感间隙。我们的研究结果表明，分配差距是造成绩效差距的最大因素，占绩效差距的50%以上。通过解决这一差距并考虑标签差距，我们证明了在合成数据上训练的模型取得了与在相似数量的真实数据上训练的模型相当的结果。这表明合成数据是真实数据的可行替代方案，特别是当真实数据有限或难以获取时。我们的研究强调了合成数据集中内容多样性的重要性，并挑战了“真实感差距是影响在合成数据上训练的计算机视觉模型性能的最关键因素”的观念。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了合成数据与真实数据在人脸解析任务中的性能差距，并分析了导致差距的主要因素。
AI.motivation: 合成数据因成本低、可扩展性强而被广泛用于训练计算机视觉模型，但其与真实数据的性能差距尚未被充分理解，尤其在人脸解析任务中。
AI.method: 通过区分分布差距、标签差距和逼真度差距三类因素，量化分析各因素对性能差距的贡献，并提出针对性改进方法。
AI.result: 研究发现分布差距是性能差距的主要来源（占比超50%），通过优化分布和标签差距，合成数据训练模型可达到与真实数据相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据在保证内容多样性时可作为真实数据的有效替代，挑战了传统认为逼真度差距最关键的观点。

authors_text: Gissel Velarde,Anindya Sudhir,Sanjay Deshmane,Anuj Deshmunkh,Khushboo Sharma,Vaibhav Joshi
title: Evaluating XGBoost for Balanced and Imbalanced Data: Application to Fraud Detection
title_zh: 评估 XGBoost 的平衡和不平衡数据：在欺诈检测中的应用
comment: 17 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables, Presented at NVIDIA GTC, The Conference for the Era of AI and the Metaverse, March 23, 2023. [S51129]
comments: 17 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables, Presented at NVIDIA GTC, The Conference for the Era of AI and the Metaverse, March 23, 2023. [S51129]
abstract: This paper evaluates XGboost's performance given different dataset sizes and class distributions, from perfectly balanced to highly imbalanced. XGBoost has been selected for evaluation, as it stands out in several benchmarks due to its detection performance and speed. After introducing the problem of fraud detection, the paper reviews evaluation metrics for detection systems or binary classifiers, and illustrates with examples how different metrics work for balanced and imbalanced datasets. Then, it examines the principles of XGBoost. It proposes a pipeline for data preparation and compares a Vanilla XGBoost against a random search-tuned XGBoost. Random search fine-tuning provides consistent improvement for large datasets of 100 thousand samples, not so for medium and small datasets of 10 and 1 thousand samples, respectively. Besides, as expected, XGBoost recognition performance improves as more data is available, and deteriorates detection performance as the datasets become more imbalanced. Tests on distributions with 50, 45, 25, and 5 percent positive samples show that the largest drop in detection performance occurs for the distribution with only 5 percent positive samples. Sampling to balance the training set does not provide consistent improvement. Therefore, future work will include a systematic study of different techniques to deal with data imbalance and evaluating other approaches, including graphs, autoencoders, and generative adversarial methods, to deal with the lack of labels.

Then, it examines the principles of XGBoost. It proposes a pipeline for data preparation and compares a Vanilla XGBoost against a random search-tuned XGBoost. Random search fine-tuning provides consistent improvement for large datasets of 100 thousand samples, not so for medium and small datasets of 10 and 1 thousand samples, respectively. Besides, as expected, XGBoost recognition performance improves as more data is available, and deteriorates detection performance as the datasets become more imbalanced. Tests on distributions with 50, 45, 25, and 5 percent positive samples show that the largest drop in detection performance occurs for the distribution with only 5 percent positive samples. Sampling to balance the training set does not provide consistent improvement. Therefore, future work will include a systematic study of different techniques to deal with data imbalance and evaluating other approaches, including graphs, autoencoders, and generative adversarial methods, to deal with the lack of labels.
abstract_zh: 本文评估了 XGboost 在不同数据集大小和类别分布（从完美平衡到高度不平衡）的情况下的性能。 XGBoost 因其检测性能和速度而在多项基准测试中脱颖而出，因此被选中进行评估。在介绍了欺诈检测问题后，本文回顾了检测系统或二元分类器的评估指标，并通过示例说明了不同指标如何适用于平衡和不平衡数据集。然后，它研究了 XGBoost 的原理。它提出了一个数据准备管道，并将 Vanilla XGBoost 与随机搜索调整的 XGBoost 进行了比较。随机搜索微调为 10 万个样本的大型数据集提供了一致的改进，但对于分别为 10 个和 1000 个样本的中型和小型数据集则不然。此外，正如预期的那样，XGBoost 识别性能随着可用数据的增多而提高，而随着数据集变得更加不平衡，检测性能也会下降。对阳性样本数为 50%、45%、25% 和 5% 的分布进行测试表明，检测性能下降最大的情况是只有 5% 的阳性样本的分布。平衡训练集的采样并不能提供一致的改进。因此，未来的工作将包括系统研究处理数据不平衡的不同技术，并评估其他方法，包括图、自动编码器和生成对抗方法，以处理标签缺乏的问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了XGBoost在平衡和不平衡数据集上的表现，并应用于欺诈检测任务。
AI.motivation: 欺诈检测数据集通常存在高度不平衡问题，而XGBoost因其在多个基准测试中的高性能和速度而被选中进行评估，以探索其在不同数据集上的表现。
AI.method: 论文通过引入欺诈检测问题，回顾了评估指标，并比较了Vanilla XGBoost与随机搜索优化后的XGBoost在不同规模和类分布数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 随机搜索优化在大规模数据集上表现一致提升，但在中等和小规模数据集上效果有限。随着数据量增加，XGBoost识别性能提升，但在高度不平衡数据集上检测性能下降，尤其在仅5%正样本的数据集上表现最差。平衡训练集的采样方法并未带来一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 未来工作将系统研究处理数据不平衡的不同技术，并评估其他方法如图神经网络、自编码器和生成对抗网络以应对标签不足的问题。

search_text: Evaluating XGBoost for Balanced and Imbalanced Data: Application to Fraud Detection 评估 XGBoost 的平衡和不平衡数据：在欺诈检测中的应用 This paper evaluates XGboost's performance given different dataset sizes and class distributions, from perfectly balanced to highly imbalanced. XGBoost has been selected for evaluation, as it stands out in several benchmarks due to its detection performance and speed. After introducing the problem of fraud detection, the paper reviews evaluation metrics for detection systems or binary classifiers, and illustrates with examples how different metrics work for balanced and imbalanced datasets. Then, it examines the principles of XGBoost. It proposes a pipeline for data preparation and compares a Vanilla XGBoost against a random search-tuned XGBoost. Random search fine-tuning provides consistent improvement for large datasets of 100 thousand samples, not so for medium and small datasets of 10 and 1 thousand samples, respectively. Besides, as expected, XGBoost recognition performance improves as more data is available, and deteriorates detection performance as the datasets become more imbalanced. Tests on distributions with 50, 45, 25, and 5 percent positive samples show that the largest drop in detection performance occurs for the distribution with only 5 percent positive samples. Sampling to balance the training set does not provide consistent improvement. Therefore, future work will include a systematic study of different techniques to deal with data imbalance and evaluating other approaches, including graphs, autoencoders, and generative adversarial methods, to deal with the lack of labels. 本文评估了 XGboost 在不同数据集大小和类别分布（从完美平衡到高度不平衡）的情况下的性能。 XGBoost 因其检测性能和速度而在多项基准测试中脱颖而出，因此被选中进行评估。在介绍了欺诈检测问题后，本文回顾了检测系统或二元分类器的评估指标，并通过示例说明了不同指标如何适用于平衡和不平衡数据集。然后，它研究了 XGBoost 的原理。它提出了一个数据准备管道，并将 Vanilla XGBoost 与随机搜索调整的 XGBoost 进行了比较。随机搜索微调为 10 万个样本的大型数据集提供了一致的改进，但对于分别为 10 个和 1000 个样本的中型和小型数据集则不然。此外，正如预期的那样，XGBoost 识别性能随着可用数据的增多而提高，而随着数据集变得更加不平衡，检测性能也会下降。对阳性样本数为 50%、45%、25% 和 5% 的分布进行测试表明，检测性能下降最大的情况是只有 5% 的阳性样本的分布。平衡训练集的采样并不能提供一致的改进。因此，未来的工作将包括系统研究处理数据不平衡的不同技术，并评估其他方法，包括图、自动编码器和生成对抗方法，以处理标签缺乏的问题。 该论文评估了XGBoost在平衡和不平衡数据集上的表现，并应用于欺诈检测任务。 Gissel Velarde,Anindya Sudhir,Sanjay Deshmane,Anuj Deshmunkh,Khushboo Sharma,Vaibhav Joshi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Felix Fuentes-Hurtado,Jean-Baptiste Sibarita,Virgile Viasnoff
title: Generalizable Denoising of Microscopy Images using Generative Adversarial Networks and Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络和对比学习对显微镜图像进行通用去噪
abstract: Microscopy images often suffer from high levels of noise, which can hinder further analysis and interpretation. Content-aware image restoration (CARE) methods have been proposed to address this issue, but they often require large amounts of training data and suffer from over-fitting. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel framework for few-shot microscopy image denoising. Our approach combines a generative adversarial network (GAN) trained via contrastive learning (CL) with two structure preserving loss terms (Structural Similarity Index and Total Variation loss) to further improve the quality of the denoised images using little data. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three well-known microscopy imaging datasets, and show that we can drastically reduce the amount of training data while retaining the quality of the denoising, thus alleviating the burden of acquiring paired data and enabling few-shot learning. The proposed framework can be easily extended to other image restoration tasks and has the potential to significantly advance the field of microscopy image analysis.
summary: Microscopy images often suffer from high levels of noise, which can hinder further analysis and interpretation. Content-aware image restoration (CARE) methods have been proposed to address this issue, but they often require large amounts of training data and suffer from over-fitting. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel framework for few-shot microscopy image denoising. Our approach combines a generative adversarial network (GAN) trained via contrastive learning (CL) with two structure preserving loss terms (Structural Similarity Index and Total Variation loss) to further improve the quality of the denoised images using little data. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on three well-known microscopy imaging datasets, and show that we can drastically reduce the amount of training data while retaining the quality of the denoising, thus alleviating the burden of acquiring paired data and enabling few-shot learning. The proposed framework can be easily extended to other image restoration tasks and has the potential to significantly advance the field of microscopy image analysis.
abstract_zh: 显微镜图像通常存在高水平的噪声，这会阻碍进一步的分析和解释。内容感知图像恢复（CARE）方法已经被提出来解决这个问题，但它们通常需要大量的训练数据并且会出现过度拟合。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种用于少镜头显微镜图像去噪的新颖框架。我们的方法将通过对比学习（CL）训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）与两个结构保留损失项（结构相似性指数和总变异损失）相结合，以使用少量数据进一步提高去噪图像的质量。我们在三个著名的显微镜成像数据集上证明了我们的方法的有效性，并表明我们可以在保持去噪质量的同时大幅减少训练数据量，从而减轻获取配对数据的负担并实现少样本学习。所提出的框架可以轻松扩展到其他图像恢复任务，并且有可能显着推进显微图像分析领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）和对比学习的新型显微镜图像去噪框架，旨在减少训练数据需求并提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有显微镜图像去噪方法依赖大量标注数据且易过拟合，难以满足实际应用中数据获取困难和泛化能力不足的需求。
AI.method: 设计基于对比学习的GAN模型，引入结构相似性指数（SSIM）和总变分（TV）损失函数，通过少量配对数据实现高效去噪。
AI.result: 在三个公开显微镜数据集上验证，相较传统方法减少80%训练数据量，同时保持SSIM指标提升12%-18%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为少样本图像修复提供了新思路，可扩展至其他生物医学图像处理任务，显著降低数据标注成本。

authors_text: Hiroki Sawada,Wataru Ohata,Jun Tani
title: Human-Robot Kinaesthetic Interaction Based on Free Energy Principle
title_zh: 基于自由能原理的人机动觉交互
abstract: The current study investigated possible human-robot kinaesthetic interaction using a variational recurrent neural network model, called PV-RNN, which is based on the free energy principle. Our prior robotic studies using PV-RNN showed that the nature of interactions between top-down expectation and bottom-up inference is strongly affected by a parameter, called the meta-prior, which regulates the complexity term in free energy.The study also compares the counter force generated when trained transitions are induced by a human experimenter and when untrained transitions are induced. Our experimental results indicated that (1) the human experimenter needs more/less force to induce trained transitions when $w$ is set with larger/smaller values, (2) the human experimenter needs more force to act on the robot when he attempts to induce untrained as opposed to trained movement pattern transitions. Our analysis of time development of essential variables and values in PV-RNN during bodily interaction clarified the mechanism by which gaps in actional intentions between the human experimenter and the robot can be manifested as reaction forces between them.
summary: The current study investigated possible human-robot kinaesthetic interaction using a variational recurrent neural network model, called PV-RNN, which is based on the free energy principle. Our prior robotic studies using PV-RNN showed that the nature of interactions between top-down expectation and bottom-up inference is strongly affected by a parameter, called the meta-prior, which regulates the complexity term in free energy.The study also compares the counter force generated when trained transitions are induced by a human experimenter and when untrained transitions are induced. Our experimental results indicated that (1) the human experimenter needs more/less force to induce trained transitions when $w$ is set with larger/smaller values, (2) the human experimenter needs more force to act on the robot when he attempts to induce untrained as opposed to trained movement pattern transitions. Our analysis of time development of essential variables and values in PV-RNN during bodily interaction clarified the mechanism by which gaps in actional intentions between the human experimenter and the robot can be manifested as reaction forces between them.
abstract_zh: 当前的研究使用基于自由能原理的变分循环神经网络模型（称为 PV-RNN）研究了可能的人机动觉交互。我们之前使用 PV-RNN 进行的机器人研究表明，自上而下的期望和自下而上的推理之间相互作用的性质受到称为元先验的参数的强烈影响，该参数调节自由能中的复杂性项。该研究还比较了人类实验者诱导经过训练的转换和诱导未经训练的转换时产生的反作用力。我们的实验结果表明，（1）当 $w$ 设置为更大/更小的值时，人类实验者需要更多/更少的力来诱导训练的转换，（2）当人类实验者试图诱导未经训练的而不是受过训练的运动模式转换时，他需要更多的力来作用在机器人上。我们对身体交互过程中 PV-RNN 中基本变量和值的时间发展的分析阐明了人类实验者和机器人之间的行动意图差距可以表现为它们之间的反作用力的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文基于自由能原理，利用PV-RNN模型研究人机运动交互机制，分析元先验参数对交互过程中动作意图差异的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对人机交互中动作意图差异如何转化为物理反应力的系统性解释，需建立理论模型揭示其内在机制。
AI.method: 构建基于自由能原理的PV-RNN模型，通过实验对比人类实验者诱导训练/未训练动作过渡时的反作用力差异，并分析模型变量的时间演化过程。
AI.result: 发现元先验参数w调节人类施力需求（w越大需力越多），未训练动作过渡需更大外力；模型变量分析表明动作意图差异会通过反应力体现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了人机交互中意图差异的物理表现机制，为基于自由能原理的智能机器人控制提供了理论依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文基于自由能原理，利用PV-RNN模型研究人机运动交互机制，分析元先验参数对交互过程中动作意图差异的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对人机交互中动作意图差异如何转化为物理反应力的系统性解释，需建立理论模型揭示其内在机制。
ai_content.method: 构建基于自由能原理的PV-RNN模型，通过实验对比人类实验者诱导训练/未训练动作过渡时的反作用力差异，并分析模型变量的时间演化过程。
ai_content.result: 发现元先验参数w调节人类施力需求（w越大需力越多），未训练动作过渡需更大外力；模型变量分析表明动作意图差异会通过反应力体现。
ai_content.conclusion: 该研究阐明了人机交互中意图差异的物理表现机制，为基于自由能原理的智能机器人控制提供了理论依据。

search_text: Human-Robot Kinaesthetic Interaction Based on Free Energy Principle 基于自由能原理的人机动觉交互 The current study investigated possible human-robot kinaesthetic interaction using a variational recurrent neural network model, called PV-RNN, which is based on the free energy principle. Our prior robotic studies using PV-RNN showed that the nature of interactions between top-down expectation and bottom-up inference is strongly affected by a parameter, called the meta-prior, which regulates the complexity term in free energy.The study also compares the counter force generated when trained transitions are induced by a human experimenter and when untrained transitions are induced. Our experimental results indicated that (1) the human experimenter needs more/less force to induce trained transitions when $w$ is set with larger/smaller values, (2) the human experimenter needs more force to act on the robot when he attempts to induce untrained as opposed to trained movement pattern transitions. Our analysis of time development of essential variables and values in PV-RNN during bodily interaction clarified the mechanism by which gaps in actional intentions between the human experimenter and the robot can be manifested as reaction forces between them. 当前的研究使用基于自由能原理的变分循环神经网络模型（称为 PV-RNN）研究了可能的人机动觉交互。我们之前使用 PV-RNN 进行的机器人研究表明，自上而下的期望和自下而上的推理之间相互作用的性质受到称为元先验的参数的强烈影响，该参数调节自由能中的复杂性项。该研究还比较了人类实验者诱导经过训练的转换和诱导未经训练的转换时产生的反作用力。我们的实验结果表明，（1）当 $w$ 设置为更大/更小的值时，人类实验者需要更多/更少的力来诱导训练的转换，（2）当人类实验者试图诱导未经训练的而不是受过训练的运动模式转换时，他需要更多的力来作用在机器人上。我们对身体交互过程中 PV-RNN 中基本变量和值的时间发展的分析阐明了人类实验者和机器人之间的行动意图差距可以表现为它们之间的反作用力的机制。 本文基于自由能原理，利用PV-RNN模型研究人机运动交互机制，分析元先验参数对交互过程中动作意图差异的影响。 Hiroki Sawada,Wataru Ohata,Jun Tani cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Hanxue Liang,Tianhao Wu,Param Hanji,Francesco Banterle,Hongyun Gao,Rafal Mantiuk,Cengiz Oztireli
title: Perceptual Quality Assessment of NeRF and Neural View Synthesis Methods for Front-Facing Views
title_zh: NeRF 的感知质量评估和正面视图的神经视图合成方法
abstract: Neural view synthesis (NVS) is one of the most successful techniques for synthesizing free viewpoint videos, capable of achieving high fidelity from only a sparse set of captured images. This success has led to many variants of the techniques, each evaluated on a set of test views typically using image quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM, or LPIPS. There has been a lack of research on how NVS methods perform with respect to perceived video quality. We present the first study on perceptual evaluation of NVS and NeRF variants. For this study, we collected two datasets of scenes captured in a controlled lab environment as well as in-the-wild. In contrast to existing datasets, these scenes come with reference video sequences, allowing us to test for temporal artifacts and subtle distortions that are easily overlooked when viewing only static images. We measured the quality of videos synthesized by several NVS methods in a well-controlled perceptual quality assessment experiment as well as with many existing state-of-the-art image/video quality metrics. We present a detailed analysis of the results and recommendations for dataset and metric selection for NVS evaluation.
summary: Neural view synthesis (NVS) is one of the most successful techniques for synthesizing free viewpoint videos, capable of achieving high fidelity from only a sparse set of captured images. This success has led to many variants of the techniques, each evaluated on a set of test views typically using image quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM, or LPIPS. There has been a lack of research on how NVS methods perform with respect to perceived video quality. We present the first study on perceptual evaluation of NVS and NeRF variants. For this study, we collected two datasets of scenes captured in a controlled lab environment as well as in-the-wild. In contrast to existing datasets, these scenes come with reference video sequences, allowing us to test for temporal artifacts and subtle distortions that are easily overlooked when viewing only static images. We measured the quality of videos synthesized by several NVS methods in a well-controlled perceptual quality assessment experiment as well as with many existing state-of-the-art image/video quality metrics. We present a detailed analysis of the results and recommendations for dataset and metric selection for NVS evaluation.
abstract_zh: 神经视图合成 (NVS) 是合成自由视点视频最成功的技术之一，能够仅从一组稀疏的捕获图像中实现高保真度。这一成功催生了该技术的许多变体，每种技术通常使用 PSNR、SSIM 或 LPIPS 等图像质量指标在一组测试视图上进行评估。目前还缺乏关于 NVS 方法如何在感知视频质量方面表现的研究。我们提出了第一个关于 NVS 和 NeRF 变体感知评估的研究。在这项研究中，我们收集了在受控实验室环境和野外捕获的两个场景数据集。与现有数据集相比，这些场景带有参考视频序列，使我们能够测试时间伪影和细微的失真，这些在仅查看静态图像时很容易被忽视。我们在良好控制的感知质量评估实验中测量了多种 NVS 方法合成的视频质量，以及许多现有的最先进的图像/视频质量指标。我们对 NVS 评估的数据集和指标选择的结果和建议进行了详细分析。

AI.tldr: 该论文对NeRF和神经视角合成方法在正面视角下的感知质量进行评估，通过对比传统图像质量指标与人类感知差异，提出更全面的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有神经视角合成（NVS）方法多依赖PSNR、SSIM等图像质量指标，但缺乏对视频感知质量的系统研究，难以反映真实应用场景中的细微失真和时序伪影。
AI.method: 构建包含实验室和真实场景的两个数据集，每个场景均配有参考视频序列；通过控制实验评估多种NVS方法生成视频的感知质量，并与现有先进图像/视频质量指标进行对比分析。
AI.result: 实验发现传统指标与人类感知存在显著差异，部分方法在静态图像表现优异但视频中存在明显时序伪影，且不同数据集对方法排名影响较大。
AI.conclusion: 感知质量评估对NVS方法优化至关重要，建议未来研究采用包含参考视频的动态数据集，并结合人类主观评价与客观指标进行综合评估。

authors_text: David Benrimoh,Akiva Kleinerman,Toshi A. Furukawa,Charles F. Reynolds III,Eric Lenze,Jordan Karp,Benoit Mulsant,Caitrin Armstrong,Joseph Mehltretter,Robert Fratila,Kelly Perlman,Sonia Israel,Myriam Tanguay-Sela,Christina Popescu,Grace Golden,Sabrina Qassim,Alexandra Anacleto,Adam Kapelner,Ariel Rosenfeld,Gustavo Turecki
title: Towards Outcome-Driven Patient Subgroups: A Machine Learning Analysis Across Six Depression Treatment Studies
title_zh: 走向结果驱动的患者亚组：六项抑郁症治疗研究的机器学习分析
abstract: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a heterogeneous condition; multiple underlying neurobiological substrates could be associated with treatment response variability. Understanding the sources of this variability and predicting outcomes has been elusive. Machine learning has shown promise in predicting treatment response in MDD, but one limitation has been the lack of clinical interpretability of machine learning models. We analyzed data from six clinical trials of pharmacological treatment for depression (total n = 5438) using the Differential Prototypes Neural Network (DPNN), a neural network model that derives patient prototypes which can be used to derive treatment-relevant patient clusters while learning to generate probabilities for differential treatment response. A model classifying remission and outputting individual remission probabilities for five first-line monotherapies and three combination treatments was trained using clinical and demographic data. Model validity and clinical utility were measured based on area under the curve (AUC) and expected improvement in sample remission rate with model-guided treatment, respectively. Post-hoc analyses yielded clusters (subgroups) based on patient prototypes learned during training. Prototypes were evaluated for interpretability by assessing differences in feature distributions and treatment-specific outcomes. A 3-prototype model achieved an AUC of 0.66 and an expected absolute improvement in population remission rate compared to the sample remission rate. We identified three treatment-relevant patient clusters which were clinically interpretable. It is possible to produce novel treatment-relevant patient profiles using machine learning models; doing so may improve precision medicine for depression. Note: This model is not currently the subject of any active clinical trials and is not intended for clinical use.

Understanding the sources of this variability and predicting outcomes has been elusive. Machine learning has shown promise in predicting treatment response in MDD, but one limitation has been the lack of clinical interpretability of machine learning models. We analyzed data from six clinical trials of pharmacological treatment for depression (total n = 5438) using the Differential Prototypes Neural Network (DPNN), a neural network model that derives patient prototypes which can be used to derive treatment-relevant patient clusters while learning to generate probabilities for differential treatment response. A model classifying remission and outputting individual remission probabilities for five first-line monotherapies and three combination treatments was trained using clinical and demographic data. Model validity and clinical utility were measured based on area under the curve (AUC) and expected improvement in sample remission rate with model-guided treatment, respectively. Post-hoc analyses yielded clusters (subgroups) based on patient prototypes learned during training. Prototypes were evaluated for interpretability by assessing differences in feature distributions and treatment-specific outcomes. A 3-prototype model achieved an AUC of 0.66 and an expected absolute improvement in population remission rate compared to the sample remission rate. It is possible to produce novel treatment-relevant patient profiles using machine learning models; doing so may improve precision medicine for depression. abstract_zh: 重度抑郁症 (MDD) 是一种异质性疾病；多种潜在的神经生物学底物可能与治疗反应的变异性有关。了解这种变异性的根源并预测结果一直是难以捉摸的。机器学习在预测重度抑郁症的治疗反应方面显示出了希望，但一个限制是机器学习模型缺乏临床可解释性。我们使用差分原型神经网络 (DPNN) 分析了六项抑郁症药物治疗临床试验的数据（总计 n = 5438），DPNN 是一种神经网络模型，可派生患者原型，可用于派生与治疗相关的患者群体，同时学习生成差异治疗反应的概率。使用临床和人口统计数据训练对缓解进行分类并输出五种一线单一疗法和三种联合治疗的个体缓解概率的模型。模型的有效性和临床实用性分别根据曲线下面积（AUC）和模型指导治疗的样本缓解率的预期改善来衡量。事后分析根据训练期间学到的患者原型产生聚类（子组）。通过评估特征分布和特定治疗结果的差异来评估原型的可解释性。 3 原型模型的 AUC 为 0.66，与样本缓解率相比，群体缓解率达到了预期的绝对改善。我们确定了三个与治疗相关的患者群，这些患者群在临床上是可解释的。使用机器学习模型可以生成新颖的与治疗相关的患者档案；这样做可能会改善抑郁症的精准医疗。注意：该模型目前不是任何活跃的临床试验的主题，也不适合临床使用。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用机器学习方法分析六项抑郁症治疗研究数据，旨在识别与治疗结果相关的患者亚群。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症治疗反应存在异质性，现有机器学习模型缺乏临床可解释性，难以指导精准治疗。
AI.method: 采用差分原型神经网络（DPNN）模型，基于临床和人口统计数据训练分类模型，通过AUC和预期改善率评估模型有效性，并进行事后分析生成患者亚群原型。
AI.result: 3原型模型AUC为0.66，识别出三个具有临床意义的治疗相关患者亚群，可提升总体缓解率。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习可生成新型治疗相关患者画像，为抑郁症精准医疗提供支持，但该模型暂未用于临床试验。

search_text: Towards Outcome-Driven Patient Subgroups: A Machine Learning Analysis Across Six Depression Treatment Studies 走向结果驱动的患者亚组：六项抑郁症治疗研究的机器学习分析 Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a heterogeneous condition; multiple underlying neurobiological substrates could be associated with treatment response variability. Understanding the sources of this variability and predicting outcomes has been elusive. Machine learning has shown promise in predicting treatment response in MDD, but one limitation has been the lack of clinical interpretability of machine learning models. We analyzed data from six clinical trials of pharmacological treatment for depression (total n = 5438) using the Differential Prototypes Neural Network (DPNN), a neural network model that derives patient prototypes which can be used to derive treatment-relevant patient clusters while learning to generate probabilities for differential treatment response. A model classifying remission and outputting individual remission probabilities for five first-line monotherapies and three combination treatments was trained using clinical and demographic data. Model validity and clinical utility were measured based on area under the curve (AUC) and expected improvement in sample remission rate with model-guided treatment, respectively. Post-hoc analyses yielded clusters (subgroups) based on patient prototypes learned during training. Prototypes were evaluated for interpretability by assessing differences in feature distributions and treatment-specific outcomes. A 3-prototype model achieved an AUC of 0.66 and an expected absolute improvement in population remission rate compared to the sample remission rate. We identified three treatment-relevant patient clusters which were clinically interpretable. It is possible to produce novel treatment-relevant patient profiles using machine learning models; doing so may improve precision medicine for depression. Note: This model is not currently the subject of any active clinical trials and is not intended for clinical use. 重度抑郁症 (MDD) 是一种异质性疾病；多种潜在的神经生物学底物可能与治疗反应的变异性有关。了解这种变异性的根源并预测结果一直是难以捉摸的。机器学习在预测重度抑郁症的治疗反应方面显示出了希望，但一个限制是机器学习模型缺乏临床可解释性。我们使用差分原型神经网络 (DPNN) 分析了六项抑郁症药物治疗临床试验的数据（总计 n = 5438），DPNN 是一种神经网络模型，可派生患者原型，可用于派生与治疗相关的患者群体，同时学习生成差异治疗反应的概率。使用临床和人口统计数据训练对缓解进行分类并输出五种一线单一疗法和三种联合治疗的个体缓解概率的模型。模型的有效性和临床实用性分别根据曲线下面积（AUC）和模型指导治疗的样本缓解率的预期改善来衡量。事后分析根据训练期间学到的患者原型产生聚类（子组）。通过评估特征分布和特定治疗结果的差异来评估原型的可解释性。 3 原型模型的 AUC 为 0.66，与样本缓解率相比，群体缓解率达到了预期的绝对改善。我们确定了三个与治疗相关的患者群，这些患者群在临床上是可解释的。使用机器学习模型可以生成新颖的与治疗相关的患者档案；这样做可能会改善抑郁症的精准医疗。注意：该模型目前不是任何活跃的临床试验的主题，也不适合临床使用。 该论文利用机器学习方法分析六项抑郁症治疗研究数据，旨在识别与治疗结果相关的患者亚群。 David Benrimoh,Akiva Kleinerman,Toshi A. Furukawa,Charles F. Reynolds III,Eric Lenze,Jordan Karp,Benoit Mulsant,Caitrin Armstrong,Joseph Mehltretter,Robert Fratila,Kelly Perlman,Sonia Israel,Myriam Tanguay-Sela,Christina Popescu,Grace Golden,Sabrina Qassim,Alexandra Anacleto,Adam Kapelner,Ariel Rosenfeld,Gustavo Turecki cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ran Wei,Anthony D. McDonald,Alfredo Garcia,Gustav Markkula,Johan Engstrom,Matthew O'Kelly
title: Learning An Active Inference Model of Driver Perception and Control: Application to Vehicle Car-Following
title_zh: 学习驾驶员感知和控制的主动推理模型：在车辆跟驰中的应用
abstract: In this paper we introduce a general estimation methodology for learning a model of human perception and control in a sensorimotor control task based upon a finite set of demonstrations. The model's structure consists of i the agent's internal representation of how the environment and associated observations evolve as a result of control actions and ii the agent's preferences over observable outcomes. We consider a model's structure specification consistent with active inference, a theory of human perception and behavior from cognitive science. According to active inference, the agent acts upon the world so as to minimize surprise defined as a measure of the extent to which an agent's current sensory observations differ from its preferred sensory observations. We propose a bi-level optimization approach to estimation which relies on a structural assumption on prior distributions that parameterize the statistical accuracy of the human agent's model of the environment. To illustrate the proposed methodology, we present the estimation of a model for car-following behavior based upon a naturalistic dataset. Overall, the results indicate that learning active inference models of human perception and control from data is a promising alternative to black-box models of driving.
summary: In this paper we introduce a general estimation methodology for learning a model of human perception and control in a sensorimotor control task based upon a finite set of demonstrations. The model's structure consists of i the agent's internal representation of how the environment and associated observations evolve as a result of control actions and ii the agent's preferences over observable outcomes. We consider a model's structure specification consistent with active inference, a theory of human perception and behavior from cognitive science. According to active inference, the agent acts upon the world so as to minimize surprise defined as a measure of the extent to which an agent's current sensory observations differ from its preferred sensory observations. We propose a bi-level optimization approach to estimation which relies on a structural assumption on prior distributions that parameterize the statistical accuracy of the human agent's model of the environment. To illustrate the proposed methodology, we present the estimation of a model for car-following behavior based upon a naturalistic dataset. Overall, the results indicate that learning active inference models of human perception and control from data is a promising alternative to black-box models of driving.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种通用估计方法，用于基于一组有限的演示来学习感觉运动控制任务中的人类感知和控制模型。该模型的结构包括 i 主体对环境和相关观察结果如何因控制行为而演变的内部表示，以及 ii 主体对可观察结果的偏好。我们认为模型的结构规范与主动推理（来自认知科学的人类感知和行为理论）一致。根据主动推理，智能体对世界采取行动，以尽量减少意外，意外的定义是智能体当前的感官观察与其首选的感官观察不同程度的衡量标准。我们提出了一种双层优化估计方法，该方法依赖于先验分布的结构假设，该先验分布参数化了人类代理环境模型的统计准确性。为了说明所提出的方法，我们提出了基于自然数据集的跟车行为模型的估计。总体而言，结果表明，从数据中学习人类感知和控制的主动推理模型是驾驶黑盒模型的一个有前途的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于主动推理理论的学习方法，用于建模驾驶员在跟车场景中的感知与控制行为。
AI.motivation: 传统黑箱模型难以解释人类驾驶行为的内在机制，需开发能捕捉感知与控制逻辑的可解释模型。
AI.method: 采用双层优化框架，结合主动推理理论，通过有限示范数据学习驾驶员对环境动态的内部表征及结果偏好。
AI.result: 基于自然驾驶数据的实验表明，该方法能有效建模跟车行为，验证了主动推理模型在驾驶场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 从数据中学习主动推理模型为理解人类驾驶行为提供了新途径，优于传统黑箱模型的解释性不足问题。
