search_text: Blind Inpainting with Object-aware Discrimination for Artificial Marker Removal 通过对象感知辨别进行盲修复以实现人工标记去除 Medical images often incorporate doctor-added markers that can hinder AI-based diagnosis. This issue highlights the need of inpainting techniques to restore the corrupted visual contents. However, existing methods require manual mask annotation as input, limiting the application scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel blind inpainting method that automatically reconstructs visual contents within the corrupted regions without mask input as guidance. Our model includes a blind reconstruction network and an object-aware discriminator for adversarial training. The reconstruction network contains two branches that predict corrupted regions in images and simultaneously restore the missing visual contents. Leveraging the potent recognition capability of a dense object detector, the object-aware discriminator ensures markers undetectable after inpainting. Thus, the restored images closely resemble the clean ones. We evaluate our method on three datasets of various medical imaging modalities, confirming better performance over other state-of-the-art methods. 医学图像通常包含医生添加的标记，这些标记可能会阻碍基于人工智能的诊断。这个问题凸显了修复技术来恢复损坏的视觉内容的必要性。然而，现有方法需要手动掩模注释作为输入，限制了应用场景。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的盲修复方法，该方法可以自动重建损坏区域内的视觉内容，而无需掩模输入作为指导。我们的模型包括盲重建网络和用于对抗训练的对象感知鉴别器。重建网络包含两个分支，可预测图像中的损坏区域并同时恢复丢失的视觉内容。利用密集物体检测器的强大识别能力，物体感知鉴别器确保修复后标记无法被检测到。因此，恢复的图像与干净的图像非常相似。我们在不同医学成像模式的三个数据集上评估我们的方法，确认其性能优于其他最先进的方法。 本文提出一种无需人工标注掩码的盲修复方法，用于自动去除医学图像中的人工标记。 Xuechen Guo,Wenhao Hu,Chiming Ni,Wenhao Chai,Shiyan Li,Gaoang Wang cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Mausoom Sarkar,Nikitha SR,Mayur Hemani,Rishabh Jain,Balaji Krishnamurthy
title: Parameter Efficient Local Implicit Image Function Network for Face Segmentation
title_zh: 用于人脸分割的参数高效局部隐式图像函数网络
abstract: Face parsing is defined as the per-pixel labeling of images containing human faces. The labels are defined to identify key facial regions like eyes, lips, nose, hair, etc. In this work, we make use of the structural consistency of the human face to propose a lightweight face-parsing method using a Local Implicit Function network, FP-LIIF. We propose a simple architecture having a convolutional encoder and a pixel MLP decoder that uses 1/26th number of parameters compared to the state-of-the-art models and yet matches or outperforms state-of-the-art models on multiple datasets, like CelebAMask-HQ and LaPa. We do not use any pretraining, and compared to other works, our network can also generate segmentation at different resolutions without any changes in the input resolution. This work enables the use of facial segmentation on low-compute or low-bandwidth devices because of its higher FPS and smaller model size.
summary: Face parsing is defined as the per-pixel labeling of images containing human faces. The labels are defined to identify key facial regions like eyes, lips, nose, hair, etc. In this work, we make use of the structural consistency of the human face to propose a lightweight face-parsing method using a Local Implicit Function network, FP-LIIF. We propose a simple architecture having a convolutional encoder and a pixel MLP decoder that uses 1/26th number of parameters compared to the state-of-the-art models and yet matches or outperforms state-of-the-art models on multiple datasets, like CelebAMask-HQ and LaPa. We do not use any pretraining, and compared to other works, our network can also generate segmentation at different resolutions without any changes in the input resolution. This work enables the use of facial segmentation on low-compute or low-bandwidth devices because of its higher FPS and smaller model size.
abstract_zh: 人脸解析被定义为对包含人脸的图像进行逐像素标记。标签被定义为识别关键的面部区域，如眼睛、嘴唇、鼻子、头发等。在这项工作中，我们利用人脸的结构一致性，提出一种使用局部隐式函数网络 FP-LIIF 的轻量级面部解析方法。我们提出了一种具有卷积编码器和像素 MLP 解码器的简单架构，与最先进的模型相比，它使用的参数数量是最先进模型的 1/26，但在多个数据集（如 CelebAMask-HQ 和 LaPa）上匹配或优于最先进的模型。我们不使用任何预训练，并且与其他作品相比，我们的网络还可以在不改变输入分辨率的情况下生成不同分辨率的分割。这项工作由于具有更高的 FPS 和更小的模型尺寸，因此可以在低计算或低带宽设备上使用面部分割。

AI.tldr: 提出一种参数高效且轻量的人脸分割方法FP-LIIF，实现高精度且低计算需求的面部区域像素级分割
AI.motivation: 解决现有面部分割模型参数冗余、计算量大且难以适配低资源设备的问题，同时保持分割精度
AI.method: 设计包含卷积编码器和像素MLP解码器的局部隐式函数网络，通过结构一致性建模实现参数压缩（仅需竞品1/26参数），支持无预训练和多分辨率输出
AI.result: 在CelebAMask-HQ和LaPa数据集上达到或超越SOTA性能，模型体积更小且推理速度更快（更高FPS），无需调整输入分辨率即可生成多尺度分割结果
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过参数高效架构实现了低计算开销的人脸分割，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案，推动了轻量化视觉模型的发展

authors_text: Martina Lippi,Michael C. Welle,Andrea Gasparri,Danica Kragic
title: Ensemble Latent Space Roadmap for Improved Robustness in Visual Action Planning
title_zh: 用于提高视觉动作规划鲁棒性的集成潜在空间路线图
abstract: Planning in learned latent spaces helps to decrease the dimensionality of raw observations. In this work, we propose to leverage the ensemble paradigm to enhance the robustness of latent planning systems. We rely on our Latent Space Roadmap (LSR) framework, which builds a graph in a learned structured latent space to perform planning. Given multiple LSR framework instances, that differ either on their latent spaces or on the parameters for constructing the graph, we use the action information as well as the embedded nodes of the produced plans to define similarity measures. These are then utilized to select the most promising plans. We validate the performance of our Ensemble LSR (ENS-LSR) on simulated box stacking and grape harvesting tasks as well as on a real-world robotic T-shirt folding experiment.
summary: Planning in learned latent spaces helps to decrease the dimensionality of raw observations. In this work, we propose to leverage the ensemble paradigm to enhance the robustness of latent planning systems. We rely on our Latent Space Roadmap (LSR) framework, which builds a graph in a learned structured latent space to perform planning. Given multiple LSR framework instances, that differ either on their latent spaces or on the parameters for constructing the graph, we use the action information as well as the embedded nodes of the produced plans to define similarity measures. These are then utilized to select the most promising plans. We validate the performance of our Ensemble LSR (ENS-LSR) on simulated box stacking and grape harvesting tasks as well as on a real-world robotic T-shirt folding experiment.
abstract_zh: 在学习的潜在空间中进行规划有助于降低原始观察的维度。在这项工作中，我们建议利用集成范式来增强潜在规划系统的鲁棒性。我们依靠潜在空间路线图（LSR）框架，该框架在学习的结构化潜在空间中构建一个图来执行规划。给定多个 LSR 框架实例，它们的潜在空间或构建图的参数不同，我们使用操作信息以及生成的计划的嵌入节点来定义相似性度量。然后利用这些来选择最有前途的计划。我们验证了 Ensemble LSR (ENS-LSR) 在模拟箱子堆垛和葡萄收获任务以及现实世界的机器人 T 恤折叠实验中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成潜在空间路线图（ENS-LSR）方法，通过结合多个潜在空间规划实例来提高视觉动作规划的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 潜在空间规划虽能降低观测维度，但单一模型可能因潜在空间分布偏差或规划路径局限性导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 构建多个差异化的潜在空间路线图（LSR）实例，通过动作信息与规划路径嵌入节点计算相似性度量，筛选最优计划进行集成决策。
AI.result: 在模拟的积木堆叠、葡萄采摘任务及真实T恤折叠实验中，ENS-LSR均表现出比单一LSR更高的规划成功率和环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: 集成多潜在空间规划实例能有效提升视觉动作规划的鲁棒性，为复杂动态场景下的机器人决策提供新思路。

Given multiple LSR framework instances, that differ either on their latent spaces or on the parameters for constructing the graph, we use the action information as well as the embedded nodes of the produced plans to define similarity measures. These are then utilized to select the most promising plans. We validate the performance of our Ensemble LSR (ENS-LSR) on simulated box stacking and grape harvesting tasks as well as on a real-world robotic T-shirt folding experiment. 在学习的潜在空间中进行规划有助于降低原始观察的维度。在这项工作中，我们建议利用集成范式来增强潜在规划系统的鲁棒性。我们依靠潜在空间路线图（LSR）框架，该框架在学习的结构化潜在空间中构建一个图来执行规划。给定多个 LSR 框架实例，它们的潜在空间或构建图的参数不同，我们使用操作信息以及生成的计划的嵌入节点来定义相似性度量。然后利用这些来选择最有前途的计划。我们验证了 Ensemble LSR (ENS-LSR) 在模拟箱子堆垛和葡萄收获任务以及现实世界的机器人 T 恤折叠实验中的性能。 本文提出了一种集成潜在空间路线图（ENS-LSR）方法，通过结合多个潜在空间规划实例来提高视觉动作规划的鲁棒性。 Martina Lippi,Michael C. Welle,Andrea Gasparri,Danica Kragic cs.RO

authors_text: Aidana Massalimova,Maikel Timmermans,Nicola Cavalcanti,Daniel Suter,Matthias Seibold,Fabio Carrillo,Christoph J. Laux,Reto Sutter,Mazda Farshad,Kathleen Denis,Philipp Fürnstahl
title: Automatic breach detection during spine pedicle drilling based on vibroacoustic sensing
title_zh: 基于振动声学传感的脊柱椎弓根钻孔过程中的自动缺口检测
abstract: Pedicle drilling is a complex and critical spinal surgery task. Detecting breach or penetration of the surgical tool to the cortical wall during pilot-hole drilling is essential to avoid damage to vital anatomical structures adjacent to the pedicle, such as the spinal cord, blood vessels, and nerves. Currently, the guidance of pedicle drilling is done using image-guided methods that are radiation intensive and limited to the preoperative information. This work proposes a new radiation-free breach detection algorithm leveraging a non-visual sensor setup in combination with deep learning approach. Multiple vibroacoustic sensors, such as a contact microphone, a free-field microphone, a tri-axial accelerometer, a uni-axial accelerometer, and an optical tracking system were integrated into the setup. Data were collected on four cadaveric human spines, ranging from L5 to T10. An experienced spine surgeon drilled the pedicles relying on optical navigation. A new automatic labeling method based on the tracking data was introduced. Labeled data was subsequently fed to the network in mel-spectrograms, classifying the data into breach and non-breach. Different sensor types, sensor positioning, and their combinations were evaluated. The best results in breach recall for individual sensors could be achieved using contact microphones attached to the dorsal skin (85.8\%) and uni-axial accelerometers clamped to the spinous process of the drilled vertebra (81.0\%). The best-performing data fusion model combined the latter two sensors with a breach recall of 98\%. The proposed method shows the great potential of non-visual sensor fusion for avoiding screw misplacement and accidental bone breaches during pedicle drilling and could be extended to further surgical applications.

A new automatic labeling method based on the tracking data was introduced. Labeled data was subsequently fed to the network in mel-spectrograms, classifying the data into breach and non-breach. The best results in breach recall for individual sensors could be achieved using contact microphones attached to the dorsal skin (85.8\%) and uni-axial accelerometers clamped to the spinous process of the drilled vertebra (81.0\%). The best-performing data fusion model combined the latter two sensors with a breach recall of 98\%. abstract_zh: 椎弓根钻孔是一项复杂而关键的脊柱外科任务。在先导孔钻孔过程中检测手术工具对皮质壁的破坏或穿透对于避免损坏椎弓根附近的重要解剖结构（例如脊髓、血管和神经）至关重要。目前，椎弓根钻孔的引导是使用图像引导方法完成的，该方法是辐射密集型的并且仅限于术前信息。这项工作提出了一种新的无辐射违规检测算法，利用非视觉传感器设置与深度学习方法相结合。该装置集成了多个振动声学传感器，例如接触式麦克风、自由场麦克风、三轴加速度计、单轴加速度计和光学跟踪系统。数据收集于四具尸体脊柱，范围从 L5 到 T10。经验丰富的脊柱外科医生依靠光学导航对椎弓根进行钻孔。提出了一种新的基于跟踪数据的自动标记方法。标记的数据随后以梅尔谱图的形式输入网络，将数据分为违规数据和非违规数据。评估了不同的传感器类型、传感器定位及其组合。使用连接到背部皮肤的接触式麦克风 (85.8\%) 和夹在钻孔椎骨棘突上的单轴加速度计 (81.0\%) 可以实现单个传感器的违规召回的最佳结果。性能最佳的数据融合模型结合了后两个传感器，违规召回率为 98%。所提出的方法显示了非视觉传感器融合在避免椎弓根钻孔过程中螺钉错位和意外骨断裂方面的巨大潜力，并且可以扩展到进一步的外科应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于振动声学传感的脊柱椎弓根钻孔自动裂痕检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有椎弓根钻孔导航依赖辐射成像且受限于术前信息，亟需一种无辐射、实时的裂痕检测技术以避免损伤关键解剖结构。
AI.method: 集成接触麦克风、自由场麦克风、三轴/单轴加速度计及光学跟踪系统，通过深度学习对采集的振动声学数据进行梅尔频谱图分类，并评估不同传感器组合的检测性能。
AI.result: 单传感器最佳召回率分别为接触麦克风85.8%和单轴加速度计81.0%，数据融合模型召回率提升至98%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了非视觉传感器融合在避免椎弓根螺钉误置中的潜力，可拓展至其他外科手术场景。

authors_text: Fajar J. Ekaputra,Majlinda Llugiqi,Marta Sabou,Andreas Ekelhart,Heiko Paulheim,Anna Breit,Artem Revenko,Laura Waltersdorfer,Kheir Eddine Farfar,Sören Auer
title: Describing and Organizing Semantic Web and Machine Learning Systems in the SWeMLS-KG
title_zh: 描述和组织 SWeMLS-KG 中的语义网和机器学习系统
comment: Preprint of a paper in the resource track of the 20th Extended Semantic Web Conference (ESWC'23)
comments: Preprint of a paper in the resource track of the 20th Extended Semantic Web Conference (ESWC'23)
abstract: In line with the general trend in artificial intelligence research to create intelligent systems that combine learning and symbolic components, a new sub-area has emerged that focuses on combining machine learning (ML) components with techniques developed by the Semantic Web (SW) community - Semantic Web Machine Learning (SWeML for short). Due to its rapid growth and impact on several communities in the last two decades, there is a need to better understand the space of these SWeML Systems, their characteristics, and trends. Yet, surveys that adopt principled and unbiased approaches are missing. To fill this gap, we performed a systematic study and analyzed nearly 500 papers published in the last decade in this area, where we focused on evaluating architectural, and application-specific features. Our analysis identified a rapidly growing interest in SWeML Systems, with a high impact on several application domains and tasks. Catalysts for this rapid growth are the increased application of deep learning and knowledge graph technologies. By leveraging the in-depth understanding of this area acquired through this study, a further key contribution of this paper is a classification system for SWeML Systems which we publish as ontology.
summary: In line with the general trend in artificial intelligence research to create intelligent systems that combine learning and symbolic components, a new sub-area has emerged that focuses on combining machine learning (ML) components with techniques developed by the Semantic Web (SW) community - Semantic Web Machine Learning (SWeML for short). Due to its rapid growth and impact on several communities in the last two decades, there is a need to better understand the space of these SWeML Systems, their characteristics, and trends. Yet, surveys that adopt principled and unbiased approaches are missing. To fill this gap, we performed a systematic study and analyzed nearly 500 papers published in the last decade in this area, where we focused on evaluating architectural, and application-specific features. Our analysis identified a rapidly growing interest in SWeML Systems, with a high impact on several application domains and tasks. Catalysts for this rapid growth are the increased application of deep learning and knowledge graph technologies. By leveraging the in-depth understanding of this area acquired through this study, a further key contribution of this paper is a classification system for SWeML Systems which we publish as ontology.
abstract_zh: 顺应人工智能研究创建结合学习和符号组件的智能系统的总体趋势，出现了一个新的子领域，专注于将机器学习（ML）组件与语义网（SW）社区开发的技术相结合——语义网机器学习（简称SWeML）。由于其在过去二十年中的快速增长和对多个社区的影响，因此需要更好地了解这些 SWeML 系统的空间、其特征和趋势。然而，缺乏采用原则性和公正方法的调查。为了填补这一空白，我们进行了系统研究并分析了过去十年在该领域发表的近 500 篇论文，其中我们重点评估架构和特定于应用程序的功能。我们的分析发现，人们对 SWeML 系统的兴趣迅速增长，对多个应用领域和任务产生了很大影响。这种快速增长的催化剂是深度学习和知识图技术应用的增加。通过利用通过本研究获得的对该领域的深入了解，本文的另一个关键贡献是 SWeML 系统的分类系统，我们将其作为本体发布。

AI.tldr: 描述和组织语义网络与机器学习系统的分类体系
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对SWeML系统的系统性综述，需明确其特征和趋势
AI.method: 系统综述法，分析近500篇论文的架构和应用特征
AI.result: 发现SWeML系统快速增长，深度学习和知识图谱技术是主要推动因素
AI.conclusion: 构建了SWeML系统的分类体系，促进跨领域研究与应用

authors_text: Shaozhe Hao,Kai Han,Kwan-Yee K. Wong
title: Learning Attention as Disentangler for Compositional Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 学习注意力作为组合零样本学习的解缠剂
abstract: Compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) aims at learning visual concepts (i.e., attributes and objects) from seen compositions and combining concept knowledge into unseen compositions. The key to CZSL is learning the disentanglement of the attribute-object composition. To this end, we propose to exploit cross-attentions as compositional disentanglers to learn disentangled concept embeddings. For example, if we want to recognize an unseen composition "yellow flower", we can learn the attribute concept "yellow" and object concept "flower" from different yellow objects and different flowers respectively. To further constrain the disentanglers to learn the concept of interest, we employ a regularization at the attention level. Specifically, we adapt the earth mover's distance (EMD) as a feature similarity metric in the cross-attention module. Moreover, benefiting from concept disentanglement, we improve the inference process and tune the prediction score by combining multiple concept probabilities. Comprehensive experiments on three CZSL benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous works in both closed- and open-world settings, establishing a new state-of-the-art.
summary: Compositional zero-shot learning (CZSL) aims at learning visual concepts (i.e., attributes and objects) from seen compositions and combining concept knowledge into unseen compositions. The key to CZSL is learning the disentanglement of the attribute-object composition. To this end, we propose to exploit cross-attentions as compositional disentanglers to learn disentangled concept embeddings. For example, if we want to recognize an unseen composition "yellow flower", we can learn the attribute concept "yellow" and object concept "flower" from different yellow objects and different flowers respectively. To further constrain the disentanglers to learn the concept of interest, we employ a regularization at the attention level. Specifically, we adapt the earth mover's distance (EMD) as a feature similarity metric in the cross-attention module. Moreover, benefiting from concept disentanglement, we improve the inference process and tune the prediction score by combining multiple concept probabilities. Comprehensive experiments on three CZSL benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms previous works in both closed- and open-world settings, establishing a new state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 构图零样本学习（CZSL）旨在从已见的构图中学习视觉概念（即属性和对象），并将概念知识组合到未见过的构图中。 CZSL 的关键是学习属性-对象组合的解开。为此，我们建议利用交叉注意力作为组合解缠器来学习解缠的概念嵌入。例如，如果我们想识别一个看不见的构图“黄色花”，我们可以分别从不同的黄色对象和不同的花中学习属性概念“黄色”和对象概念“花”。为了进一步限制解开者学习兴趣的概念，我们在注意力层面采用了正则化。具体来说，我们采用推土机距离（EMD）作为交叉注意模块中的特征相似性度量。此外，受益于概念解缠，我们通过组合多个概念概率来改进推理过程并调整预测分数。对三个 CZSL 基准数据集的综合实验表明，我们的方法在封闭和开放世界环境中都显着优于以前的工作，建立了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过学习注意力机制实现概念解耦的方法，以提升组合零样本学习（CZSL）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CZSL方法难以有效解耦属性与对象的概念，导致在未见过的组合上表现不佳。本文旨在通过注意力机制实现更精确的概念解耦。
AI.method: 利用跨注意力作为组合解耦器，通过地球移动距离（EMD）正则化约束注意力模块，学习解耦的概念嵌入，并结合多概念概率优化推理过程。
AI.result: 在三个CZSL基准数据集上，该方法在封闭和开放世界场景中均显著优于现有方法，达到新状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制实现的概念解耦有效提升了CZSL性能，验证了方法在组合推理任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Elizaveta Korotkova,Isaac Chung
title: Beyond Toxic: Toxicity Detection Datasets are Not Enough for Brand Safety
title_zh: 超越有毒：毒性检测数据集不足以保证品牌安全
abstract: The rapid growth in user generated content on social media has resulted in a significant rise in demand for automated content moderation. Various methods and frameworks have been proposed for the tasks of hate speech detection and toxic comment classification. In this work, we combine common datasets to extend these tasks to brand safety. Brand safety aims to protect commercial branding by identifying contexts where advertisements should not appear and covers not only toxicity, but also other potentially harmful content. As these datasets contain different label sets, we approach the overall problem as a binary classification task. We demonstrate the need for building brand safety specific datasets via the application of common toxicity detection datasets to a subset of brand safety and empirically analyze the effects of weighted sampling strategies in text classification.
summary: The rapid growth in user generated content on social media has resulted in a significant rise in demand for automated content moderation. Various methods and frameworks have been proposed for the tasks of hate speech detection and toxic comment classification. In this work, we combine common datasets to extend these tasks to brand safety. Brand safety aims to protect commercial branding by identifying contexts where advertisements should not appear and covers not only toxicity, but also other potentially harmful content. As these datasets contain different label sets, we approach the overall problem as a binary classification task. We demonstrate the need for building brand safety specific datasets via the application of common toxicity detection datasets to a subset of brand safety and empirically analyze the effects of weighted sampling strategies in text classification.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体上用户生成内容的快速增长导致对自动内容审核的需求显着增加。人们已经针对仇恨言论检测和有毒评论分类的任务提出了各种方法和框架。在这项工作中，我们结合了常见的数据集，将这些任务扩展到品牌安全。品牌安全旨在通过识别广告不应出现的环境来保护商业品牌，不仅涵盖毒性内容，还涵盖其他潜在有害内容。由于这些数据集包含不同的标签集，我们将整个问题作为二元分类任务来处理。我们证明了通过将常见毒性检测数据集应用于品牌安全子集来构建品牌安全特定数据集的必要性，并实证分析了文本分类中加权采样策略的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了现有毒性检测数据集在品牌安全任务中的不足，并提出需要构建专门的品牌安全数据集及优化分类方法。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体用户生成内容激增导致品牌安全需求上升，但现有毒性检测数据集无法全面覆盖品牌安全所需的非毒性有害内容。
AI.method: 整合常见毒性检测数据集，将其扩展至品牌安全任务，采用二分类框架并实验加权采样策略进行文本分类分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，直接应用毒性数据集效果有限，需通过加权采样提升模型性能，但专用品牌安全数据集仍不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: 品牌安全需超越传统毒性检测，应构建针对性数据集并优化分类方法以应对多样化有害内容场景。

authors_text: Xiangyuan Yang,Jie Lin,Hanlin Zhang,Xinyu Yang,Peng Zhao
title: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Examples via Direction Tuning
title_zh: 通过方向调整提高对抗性示例的可迁移性
abstract: In the transfer-based adversarial attacks, adversarial examples are only generated by the surrogate models and achieve effective perturbation in the victim models. Although considerable efforts have been developed on improving the transferability of adversarial examples generated by transfer-based adversarial attacks, our investigation found that, the big deviation between the actual and steepest update directions of the current transfer-based adversarial attacks is caused by the large update step length, resulting in the generated adversarial examples can not converge well. However, directly reducing the update step length will lead to serious update oscillation so that the generated adversarial examples also can not achieve great transferability to the victim models. To address these issues, a novel transfer-based attack, namely direction tuning attack, is proposed to not only decrease the update deviation in the large step length, but also mitigate the update oscillation in the small sampling step length, thereby making the generated adversarial examples converge well to achieve great transferability on victim models. In addition, a network pruning method is proposed to smooth the decision boundary, thereby further decreasing the update oscillation and enhancing the transferability of the generated adversarial examples. The experiment results on ImageNet demonstrate that the average attack success rate (ASR) of the adversarial examples generated by our method can be improved from 87.9\% to 94.5\% on five victim models without defenses, and from 69.1\% to 76.2\% on eight advanced defense methods, in comparison with that of latest gradient-based attacks.
summary: In the transfer-based adversarial attacks, adversarial examples are only generated by the surrogate models and achieve effective perturbation in the victim models. Although considerable efforts have been developed on improving the transferability of adversarial examples generated by transfer-based adversarial attacks, our investigation found that, the big deviation between the actual and steepest update directions of the current transfer-based adversarial attacks is caused by the large update step length, resulting in the generated adversarial examples can not converge well. However, directly reducing the update step length will lead to serious update oscillation so that the generated adversarial examples also can not achieve great transferability to the victim models. To address these issues, a novel transfer-based attack, namely direction tuning attack, is proposed to not only decrease the update deviation in the large step length, but also mitigate the update oscillation in the small sampling step length, thereby making the generated adversarial examples converge well to achieve great transferability on victim models. In addition, a network pruning method is proposed to smooth the decision boundary, thereby further decreasing the update oscillation and enhancing the transferability of the generated adversarial examples. The experiment results on ImageNet demonstrate that the average attack success rate (ASR) of the adversarial examples generated by our method can be improved from 87.9\% to 94.5\% on five victim models without defenses, and from 69.1\% to 76.2\% on eight advanced defense methods, in comparison with that of latest gradient-based attacks.
abstract_zh: 在基于转移的对抗性攻击中，对抗性示例仅由代理模型生成，并在受害者模型中实现有效的扰动。尽管人们在提高基于转移的对抗攻击生成的对抗样本的可转移性方面做出了相当大的努力，但我们的调查发现，当前基于转移的对抗攻击的实际更新方向和最陡更新方向之间的较大偏差是由于较大的更新步长造成的，导致生成的对抗样本不能很好地收敛。然而，直接减少更新步长会导致严重的更新振荡，从而导致生成的对抗样本也无法实现对受害者模型的良好可迁移性。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种新的基于转移的攻击，即方向调整攻击，不仅可以减少大步长下的更新偏差，而且可以减轻小采样步长下的更新振荡，从而使生成的对抗性示例很好地收敛，从而在受害者模型上实现良好的可转移性。此外，还提出了一种网络剪枝方法来平滑决策边界，从而进一步减少更新振荡并增强生成的对抗性示例的可迁移性。 ImageNet 上的实验结果表明，与最新的基于梯度的攻击相比，我们的方法生成的对抗示例的平均攻击成功率（ASR）在 5 个无防御的受害者模型上可以从 87.9% 提高到 94.5%，在 8 种高级防御方法上可以从 69.1% 提高到 76.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为方向调优的新型迁移攻击方法，通过调整更新方向和网络剪枝技术提升对抗样本在目标模型上的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移攻击方法因更新步长过大导致方向偏差和收敛性差，而减小步长又会引起更新震荡，难以兼顾攻击效果与稳定性。
AI.method: 提出方向调优攻击框架，在大步长下减少方向偏差，小步长下抑制震荡；结合网络剪枝平滑决策边界进一步提升迁移性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，无防御模型的平均攻击成功率从87.9%提升至94.5%，对八种高级防御方法的攻击成功率从69.1%提升至76.2%。
AI.conclusion: 方向调优方法通过协同优化更新方向与网络结构，有效解决了迁移攻击中的收敛与震荡矛盾，显著提升了对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为方向调优的新型迁移攻击方法，通过调整更新方向和网络剪枝技术提升对抗样本在目标模型上的可迁移性。

search_text: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Examples via Direction Tuning 通过方向调整提高对抗性示例的可迁移性 In the transfer-based adversarial attacks, adversarial examples are only generated by the surrogate models and achieve effective perturbation in the victim models. Although considerable efforts have been developed on improving the transferability of adversarial examples generated by transfer-based adversarial attacks, our investigation found that, the big deviation between the actual and steepest update directions of the current transfer-based adversarial attacks is caused by the large update step length, resulting in the generated adversarial examples can not converge well. However, directly reducing the update step length will lead to serious update oscillation so that the generated adversarial examples also can not achieve great transferability to the victim models. To address these issues, a novel transfer-based attack, namely direction tuning attack, is proposed to not only decrease the update deviation in the large step length, but also mitigate the update oscillation in the small sampling step length, thereby making the generated adversarial examples converge well to achieve great transferability on victim models. In addition, a network pruning method is proposed to smooth the decision boundary, thereby further decreasing the update oscillation and enhancing the transferability of the generated adversarial examples. The experiment results on ImageNet demonstrate that the average attack success rate (ASR) of the adversarial examples generated by our method can be improved from 87.9\% to 94.5\% on five victim models without defenses, and from 69.1\% to 76.2\% on eight advanced defense methods, in comparison with that of latest gradient-based attacks. 在基于转移的对抗性攻击中，对抗性示例仅由代理模型生成，并在受害者模型中实现有效的扰动。尽管人们在提高基于转移的对抗攻击生成的对抗样本的可转移性方面做出了相当大的努力，但我们的调查发现，当前基于转移的对抗攻击的实际更新方向和最陡更新方向之间的较大偏差是由于较大的更新步长造成的，导致生成的对抗样本不能很好地收敛。然而，直接减少更新步长会导致严重的更新振荡，从而导致生成的对抗样本也无法实现对受害者模型的良好可迁移性。为了解决这些问题，提出了一种新的基于转移的攻击，即方向调整攻击，不仅可以减少大步长下的更新偏差，而且可以减轻小采样步长下的更新振荡，从而使生成的对抗性示例很好地收敛，从而在受害者模型上实现良好的可转移性。此外，还提出了一种网络剪枝方法来平滑决策边界，从而进一步减少更新振荡并增强生成的对抗性示例的可迁移性。 ImageNet 上的实验结果表明，与最新的基于梯度的攻击相比，我们的方法生成的对抗示例的平均攻击成功率（ASR）在 5 个无防御的受害者模型上可以从 87.9% 提高到 94.5%，在 8 种高级防御方法上可以从 69.1% 提高到 76.2%。 本文提出一种名为方向调优的新型迁移攻击方法，通过调整更新方向和网络剪枝技术提升对抗样本在目标模型上的可迁移性。 Xiangyuan Yang,Jie Lin,Hanlin Zhang,Xinyu Yang,Peng Zhao cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sang-Hun Han,Min-Gyu Park,Ju Hong Yoon,Ju-Mi Kang,Young-Jae Park,Hae-Gon Jeon
title: High-fidelity 3D Human Digitization from Single 2K Resolution Images
title_zh: 从单个 2K 分辨率图像进行高保真 3D 人体数字化
comment: code page : https://github.com/SangHunHan92/2K2K, Accepted to CVPR 2023 (Highlight)
comments: code page : https://github.com/SangHunHan92/2K2K, Accepted to CVPR 2023 (Highlight)
abstract: High-quality 3D human body reconstruction requires high-fidelity and large-scale training data and appropriate network design that effectively exploits the high-resolution input images. To tackle these problems, we propose a simple yet effective 3D human digitization method called 2K2K, which constructs a large-scale 2K human dataset and infers 3D human models from 2K resolution images. The proposed method separately recovers the global shape of a human and its details. The low-resolution depth network predicts the global structure from a low-resolution image, and the part-wise image-to-normal network predicts the details of the 3D human body structure. The high-resolution depth network merges the global 3D shape and the detailed structures to infer the high-resolution front and back side depth maps. Finally, an off-the-shelf mesh generator reconstructs the full 3D human model, which are available at https://github.com/SangHunHan92/2K2K. In addition, we also provide 2,050 3D human models, including texture maps, 3D joints, and SMPL parameters for research purposes. In experiments, we demonstrate competitive performance over the recent works on various datasets.
summary: High-quality 3D human body reconstruction requires high-fidelity and large-scale training data and appropriate network design that effectively exploits the high-resolution input images. To tackle these problems, we propose a simple yet effective 3D human digitization method called 2K2K, which constructs a large-scale 2K human dataset and infers 3D human models from 2K resolution images. The proposed method separately recovers the global shape of a human and its details. The low-resolution depth network predicts the global structure from a low-resolution image, and the part-wise image-to-normal network predicts the details of the 3D human body structure. The high-resolution depth network merges the global 3D shape and the detailed structures to infer the high-resolution front and back side depth maps. Finally, an off-the-shelf mesh generator reconstructs the full 3D human model, which are available at https://github.com/SangHunHan92/2K2K. In addition, we also provide 2,050 3D human models, including texture maps, 3D joints, and SMPL parameters for research purposes. In experiments, we demonstrate competitive performance over the recent works on various datasets.
abstract_zh: 高质量的 3D 人体重建需要高保真和大规模的训练数据以及有效利用高分辨率输入图像的适当的网络设计。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 3D 人体数字化方法，称为 2K2K，该方法构建大规模 2K 人体数据集，并从 2K 分辨率图像推断 3D 人体模型。所提出的方法分别恢复人体的整体形状及其细节。低分辨率深度网络从低分辨率图像预测全局结构，部分图像到法线网络预测 3D 人体结构的细节。高分辨率深度网络融合全局 3D 形状和详细结构来推断高分辨率正面和背面深度图。最后，现成的网格生成器重建了完整的 3D 人体模型，可从 https://github.com/SangHunHan92/2K2K 获取。此外，我们还提供 2,050 个 3D 人体模型，包括用于研究目的的纹理图、3D 关节和 SMPL 参数。在实验中，我们展示了与最近在各种数据集上的工作相比的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张2K分辨率图像进行高保真3D人体数字化的方法。
AI.motivation: 高质量3D人体重建需要高保真大规模训练数据和能有效利用高分辨率输入图像的网络设计，现有方法存在数据不足和细节还原困难的问题。
AI.method: 提出2K2K方法，构建大规模2K人体数据集，通过低分辨率深度网络预测全局结构，部件级图像法向网络预测细节，高分辨率深度网络融合生成深度图，最后使用现成网格生成器重建3D模型。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了方法的竞争力，并提供了2050个含纹理、骨骼和SMPL参数的3D人体模型用于研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离全局结构与细节预测实现了高效高保真重建，为单图像3D人体数字化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Baichun Wei,Chunzhi Yi,Qi Zhang,Haiqi Zhu,Jianfei Zhu,Feng Jiang
title: ActiveSelfHAR: Incorporating Self Training into Active Learning to Improve Cross-Subject Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: ActiveSelfHAR：将自我训练融入主动学习，提高跨学科人类活动识别
abstract: Deep learning-based human activity recognition (HAR) methods have shown great promise in the applications of smart healthcare systems and wireless body sensor network (BSN). Despite their demonstrated performance in laboratory settings, the real-world implementation of such methods is still hindered by the cross-subject issue when adapting to new users. To solve this issue, we propose ActiveSelfHAR, a framework that combines active learning's benefit of sparsely acquiring data with actual labels and self- training's benefit of effectively utilizing unlabeled data to enable the deep model to adapt to the target domain, i.e., the new users. In this framework, the model trained in the last iteration or the source domain is first utilized to generate pseudo labels of the target-domain samples and construct a self-training set based on the confidence score. Second, we propose to use the spatio-temporal relationships among the samples in the non-self-training set to augment the core set selected by active learning. Finally, we combine the self-training set and the augmented core set to fine-tune the model. We demonstrate our method by comparing it with state-of-the-art methods on two IMU-based datasets and an EMG-based dataset. Our method presents similar HAR accuracies with the upper bound, i.e. fully supervised fine-tuning with less than 1\% labeled data of the target dataset and significantly improves data efficiency and time cost. Our work highlights the potential of implementing user-independent HAR methods into smart healthcare systems and BSN.
summary: Deep learning-based human activity recognition (HAR) methods have shown great promise in the applications of smart healthcare systems and wireless body sensor network (BSN). Despite their demonstrated performance in laboratory settings, the real-world implementation of such methods is still hindered by the cross-subject issue when adapting to new users. To solve this issue, we propose ActiveSelfHAR, a framework that combines active learning's benefit of sparsely acquiring data with actual labels and self- training's benefit of effectively utilizing unlabeled data to enable the deep model to adapt to the target domain, i.e., the new users. In this framework, the model trained in the last iteration or the source domain is first utilized to generate pseudo labels of the target-domain samples and construct a self-training set based on the confidence score. Second, we propose to use the spatio-temporal relationships among the samples in the non-self-training set to augment the core set selected by active learning. Finally, we combine the self-training set and the augmented core set to fine-tune the model. We demonstrate our method by comparing it with state-of-the-art methods on two IMU-based datasets and an EMG-based dataset. Our method presents similar HAR accuracies with the upper bound, i.e. fully supervised fine-tuning with less than 1\% labeled data of the target dataset and significantly improves data efficiency and time cost. Our work highlights the potential of implementing user-independent HAR methods into smart healthcare systems and BSN.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的人体活动识别（HAR）方法在智能医疗系统和无线身体传感器网络（BSN）的应用中显示出巨大的前景。尽管它们在实验室环境中展示了性能，但在适应新用户时，此类方法的实际实施仍然受到跨学科问题的阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了ActiveSelfHAR，一个框架，结合了主动学习稀疏获取数据与实际标签的好处和自训练有效利用未标记数据的好处，使深度模型能够适应目标领域，即新用户。在此框架中，首先利用上次迭代或源域中训练的模型来生成目标域样本的伪标签，并基于置信度分数构建自训练集。其次，我们建议利用非自训练集中样本之间的时空关系来增强主动学习选择的核心集。最后，我们结合自训练集和增强核心集来微调模型。我们通过将我们的方法与两个基于 IMU 的数据集和一个基于 EMG 的数据集上最先进的方法进行比较来演示我们的方法。我们的方法提供了与上限类似的 HAR 精度，即使用目标数据集的不到 1% 的标记数据进行完全监督的微调，并显着提高了数据效率和时间成本。我们的工作凸显了将独立于用户的 HAR 方法实施到智能医疗系统和 BSN 中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ActiveSelfHAR框架，结合主动学习与自训练方法，解决跨用户人体活动识别（HAR）中的数据效率问题。
AI.motivation: 基于深度学习的HAR方法在实验室表现良好，但实际应用中因跨用户差异导致性能下降，需减少标注数据依赖以适应新用户。
AI.method: 通过自训练生成伪标签构建训练集，结合主动学习选择关键样本，并利用时空关系增强核心样本集，最终联合优化模型。
AI.result: 在IMU和EMG数据集上，该方法以不足1%的目标数据标注量达到全监督微调的精度，显著提升数据效率与时间成本。
AI.conclusion: ActiveSelfHAR为实现用户无关的HAR方法在智能医疗系统和无线体感网络中的应用提供了有效途径。

conclusion: ActiveSelfHAR为实现用户无关的HAR方法在智能医疗系统和无线体感网络中的应用提供了有效途径。
search_text: ActiveSelfHAR: Incorporating Self Training into Active Learning to Improve Cross-Subject Human Activity Recognition ActiveSelfHAR：将自我训练融入主动学习，提高跨学科人类活动识别 Deep learning-based human activity recognition (HAR) methods have shown great promise in the applications of smart healthcare systems and wireless body sensor network (BSN). Despite their demonstrated performance in laboratory settings, the real-world implementation of such methods is still hindered by the cross-subject issue when adapting to new users. To solve this issue, we propose ActiveSelfHAR, a framework that combines active learning's benefit of sparsely acquiring data with actual labels and self- training's benefit of effectively utilizing unlabeled data to enable the deep model to adapt to the target domain, i.e., the new users. In this framework, the model trained in the last iteration or the source domain is first utilized to generate pseudo labels of the target-domain samples and construct a self-training set based on the confidence score. Second, we propose to use the spatio-temporal relationships among the samples in the non-self-training set to augment the core set selected by active learning. Finally, we combine the self-training set and the augmented core set to fine-tune the model. We demonstrate our method by comparing it with state-of-the-art methods on two IMU-based datasets and an EMG-based dataset. Our method presents similar HAR accuracies with the upper bound, i.e. fully supervised fine-tuning with less than 1\% labeled data of the target dataset and significantly improves data efficiency and time cost. Our work highlights the potential of implementing user-independent HAR methods into smart healthcare systems and BSN. 基于深度学习的人体活动识别（HAR）方法在智能医疗系统和无线身体传感器网络（BSN）的应用中显示出巨大的前景。尽管它们在实验室环境中展示了性能，但在适应新用户时，此类方法的实际实施仍然受到跨学科问题的阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了ActiveSelfHAR，一个框架，结合了主动学习稀疏获取数据与实际标签的好处和自训练有效利用未标记数据的好处，使深度模型能够适应目标领域，即新用户。在此框架中，首先利用上次迭代或源域中训练的模型来生成目标域样本的伪标签，并基于置信度分数构建自训练集。其次，我们建议利用非自训练集中样本之间的时空关系来增强主动学习选择的核心集。最后，我们结合自训练集和增强核心集来微调模型。我们通过将我们的方法与两个基于 IMU 的数据集和一个基于 EMG 的数据集上最先进的方法进行比较来演示我们的方法。我们的方法提供了与上限类似的 HAR 精度，即使用目标数据集的不到 1% 的标记数据进行完全监督的微调，并显着提高了数据效率和时间成本。我们的工作凸显了将独立于用户的 HAR 方法实施到智能医疗系统和 BSN 中的潜力。 本文提出ActiveSelfHAR框架，结合主动学习与自训练方法，解决跨用户人体活动识别（HAR）中的数据效率问题。 Baichun Wei,Chunzhi Yi,Qi Zhang,Haiqi Zhu,Jianfei Zhu,Feng Jiang cs.HC

authors_text: Qiming Zhang,Jing Zhang,Yufei Xu,Dacheng Tao
title: Vision Transformer with Quadrangle Attention
title_zh: 具有四边形注意力的视觉变压器
comment: 15 pages, the extension of the ECCV 2022 paper (VSA: Learning Varied-Size Window Attention in Vision Transformers)
comments: 15 pages, the extension of the ECCV 2022 paper (VSA: Learning Varied-Size Window Attention in Vision Transformers)
abstract: Window-based attention has become a popular choice in vision transformers due to its superior performance, lower computational complexity, and less memory footprint. However, the design of hand-crafted windows, which is data-agnostic, constrains the flexibility of transformers to adapt to objects of varying sizes, shapes, and orientations. To address this issue, we propose a novel quadrangle attention (QA) method that extends the window-based attention to a general quadrangle formulation. Our method employs an end-to-end learnable quadrangle regression module that predicts a transformation matrix to transform default windows into target quadrangles for token sampling and attention calculation, enabling the network to model various targets with different shapes and orientations and capture rich context information. We integrate QA into plain and hierarchical vision transformers to create a new architecture named QFormer, which offers minor code modifications and negligible extra computational cost. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that QFormer outperforms existing representative vision transformers on various vision tasks, including classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and pose estimation. The code will be made publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/QFormer}{QFormer}.
summary: Window-based attention has become a popular choice in vision transformers due to its superior performance, lower computational complexity, and less memory footprint. However, the design of hand-crafted windows, which is data-agnostic, constrains the flexibility of transformers to adapt to objects of varying sizes, shapes, and orientations. To address this issue, we propose a novel quadrangle attention (QA) method that extends the window-based attention to a general quadrangle formulation. Our method employs an end-to-end learnable quadrangle regression module that predicts a transformation matrix to transform default windows into target quadrangles for token sampling and attention calculation, enabling the network to model various targets with different shapes and orientations and capture rich context information. We integrate QA into plain and hierarchical vision transformers to create a new architecture named QFormer, which offers minor code modifications and negligible extra computational cost. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that QFormer outperforms existing representative vision transformers on various vision tasks, including classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and pose estimation. The code will be made publicly available at \href{https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/QFormer}{QFormer}.
abstract_zh: 基于窗口的注意力因其优越的性能、较低的计算复杂度和更少的内存占用而成为视觉转换器的流行选择。然而，手工制作的窗口的设计与数据无关，限制了变压器适应不同大小、形状和方向的对象的灵活性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的四边形注意（QA）方法，将基于窗口的注意扩展到一般的四边形公式。我们的方法采用端到端可学习四边形回归模块，该模块预测转换矩阵，将默认窗口转换为目标四边形以进行标记采样和注意力计算，使网络能够对具有不同形状和方向的各种目标进行建模并捕获丰富的上下文信息。我们将 QA 集成到普通和分层视觉转换器中，以创建一个名为 QFormer 的新架构，它提供了少量的代码修改和可以忽略不计的额外计算成本。对公共基准的大量实验表明，QFormer 在各种视觉任务上都优于现有的代表性视觉转换器，包括分类、对象检测、语义分割和姿势估计。该代码将在 \href{https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/QFormer}{QFormer} 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为QFormer的新架构，通过引入四边形注意力机制（QA）来改进视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 基于窗口的注意力机制虽然性能优越且计算复杂度低，但其设计是数据无关的，限制了Transformer对不同大小、形状和方向目标的适应性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的四边形注意力（QA）方法，通过端到端可学习的四边形回归模块预测变换矩阵，将默认窗口转换为目标四边形，以进行令牌采样和注意力计算。
AI.result: 在多个公共基准测试中，QFormer在分类、目标检测、语义分割和姿态估计等视觉任务中均优于现有的代表性视觉Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: QFormer通过引入四边形注意力机制，显著提升了视觉Transformer模型的灵活性和性能，且代码将公开发布。

authors_text: Souhaib Attaiki,Lei Li,Maks Ovsjanikov
title: Generalizable Local Feature Pre-training for Deformable Shape Analysis
title_zh: 用于可变形形状分析的可泛化局部特征预训练
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, 7 tables, to be published in The IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: 16 pages, 14 figures, 7 tables, to be published in The IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: Transfer learning is fundamental for addressing problems in settings with little training data. While several transfer learning approaches have been proposed in 3D, unfortunately, these solutions typically operate on an entire 3D object or even scene-level and thus, as we show, fail to generalize to new classes, such as deformable organic shapes. In addition, there is currently a lack of understanding of what makes pre-trained features transferable across significantly different 3D shape categories. In this paper, we make a step toward addressing these challenges. First, we analyze the link between feature locality and transferability in tasks involving deformable 3D objects, while also comparing different backbones and losses for local feature pre-training. We observe that with proper training, learned features can be useful in such tasks, but, crucially, only with an appropriate choice of the receptive field size. We then propose a differentiable method for optimizing the receptive field within 3D transfer learning. Jointly, this leads to the first learnable features that can successfully generalize to unseen classes of 3D shapes such as humans and animals. Our extensive experiments show that this approach leads to state-of-the-art results on several downstream tasks such as segmentation, shape correspondence, and classification. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/pvnieo/vader}.
summary: Transfer learning is fundamental for addressing problems in settings with little training data. While several transfer learning approaches have been proposed in 3D, unfortunately, these solutions typically operate on an entire 3D object or even scene-level and thus, as we show, fail to generalize to new classes, such as deformable organic shapes. In addition, there is currently a lack of understanding of what makes pre-trained features transferable across significantly different 3D shape categories. In this paper, we make a step toward addressing these challenges. First, we analyze the link between feature locality and transferability in tasks involving deformable 3D objects, while also comparing different backbones and losses for local feature pre-training. We observe that with proper training, learned features can be useful in such tasks, but, crucially, only with an appropriate choice of the receptive field size. We then propose a differentiable method for optimizing the receptive field within 3D transfer learning. Jointly, this leads to the first learnable features that can successfully generalize to unseen classes of 3D shapes such as humans and animals. Our extensive experiments show that this approach leads to state-of-the-art results on several downstream tasks such as segmentation, shape correspondence, and classification. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/pvnieo/vader}.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习对于解决训练数据很少的环境中的问题至关重要。虽然在 3D 领域提出了几种迁移学习方法，但不幸的是，这些解决方案通常在整个 3D 对象甚至场景级别上运行，因此，正如我们所展示的，无法推广到新的类别，例如可变形的有机形状。此外，目前还缺乏对如何使预训练特征可以跨显着不同的 3D 形状类别进行迁移的理解。在本文中，我们朝着应对这些挑战迈出了一步。首先，我们分析了涉及可变形 3D 对象的任务中特征局部性和可转移性之间的联系，同时还比较了局部特征预训练的不同主干和损失。我们观察到，通过适当的训练，学习到的特征在此类任务中可能有用，但最重要的是，只有适当选择感受野大小。然后，我们提出了一种可微分的方法来优化 3D 迁移学习中的感受野。总之，这导致了第一个可学习的特征，可以成功地推广到看不见的 3D 形状类别，例如人类和动物。我们广泛的实验表明，这种方法可以在分割、形状对应和分类等几个下游任务上带来最先进的结果。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/pvnieo/vader} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可泛化的局部特征预训练方法，用于解决可变形三维形状分析中的跨类别迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有三维迁移学习方法在处理可变形有机形状（如人类和动物）时泛化能力不足，且缺乏对跨类别可迁移特征本质的理解。
AI.method: 通过分析局部特征与可迁移性之间的关系，比较不同主干网络和损失函数，提出可微分优化三维迁移学习中感受野大小的方法。
AI.result: 在分割、形状对应和分类等下游任务中达到最先进的性能，并成功泛化到未见过的三维形状类别。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化感受野大小的可学习局部特征，有效解决了可变形三维形状的跨类别迁移难题。

Jointly, this leads to the first learnable features that can successfully generalize to unseen classes of 3D shapes such as humans and animals. Our extensive experiments show that this approach leads to state-of-the-art results on several downstream tasks such as segmentation, shape correspondence, and classification. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/pvnieo/vader}. 迁移学习对于解决训练数据很少的环境中的问题至关重要。虽然在 3D 领域提出了几种迁移学习方法，但不幸的是，这些解决方案通常在整个 3D 对象甚至场景级别上运行，因此，正如我们所展示的，无法推广到新的类别，例如可变形的有机形状。此外，目前还缺乏对如何使预训练特征可以跨显着不同的 3D 形状类别进行迁移的理解。在本文中，我们朝着应对这些挑战迈出了一步。首先，我们分析了涉及可变形 3D 对象的任务中特征局部性和可转移性之间的联系，同时还比较了局部特征预训练的不同主干和损失。我们观察到，通过适当的训练，学习到的特征在此类任务中可能有用，但最重要的是，只有适当选择感受野大小。然后，我们提出了一种可微分的方法来优化 3D 迁移学习中的感受野。总之，这导致了第一个可学习的特征，可以成功地推广到看不见的 3D 形状类别，例如人类和动物。我们广泛的实验表明，这种方法可以在分割、形状对应和分类等几个下游任务上带来最先进的结果。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/pvnieo/vader} 获取。 本文提出一种可泛化的局部特征预训练方法，用于解决可变形三维形状分析中的跨类别迁移问题。 Souhaib Attaiki,Lei Li,Maks Ovsjanikov cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiquan Tan,Yifan Zhang,Jingqin Yang,Yang Yuan
title: Contrastive Learning Is Spectral Clustering On Similarity Graph
title_zh: 对比学习是相似图上的谱聚类
comment: ICLR 2024; We express our gratitude to the anonymous reviewers for their valuable feedback
comments: ICLR 2024; We express our gratitude to the anonymous reviewers for their valuable feedback
abstract: Contrastive learning is a powerful self-supervised learning method, but we have a limited theoretical understanding of how it works and why it works. In this paper, we prove that contrastive learning with the standard InfoNCE loss is equivalent to spectral clustering on the similarity graph. Using this equivalence as the building block, we extend our analysis to the CLIP model and rigorously characterize how similar multi-modal objects are embedded together. Motivated by our theoretical insights, we introduce the Kernel-InfoNCE loss, incorporating mixtures of kernel functions that outperform the standard Gaussian kernel on several vision datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/yifanzhang-pro/Kernel-InfoNCE.
summary: Contrastive learning is a powerful self-supervised learning method, but we have a limited theoretical understanding of how it works and why it works. In this paper, we prove that contrastive learning with the standard InfoNCE loss is equivalent to spectral clustering on the similarity graph. Using this equivalence as the building block, we extend our analysis to the CLIP model and rigorously characterize how similar multi-modal objects are embedded together. Motivated by our theoretical insights, we introduce the Kernel-InfoNCE loss, incorporating mixtures of kernel functions that outperform the standard Gaussian kernel on several vision datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/yifanzhang-pro/Kernel-InfoNCE.
abstract_zh: 对比学习是一种强大的自我监督学习方法，但我们对其工作原理和原因的理论理解有限。在本文中，我们证明了使用标准 InfoNCE 损失的对比学习相当于相似图上的谱聚类。使用这种等价性作为构建块，我们将分析扩展到 CLIP 模型，并严格描述相似的多模态对象如何嵌入在一起。在我们的理论见解的推动下，我们引入了 Kernel-InfoNCE 损失，结合了在多个视觉数据集上优于标准高斯核的核函数混合。代码可在 https://github.com/yifanzhang-pro/Kernel-InfoNCE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文证明对比学习中的InfoNCE损失等价于相似性图上的谱聚类，并基于此扩展分析CLIP模型，提出改进的Kernel-InfoNCE损失函数。
AI.motivation: 对比学习虽效果显著，但其理论机制尚不明确，缺乏对多模态嵌入相似性的严格理论分析。
AI.method: 通过理论证明InfoNCE损失与谱聚类的等价性，将其扩展至CLIP模型，并设计混合核函数的Kernel-InfoNCE损失替代标准高斯核。
AI.result: 理论揭示对比学习与谱聚类的联系，改进后的Kernel-InfoNCE在多个视觉数据集上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习可解释为图谱聚类，新损失函数通过核混合提升性能，为多模态嵌入提供理论支持与优化方向。

authors_text: Zongrui Li,Qian Zheng,Boxin Shi,Gang Pan,Xudong Jiang
title: DANI-Net: Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo by Differentiable Shadow Handling, Anisotropic Reflectance Modeling, and Neural Inverse Rendering
title_zh: DANI-Net：通过可微分阴影处理、各向异性反射建模和神经逆向渲染实现未校准光度立体
abstract: Uncalibrated photometric stereo (UPS) is challenging due to the inherent ambiguity brought by the unknown light. Although the ambiguity is alleviated on non-Lambertian objects, the problem is still difficult to solve for more general objects with complex shapes introducing irregular shadows and general materials with complex reflectance like anisotropic reflectance. To exploit cues from shadow and reflectance to solve UPS and improve performance on general materials, we propose DANI-Net, an inverse rendering framework with differentiable shadow handling and anisotropic reflectance modeling. Unlike most previous methods that use non-differentiable shadow maps and assume isotropic material, our network benefits from cues of shadow and anisotropic reflectance through two differentiable paths. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate our superior and robust performance.
summary: Uncalibrated photometric stereo (UPS) is challenging due to the inherent ambiguity brought by the unknown light. Although the ambiguity is alleviated on non-Lambertian objects, the problem is still difficult to solve for more general objects with complex shapes introducing irregular shadows and general materials with complex reflectance like anisotropic reflectance. To exploit cues from shadow and reflectance to solve UPS and improve performance on general materials, we propose DANI-Net, an inverse rendering framework with differentiable shadow handling and anisotropic reflectance modeling. Unlike most previous methods that use non-differentiable shadow maps and assume isotropic material, our network benefits from cues of shadow and anisotropic reflectance through two differentiable paths. Experiments on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate our superior and robust performance.
abstract_zh: 由于未知光带来的固有模糊性，未校准光度立体（UPS）具有挑战性。尽管在非朗伯物体上减轻了模糊性，但对于具有复杂形状（引入不规则阴影）的更一般物体以及具有复杂反射率（如各向异性反射率）的一般材料，该问题仍然难以解决。为了利用阴影和反射率的线索来解决 UPS 问题并提高一般材质的性能，我们提出了 DANI-Net，这是一种具有可微分阴影处理和各向异性反射率建模的逆渲染框架。与大多数以前使用不可微阴影贴图并假设各向同性材料的方法不同，我们的网络通过两个可微路径受益于阴影和各向异性反射率的线索。对多个现实世界数据集的实验证明了我们卓越而强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DANI-Net框架，通过可微分阴影处理和各向异性反射建模解决未校准光度立体问题。
AI.motivation: 未校准光度立体问题因未知光源和复杂材质（如各向异性反射）导致的阴影与反射模糊性难以有效求解。
AI.method: 构建包含可微分阴影处理模块与各向异性反射建模的神经逆渲染框架，通过双路径网络同时利用阴影与反射线索。
AI.result: 在多个真实场景数据集上验证了方法在复杂材质与阴影条件下的优越性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DANI-Net通过融合阴影与各向异性反射信息，有效提升了未校准光度立体问题的求解精度与适用性。

authors_text: Konrad Kułakowski,Jacek Szybowski,Jiri Mazurek,Sebastian Ernst
title: Towards secure judgments aggregation in AHP
title_zh: 在 AHP 中实现安全判断聚合
abstract: In decision-making methods, it is common to assume that the experts are honest and professional. However, this is not the case when one or more experts in the group decision making framework, such as the group analytic hierarchy process (GAHP), try to manipulate results in their favor. The aim of this paper is to introduce two heuristics in the GAHP, setting allowing to detect the manipulators and minimize their effect on the group consensus by diminishing their weights. The first heuristic is based on the assumption that manipulators will provide judgments which can be considered outliers with respect to those of the rest of the experts in the group. The second heuristic assumes that dishonest judgments are less consistent than the average consistency of the group. Both approaches are illustrated with numerical examples and simulations.
summary: In decision-making methods, it is common to assume that the experts are honest and professional. However, this is not the case when one or more experts in the group decision making framework, such as the group analytic hierarchy process (GAHP), try to manipulate results in their favor. The aim of this paper is to introduce two heuristics in the GAHP, setting allowing to detect the manipulators and minimize their effect on the group consensus by diminishing their weights. The first heuristic is based on the assumption that manipulators will provide judgments which can be considered outliers with respect to those of the rest of the experts in the group. The second heuristic assumes that dishonest judgments are less consistent than the average consistency of the group. Both approaches are illustrated with numerical examples and simulations.
abstract_zh: 在决策方法中，通常假设专家是诚实且专业的。然而，当群体决策框架（例如群体层次分析法（GAHP））中的一名或多名专家试图操纵对他们有利的结果时，情况并非如此。本文的目的是在 GAHP 中引入两种启发式方法，允许检测操纵者并通过减小其权重来最小化其对群体共识的影响。第一个启发式基于这样的假设：操纵者将提供相对于组中其他专家的判断而言可以被视为异常值的判断。第二个启发式假设不诚实的判断的一致性低于群体的平均一致性。这两种方法都通过数值示例和模拟进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种启发式方法以在群体分析层次过程（GAHP）中检测并减少操纵者对群体共识的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统决策方法假设专家诚实可靠，但实际可能存在专家通过操纵判断来影响结果的情况，导致群体决策偏差。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过识别判断中的异常值检测操纵者，第二种方法通过判断一致性低于群体平均水平来识别并降低其权重。
AI.result: 数值实验和模拟验证了两种方法在检测操纵者及降低其影响方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 两种启发式方法能有效提升GAHP框架下群体判断聚合的安全性与可靠性。

result: 数值实验和模拟验证了两种方法在检测操纵者及降低其影响方面的有效性。
conclusion: 两种启发式方法能有效提升GAHP框架下群体判断聚合的安全性与可靠性。
search_text: Towards secure judgments aggregation in AHP 在 AHP 中实现安全判断聚合 In decision-making methods, it is common to assume that the experts are honest and professional. However, this is not the case when one or more experts in the group decision making framework, such as the group analytic hierarchy process (GAHP), try to manipulate results in their favor. The aim of this paper is to introduce two heuristics in the GAHP, setting allowing to detect the manipulators and minimize their effect on the group consensus by diminishing their weights. The first heuristic is based on the assumption that manipulators will provide judgments which can be considered outliers with respect to those of the rest of the experts in the group. The second heuristic assumes that dishonest judgments are less consistent than the average consistency of the group. Both approaches are illustrated with numerical examples and simulations. 在决策方法中，通常假设专家是诚实且专业的。然而，当群体决策框架（例如群体层次分析法（GAHP））中的一名或多名专家试图操纵对他们有利的结果时，情况并非如此。本文的目的是在 GAHP 中引入两种启发式方法，允许检测操纵者并通过减小其权重来最小化其对群体共识的影响。第一个启发式基于这样的假设：操纵者将提供相对于组中其他专家的判断而言可以被视为异常值的判断。第二个启发式假设不诚实的判断的一致性低于群体的平均一致性。这两种方法都通过数值示例和模拟进行了说明。 本文提出两种启发式方法以在群体分析层次过程（GAHP）中检测并减少操纵者对群体共识的影响。 Konrad Kułakowski,Jacek Szybowski,Jiri Mazurek,Sebastian Ernst cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Vasileios Sevetlidis,George Pavlidis,Vasiliki Balaska,Athanasios Psomoulis,Spyridon Mouroutsos,Antonios Gasteratos
title: Defect detection using weakly supervised learning
title_zh: 使用弱监督学习进行缺陷检测
abstract: In many real-world scenarios, obtaining large amounts of labeled data can be a daunting task. Weakly supervised learning techniques have gained significant attention in recent years as an alternative to traditional supervised learning, as they enable training models using only a limited amount of labeled data. In this paper, the performance of a weakly supervised classifier to its fully supervised counterpart is compared on the task of defect detection. Experiments are conducted on a dataset of images containing defects, and evaluate the two classifiers based on their accuracy, precision, and recall. Our results show that the weakly supervised classifier achieves comparable performance to the supervised classifier, while requiring significantly less labeled data.
summary: In many real-world scenarios, obtaining large amounts of labeled data can be a daunting task. Weakly supervised learning techniques have gained significant attention in recent years as an alternative to traditional supervised learning, as they enable training models using only a limited amount of labeled data. In this paper, the performance of a weakly supervised classifier to its fully supervised counterpart is compared on the task of defect detection. Experiments are conducted on a dataset of images containing defects, and evaluate the two classifiers based on their accuracy, precision, and recall. Our results show that the weakly supervised classifier achieves comparable performance to the supervised classifier, while requiring significantly less labeled data.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实场景中，获取大量标记数据可能是一项艰巨的任务。近年来，弱监督学习技术作为传统监督学习的替代方案受到了广泛关注，因为它们能够仅使用有限数量的标记数据来训练模型。在本文中，在缺陷检测任务上比较了弱监督分类器与其完全监督分类器的性能。在包含缺陷的图像数据集上进行实验，并根据准确度、精确度和召回率评估两个分类器。我们的结果表明，弱监督分类器实现了与监督分类器相当的性能，同时需要更少的标记数据。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了弱监督分类器与全监督分类器在缺陷检测任务中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中获取大量标注数据成本高昂，弱监督学习可通过少量标注数据训练模型，但其效果尚需验证。
AI.method: 在包含缺陷的图像数据集上，分别训练弱监督和全监督分类器，并通过准确率、精确率和召回率进行性能评估。
AI.result: 弱监督分类器在性能上与全监督分类器相当，但所需标注数据显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督学习在缺陷检测中具有实用价值，可有效降低对大规模标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Ebrahim Balouji,Jonas Sjöblom,Nikolce Murgovski,Morteza Haghir Chehreghani
title: Prediction of Time and Distance of Trips Using Explainable Attention-based LSTMs
title_zh: 使用可解释的基于注意力的 LSTM 预测行程时间和距离
abstract: In this paper, we propose machine learning solutions to predict the time of future trips and the possible distance the vehicle will travel. For this prediction task, we develop and investigate four methods. In the first method, we use long short-term memory (LSTM)-based structures specifically designed to handle multi-dimensional historical data of trip time and distances simultaneously. Using it, we predict the future trip time and forecast the distance a vehicle will travel by concatenating the outputs of LSTM networks through fully connected layers. The second method uses attention-based LSTM networks (At-LSTM) to perform the same tasks. The third method utilizes two LSTM networks in parallel, one for forecasting the time of the trip and the other for predicting the distance. The output of each LSTM is then concatenated through fully connected layers. Finally, the last model is based on two parallel At-LSTMs, where similarly, each At-LSTM predicts time and distance separately through fully connected layers. Among the proposed methods, the most advanced one, i.e., parallel At-LSTM, predicts the next trip's distance and time with 3.99% error margin where it is 23.89% better than LSTM, the first method. We also propose TimeSHAP as an explainability method for understanding how the networks perform learning and model the sequence of information.
summary: In this paper, we propose machine learning solutions to predict the time of future trips and the possible distance the vehicle will travel. For this prediction task, we develop and investigate four methods. In the first method, we use long short-term memory (LSTM)-based structures specifically designed to handle multi-dimensional historical data of trip time and distances simultaneously. Using it, we predict the future trip time and forecast the distance a vehicle will travel by concatenating the outputs of LSTM networks through fully connected layers. The second method uses attention-based LSTM networks (At-LSTM) to perform the same tasks. The third method utilizes two LSTM networks in parallel, one for forecasting the time of the trip and the other for predicting the distance. The output of each LSTM is then concatenated through fully connected layers. Finally, the last model is based on two parallel At-LSTMs, where similarly, each At-LSTM predicts time and distance separately through fully connected layers. Among the proposed methods, the most advanced one, i.e., parallel At-LSTM, predicts the next trip's distance and time with 3.99% error margin where it is 23.89% better than LSTM, the first method. We also propose TimeSHAP as an explainability method for understanding how the networks perform learning and model the sequence of information.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了机器学习解决方案来预测未来出行的时间以及车辆可能行驶的距离。对于这个预测任务，我们开发并研究了四种方法。在第一种方法中，我们使用基于长短期记忆（LSTM）的结构，专门设计用于同时处理行程时间和距离的多维历史数据。使用它，我们通过全连接层连接 LSTM 网络的输出来预测未来的出行时间并预测车辆将行驶的距离。第二种方法使用基于注意力的 LSTM 网络 (At-LSTM) 来执行相同的任务。第三种方法并行使用两个 LSTM 网络，一个用于预测行程时间，另一个用于预测距离。然后，每个 LSTM 的输出通过全连接层连接起来。最后，最后一个模型基于两个并行的 At-LSTM，同样，每个 At-LSTM 通过全连接层分别预测时间和距离。在所提出的方法中，最先进的方法，即并行 At-LSTM，以 3.99% 的误差范围预测下一次旅行的距离和时间，比第一种方法 LSTM 好 23.89%。我们还提出 TimeSHAP 作为一种可解释性方法，用于理解网络如何执行学习并对信息序列进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出四种基于LSTM的机器学习方法，用于预测未来行程的时间和距离，并引入TimeSHAP解释模型。
AI.motivation: 准确预测行程时间和距离对交通调度和资源分配至关重要，现有方法在处理多维历史数据时存在不足。
AI.method: 设计四种模型：1) LSTM同时预测时间与距离；2) 基于注意力机制的At-LSTM；3) 并行LSTM分别预测时间与距离；4) 并行At-LSTM结合注意力机制与全连接层。
AI.result: 并行At-LSTM模型在预测误差上比基础LSTM降低23.89%，误差率为3.99%，且通过TimeSHAP实现模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 并行At-LSTM在预测精度上表现最优，结合TimeSHAP可增强模型透明度，为智能交通系统提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Davide Moltisanti,Frank Keller,Hakan Bilen,Laura Sevilla-Lara
title: Learning Action Changes by Measuring Verb-Adverb Textual Relationships
title_zh: 通过测量动词-副词文本关系来学习动作变化
comment: CVPR 23. Version 2 updates some results due to an errata (see code repository for more details). Code and dataset available at https://github.com/dmoltisanti/air-cvpr23
comments: CVPR 23. Version 2 updates some results due to an errata (see code repository for more details). Code and dataset available at https://github.com/dmoltisanti/air-cvpr23
abstract: The goal of this work is to understand the way actions are performed in videos. That is, given a video, we aim to predict an adverb indicating a modification applied to the action (e.g. cut "finely"). We cast this problem as a regression task. We measure textual relationships between verbs and adverbs to generate a regression target representing the action change we aim to learn. We test our approach on a range of datasets and achieve state-of-the-art results on both adverb prediction and antonym classification. Furthermore, we outperform previous work when we lift two commonly assumed conditions: the availability of action labels during testing and the pairing of adverbs as antonyms. Existing datasets for adverb recognition are either noisy, which makes learning difficult, or contain actions whose appearance is not influenced by adverbs, which makes evaluation less reliable. To address this, we collect a new high quality dataset: Adverbs in Recipes (AIR). We focus on instructional recipes videos, curating a set of actions that exhibit meaningful visual changes when performed differently. Videos in AIR are more tightly trimmed and were manually reviewed by multiple annotators to ensure high labelling quality. Results show that models learn better from AIR given its cleaner videos. At the same time, adverb prediction on AIR is challenging, demonstrating that there is considerable room for improvement.
summary: The goal of this work is to understand the way actions are performed in videos. That is, given a video, we aim to predict an adverb indicating a modification applied to the action (e.g. cut "finely"). We cast this problem as a regression task. We measure textual relationships between verbs and adverbs to generate a regression target representing the action change we aim to learn. We test our approach on a range of datasets and achieve state-of-the-art results on both adverb prediction and antonym classification. Furthermore, we outperform previous work when we lift two commonly assumed conditions: the availability of action labels during testing and the pairing of adverbs as antonyms. Existing datasets for adverb recognition are either noisy, which makes learning difficult, or contain actions whose appearance is not influenced by adverbs, which makes evaluation less reliable. To address this, we collect a new high quality dataset: Adverbs in Recipes (AIR). We focus on instructional recipes videos, curating a set of actions that exhibit meaningful visual changes when performed differently. Videos in AIR are more tightly trimmed and were manually reviewed by multiple annotators to ensure high labelling quality. Results show that models learn better from AIR given its cleaner videos. At the same time, adverb prediction on AIR is challenging, demonstrating that there is considerable room for improvement.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是了解视频中动作的执行方式。也就是说，给定一个视频，我们的目标是预测一个副词，指示应用于动作的修改（例如“精细地”剪切）。我们将此问题视为回归任务。我们测量动词和副词之间的文本关系，以生成代表我们想要学习的动作变化的回归目标。我们在一系列数据集上测试我们的方法，并在副词预测和反义词分类方面取得了最先进的结果。此外，当我们提升两个常见假设条件时，我们的表现优于之前的工作：测试期间动作标签的可用性以及副词作为反义词的配对。现有的副词识别数据集要么是嘈杂的，这使得学习变得困难，要么包含外观不受副词影响的动作，这使得评估不太可靠。为了解决这个问题，我们收集了一个新的高质量数据集：Adverbs in Recipes (AIR)。我们专注于教学食谱视频，策划一组在不同执行时表现出有意义的视觉变化的动作。 AIR 中的视频经过更严格的修剪，并由多个注释者手动审核，以确保高标签质量。结果表明，鉴于 AIR 的视频更清晰，模型可以更好地从 AIR 中学习。与此同时，AIR 的副词预测具有挑战性，这表明还有很大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过分析动词与副词之间的文本关系，预测视频中动作的修饰副词（如'精细地切'中的'精细地'），并将其建模为回归任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在噪声或动作不受副词影响的问题，导致模型学习困难且评估不可靠，需构建高质量数据集并突破传统方法限制。
AI.method: 将问题转化为回归任务，通过测量动词-副词文本关系生成回归目标，并构建名为AIR的新数据集，包含经过人工审核的烹饪视频动作片段。
AI.result: 在副词预测和反义词分类任务中达到SOTA性能，且无需测试时的动作标签和反义配对假设；模型在AIR数据集上表现更优，但副词预测仍具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: AIR数据集提升了模型学习效果，证明了该方向的潜力，但副词预测任务仍有显著改进空间。

search_text: Learning Action Changes by Measuring Verb-Adverb Textual Relationships 通过测量动词-副词文本关系来学习动作变化 The goal of this work is to understand the way actions are performed in videos. That is, given a video, we aim to predict an adverb indicating a modification applied to the action (e.g. cut "finely"). We cast this problem as a regression task. We measure textual relationships between verbs and adverbs to generate a regression target representing the action change we aim to learn. We test our approach on a range of datasets and achieve state-of-the-art results on both adverb prediction and antonym classification. Furthermore, we outperform previous work when we lift two commonly assumed conditions: the availability of action labels during testing and the pairing of adverbs as antonyms. Existing datasets for adverb recognition are either noisy, which makes learning difficult, or contain actions whose appearance is not influenced by adverbs, which makes evaluation less reliable. To address this, we collect a new high quality dataset: Adverbs in Recipes (AIR). We focus on instructional recipes videos, curating a set of actions that exhibit meaningful visual changes when performed differently. Videos in AIR are more tightly trimmed and were manually reviewed by multiple annotators to ensure high labelling quality. Results show that models learn better from AIR given its cleaner videos. At the same time, adverb prediction on AIR is challenging, demonstrating that there is considerable room for improvement. 这项工作的目标是了解视频中动作的执行方式。也就是说，给定一个视频，我们的目标是预测一个副词，指示应用于动作的修改（例如“精细地”剪切）。我们将此问题视为回归任务。我们测量动词和副词之间的文本关系，以生成代表我们想要学习的动作变化的回归目标。我们在一系列数据集上测试我们的方法，并在副词预测和反义词分类方面取得了最先进的结果。此外，当我们提升两个常见假设条件时，我们的表现优于之前的工作：测试期间动作标签的可用性以及副词作为反义词的配对。现有的副词识别数据集要么是嘈杂的，这使得学习变得困难，要么包含外观不受副词影响的动作，这使得评估不太可靠。为了解决这个问题，我们收集了一个新的高质量数据集：Adverbs in Recipes (AIR)。我们专注于教学食谱视频，策划一组在不同执行时表现出有意义的视觉变化的动作。 AIR 中的视频经过更严格的修剪，并由多个注释者手动审核，以确保高标签质量。结果表明，鉴于 AIR 的视频更清晰，模型可以更好地从 AIR 中学习。与此同时，AIR 的副词预测具有挑战性，这表明还有很大的改进空间。 本论文旨在通过分析动词与副词之间的文本关系，预测视频中动作的修饰副词（如'精细地切'中的'精细地'），并将其建模为回归任务。 Davide Moltisanti,Frank Keller,Hakan Bilen,Laura Sevilla-Lara cs.CV

authors_text: Shengchao Zhou,Weizhou Liu,Chen Hu,Shuchang Zhou,Chao Ma
title: UniDistill: A Universal Cross-Modality Knowledge Distillation Framework for 3D Object Detection in Bird's-Eye View
title_zh: UniDistill：用于鸟瞰 3D 对象检测的通用跨模态知识蒸馏框架
abstract: In the field of 3D object detection for autonomous driving, the sensor portfolio including multi-modality and single-modality is diverse and complex. Since the multi-modal methods have system complexity while the accuracy of single-modal ones is relatively low, how to make a tradeoff between them is difficult. In this work, we propose a universal cross-modality knowledge distillation framework (UniDistill) to improve the performance of single-modality detectors. Specifically, during training, UniDistill projects the features of both the teacher and the student detector into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV), which is a friendly representation for different modalities. Then, three distillation losses are calculated to sparsely align the foreground features, helping the student learn from the teacher without introducing additional cost during inference. Taking advantage of the similar detection paradigm of different detectors in BEV, UniDistill easily supports LiDAR-to-camera, camera-to-LiDAR, fusion-to-LiDAR and fusion-to-camera distillation paths. Furthermore, the three distillation losses can filter the effect of misaligned background information and balance between objects of different sizes, improving the distillation effectiveness. Extensive experiments on nuScenes demonstrate that UniDistill effectively improves the mAP and NDS of student detectors by 2.0%~3.2%.
summary: In the field of 3D object detection for autonomous driving, the sensor portfolio including multi-modality and single-modality is diverse and complex. Since the multi-modal methods have system complexity while the accuracy of single-modal ones is relatively low, how to make a tradeoff between them is difficult. In this work, we propose a universal cross-modality knowledge distillation framework (UniDistill) to improve the performance of single-modality detectors. Specifically, during training, UniDistill projects the features of both the teacher and the student detector into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV), which is a friendly representation for different modalities. Then, three distillation losses are calculated to sparsely align the foreground features, helping the student learn from the teacher without introducing additional cost during inference. Taking advantage of the similar detection paradigm of different detectors in BEV, UniDistill easily supports LiDAR-to-camera, camera-to-LiDAR, fusion-to-LiDAR and fusion-to-camera distillation paths. Furthermore, the three distillation losses can filter the effect of misaligned background information and balance between objects of different sizes, improving the distillation effectiveness. Extensive experiments on nuScenes demonstrate that UniDistill effectively improves the mAP and NDS of student detectors by 2.0%~3.2%.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶3D物体检测领域，包括多模态和单模态的传感器组合多样且复杂。由于多模态方法系统复杂，而单模态方法精度较低，如何在两者之间进行权衡是很困难的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的跨模态知识蒸馏框架（UniDistill）来提高单模态检测器的性能。具体来说，在训练期间，UniDistill 将教师和学生检测器的特征投影到鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中，这是不同模式的友好表示。然后，计算三个蒸馏损失以稀疏地对齐前景特征，帮助学生向老师学习，而不会在推理过程中引入额外成本。利用 BEV 中不同检测器的相似检测范例，UniDistill 可以轻松支持 LiDAR 到相机、相机到 LiDAR、融合到 LiDAR 以及融合到相机蒸馏路径。此外，三个蒸馏损失可以过滤未对准的背景信息的影响以及不同大小的对象之间的平衡，从而提高蒸馏效率。 nuScenes上的大量实验表明，UniDistill有效地将学生检测器的mAP和NDS提高了2.0%~3.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的跨模态知识蒸馏框架UniDistill，用于提升单模态3D目标检测器在鸟瞰图（BEV）中的性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态方法系统复杂，单模态方法精度较低，如何在复杂性和精度间取得平衡是自动驾驶领域3D目标检测的难点。
AI.method: 在训练阶段，UniDistill将教师和学生检测器的特征投影到BEV空间，通过三个蒸馏损失稀疏对齐前景特征，并支持LiDAR-to-camera、camera-to-LiDAR等多路径蒸馏。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，UniDistill使学生检测器的mAP和NDS指标提升2.0%~3.2%。
AI.conclusion: UniDistill通过BEV特征对齐和多路径蒸馏有效提升了单模态检测器性能，且无需增加推理成本。

search_text: UniDistill: A Universal Cross-Modality Knowledge Distillation Framework for 3D Object Detection in Bird's-Eye View UniDistill：用于鸟瞰 3D 对象检测的通用跨模态知识蒸馏框架 In the field of 3D object detection for autonomous driving, the sensor portfolio including multi-modality and single-modality is diverse and complex. Since the multi-modal methods have system complexity while the accuracy of single-modal ones is relatively low, how to make a tradeoff between them is difficult. In this work, we propose a universal cross-modality knowledge distillation framework (UniDistill) to improve the performance of single-modality detectors. Specifically, during training, UniDistill projects the features of both the teacher and the student detector into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV), which is a friendly representation for different modalities. Then, three distillation losses are calculated to sparsely align the foreground features, helping the student learn from the teacher without introducing additional cost during inference. Taking advantage of the similar detection paradigm of different detectors in BEV, UniDistill easily supports LiDAR-to-camera, camera-to-LiDAR, fusion-to-LiDAR and fusion-to-camera distillation paths. Furthermore, the three distillation losses can filter the effect of misaligned background information and balance between objects of different sizes, improving the distillation effectiveness. Extensive experiments on nuScenes demonstrate that UniDistill effectively improves the mAP and NDS of student detectors by 2.0%~3.2%. 在自动驾驶3D物体检测领域，包括多模态和单模态的传感器组合多样且复杂。由于多模态方法系统复杂，而单模态方法精度较低，如何在两者之间进行权衡是很困难的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的跨模态知识蒸馏框架（UniDistill）来提高单模态检测器的性能。具体来说，在训练期间，UniDistill 将教师和学生检测器的特征投影到鸟瞰图 (BEV) 中，这是不同模式的友好表示。然后，计算三个蒸馏损失以稀疏地对齐前景特征，帮助学生向老师学习，而不会在推理过程中引入额外成本。利用 BEV 中不同检测器的相似检测范例，UniDistill 可以轻松支持 LiDAR 到相机、相机到 LiDAR、融合到 LiDAR 以及融合到相机蒸馏路径。此外，三个蒸馏损失可以过滤未对准的背景信息的影响以及不同大小的对象之间的平衡，从而提高蒸馏效率。 nuScenes上的大量实验表明，UniDistill有效地将学生检测器的mAP和NDS提高了2.0%~3.2%。 本文提出了一种通用的跨模态知识蒸馏框架UniDistill，用于提升单模态3D目标检测器在鸟瞰图（BEV）中的性能。 Shengchao Zhou,Weizhou Liu,Chen Hu,Shuchang Zhou,Chao Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Siqi Chen,Xueming Li,Xianlin Zhang,Mingdao Wang,Yu Zhang,Jiatong Han,Yue Zhang
title: Exemplar-based Video Colorization with Long-term Spatiotemporal Dependency
title_zh: 具有长期时空依赖性的基于示例的视频着色
abstract: Exemplar-based video colorization is an essential technique for applications like old movie restoration. Although recent methods perform well in still scenes or scenes with regular movement, they always lack robustness in moving scenes due to their weak ability in modeling long-term dependency both spatially and temporally, leading to color fading, color discontinuity or other artifacts. To solve this problem, we propose an exemplar-based video colorization framework with long-term spatiotemporal dependency. To enhance the long-term spatial dependency, a parallelized CNN-Transformer block and a double head non-local operation are designed. The proposed CNN-Transformer block can better incorporate long-term spatial dependency with local texture and structural features, and the double head non-local operation further leverages the performance of augmented feature. While for long-term temporal dependency enhancement, we further introduce the novel linkage subnet. The linkage subnet propagate motion information across adjacent frame blocks and help to maintain temporal continuity. Experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms recent state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. Also, our model can generate more colorful, realistic and stabilized results, especially for scenes where objects change greatly and irregularly.
summary: Exemplar-based video colorization is an essential technique for applications like old movie restoration. Although recent methods perform well in still scenes or scenes with regular movement, they always lack robustness in moving scenes due to their weak ability in modeling long-term dependency both spatially and temporally, leading to color fading, color discontinuity or other artifacts. To solve this problem, we propose an exemplar-based video colorization framework with long-term spatiotemporal dependency. To enhance the long-term spatial dependency, a parallelized CNN-Transformer block and a double head non-local operation are designed. The proposed CNN-Transformer block can better incorporate long-term spatial dependency with local texture and structural features, and the double head non-local operation further leverages the performance of augmented feature. While for long-term temporal dependency enhancement, we further introduce the novel linkage subnet. The linkage subnet propagate motion information across adjacent frame blocks and help to maintain temporal continuity. Experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms recent state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and qualitatively. Also, our model can generate more colorful, realistic and stabilized results, especially for scenes where objects change greatly and irregularly.
abstract_zh: 基于示例的视频着色是旧电影修复等应用的一项重要技术。尽管最近的方法在静止场景或有规律运动的场景中表现良好，但由于它们在空间和时间上长期依赖性建模的能力较弱，导致颜色褪色、颜色不连续或其他伪影，因此它们在移动场景中总是缺乏鲁棒性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有长期时空依赖性的基于示例的视频着色框架。为了增强长期空间依赖性，设计了并行 CNN-Transformer 块和双头非局部操作。所提出的 CNN-Transformer 块可以更好地将长期空间依赖性与局部纹理和结构特征结合起来，并且双头非局部操作进一步利用了增强特征的性能。而为了长期时间依赖性增强，我们进一步引入了新颖的链接子网。链接子网在相邻帧块之间传播运动信息，并有助于保持时间连续性。实验表明，我们的模型在数量和质量上都优于最近最先进的方法。此外，我们的模型可以生成更加丰富多彩、真实且稳定的结果，特别是对于物体变化较大且不规则的场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于示例的视频着色框架，通过建模长期时空依赖关系来提升动态场景的着色效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态场景时因无法有效建模长期时空依赖，导致颜色褪色、不连续等伪影问题，需提升复杂运动场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计并行CNN-Transformer块与双头非局部操作增强空间依赖，引入链接子网络传播相邻帧运动信息以提升时间连续性。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在定量和定性指标上优于最新方法，尤其在大范围不规则运动场景中生成更鲜艳、真实且稳定的着色结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合长期时空依赖建模，本文方法显著提升了动态视频着色的质量与稳定性，解决了现有技术的局限性。
