authors_text: Andreea Postovan,Mădălina Eraşcu
title: Architecturing Binarized Neural Networks for Traffic Sign Recognition
title_zh: 构建用于交通标志识别的二值化神经网络
abstract: Traffic signs support road safety and managing the flow of traffic, hence are an integral part of any vision system for autonomous driving. While the use of deep learning is well-known in traffic signs classification due to the high accuracy results obtained using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) (state of the art is 99.46\%), little is known about binarized neural networks (BNNs). Compared to CNNs, BNNs reduce the model size and simplify convolution operations and have shown promising results in computationally limited and energy-constrained devices which appear in the context of autonomous driving. This work presents a bottom-up approach for architecturing BNNs by studying characteristics of the constituent layers. These constituent layers (binarized convolutional layers, max pooling, batch normalization, fully connected layers) are studied in various combinations and with different values of kernel size, number of filters and of neurons by using the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB) for training. As a result, we propose BNNs architectures which achieve more than $90\%$ for GTSRB (the maximum is $96.45\%$) and an average greater than $80\%$ (the maximum is $88.99\%$) considering also the Belgian and Chinese datasets for testing. The number of parameters of these architectures varies from 100k to less than 2M. The accompanying material of this paper is publicly available at https://github.com/apostovan21/BinarizedNeuralNetwork.
summary: Traffic signs support road safety and managing the flow of traffic, hence are an integral part of any vision system for autonomous driving. While the use of deep learning is well-known in traffic signs classification due to the high accuracy results obtained using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) (state of the art is 99.46\%), little is known about binarized neural networks (BNNs). Compared to CNNs, BNNs reduce the model size and simplify convolution operations and have shown promising results in computationally limited and energy-constrained devices which appear in the context of autonomous driving. This work presents a bottom-up approach for architecturing BNNs by studying characteristics of the constituent layers. These constituent layers (binarized convolutional layers, max pooling, batch normalization, fully connected layers) are studied in various combinations and with different values of kernel size, number of filters and of neurons by using the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB) for training. As a result, we propose BNNs architectures which achieve more than $90\%$ for GTSRB (the maximum is $96.45\%$) and an average greater than $80\%$ (the maximum is $88.99\%$) considering also the Belgian and Chinese datasets for testing. The number of parameters of these architectures varies from 100k to less than 2M. The accompanying material of this paper is publicly available at https://github.com/apostovan21/BinarizedNeuralNetwork.
abstract_zh: 交通标志支持道路安全和管理交通流量，因此是任何自动驾驶视觉系统不可或缺的一部分。虽然深度学习在交通标志分类中的应用众所周知，因为使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 获得了高精度结果（现有技术为 99.46\%），但人们对二值化神经网络 (BNN) 知之甚少。与 CNN 相比，BNN 减少了模型大小并简化了卷积运算，并且在自动驾驶背景下出现的计算有限和能量受限的设备中显示出了有希望的结果。这项工作提出了一种通过研究组成层的特征来构建 BNN 的自下而上的方法。这些构成层（二值化卷积层、最大池化、批量归一化、全连接层）通过使用德国交通标志识别基准（GTSRB）进行训练，以不同的组合以及不同的内核大小、滤波器数量和神经元数量进行研究。因此，我们提出了 BNN 架构，其 GTSRB 的实现超过 $90\%$（最大值为 $96.45\%$），并且平均大于 $80\%$（最大值为 $88.99\%$），同时考虑到用于测试的比利时和中国数据集。这些架构的参数数量从 100k 到不到 2M 不等。本文的随附材料可在 https://github.com/apostovan21/BinarizedNeuralNetwork 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对交通标志识别的二值化神经网络（BNN）架构设计方法，旨在提升模型在计算资源受限场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络（CNN）在交通标志分类中表现优异，但其计算量大、能耗高，难以满足自动驾驶中边缘设备的实时性需求。二值化神经网络（BNN）因参数量少、运算简化而具有潜力，但其架构设计研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 采用自底向上的方法，系统研究BNN各层（二值化卷积层、最大池化、批量归一化、全连接层）的组合方式及参数（如卷积核大小、滤波器数量、神经元数量），基于GTSRB数据集进行训练与验证，并在比利时和中国数据集上测试泛化性能。
AI.result: 提出的BNN架构在GTSRB数据集上达到最高96.45%的准确率，在比利时和中国数据集上的平均准确率超过80%（最高88.99%），模型参数量范围为10万至200万之间。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化BNN架构设计，可在保持高识别准确率的同时显著降低模型复杂度，为自动驾驶中的低功耗、实时交通标志识别提供可行方案。

search_text: Architecturing Binarized Neural Networks for Traffic Sign Recognition 构建用于交通标志识别的二值化神经网络 Traffic signs support road safety and managing the flow of traffic, hence are an integral part of any vision system for autonomous driving. While the use of deep learning is well-known in traffic signs classification due to the high accuracy results obtained using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) (state of the art is 99.46\%), little is known about binarized neural networks (BNNs). Compared to CNNs, BNNs reduce the model size and simplify convolution operations and have shown promising results in computationally limited and energy-constrained devices which appear in the context of autonomous driving. This work presents a bottom-up approach for architecturing BNNs by studying characteristics of the constituent layers. These constituent layers (binarized convolutional layers, max pooling, batch normalization, fully connected layers) are studied in various combinations and with different values of kernel size, number of filters and of neurons by using the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark (GTSRB) for training. As a result, we propose BNNs architectures which achieve more than $90\%$ for GTSRB (the maximum is $96.45\%$) and an average greater than $80\%$ (the maximum is $88.99\%$) considering also the Belgian and Chinese datasets for testing. The number of parameters of these architectures varies from 100k to less than 2M. The accompanying material of this paper is publicly available at https://github.com/apostovan21/BinarizedNeuralNetwork. 交通标志支持道路安全和管理交通流量，因此是任何自动驾驶视觉系统不可或缺的一部分。虽然深度学习在交通标志分类中的应用众所周知，因为使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 获得了高精度结果（现有技术为 99.46\%），但人们对二值化神经网络 (BNN) 知之甚少。与 CNN 相比，BNN 减少了模型大小并简化了卷积运算，并且在自动驾驶背景下出现的计算有限和能量受限的设备中显示出了有希望的结果。这项工作提出了一种通过研究组成层的特征来构建 BNN 的自下而上的方法。这些构成层（二值化卷积层、最大池化、批量归一化、全连接层）通过使用德国交通标志识别基准（GTSRB）进行训练，以不同的组合以及不同的内核大小、滤波器数量和神经元数量进行研究。因此，我们提出了 BNN 架构，其 GTSRB 的实现超过 $90\%$（最大值为 $96.45\%$），并且平均大于 $80\%$（最大值为 $88.99\%$），同时考虑到用于测试的比利时和中国数据集。这些架构的参数数量从 100k 到不到 2M 不等。本文的随附材料可在 https://github.com/apostovan21/BinarizedNeuralNetwork 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种针对交通标志识别的二值化神经网络（BNN）架构设计方法，旨在提升模型在计算资源受限场景下的性能。 Andreea Postovan,Mădălina Eraşcu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhaofei Wang,Weijia Zhang,Min-Ling Zhang
title: Transformer-based Multi-Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的多实例学习，用于弱监督目标检测
abstract: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) enables the training of object detection models using only image-level annotations. State-of-the-art WSOD detectors commonly rely on multi-instance learning (MIL) as the backbone of their detectors and assume that the bounding box proposals of an image are independent of each other. However, since such approaches only utilize the highest score proposal and discard the potentially useful information from other proposals, their independent MIL backbone often limits models to salient parts of an object or causes them to detect only one object per class. To solve the above problems, we propose a novel backbone for WSOD based on our tailored Vision Transformer named Weakly Supervised Transformer Detection Network (WSTDN). Our algorithm is not only the first to demonstrate that self-attention modules that consider inter-instance relationships are effective backbones for WSOD, but also we introduce a novel bounding box mining method (BBM) integrated with a memory transfer refinement (MTR) procedure to utilize the instance dependencies for facilitating instance refinements. Experimental results on PASCAL VOC2007 and VOC2012 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed WSTDN and modified instance refinement modules.
summary: Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) enables the training of object detection models using only image-level annotations. State-of-the-art WSOD detectors commonly rely on multi-instance learning (MIL) as the backbone of their detectors and assume that the bounding box proposals of an image are independent of each other. However, since such approaches only utilize the highest score proposal and discard the potentially useful information from other proposals, their independent MIL backbone often limits models to salient parts of an object or causes them to detect only one object per class. To solve the above problems, we propose a novel backbone for WSOD based on our tailored Vision Transformer named Weakly Supervised Transformer Detection Network (WSTDN). Our algorithm is not only the first to demonstrate that self-attention modules that consider inter-instance relationships are effective backbones for WSOD, but also we introduce a novel bounding box mining method (BBM) integrated with a memory transfer refinement (MTR) procedure to utilize the instance dependencies for facilitating instance refinements. Experimental results on PASCAL VOC2007 and VOC2012 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed WSTDN and modified instance refinement modules.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象检测 (WSOD) 可以仅使用图像级注释来训练对象检测模型。最先进的 WSOD 检测器通常依赖多实例学习 (MIL) 作为其检测器的骨干，并假设图像的边界框建议彼此独立。然而，由于此类方法仅利用最高分提案并丢弃来自其他提案的潜在有用信息，因此它们独立的 MIL 主干通常将模型限制为对象的显着部分，或者导致它们每个类仅检测一个对象。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种基于我们定制的 Vision Transformer 的新型 WSOD 主干网络，称为弱监督 Transformer 检测网络（WSTDN）。我们的算法不仅首次证明考虑实例间关系的自注意力模块是 WSOD 的有效支柱，而且我们还引入了一种与内存传输细化 (MTR) 过程集成的新颖的边界框挖掘方法 (BBM)，以利用实例依赖性来促进实例细化。 PASCAL VOC2007 和 VOC2012 基准测试的实验结果证明了我们提出的 WSTDN 和修改后的实例细化模块的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于改进的视觉Transformer的弱监督目标检测方法WSTDN，解决现有方法在实例依赖关系建模上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法假设候选框相互独立，仅利用最高分候选框导致模型无法有效利用其他候选框信息，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: 设计弱监督Transformer检测网络(WSTDN)，引入自注意力模块建模实例间关系，并提出结合记忆迁移精炼的边界框挖掘方法(BBM-MTR)。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC2007/2012数据集上验证了WSTDN和改进实例精炼模块的有效性，检测性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明考虑实例间关系的自注意力模块可作为WSOD有效主干，提出的BBM-MTR方法能更好利用实例依赖关系提升检测效果。

search_text: Transformer-based Multi-Instance Learning for Weakly Supervised Object Detection 基于 Transformer 的多实例学习，用于弱监督目标检测 Weakly Supervised Object Detection (WSOD) enables the training of object detection models using only image-level annotations. State-of-the-art WSOD detectors commonly rely on multi-instance learning (MIL) as the backbone of their detectors and assume that the bounding box proposals of an image are independent of each other. However, since such approaches only utilize the highest score proposal and discard the potentially useful information from other proposals, their independent MIL backbone often limits models to salient parts of an object or causes them to detect only one object per class. To solve the above problems, we propose a novel backbone for WSOD based on our tailored Vision Transformer named Weakly Supervised Transformer Detection Network (WSTDN). Our algorithm is not only the first to demonstrate that self-attention modules that consider inter-instance relationships are effective backbones for WSOD, but also we introduce a novel bounding box mining method (BBM) integrated with a memory transfer refinement (MTR) procedure to utilize the instance dependencies for facilitating instance refinements. Experimental results on PASCAL VOC2007 and VOC2012 benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed WSTDN and modified instance refinement modules. 弱监督对象检测 (WSOD) 可以仅使用图像级注释来训练对象检测模型。最先进的 WSOD 检测器通常依赖多实例学习 (MIL) 作为其检测器的骨干，并假设图像的边界框建议彼此独立。然而，由于此类方法仅利用最高分提案并丢弃来自其他提案的潜在有用信息，因此它们独立的 MIL 主干通常将模型限制为对象的显着部分，或者导致它们每个类仅检测一个对象。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种基于我们定制的 Vision Transformer 的新型 WSOD 主干网络，称为弱监督 Transformer 检测网络（WSTDN）。我们的算法不仅首次证明考虑实例间关系的自注意力模块是 WSOD 的有效支柱，而且我们还引入了一种与内存传输细化 (MTR) 过程集成的新颖的边界框挖掘方法 (BBM)，以利用实例依赖性来促进实例细化。 PASCAL VOC2007 和 VOC2012 基准测试的实验结果证明了我们提出的 WSTDN 和修改后的实例细化模块的有效性。 本文提出基于改进的视觉Transformer的弱监督目标检测方法WSTDN，解决现有方法在实例依赖关系建模上的不足。 Zhaofei Wang,Weijia Zhang,Min-Ling Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Bogyeong Kang,Hyeonyeong Nam,Ji-Wung Han,Keun-Soo Heo,Tae-Eui Kam
title: Multi-view Cross-Modality MR Image Translation for Vestibular Schwannoma and Cochlea Segmentation
title_zh: 用于前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割的多视图跨模态 MR 图像转换
abstract: In this work, we propose a multi-view image translation framework, which can translate contrast-enhanced T1 (ceT1) MR imaging to high-resolution T2 (hrT2) MR imaging for unsupervised vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation. We adopt two image translation models in parallel that use a pixel-level consistent constraint and a patch-level contrastive constraint, respectively. Thereby, we can augment pseudo-hrT2 images reflecting different perspectives, which eventually lead to a high-performing segmentation model. Our experimental results on the CrossMoDA challenge show that the proposed method achieved enhanced performance on the vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation.
summary: In this work, we propose a multi-view image translation framework, which can translate contrast-enhanced T1 (ceT1) MR imaging to high-resolution T2 (hrT2) MR imaging for unsupervised vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation. We adopt two image translation models in parallel that use a pixel-level consistent constraint and a patch-level contrastive constraint, respectively. Thereby, we can augment pseudo-hrT2 images reflecting different perspectives, which eventually lead to a high-performing segmentation model. Our experimental results on the CrossMoDA challenge show that the proposed method achieved enhanced performance on the vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多视图图像转换框架，它可以将对比度增强的 T1 (ceT1) MR 成像转换为高分辨率 T2 (hrT2) MR 成像，用于无监督的前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割。我们并行采用两个图像翻译模型，分别使用像素级一致性约束和块级对比约束。因此，我们可以增强反映不同视角的伪 hrT2 图像，最终形成高性能的分割模型。我们在 CrossMoDA 挑战中的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割方面取得了增强的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角跨模态MRI图像翻译框架，将增强T1加权图像转换为高分辨率T2加权图像，以提升前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法依赖单一模态图像，而高分辨率T2图像数据稀缺，且不同模态数据存在分布差异，限制了分割效果。
AI.method: 采用并行双模型架构，分别通过像素级一致性约束和块级对比约束生成多视角伪高分辨率T2图像，增强分割模型输入多样性。
AI.result: 在CrossMoDA挑战赛中，该方法显著提升了前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的分割精度，验证了多视角翻译的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多视角跨模态图像翻译能有效增强分割模型性能，为医学影像分析提供新的数据增强范式。

ai_content_json.method: 采用并行双模型架构，分别通过像素级一致性约束和块级对比约束生成多视角伪高分辨率T2图像，增强分割模型输入多样性。
ai_content_json.result: 在CrossMoDA挑战赛中，该方法显著提升了前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的分割精度，验证了多视角翻译的有效性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 多视角跨模态图像翻译能有效增强分割模型性能，为医学影像分析提供新的数据增强范式。

search_text: Multi-view Cross-Modality MR Image Translation for Vestibular Schwannoma and Cochlea Segmentation 用于前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割的多视图跨模态 MR 图像转换 In this work, we propose a multi-view image translation framework, which can translate contrast-enhanced T1 (ceT1) MR imaging to high-resolution T2 (hrT2) MR imaging for unsupervised vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation. We adopt two image translation models in parallel that use a pixel-level consistent constraint and a patch-level contrastive constraint, respectively. Thereby, we can augment pseudo-hrT2 images reflecting different perspectives, which eventually lead to a high-performing segmentation model. Our experimental results on the CrossMoDA challenge show that the proposed method achieved enhanced performance on the vestibular schwannoma and cochlea segmentation. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多视图图像转换框架，它可以将对比度增强的 T1 (ceT1) MR 成像转换为高分辨率 T2 (hrT2) MR 成像，用于无监督的前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割。我们并行采用两个图像翻译模型，分别使用像素级一致性约束和块级对比约束。因此，我们可以增强反映不同视角的伪 hrT2 图像，最终形成高性能的分割模型。我们在 CrossMoDA 挑战中的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗分割方面取得了增强的性能。 本文提出一种多视角跨模态MRI图像翻译框架，将增强T1加权图像转换为高分辨率T2加权图像，以提升前庭神经鞘瘤和耳蜗的分割性能。 Bogyeong Kang,Hyeonyeong Nam,Ji-Wung Han,Keun-Soo Heo,Tae-Eui Kam cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Probir Mondal,Pratyay Banerjee,Debranjan Pal,Krishnendu Basuli
title: Similarity analysis of DNA sequences through local distribution of nucleotides in strategic neighborhood
title_zh: 通过战略邻域核苷酸的局部分布进行 DNA 序列的相似性分析
comment: 5 pages; 5 figures; We have revised the manuscript title for clarity and added a co-author due to their valuable contributions. Minor typos, including those in the reference section, have also been corrected
comments: 5 pages; 5 figures; We have revised the manuscript title for clarity and added a co-author due to their valuable contributions. Minor typos, including those in the reference section, have also been corrected
abstract: We propose a new alignment-free algorithm by constructing a compact vector representation on $\mathbb{R}^{24}$ of a DNA sequence of arbitrary length. Each component of this vector is obtained from a representative sequence, the elements of which are the values realized by a function $Γ$. This function $Γ$ acts on neighborhoods of arbitrary radius that are located at strategic positions within the DNA sequence and carries complete information about the local distribution of frequencies of the nucleotides as a consequence of the uniqueness of prime factorization of integer. The algorithm exhibits linear time complexity and turns out to consume significantly small memory. The two natural parameters characterizing the radius and location of the neighbourhoods are fixed by comparing the phylogenetic tree with the benchmark for full genome sequences of fish mtDNA datasets. Using these fitting parameters, the method is applied to analyze a number of genome sequences from benchmark and other standard datasets. Our algorithm proves to be computationally efficient compared to other well known algorithms when applied on simulated dataset.
summary: We propose a new alignment-free algorithm by constructing a compact vector representation on $\mathbb{R}^{24}$ of a DNA sequence of arbitrary length. Each component of this vector is obtained from a representative sequence, the elements of which are the values realized by a function $Γ$. This function $Γ$ acts on neighborhoods of arbitrary radius that are located at strategic positions within the DNA sequence and carries complete information about the local distribution of frequencies of the nucleotides as a consequence of the uniqueness of prime factorization of integer. The algorithm exhibits linear time complexity and turns out to consume significantly small memory. The two natural parameters characterizing the radius and location of the neighbourhoods are fixed by comparing the phylogenetic tree with the benchmark for full genome sequences of fish mtDNA datasets. Using these fitting parameters, the method is applied to analyze a number of genome sequences from benchmark and other standard datasets. Our algorithm proves to be computationally efficient compared to other well known algorithms when applied on simulated dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们通过在任意长度的 DNA 序列的 $\mathbb{R}^{24}$ 上构建紧凑的向量表示，提出了一种新的免对齐算法。该向量的每个分量都是从一个代表性序列中获得的，该序列的元素是由函数$Γ$实现的值。该函数 $Л$ 作用于位于 DNA 序列内战略位置的任意半径的邻域，并由于整数素因数分解的唯一性而携带有关核苷酸频率局部分布的完整信息。该算法表现出线性时间复杂度，并且消耗的内存非常少。通过将系统发育树与鱼类 mtDNA 数据集的全基因组序列的基准进行比较，确定了表征邻域半径和位置的两个自然参数。使用这些拟合参数，该方法用于分析来自基准和其他标准数据集的大量基因组序列。当应用于模拟数据集时，与其他众所周知的算法相比，我们的算法被证明具有计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需比对的DNA序列相似性分析方法，通过构建基于核苷酸局部分布特征的向量表示进行分析。
AI.motivation: 传统DNA序列比对方法依赖复杂计算且效率较低，需开发一种高效、低内存消耗的无需比对算法以提升基因组数据分析效率。
AI.method: 利用核苷酸局部分布特征构造ℝ²⁴向量表示，通过函数Γ在战略位置的任意半径邻域内提取信息，结合质因数分解唯一性实现局部频率特征编码。
AI.result: 算法在模拟数据集上表现出线性时间复杂度和显著降低的内存消耗，优于现有主流方法，且参数通过鱼类线粒体基因组数据集的系统发育树验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为DNA序列分析提供了高效、无需比对的新范式，验证了局部核苷酸分布特征在基因组数据比较中的有效性。

authors_text: Hiroshi Yamashita,Ken-ichi Okubo,Suguru Shimomura,Yusuke Ogura,Jun Tanida,Hideyuki Suzuki
title: Low-rank combinatorial optimization and statistical learning by spatial photonic Ising machine
title_zh: 空间光子伊辛机的低阶组合优化和统计学习
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures (with a 4-page supplemental); accepted version
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures (with a 4-page supplemental); accepted version
abstract: The spatial photonic Ising machine (SPIM) [D. Pierangeli et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 122, 213902 (2019)] is a promising optical architecture utilizing spatial light modulation for solving large-scale combinatorial optimization problems efficiently. The primitive version of the SPIM, however, can accommodate Ising problems with only rank-one interaction matrices. In this Letter, we propose a new computing model for the SPIM that can accommodate any Ising problem without changing its optical implementation. The proposed model is particularly efficient for Ising problems with low-rank interaction matrices, such as knapsack problems. Moreover, it acquires the learning ability of Boltzmann machines. We demonstrate that learning, classification, and sampling of the MNIST handwritten digit images are achieved efficiently using the model with low-rank interactions. Thus, the proposed model exhibits higher practical applicability to various problems of combinatorial optimization and statistical learning, without losing the scalability inherent in the SPIM architecture.
summary: The spatial photonic Ising machine (SPIM) [D. Pierangeli et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 122, 213902 (2019)] is a promising optical architecture utilizing spatial light modulation for solving large-scale combinatorial optimization problems efficiently. The primitive version of the SPIM, however, can accommodate Ising problems with only rank-one interaction matrices. In this Letter, we propose a new computing model for the SPIM that can accommodate any Ising problem without changing its optical implementation. The proposed model is particularly efficient for Ising problems with low-rank interaction matrices, such as knapsack problems. Moreover, it acquires the learning ability of Boltzmann machines. We demonstrate that learning, classification, and sampling of the MNIST handwritten digit images are achieved efficiently using the model with low-rank interactions. Thus, the proposed model exhibits higher practical applicability to various problems of combinatorial optimization and statistical learning, without losing the scalability inherent in the SPIM architecture.
abstract_zh: 空间光子伊辛机（SPIM）[D. Pierangeli 等人，物理学。莱特牧师。 122, 213902 (2019)]是一种利用空间光调制有效解决大规模组合优化问题的有前景的光学架构。然而，SPIM 的原始版本只能解决仅具有一阶交互矩阵的 Ising 问题。在这封信中，我们提出了一种新的 SPIM 计算模型，可以在不改变其光学实现的情况下解决任何伊辛问题。所提出的模型对于具有低秩交互矩阵的伊辛问题（例如背包问题）特别有效。此外，它还获得了玻尔兹曼机的学习能力。我们证明，使用具有低秩交互的模型可以有效地实现 MNIST 手写数字图像的学习、分类和采样。因此，所提出的模型对组合优化和统计学习的各种问题表现出更高的实际适用性，同时又不失去 SPIM 架构固有的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型空间光子Ising机模型，能够处理任意Ising问题并具备学习能力，适用于组合优化和统计学习。
AI.motivation: 原始空间光子Ising机（SPIM）仅支持秩一交互矩阵，限制了其应用范围，需扩展其处理低秩交互问题的能力并引入学习功能。
AI.method: 设计了一种无需改变光学实现的新计算模型，通过低秩交互矩阵处理组合优化问题，并集成玻尔兹曼机的学习能力。
AI.result: 该模型在MNIST手写数字图像的学习、分类和采样任务中表现出高效性，验证了其在组合优化和统计学习中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 新模型在保持SPIM可扩展性的同时，显著提升了处理低秩交互问题和统计学习任务的适用性。

authors_text: Niharika S. D'Souza,Archana Venkataraman
title: mSPD-NN: A Geometrically Aware Neural Framework for Biomarker Discovery from Functional Connectomics Manifolds
title_zh: mSPD-NN：用于从功能连接组学流形中发现生物标志物的几何感知神经框架
abstract: Connectomics has emerged as a powerful tool in neuroimaging and has spurred recent advancements in statistical and machine learning methods for connectivity data. Despite connectomes inhabiting a matrix manifold, most analytical frameworks ignore the underlying data geometry. This is largely because simple operations, such as mean estimation, do not have easily computable closed-form solutions. We propose a geometrically aware neural framework for connectomes, i.e., the mSPD-NN, designed to estimate the geodesic mean of a collections of symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices. The mSPD-NN is comprised of bilinear fully connected layers with tied weights and utilizes a novel loss function to optimize the matrix-normal equation arising from Fréchet mean estimation. Via experiments on synthetic data, we demonstrate the efficacy of our mSPD-NN against common alternatives for SPD mean estimation, providing competitive performance in terms of scalability and robustness to noise. We illustrate the real-world flexibility of the mSPD-NN in multiple experiments on rs-fMRI data and demonstrate that it uncovers stable biomarkers associated with subtle network differences among patients with ADHD-ASD comorbidities and healthy controls.
summary: Connectomics has emerged as a powerful tool in neuroimaging and has spurred recent advancements in statistical and machine learning methods for connectivity data. Despite connectomes inhabiting a matrix manifold, most analytical frameworks ignore the underlying data geometry. This is largely because simple operations, such as mean estimation, do not have easily computable closed-form solutions. We propose a geometrically aware neural framework for connectomes, i.e., the mSPD-NN, designed to estimate the geodesic mean of a collections of symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices. The mSPD-NN is comprised of bilinear fully connected layers with tied weights and utilizes a novel loss function to optimize the matrix-normal equation arising from Fréchet mean estimation. Via experiments on synthetic data, we demonstrate the efficacy of our mSPD-NN against common alternatives for SPD mean estimation, providing competitive performance in terms of scalability and robustness to noise. We illustrate the real-world flexibility of the mSPD-NN in multiple experiments on rs-fMRI data and demonstrate that it uncovers stable biomarkers associated with subtle network differences among patients with ADHD-ASD comorbidities and healthy controls.
abstract_zh: 连接组学已成为神经影像学领域的强大工具，并推动了连接数据统计和机器学习方法的最新进展。尽管连接体存在于矩阵流形中，但大多数分析框架都忽略了底层的数据几何结构。这主要是因为简单的运算（例如均值估计）没有易于计算的封闭式解决方案。我们提出了一种用于连接组的几何感知神经框架，即 mSPD-NN，旨在估计对称正定（SPD）矩阵集合的测地线平均值。 mSPD-NN 由具有绑定权重的双线性全连接层组成，并利用新颖的损失函数来优化由 Fréchet 均值估计产生的矩阵正规方程。通过对合成数据的实验，我们证明了 mSPD-NN 相对于 SPD 均值估计的常见替代方案的有效性，在可扩展性和噪声鲁棒性方面提供了具有竞争力的性能。我们在 rs-fMRI 数据的多个实验中说明了 mSPD-NN 在现实世界中的灵活性，并证明它揭示了与 ADHD-ASD 合并症患者和健康对照之间细微网络差异相关的稳定生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何感知的神经网络框架mSPD-NN，用于估计对称正定矩阵集合的测地线均值，并应用于功能连接组学数据的生物标志物发现。
AI.motivation: 现有连接组数据分析方法忽视了矩阵流形的几何特性，导致均值估计困难且缺乏鲁棒性，需要开发符合数据几何结构的新方法。
AI.method: 设计双线性全连接层与绑定权重结构，结合新型损失函数优化Fréchet均值估计的矩阵正规方程，实现SPD矩阵的几何均值计算。
AI.result: 在合成数据上展现优于传统方法的可扩展性与抗噪性，在rs-fMRI数据中成功识别出ADHD-ASD共病患者与健康对照组的稳定网络差异生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: mSPD-NN有效捕捉连接组数据的几何特性，为复杂神经影像数据的生物标志物发现提供了灵活且具有理论支撑的新范式。

authors_text: Jinming Liu,Heming Sun,Jiro Katto
title: Learned Image Compression with Mixed Transformer-CNN Architectures
title_zh: 使用混合 Transformer-CNN 架构学习图像压缩
abstract: Learned image compression (LIC) methods have exhibited promising progress and superior rate-distortion performance compared with classical image compression standards. Most existing LIC methods are Convolutional Neural Networks-based (CNN-based) or Transformer-based, which have different advantages. Exploiting both advantages is a point worth exploring, which has two challenges: 1) how to effectively fuse the two methods? 2) how to achieve higher performance with a suitable complexity? In this paper, we propose an efficient parallel Transformer-CNN Mixture (TCM) block with a controllable complexity to incorporate the local modeling ability of CNN and the non-local modeling ability of transformers to improve the overall architecture of image compression models. Besides, inspired by the recent progress of entropy estimation models and attention modules, we propose a channel-wise entropy model with parameter-efficient swin-transformer-based attention (SWAtten) modules by using channel squeezing. Experimental results demonstrate our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art rate-distortion performances on three different resolution datasets (i.e., Kodak, Tecnick, CLIC Professional Validation) compared to existing LIC methods. The code is at https://github.com/jmliu206/LIC_TCM.
summary: Learned image compression (LIC) methods have exhibited promising progress and superior rate-distortion performance compared with classical image compression standards. Most existing LIC methods are Convolutional Neural Networks-based (CNN-based) or Transformer-based, which have different advantages. Exploiting both advantages is a point worth exploring, which has two challenges: 1) how to effectively fuse the two methods? 2) how to achieve higher performance with a suitable complexity? In this paper, we propose an efficient parallel Transformer-CNN Mixture (TCM) block with a controllable complexity to incorporate the local modeling ability of CNN and the non-local modeling ability of transformers to improve the overall architecture of image compression models. Besides, inspired by the recent progress of entropy estimation models and attention modules, we propose a channel-wise entropy model with parameter-efficient swin-transformer-based attention (SWAtten) modules by using channel squeezing. Experimental results demonstrate our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art rate-distortion performances on three different resolution datasets (i.e., Kodak, Tecnick, CLIC Professional Validation) compared to existing LIC methods. The code is at https://github.com/jmliu206/LIC_TCM.
abstract_zh: 与经典图像压缩标准相比，学习图像压缩（LIC）方法已经展现出有希望的进步和卓越的率失真性能。现有的LIC方法大多数是基于卷积神经网络（CNN）或基于Transformer，它们具有不同的优点。利用两者的优势是一个值得探讨的点，它有两个挑战：1）如何有效地融合这两种方法？ 2）如何以合适的复杂度实现更高的性能？在本文中，我们提出了一种复杂度可控的高效并行 Transformer-CNN 混合（TCM）模块，将 CNN 的局部建模能力和 Transformer 的非局部建模能力结合起来，以改进图像压缩模型的整体架构。此外，受熵估计模型和注意力模块最新进展的启发，我们通过使用通道压缩，提出了一种具有参数高效的基于 swin-transformer 的注意力（SWAtten）模块的通道熵模型。实验结果表明，与现有的 LIC 方法相比，我们提出的方法在三个不同分辨率数据集（即 Kodak、Tecnick、CLIC Professional Validation）上实现了最先进的率失真性能。代码位于 https://github.com/jmliu206/LIC_TCM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合Transformer和CNN优势的混合架构，用于提升图像压缩的率失真性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN或Transformer的图像压缩方法各有优劣，如何有效融合两者并控制复杂度是关键挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种可控制复杂度的并行Transformer-CNN混合块（TCM），结合CNN的局部建模能力和Transformer的非局部建模能力，并引入通道级熵模型与参数高效的SWAtten模块。
AI.result: 在Kodak、Tecnick和CLIC三个数据集上实现了优于现有方法的率失真性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效融合了CNN与Transformer的优势，在保持复杂度的同时提升了压缩性能，为图像压缩研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Xiaohui Guo
title: A novel Multi to Single Module for small object detection
title_zh: 一种用于小物体检测的新型多单模块
abstract: Small object detection presents a significant challenge in computer vision and object detection. The performance of small object detectors is often compromised by a lack of pixels and less significant features. This issue stems from information misalignment caused by variations in feature scale and information loss during feature processing. In response to this challenge, this paper proposes a novel the Multi to Single Module (M2S), which enhances a specific layer through improving feature extraction and refining features. Specifically, M2S includes the proposed Cross-scale Aggregation Module (CAM) and explored Dual Relationship Module (DRM) to improve information extraction capabilities and feature refinement effects. Moreover, this paper enhances the accuracy of small object detection by utilizing M2S to generate an additional detection head. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on two datasets, VisDrone2021-DET and SeaDronesSeeV2. The experimental results demonstrate its improved performance compared with existing methods. Compared to the baseline model (YOLOv5s), M2S improves the accuracy by about 1.1\% on the VisDrone2021-DET testing dataset and 15.68\% on the SeaDronesSeeV2 validation set.
summary: Small object detection presents a significant challenge in computer vision and object detection. The performance of small object detectors is often compromised by a lack of pixels and less significant features. This issue stems from information misalignment caused by variations in feature scale and information loss during feature processing. In response to this challenge, this paper proposes a novel the Multi to Single Module (M2S), which enhances a specific layer through improving feature extraction and refining features. Specifically, M2S includes the proposed Cross-scale Aggregation Module (CAM) and explored Dual Relationship Module (DRM) to improve information extraction capabilities and feature refinement effects. Moreover, this paper enhances the accuracy of small object detection by utilizing M2S to generate an additional detection head. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on two datasets, VisDrone2021-DET and SeaDronesSeeV2. The experimental results demonstrate its improved performance compared with existing methods. Compared to the baseline model (YOLOv5s), M2S improves the accuracy by about 1.1\% on the VisDrone2021-DET testing dataset and 15.68\% on the SeaDronesSeeV2 validation set.
abstract_zh: 小物体检测对计算机视觉和物体检测提出了重大挑战。小物体探测器的性能通常会因缺乏像素和不太重要的特征而受到影响。这个问题源于特征尺度变化和特征处理过程中信息丢失导致的信息错位。针对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的多到单模块（M2S），它通过改进特征提取和细化特征来增强特定层。具体来说，M2S包括提出的跨尺度聚合模块（CAM）和探索的双重关系模块（DRM），以提高信息提取能力和特征细化效果。此外，本文利用M2S生成额外的检测头，提高了小物体检测的准确性。该方法的有效性在两个数据集 VisDrone2021-DET 和 SeaDronesSeeV2 上进行了评估。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，其性能有所提高。与基线模型（YOLOv5s）相比，M2S 在 VisDrone2021-DET 测试数据集上的准确率提高了约 1.1%，在 SeaDronesSeeV2 验证集上的准确率提高了 15.68%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型多到单模块（M2S），用于提升小目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测因像素不足和特征不显著导致信息对齐困难与特征丢失，现有方法难以有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计包含跨尺度聚合模块（CAM）和双关系模块（DRM）的M2S模块，通过增强特征提取与精炼能力，并增加检测头以提升检测精度。
AI.result: 在VisDrone2021-DET和SeaDronesSeeV2数据集上，M2S相比YOLOv5s基线模型分别提升1.1%和15.68%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: M2S模块有效解决了小目标检测中的信息丢失问题，验证了其在提升检测精度方面的优越性。

search_text: A novel Multi to Single Module for small object detection 一种用于小物体检测的新型多单模块 Small object detection presents a significant challenge in computer vision and object detection. The performance of small object detectors is often compromised by a lack of pixels and less significant features. This issue stems from information misalignment caused by variations in feature scale and information loss during feature processing. In response to this challenge, this paper proposes a novel the Multi to Single Module (M2S), which enhances a specific layer through improving feature extraction and refining features. Specifically, M2S includes the proposed Cross-scale Aggregation Module (CAM) and explored Dual Relationship Module (DRM) to improve information extraction capabilities and feature refinement effects. Moreover, this paper enhances the accuracy of small object detection by utilizing M2S to generate an additional detection head. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated on two datasets, VisDrone2021-DET and SeaDronesSeeV2. The experimental results demonstrate its improved performance compared with existing methods. Compared to the baseline model (YOLOv5s), M2S improves the accuracy by about 1.1\% on the VisDrone2021-DET testing dataset and 15.68\% on the SeaDronesSeeV2 validation set. 小物体检测对计算机视觉和物体检测提出了重大挑战。小物体探测器的性能通常会因缺乏像素和不太重要的特征而受到影响。这个问题源于特征尺度变化和特征处理过程中信息丢失导致的信息错位。针对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的多到单模块（M2S），它通过改进特征提取和细化特征来增强特定层。具体来说，M2S包括提出的跨尺度聚合模块（CAM）和探索的双重关系模块（DRM），以提高信息提取能力和特征细化效果。此外，本文利用M2S生成额外的检测头，提高了小物体检测的准确性。该方法的有效性在两个数据集 VisDrone2021-DET 和 SeaDronesSeeV2 上进行了评估。实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，其性能有所提高。与基线模型（YOLOv5s）相比，M2S 在 VisDrone2021-DET 测试数据集上的准确率提高了约 1.1%，在 SeaDronesSeeV2 验证集上的准确率提高了 15.68%。 本文提出一种新型多到单模块（M2S），用于提升小目标检测的性能。 Xiaohui Guo cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Donggyun Kim,Jinwoo Kim,Seongwoong Cho,Chong Luo,Seunghoon Hong
title: Universal Few-shot Learning of Dense Prediction Tasks with Visual Token Matching
title_zh: 具有视觉标记匹配的密集预测任务的通用小样本学习
abstract: Dense prediction tasks are a fundamental class of problems in computer vision. As supervised methods suffer from high pixel-wise labeling cost, a few-shot learning solution that can learn any dense task from a few labeled images is desired. Yet, current few-shot learning methods target a restricted set of tasks such as semantic segmentation, presumably due to challenges in designing a general and unified model that is able to flexibly and efficiently adapt to arbitrary tasks of unseen semantics. We propose Visual Token Matching (VTM), a universal few-shot learner for arbitrary dense prediction tasks. It employs non-parametric matching on patch-level embedded tokens of images and labels that encapsulates all tasks. Also, VTM flexibly adapts to any task with a tiny amount of task-specific parameters that modulate the matching algorithm. We implement VTM as a powerful hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture involving ViT backbones where token matching is performed at multiple feature hierarchies. We experiment VTM on a challenging variant of Taskonomy dataset and observe that it robustly few-shot learns various unseen dense prediction tasks. Surprisingly, it is competitive with fully supervised baselines using only 10 labeled examples of novel tasks (0.004% of full supervision) and sometimes outperforms using 0.1% of full supervision. Codes are available at https://github.com/GitGyun/visual_token_matching.
summary: Dense prediction tasks are a fundamental class of problems in computer vision. As supervised methods suffer from high pixel-wise labeling cost, a few-shot learning solution that can learn any dense task from a few labeled images is desired. Yet, current few-shot learning methods target a restricted set of tasks such as semantic segmentation, presumably due to challenges in designing a general and unified model that is able to flexibly and efficiently adapt to arbitrary tasks of unseen semantics. We propose Visual Token Matching (VTM), a universal few-shot learner for arbitrary dense prediction tasks. It employs non-parametric matching on patch-level embedded tokens of images and labels that encapsulates all tasks. Also, VTM flexibly adapts to any task with a tiny amount of task-specific parameters that modulate the matching algorithm. We implement VTM as a powerful hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture involving ViT backbones where token matching is performed at multiple feature hierarchies. We experiment VTM on a challenging variant of Taskonomy dataset and observe that it robustly few-shot learns various unseen dense prediction tasks. Surprisingly, it is competitive with fully supervised baselines using only 10 labeled examples of novel tasks (0.004% of full supervision) and sometimes outperforms using 0.1% of full supervision. Codes are available at https://github.com/GitGyun/visual_token_matching.
abstract_zh: 密集预测任务是计算机视觉中的一类基本问题。由于监督方法面临着较高的像素级标记成本，因此需要一种能够从少量标记图像中学习任何密集任务的少量学习解决方案。然而，当前的小样本学习方法针对的是一组有限的任务，例如语义分割，这可能是由于设计能够灵活有效地适应未见语义的任意任务的通用且统一的模型所面临的挑战。我们提出了视觉令牌匹配（VTM），这是一种用于任意密集预测任务的通用少样本学习器。它对封装所有任务的图像和标签的补丁级嵌入标记采用非参数匹配。此外，VTM 可以通过少量特定于任务的参数来调节匹配算法，从而灵活地适应任何任务。我们将 VTM 实现为一个强大的分层编码器-解码器架构，涉及 ViT 主干，其中在多个特征层次结构中执行令牌匹配。我们在 Taskonomy 数据集的一个具有挑战性的变体上进行了 VTM 实验，并观察到它可以通过少量样本稳健地学习各种看不见的密集预测任务。令人惊讶的是，它与仅使用 10 个带标签的新任务示例（完全监督的 0.004%）的完全监督基线相比具有竞争力，有时甚至优于使用 0.1% 完全监督的基线。代码可在 https://github.com/GitGyun/visual_token_matching 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的小样本学习方法，用于解决任意密集预测任务，通过视觉标记匹配实现跨任务的灵活适应。
AI.motivation: 密集预测任务的监督学习方法因像素级标注成本高而受限，现有小样本方法仅适用于特定任务，缺乏统一模型来处理未见过的语义任务。
AI.method: 提出视觉标记匹配（VTM）方法，通过非参数化匹配图像和标签的嵌入标记，在多级特征层次上实现任务自适应，结合ViT主干网络和少量任务特定参数。
AI.result: 在Taskonomy数据集的挑战性变体上，VTM仅需10个标注样本（0.004%监督数据）即可稳健学习多种未见过的密集预测任务，部分情况下优于0.1%监督数据的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: VTM为密集预测任务提供了高效灵活的小样本学习框架，在极少量标注数据下实现了接近甚至超越全监督方法的性能。

authors_text: Weixia Zhang,Guangtao Zhai,Ying Wei,Xiaokang Yang,Kede Ma
title: Blind Image Quality Assessment via Vision-Language Correspondence: A Multitask Learning Perspective
title_zh: 通过视觉语言对应进行盲图像质量评估：多任务学习视角
abstract: We aim at advancing blind image quality assessment (BIQA), which predicts the human perception of image quality without any reference information. We develop a general and automated multitask learning scheme for BIQA to exploit auxiliary knowledge from other tasks, in a way that the model parameter sharing and the loss weighting are determined automatically. Specifically, we first describe all candidate label combinations (from multiple tasks) using a textual template, and compute the joint probability from the cosine similarities of the visual-textual embeddings. Predictions of each task can be inferred from the joint distribution, and optimized by carefully designed loss functions. Through comprehensive experiments on learning three tasks - BIQA, scene classification, and distortion type identification, we verify that the proposed BIQA method 1) benefits from the scene classification and distortion type identification tasks and outperforms the state-of-the-art on multiple IQA datasets, 2) is more robust in the group maximum differentiation competition, and 3) realigns the quality annotations from different IQA datasets more effectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/zwx8981/LIQE.
summary: We aim at advancing blind image quality assessment (BIQA), which predicts the human perception of image quality without any reference information. We develop a general and automated multitask learning scheme for BIQA to exploit auxiliary knowledge from other tasks, in a way that the model parameter sharing and the loss weighting are determined automatically. Specifically, we first describe all candidate label combinations (from multiple tasks) using a textual template, and compute the joint probability from the cosine similarities of the visual-textual embeddings. Predictions of each task can be inferred from the joint distribution, and optimized by carefully designed loss functions. Through comprehensive experiments on learning three tasks - BIQA, scene classification, and distortion type identification, we verify that the proposed BIQA method 1) benefits from the scene classification and distortion type identification tasks and outperforms the state-of-the-art on multiple IQA datasets, 2) is more robust in the group maximum differentiation competition, and 3) realigns the quality annotations from different IQA datasets more effectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/zwx8981/LIQE.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是推进盲图像质量评估（BIQA），它可以在没有任何参考信息的情况下预测人类对图像质量的感知。我们为 BIQA 开发了一种通用且自动化的多任务学习方案，以利用其他任务的辅助知识，从而自动确定模型参数共享和损失权重。具体来说，我们首先使用文本模板描述所有候选标签组合（来自多个任务），并根据视觉文本嵌入的余弦相似度计算联合概率。每个任务的预测可以从联合分布中推断出来，并通过精心设计的损失函数进行优化。通过学习 BIQA、场景分类和失真类型识别这三个任务的综合实验，我们验证了所提出的 BIQA 方法 1）受益于场景分类和失真类型识别任务，并且在多个 IQA 数据集上优于最新技术，2）在组最大分化竞争中更加鲁棒，3）更有效地重新调整来自不同 IQA 数据集的质量注释。源代码可在 https://github.com/zwx8981/LIQE 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉-语言对应关系的盲图像质量评估方法，通过多任务学习框架提升BIQA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统BIQA方法依赖单一任务学习，难以有效利用辅助任务知识。本文旨在通过多任务学习自动整合场景分类和失真类型识别任务的辅助信息，提升BIQA的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计文本模板描述多任务标签组合，通过视觉-文本嵌入的余弦相似度计算联合概率分布，利用参数共享和动态损失权重优化多任务预测。
AI.result: 在多个IQA数据集上优于现有方法，且在组最大分化竞赛中表现更稳健，能有效对齐不同数据集的质量标注。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习框架通过自动参数共享和损失权重分配，显著提升了盲图像质量评估的性能和跨数据集适应性。

motivation: 传统BIQA方法依赖单一任务学习，难以有效利用辅助任务知识。本文旨在通过多任务学习自动整合场景分类和失真类型识别任务的辅助信息，提升BIQA的准确性和鲁棒性。
method: 设计文本模板描述多任务标签组合，通过视觉-文本嵌入的余弦相似度计算联合概率分布，利用参数共享和动态损失权重优化多任务预测。
result: 在多个IQA数据集上优于现有方法，且在组最大分化竞赛中表现更稳健，能有效对齐不同数据集的质量标注。
conclusion: 多任务学习框架通过自动参数共享和损失权重分配，显著提升了盲图像质量评估的性能和跨数据集适应性。
search_text: Blind Image Quality Assessment via Vision-Language Correspondence: A Multitask Learning Perspective 通过视觉语言对应进行盲图像质量评估：多任务学习视角 We aim at advancing blind image quality assessment (BIQA), which predicts the human perception of image quality without any reference information. We develop a general and automated multitask learning scheme for BIQA to exploit auxiliary knowledge from other tasks, in a way that the model parameter sharing and the loss weighting are determined automatically. Specifically, we first describe all candidate label combinations (from multiple tasks) using a textual template, and compute the joint probability from the cosine similarities of the visual-textual embeddings. Predictions of each task can be inferred from the joint distribution, and optimized by carefully designed loss functions. Through comprehensive experiments on learning three tasks - BIQA, scene classification, and distortion type identification, we verify that the proposed BIQA method 1) benefits from the scene classification and distortion type identification tasks and outperforms the state-of-the-art on multiple IQA datasets, 2) is more robust in the group maximum differentiation competition, and 3) realigns the quality annotations from different IQA datasets more effectively. The source code is available at https://github.com/zwx8981/LIQE. 我们的目标是推进盲图像质量评估（BIQA），它可以在没有任何参考信息的情况下预测人类对图像质量的感知。我们为 BIQA 开发了一种通用且自动化的多任务学习方案，以利用其他任务的辅助知识，从而自动确定模型参数共享和损失权重。具体来说，我们首先使用文本模板描述所有候选标签组合（来自多个任务），并根据视觉文本嵌入的余弦相似度计算联合概率。每个任务的预测可以从联合分布中推断出来，并通过精心设计的损失函数进行优化。通过学习 BIQA、场景分类和失真类型识别这三个任务的综合实验，我们验证了所提出的 BIQA 方法 1）受益于场景分类和失真类型识别任务，并且在多个 IQA 数据集上优于最新技术，2）在组最大分化竞争中更加鲁棒，3）更有效地重新调整来自不同 IQA 数据集的质量注释。源代码可在 https://github.com/zwx8981/LIQE 获取。 该论文提出了一种基于视觉-语言对应关系的盲图像质量评估方法，通过多任务学习框架提升BIQA性能。 Weixia Zhang,Guangtao Zhai,Ying Wei,Xiaokang Yang,Kede Ma cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xinkun Ai,Wei Zheng,Ming Zhang,Dalong Chen,Chengshuo Shen,Bihao Guo,Bingjia Xiao,Yu Zhong,Nengchao Wang,Zhoujun Yang,Zhipeng Chen,Zhongyong Chen,Yonghua Ding,Yuan Pan,J-TEXT team
title: Disruption Precursor Onset Time Study Based on Semi-supervised Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 基于半监督异常检测的中断前兆发生时间研究
abstract: The full understanding of plasma disruption in tokamaks is currently lacking, and data-driven methods are extensively used for disruption prediction. However, most existing data-driven disruption predictors employ supervised learning techniques, which require labeled training data. The manual labeling of disruption precursors is a tedious and challenging task, as some precursors are difficult to accurately identify, limiting the potential of machine learning models. To address this issue, commonly used labeling methods assume that the precursor onset occurs at a fixed time before the disruption, which may not be consistent for different types of disruptions or even the same type of disruption, due to the different speeds at which plasma instabilities escalate. This leads to mislabeled samples and suboptimal performance of the supervised learning predictor. In this paper, we present a disruption prediction method based on anomaly detection that overcomes the drawbacks of unbalanced positive and negative data samples and inaccurately labeled disruption precursor samples. We demonstrate the effectiveness and reliability of anomaly detection predictors based on different algorithms on J-TEXT and EAST to evaluate the reliability of the precursor onset time inferred by the anomaly detection predictor. The precursor onset times inferred by these predictors reveal that the labeling methods have room for improvement as the onset times of different shots are not necessarily the same. Finally, we optimize precursor labeling using the onset times inferred by the anomaly detection predictor and test the optimized labels on supervised learning disruption predictors. The results on J-TEXT and EAST show that the models trained on the optimized labels outperform those trained on fixed onset time labels.
summary: The full understanding of plasma disruption in tokamaks is currently lacking, and data-driven methods are extensively used for disruption prediction. However, most existing data-driven disruption predictors employ supervised learning techniques, which require labeled training data. The manual labeling of disruption precursors is a tedious and challenging task, as some precursors are difficult to accurately identify, limiting the potential of machine learning models. To address this issue, commonly used labeling methods assume that the precursor onset occurs at a fixed time before the disruption, which may not be consistent for different types of disruptions or even the same type of disruption, due to the different speeds at which plasma instabilities escalate. This leads to mislabeled samples and suboptimal performance of the supervised learning predictor. In this paper, we present a disruption prediction method based on anomaly detection that overcomes the drawbacks of unbalanced positive and negative data samples and inaccurately labeled disruption precursor samples. We demonstrate the effectiveness and reliability of anomaly detection predictors based on different algorithms on J-TEXT and EAST to evaluate the reliability of the precursor onset time inferred by the anomaly detection predictor. The precursor onset times inferred by these predictors reveal that the labeling methods have room for improvement as the onset times of different shots are not necessarily the same. Finally, we optimize precursor labeling using the onset times inferred by the anomaly detection predictor and test the optimized labels on supervised learning disruption predictors. The results on J-TEXT and EAST show that the models trained on the optimized labels outperform those trained on fixed onset time labels.
abstract_zh: 目前缺乏对托卡马克等离子体破坏的全面了解，数据驱动的方法被广泛用于破坏预测。然而，大多数现有的数据驱动的中断预测器都采用监督学习技术，这需要标记的训练数据。手动标记破坏前体是一项繁琐且具有挑战性的任务，因为一些前体很难准确识别，限制了机器学习模型的潜力。为了解决这个问题，常用的标记方法假设前体发生在破坏之前的固定时间，由于血浆不稳定性升级的速度不同，这对于不同类型的破坏甚至相同类型的破坏可能不一致。这会导致样本标记错误以及监督学习预测器的性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于异常检测的中断预测方法，克服了正负数据样本不平衡以及中断前兆样本标记不准确的缺点。我们在 J-TEXT 和 EAST 上证明了基于不同算法的异常检测预测器的有效性和可靠性，以评估异常检测预测器推断的前兆出现时间的可靠性。这些预测变量推断出的前兆发病时间表明，标记方法还有改进的空间，因为不同镜头的发病时间不一定相同。最后，我们使用异常检测预测器推断的起始时间来优化前体标记，并在监督学习中断预测器上测试优化的标签。 J-TEXT 和 EAST 的结果表明，在优化标签上训练的模型优于在固定起始时间标签上训练的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异常检测的半监督方法，用于改进托卡马克装置中等离子体破裂前兆起始时间的标注，以提升破裂预测模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法依赖人工标注的固定前兆起始时间，但不同破裂类型的演化速度差异导致标注不准确，限制了模型效果。
AI.method: 采用异常检测算法推断前兆起始时间，优化标注数据，并在J-TEXT和EAST装置上验证改进标注对监督学习模型的提升效果。
AI.result: 优化标注后的模型在J-TEXT和EAST数据集上均优于传统固定时间标注方法，验证了异常检测标注的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 异常检测方法能更准确推断前兆起始时间，改进标注策略可显著提升监督学习破裂预测模型的可靠性。

authors_text: Haoyu Chen,Zhihua Wang,Yang Yang,Qilin Sun,Kede Ma
title: Learning a Deep Color Difference Metric for Photographic Images
title_zh: 学习摄影图像的深度色差度量
abstract: Most well-established and widely used color difference (CD) metrics are handcrafted and subject-calibrated against uniformly colored patches, which do not generalize well to photographic images characterized by natural scene complexities. Constructing CD formulae for photographic images is still an active research topic in imaging/illumination, vision science, and color science communities. In this paper, we aim to learn a deep CD metric for photographic images with four desirable properties. First, it well aligns with the observations in vision science that color and form are linked inextricably in visual cortical processing. Second, it is a proper metric in the mathematical sense. Third, it computes accurate CDs between photographic images, differing mainly in color appearances. Fourth, it is robust to mild geometric distortions (e.g., translation or due to parallax), which are often present in photographic images of the same scene captured by different digital cameras. We show that all these properties can be satisfied at once by learning a multi-scale autoregressive normalizing flow for feature transform, followed by the Euclidean distance which is linearly proportional to the human perceptual CD. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on the large-scale SPCD dataset demonstrate the promise of the learned CD metric.
summary: Most well-established and widely used color difference (CD) metrics are handcrafted and subject-calibrated against uniformly colored patches, which do not generalize well to photographic images characterized by natural scene complexities. Constructing CD formulae for photographic images is still an active research topic in imaging/illumination, vision science, and color science communities. In this paper, we aim to learn a deep CD metric for photographic images with four desirable properties. First, it well aligns with the observations in vision science that color and form are linked inextricably in visual cortical processing. Second, it is a proper metric in the mathematical sense. Third, it computes accurate CDs between photographic images, differing mainly in color appearances. Fourth, it is robust to mild geometric distortions (e.g., translation or due to parallax), which are often present in photographic images of the same scene captured by different digital cameras. We show that all these properties can be satisfied at once by learning a multi-scale autoregressive normalizing flow for feature transform, followed by the Euclidean distance which is linearly proportional to the human perceptual CD. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on the large-scale SPCD dataset demonstrate the promise of the learned CD metric.
abstract_zh: 大多数成熟且广泛使用的色差（CD）指标都是手工制作的，并针对均匀的色块进行了主题校准，这不能很好地推广到以自然场景复杂性为特征的摄影图像。构建摄影图像的 CD 公式仍然是成像/照明、视觉科学和色彩科学界的一个活跃的研究课题。在本文中，我们的目标是学习具有四个所需属性的摄影图像的深度 CD 度量。首先，它与视觉科学的观察结果非常一致，即颜色和形状在视觉皮层处理中密不可分。其次，它是数学意义上的适当度量。第三，它计算摄影图像之间的准确 CD，主要区别在于颜色外观。第四，它对轻微的几何扭曲（例如，平移或由于视差）具有鲁棒性，这些扭曲通常出现在不同数码相机拍摄的同一场景的摄影图像中。我们证明，通过学习用于特征变换的多尺度自回归归一化流，然后学习与人类感知CD成线性比例的欧几里德距离，可以立即满足所有这些属性。对大规模 SPCD 数据集的定量和定性实验证明了学习的 CD 指标的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习方法，用于学习适用于摄影图像的颜色差异度量，以解决传统手工设计方法在复杂自然场景中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有颜色差异度量方法基于均匀色块校准，难以适应摄影图像中复杂的自然场景，需开发更鲁棒且符合人类视觉感知的度量方式。
AI.method: 通过学习多尺度自回归归一化流进行特征转换，结合欧几里得距离构建与人类感知颜色差异线性相关的深度度量模型。
AI.result: 在SPCD数据集上的实验表明，所学度量在准确性和几何失真鲁棒性方面优于传统方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法同时满足数学正确性、视觉感知一致性及对几何失真的鲁棒性，展示了深度学习在颜色差异度量领域的潜力。

search_text: Learning a Deep Color Difference Metric for Photographic Images 学习摄影图像的深度色差度量 Most well-established and widely used color difference (CD) metrics are handcrafted and subject-calibrated against uniformly colored patches, which do not generalize well to photographic images characterized by natural scene complexities. Constructing CD formulae for photographic images is still an active research topic in imaging/illumination, vision science, and color science communities. In this paper, we aim to learn a deep CD metric for photographic images with four desirable properties. First, it well aligns with the observations in vision science that color and form are linked inextricably in visual cortical processing. Second, it is a proper metric in the mathematical sense. Third, it computes accurate CDs between photographic images, differing mainly in color appearances. Fourth, it is robust to mild geometric distortions (e.g., translation or due to parallax), which are often present in photographic images of the same scene captured by different digital cameras. We show that all these properties can be satisfied at once by learning a multi-scale autoregressive normalizing flow for feature transform, followed by the Euclidean distance which is linearly proportional to the human perceptual CD. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on the large-scale SPCD dataset demonstrate the promise of the learned CD metric. 大多数成熟且广泛使用的色差（CD）指标都是手工制作的，并针对均匀的色块进行了主题校准，这不能很好地推广到以自然场景复杂性为特征的摄影图像。构建摄影图像的 CD 公式仍然是成像/照明、视觉科学和色彩科学界的一个活跃的研究课题。在本文中，我们的目标是学习具有四个所需属性的摄影图像的深度 CD 度量。首先，它与视觉科学的观察结果非常一致，即颜色和形状在视觉皮层处理中密不可分。其次，它是数学意义上的适当度量。第三，它计算摄影图像之间的准确 CD，主要区别在于颜色外观。第四，它对轻微的几何扭曲（例如，平移或由于视差）具有鲁棒性，这些扭曲通常出现在不同数码相机拍摄的同一场景的摄影图像中。我们证明，通过学习用于特征变换的多尺度自回归归一化流，然后学习与人类感知CD成线性比例的欧几里德距离，可以立即满足所有这些属性。对大规模 SPCD 数据集的定量和定性实验证明了学习的 CD 指标的前景。 本文提出一种深度学习方法，用于学习适用于摄影图像的颜色差异度量，以解决传统手工设计方法在复杂自然场景中的不足。 Haoyu Chen,Zhihua Wang,Yang Yang,Qilin Sun,Kede Ma cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Haeyong Kang,Jaehong Yoon,Sultan Rizky Madjid,Sung Ju Hwang,Chang D. Yoo
title: Forget-free Continual Learning with Soft-Winning SubNetworks
title_zh: 通过软致胜子网络进行无忘记的持续学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07529
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07529
abstract: Inspired by Regularized Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (RLTH), which states that competitive smooth (non-binary) subnetworks exist within a dense network in continual learning tasks, we investigate two proposed architecture-based continual learning methods which sequentially learn and select adaptive binary- (WSN) and non-binary Soft-Subnetworks (SoftNet) for each task. WSN and SoftNet jointly learn the regularized model weights and task-adaptive non-binary masks of subnetworks associated with each task whilst attempting to select a small set of weights to be activated (winning ticket) by reusing weights of the prior subnetworks. Our proposed WSN and SoftNet are inherently immune to catastrophic forgetting as each selected subnetwork model does not infringe upon other subnetworks in Task Incremental Learning (TIL). In TIL, binary masks spawned per winning ticket are encoded into one N-bit binary digit mask, then compressed using Huffman coding for a sub-linear increase in network capacity to the number of tasks. Surprisingly, in the inference step, SoftNet generated by injecting small noises to the backgrounds of acquired WSN (holding the foregrounds of WSN) provides excellent forward transfer power for future tasks in TIL. SoftNet shows its effectiveness over WSN in regularizing parameters to tackle the overfitting, to a few examples in Few-shot Class Incremental Learning (FSCIL).

WSN and SoftNet jointly learn the regularized model weights and task-adaptive non-binary masks of subnetworks associated with each task whilst attempting to select a small set of weights to be activated (winning ticket) by reusing weights of the prior subnetworks. Our proposed WSN and SoftNet are inherently immune to catastrophic forgetting as each selected subnetwork model does not infringe upon other subnetworks in Task Incremental Learning (TIL). In TIL, binary masks spawned per winning ticket are encoded into one N-bit binary digit mask, then compressed using Huffman coding for a sub-linear increase in network capacity to the number of tasks. Surprisingly, in the inference step, SoftNet generated by injecting small noises to the backgrounds of acquired WSN (holding the foregrounds of WSN) provides excellent forward transfer power for future tasks in TIL. SoftNet shows its effectiveness over WSN in regularizing parameters to tackle the overfitting, to a few examples in Few-shot Class Incremental Learning (FSCIL).
abstract_zh: 受正则化彩票假说（RLTH）的启发，该假设指出，在连续学习任务中，密集网络中存在竞争性平滑（非二进制）子网络，我们研究了两种提出的基于架构的连续学习方法，这些方法为每个任务顺序学习和选择自适应二进制（WSN）和非二进制软子网络（SoftNet）。 WSN 和 SoftNet 共同学习与每个任务相关的子网络的正则化模型权重和任务自适应非二进制掩码，同时尝试通过重用先前子网络的权重来选择要激活的一小组权重（中奖彩票）。我们提出的 WSN 和 SoftNet 本质上不受灾难性遗忘的影响，因为每个选定的子网络模型都不会侵犯任务增量学习（TIL）中的其他子网络。在 TIL 中，每张中奖彩票生成的二进制掩码被编码为一个 N 位二进制数字掩码，然后使用霍夫曼编码进行压缩，以实现网络容量与任务数量的次线性增加。令人惊讶的是，在推理步骤中，通过向获取的 WSN 背景（占据 WSN 的前景）注入小噪声而生成的 SoftNet 为 TIL 中的未来任务提供了出色的前向传输能力。以少样本类增量学习 (FSCIL) 中的几个示例为例，SoftNet 在规范参数以解决过度拟合方面比 WSN 更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子网络的连续学习方法，通过二进制（WSN）和非二进制（SoftNet）子网络实现无遗忘的持续学习。
AI.motivation: 传统连续学习方法在增量任务中易出现灾难性遗忘，而正则化彩票假设（RLTH）表明密集网络中存在竞争性平滑子网络，启发了本文对子网络结构的探索。
AI.method: 提出WSN和SoftNet两种方法，通过正则化学习任务自适应的二进制/非二进制子网络掩码，复用前序子网络权重选择激活权重（获胜彩票），并采用霍夫曼编码压缩掩码以提升容量。
AI.result: WSN和SoftNet在任务增量学习（TIL）中有效避免灾难性遗忘，SoftNet通过注入噪声的背景实现前向知识迁移，在少样本类别增量学习（FSCIL）中优于WSN。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过子网络结构设计实现无遗忘连续学习，SoftNet在参数正则化和少样本场景中表现更优，为持续学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nicola Franco,Daniel Korth,Jeanette Miriam Lorenz,Karsten Roscher,Stephan Guennemann
title: Diffusion Denoised Smoothing for Certified and Adversarial Robust Out-Of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于经过认证和对抗的鲁棒分布外检测的扩散去噪平滑
abstract: As the use of machine learning continues to expand, the importance of ensuring its safety cannot be overstated. A key concern in this regard is the ability to identify whether a given sample is from the training distribution, or is an "Out-Of-Distribution" (OOD) sample. In addition, adversaries can manipulate OOD samples in ways that lead a classifier to make a confident prediction. In this study, we present a novel approach for certifying the robustness of OOD detection within a $\ell_2$-norm around the input, regardless of network architecture and without the need for specific components or additional training. Further, we improve current techniques for detecting adversarial attacks on OOD samples, while providing high levels of certified and adversarial robustness on in-distribution samples. The average of all OOD detection metrics on CIFAR10/100 shows an increase of $\sim 13 \% / 5\%$ relative to previous approaches.
summary: As the use of machine learning continues to expand, the importance of ensuring its safety cannot be overstated. A key concern in this regard is the ability to identify whether a given sample is from the training distribution, or is an "Out-Of-Distribution" (OOD) sample. In addition, adversaries can manipulate OOD samples in ways that lead a classifier to make a confident prediction. In this study, we present a novel approach for certifying the robustness of OOD detection within a $\ell_2$-norm around the input, regardless of network architecture and without the need for specific components or additional training. Further, we improve current techniques for detecting adversarial attacks on OOD samples, while providing high levels of certified and adversarial robustness on in-distribution samples. The average of all OOD detection metrics on CIFAR10/100 shows an increase of $\sim 13 \% / 5\%$ relative to previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习的使用不断扩大，确保其安全的重要性怎么强调也不为过。这方面的一个关键问题是识别给定样本是来自训练分布还是“分布外”(OOD) 样本的能力。此外，攻击者可以通过引导分类器做出可信预测的方式操纵 OOD 样本。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于验证 OOD 检测在输入周围的 $\ell_2$-范数内的鲁棒性，无论网络架构如何，并且不需要特定组件或额外的训练。此外，我们改进了当前检测 OOD 样本对抗性攻击的技术，同时为分发样本提供高水平的认证和对抗性鲁棒性。 CIFAR10/100 上所有 OOD 检测指标的平均值显示，相对于之前的方法，增加了 $\sim 13 \% / 5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散去噪平滑的新方法，用于增强对分布外样本（OOD）的认证和对抗鲁棒检测。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习应用的扩展，确保模型安全性至关重要。现有方法难以有效识别对抗性攻击下的OOD样本，且缺乏对网络结构的普适性及额外训练需求。
AI.method: 通过扩散去噪平滑技术，在输入的ℓ2范数范围内认证OOD检测鲁棒性，无需特定网络组件或额外训练，同时提升对对抗攻击的检测能力。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100数据集上，所有OOD检测指标平均提升约13%/5%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了OOD检测的认证与对抗鲁棒性，且具有结构普适性，实验结果验证了其有效性。

In this study, we present a novel approach for certifying the robustness of OOD detection within a $\ell_2$-norm around the input, regardless of network architecture and without the need for specific components or additional training. Further, we improve current techniques for detecting adversarial attacks on OOD samples, while providing high levels of certified and adversarial robustness on in-distribution samples. The average of all OOD detection metrics on CIFAR10/100 shows an increase of $\sim 13 \% / 5\%$ relative to previous approaches. 随着机器学习的使用不断扩大，确保其安全的重要性怎么强调也不为过。这方面的一个关键问题是识别给定样本是来自训练分布还是“分布外”(OOD) 样本的能力。此外，攻击者可以通过引导分类器做出可信预测的方式操纵 OOD 样本。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于验证 OOD 检测在输入周围的 $\ell_2$-范数内的鲁棒性，无论网络架构如何，并且不需要特定组件或额外的训练。此外，我们改进了当前检测 OOD 样本对抗性攻击的技术，同时为分发样本提供高水平的认证和对抗性鲁棒性。 CIFAR10/100 上所有 OOD 检测指标的平均值显示，相对于之前的方法，增加了 $\sim 13 \% / 5\%$。 本文提出一种基于扩散去噪平滑的新方法，用于增强对分布外样本（OOD）的认证和对抗鲁棒检测。 Nicola Franco,Daniel Korth,Jeanette Miriam Lorenz,Karsten Roscher,Stephan Guennemann cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Chang Liu,Weiming Zhang,Xiangru Lin,Wei Zhang,Xiao Tan,Junyu Han,Xiaomao Li,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: Ambiguity-Resistant Semi-Supervised Learning for Dense Object Detection
title_zh: 用于密集目标检测的抗歧义半监督学习
abstract: With basic Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) techniques, one-stage detectors generally obtain limited promotions compared with two-stage clusters. We experimentally find that the root lies in two kinds of ambiguities: (1) Selection ambiguity that selected pseudo labels are less accurate, since classification scores cannot properly represent the localization quality. (2) Assignment ambiguity that samples are matched with improper labels in pseudo-label assignment, as the strategy is misguided by missed objects and inaccurate pseudo boxes. To tackle these problems, we propose a Ambiguity-Resistant Semi-supervised Learning (ARSL) for one-stage detectors. Specifically, to alleviate the selection ambiguity, Joint-Confidence Estimation (JCE) is proposed to jointly quantifies the classification and localization quality of pseudo labels. As for the assignment ambiguity, Task-Separation Assignment (TSA) is introduced to assign labels based on pixel-level predictions rather than unreliable pseudo boxes. It employs a "divide-and-conquer" strategy and separately exploits positives for the classification and localization task, which is more robust to the assignment ambiguity. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that ARSL effectively mitigates the ambiguities and achieves state-of-the-art SSOD performance on MS COCO and PASCAL VOC. Codes can be found at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection.
summary: With basic Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) techniques, one-stage detectors generally obtain limited promotions compared with two-stage clusters. We experimentally find that the root lies in two kinds of ambiguities: (1) Selection ambiguity that selected pseudo labels are less accurate, since classification scores cannot properly represent the localization quality. (2) Assignment ambiguity that samples are matched with improper labels in pseudo-label assignment, as the strategy is misguided by missed objects and inaccurate pseudo boxes. To tackle these problems, we propose a Ambiguity-Resistant Semi-supervised Learning (ARSL) for one-stage detectors. Specifically, to alleviate the selection ambiguity, Joint-Confidence Estimation (JCE) is proposed to jointly quantifies the classification and localization quality of pseudo labels. As for the assignment ambiguity, Task-Separation Assignment (TSA) is introduced to assign labels based on pixel-level predictions rather than unreliable pseudo boxes. It employs a "divide-and-conquer" strategy and separately exploits positives for the classification and localization task, which is more robust to the assignment ambiguity. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that ARSL effectively mitigates the ambiguities and achieves state-of-the-art SSOD performance on MS COCO and PASCAL VOC. Codes can be found at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection.
abstract_zh: 使用基本的半监督目标检测（SSOD）技术，与两级集群相比，一级检测器通常获得有限的提升。我们通过实验发现，根源在于两种歧义：（1）选择歧义，即选择的伪标签不太准确，因为分类分数无法正确代表定位质量。 （2）分配模糊性，即样本在伪标签分配中与不正确的标签匹配，因为策略被遗漏的对象和不准确的伪框误导。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于单级检测器的抗歧义半监督学习（ARSL）。具体来说，为了减轻选择模糊性，提出联合置信估计（JCE）来联合量化伪标签的分类和定位质量。至于分配模糊性，引入了任务分离分配（TSA）来基于像素级预测而不是不可靠的伪框来分配标签。它采用“分而治之”的策略，分别利用分类和定位任务的正值，这对分配模糊性更加鲁棒。综合实验表明，ARSL 有效地减轻了歧义，并在 MS COCO 和 PASCAL VOC 上实现了最先进的 SSOD 性能。代码可以在 https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种抗模糊半监督学习方法（ARSL），用于解决单阶段密集目标检测中的伪标签选择与分配模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在单阶段检测器上效果有限，主要受限于伪标签选择准确性不足及标签分配策略易受漏检和定位误差影响的双重模糊性问题。
AI.method: 提出联合置信度估计（JCE）量化分类与定位质量，以及任务分离分配（TSA）基于像素级预测分离分类与定位任务，通过分而治之策略提升分配鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MS COCO和PASCAL VOC数据集上达到当时最先进的半监督目标检测性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ARSL通过缓解选择与分配模糊性，显著提升了单阶段检测器的半监督学习效果，为密集目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ming Wang,Xianda Guo,Beibei Lin,Tian Yang,Zheng Zhu,Lincheng Li,Shunli Zhang,Xin Yu
title: DyGait: Exploiting Dynamic Representations for High-performance Gait Recognition
title_zh: DyGait：利用动态表示实现高性能步态识别
abstract: Gait recognition is a biometric technology that recognizes the identity of humans through their walking patterns. Compared with other biometric technologies, gait recognition is more difficult to disguise and can be applied to the condition of long-distance without the cooperation of subjects. Thus, it has unique potential and wide application for crime prevention and social security. At present, most gait recognition methods directly extract features from the video frames to establish representations. However, these architectures learn representations from different features equally but do not pay enough attention to dynamic features, which refers to a representation of dynamic parts of silhouettes over time (e.g. legs). Since dynamic parts of the human body are more informative than other parts (e.g. bags) during walking, in this paper, we propose a novel and high-performance framework named DyGait. This is the first framework on gait recognition that is designed to focus on the extraction of dynamic features. Specifically, to take full advantage of the dynamic information, we propose a Dynamic Augmentation Module (DAM), which can automatically establish spatial-temporal feature representations of the dynamic parts of the human body. The experimental results show that our DyGait network outperforms other state-of-the-art gait recognition methods. It achieves an average Rank-1 accuracy of 71.4% on the GREW dataset, 66.3% on the Gait3D dataset, 98.4% on the CASIA-B dataset and 98.3% on the OU-MVLP dataset.
summary: Gait recognition is a biometric technology that recognizes the identity of humans through their walking patterns. Compared with other biometric technologies, gait recognition is more difficult to disguise and can be applied to the condition of long-distance without the cooperation of subjects. Thus, it has unique potential and wide application for crime prevention and social security. At present, most gait recognition methods directly extract features from the video frames to establish representations. However, these architectures learn representations from different features equally but do not pay enough attention to dynamic features, which refers to a representation of dynamic parts of silhouettes over time (e.g. legs). Since dynamic parts of the human body are more informative than other parts (e.g. bags) during walking, in this paper, we propose a novel and high-performance framework named DyGait. This is the first framework on gait recognition that is designed to focus on the extraction of dynamic features. Specifically, to take full advantage of the dynamic information, we propose a Dynamic Augmentation Module (DAM), which can automatically establish spatial-temporal feature representations of the dynamic parts of the human body. The experimental results show that our DyGait network outperforms other state-of-the-art gait recognition methods. It achieves an average Rank-1 accuracy of 71.4% on the GREW dataset, 66.3% on the Gait3D dataset, 98.4% on the CASIA-B dataset and 98.3% on the OU-MVLP dataset.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是一种生物识别技术，通过步行模式来识别人类的身份。与其他生物识别技术相比，步态识别更难伪装，可以应用于远距离、无需主体配合的情况。因此，它在预防犯罪和社会保障方面具有独特的潜力和广泛的应用。目前，大多数步态识别方法直接从视频帧中提取特征来建立表示。然而，这些架构平等地学习不同特征的表示，但对动态特征没有给予足够的关注，动态特征是指随着时间的推移轮廓的动态部分（例如腿）的表示。由于步行时人体的动态部分比其他部分（例如袋子）提供更多信息，因此在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的高性能框架，名为 DyGait。这是第一个旨在专注于动态特征提取的步态识别框架。具体来说，为了充分利用动态信息，我们提出了动态增强模块（DAM），它可以自动建立人体动态部分的时空特征表示。实验结果表明，我们的 DyGait 网络优于其他最先进的步态识别方法。它在 GREW 数据集上的平均 Rank-1 准确率达到 71.4%，在 Gait3D 数据集上达到 66.3%，在 CASIA-B 数据集上达到 98.4%，在 OU-MVLP 数据集上达到 98.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DyGait的新型框架，通过利用人体行走时动态部位（如腿部）的时空特征，提升步态识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法对视频帧特征的提取缺乏对动态部位（如腿部）的关注，而动态部位在行走过程中比静态部位（如背包）更具信息量。
AI.method: 设计了动态增强模块（DAM），自动提取人体动态部位的时空特征表示，从而更有效地捕捉步态信息。
AI.result: 在GREW、Gait3D、CASIA-B和OU-MVLP数据集上分别达到71.4%、66.3%、98.4%和98.3%的Rank-1准确率，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DyGait通过聚焦动态特征显著提升了步态识别性能，验证了动态信息在步态分析中的关键作用。

authors_text: Williams Rizzi,Chiara Di Francescomarino,Chiara Ghidini,Fabrizio Maria Maggi
title: Explain, Adapt and Retrain: How to improve the accuracy of a PPM classifier through different explanation styles
title_zh: 解释、调整和再训练：如何通过不同的解释风格提高 PPM 分类器的准确性
abstract: Recent papers have introduced a novel approach to explain why a Predictive Process Monitoring (PPM) model for outcome-oriented predictions provides wrong predictions. Moreover, they have shown how to exploit the explanations, obtained using state-of-the art post-hoc explainers, to identify the most common features that induce a predictor to make mistakes in a semi-automated way, and, in turn, to reduce the impact of those features and increase the accuracy of the predictive model. This work starts from the assumption that frequent control flow patterns in event logs may represent important features that characterize, and therefore explain, a certain prediction. Therefore, in this paper, we (i) employ a novel encoding able to leverage DECLARE constraints in Predictive Process Monitoring and compare the effectiveness of this encoding with Predictive Process Monitoring state-of-the art encodings, in particular for the task of outcome-oriented predictions; (ii) introduce a completely automated pipeline for the identification of the most common features inducing a predictor to make mistakes; and (iii) show the effectiveness of the proposed pipeline in increasing the accuracy of the predictive model by validating it on different real-life datasets.

abstract_zh: 最近的论文引入了一种新颖的方法来解释为什么面向结果的预测过程监控（PPM）模型会提供错误的预测。此外，他们还展示了如何利用最先进的事后解释器获得的解释来识别导致预测器以半自动方式犯错的最常见特征，进而减少这些特征的影响并提高预测模型的准确性。这项工作始于这样的假设：事件日志中的频繁控制流模式可能代表表征并解释特定预测的重要特征。因此，在本文中，我们（i）采用一种新颖的编码，能够利用预测过程监控中的 DECLARE 约束，并将该编码的有效性与预测过程监控最先进的编码进行比较，特别是对于面向结果的预测任务； (ii) 引入完全自动化的管道来识别导致预测者犯错误的最常见特征； (iii) 通过在不同的现实数据集上进行验证，显示所提出的管道在提高预测模型准确性方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过解释、适应和再训练的方法，利用控制流模式提升预测性流程监控（PPM）分类器的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有PPM模型在错误预测解释和特征优化方面存在不足，未能充分利用事件日志中的控制流模式，导致预测准确性受限。
AI.method: （i）设计基于DECLARE约束的新编码方法，对比传统PPM编码效果；（ii）构建自动化流程识别错误诱导特征；（iii）通过多数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 新编码方法与自动化流程显著提升预测准确性，优于现有PPM方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统化利用控制流模式和自动化特征优化，可有效提升PPM分类器的预测性能。

authors_text: Phuc Nguyen,Nam Tuan Ly,Hideaki Takeda,Atsuhiro Takasu
title: TabIQA: Table Questions Answering on Business Document Images
title_zh: TabIQA：商业文档图像的表格问题回答
abstract: Table answering questions from business documents has many challenges that require understanding tabular structures, cross-document referencing, and additional numeric computations beyond simple search queries. This paper introduces a novel pipeline, named TabIQA, to answer questions about business document images. TabIQA combines state-of-the-art deep learning techniques 1) to extract table content and structural information from images and 2) to answer various questions related to numerical data, text-based information, and complex queries from structured tables. The evaluation results on VQAonBD 2023 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of TabIQA in achieving promising performance in answering table-related questions. The TabIQA repository is available at https://github.com/phucty/itabqa.
summary: Table answering questions from business documents has many challenges that require understanding tabular structures, cross-document referencing, and additional numeric computations beyond simple search queries. This paper introduces a novel pipeline, named TabIQA, to answer questions about business document images. TabIQA combines state-of-the-art deep learning techniques 1) to extract table content and structural information from images and 2) to answer various questions related to numerical data, text-based information, and complex queries from structured tables. The evaluation results on VQAonBD 2023 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of TabIQA in achieving promising performance in answering table-related questions. The TabIQA repository is available at https://github.com/phucty/itabqa.
abstract_zh: 回答业务文档中的问题的表格面临许多挑战，需要理解表格结构、跨文档引用以及简单搜索查询之外的其他数字计算。本文介绍了一种名为 TabIQA 的新颖管道，用于回答有关业务文档图像的问题。 TabIQA 结合了最先进的深度学习技术 1) 从图像中提取表格内容和结构信息，2) 回答与数字数据、基于文本的信息和结构化表格中的复杂查询相关的各种问题。 VQAonBD 2023 数据集的评估结果证明了 TabIQA 在回答表格相关问题方面取得了可喜的性能。 TabIQA 存储库位于 https://github.com/phucty/itabqa。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TabIQA方法，用于解决从业务文档图像中回答表格相关问题的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理表格结构理解、跨文档引用及复杂数值计算等任务，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合深度学习技术，分两步处理：1) 从图像中提取表格内容与结构信息；2) 回答数值、文本及复杂查询问题。
AI.result: 在VQAonBD 2023数据集上验证了TabIQA的有效性，表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TabIQA为业务文档图像中的表格问答任务提供了可行方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Junyi Li,Zhilu Zhang,Xiaoyu Liu,Chaoyu Feng,Xiaotao Wang,Lei Lei,Wangmeng Zuo
title: Spatially Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning for Real-World Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于现实世界图像去噪的空间自适应自监督学习
abstract: Significant progress has been made in self-supervised image denoising (SSID) in the recent few years. However, most methods focus on dealing with spatially independent noise, and they have little practicality on real-world sRGB images with spatially correlated noise. Although pixel-shuffle downsampling has been suggested for breaking the noise correlation, it breaks the original information of images, which limits the denoising performance. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective to solve this problem, i.e., seeking for spatially adaptive supervision for real-world sRGB image denoising. Specifically, we take into account the respective characteristics of flat and textured regions in noisy images, and construct supervisions for them separately. For flat areas, the supervision can be safely derived from non-adjacent pixels, which are much far from the current pixel for excluding the influence of the noise-correlated ones. And we extend the blind-spot network to a blind-neighborhood network (BNN) for providing supervision on flat areas. For textured regions, the supervision has to be closely related to the content of adjacent pixels. And we present a locally aware network (LAN) to meet the requirement, while LAN itself is selectively supervised with the output of BNN. Combining these two supervisions, a denoising network (e.g., U-Net) can be well-trained. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art SSID methods on real-world sRGB photographs. The code is available at https://github.com/nagejacob/SpatiallyAdaptiveSSID.
summary: Significant progress has been made in self-supervised image denoising (SSID) in the recent few years. However, most methods focus on dealing with spatially independent noise, and they have little practicality on real-world sRGB images with spatially correlated noise. Although pixel-shuffle downsampling has been suggested for breaking the noise correlation, it breaks the original information of images, which limits the denoising performance. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective to solve this problem, i.e., seeking for spatially adaptive supervision for real-world sRGB image denoising. Specifically, we take into account the respective characteristics of flat and textured regions in noisy images, and construct supervisions for them separately. For flat areas, the supervision can be safely derived from non-adjacent pixels, which are much far from the current pixel for excluding the influence of the noise-correlated ones. And we extend the blind-spot network to a blind-neighborhood network (BNN) for providing supervision on flat areas. For textured regions, the supervision has to be closely related to the content of adjacent pixels. And we present a locally aware network (LAN) to meet the requirement, while LAN itself is selectively supervised with the output of BNN. Combining these two supervisions, a denoising network (e.g., U-Net) can be well-trained. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art SSID methods on real-world sRGB photographs. The code is available at https://github.com/nagejacob/SpatiallyAdaptiveSSID.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自监督图像去噪（SSID）取得了重大进展。然而，大多数方法专注于处理空间独立的噪声，对于具有空间相关噪声的现实世界 sRGB 图像几乎没有实用性。尽管像素洗牌下采样被建议用于打破噪声相关性，但它破坏了图像的原始信息，从而限制了去噪性能。在本文中，我们提出了一个解决这个问题的新视角，即为现实世界的 sRGB 图像去噪寻求空间自适应监督。具体来说，我们考虑了噪声图像中平坦区域和纹理区域的各自特征，并分别为它们构建监督。对于平坦区域，可以安全地从非相邻像素导出监督，这些像素距离当前像素很远，以排除与噪声相关的像素的影响。我们将盲点网络扩展到盲区网络（BNN），用于对平坦区域提供监督。对于纹理区域，监督必须与相邻像素的内容密切相关。我们提出了一个本地感知网络（LAN）来满足要求，而 LAN 本身则通过 BNN 的输出进行选择性监督。结合这两种监督，可以很好地训练去噪网络（例如 U-Net）。大量实验表明，我们的方法在真实 sRGB 照片上的表现优于最先进的 SSID 方法。该代码可从 https://github.com/nagejacob/SpatiallyAdaptiveSSID 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种空间自适应的自监督学习方法，用于处理真实世界sRGB图像中的空间相关噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督图像去噪方法难以处理真实世界图像中的空间相关噪声，且像素洗牌下采样会破坏图像信息，限制去噪性能。
AI.method: 通过区分图像平坦区域和纹理区域的特性，分别构建监督机制：对平坦区域使用盲邻域网络（BNN）基于非相邻像素生成监督，对纹理区域使用局部感知网络（LAN）并结合BNN输出进行选择性监督。
AI.result: 在真实世界sRGB图像上，该方法优于现有最先进的自监督去噪方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 空间自适应监督策略能有效提升真实场景下图像去噪性能，通过区域特性区分实现更精准的监督学习。
