motivation: 现有自监督图像去噪方法难以处理真实世界图像中的空间相关噪声，且像素洗牌下采样会破坏图像信息，限制去噪性能。
method: 通过区分图像平坦区域和纹理区域的特性，分别构建监督机制：对平坦区域使用盲邻域网络（BNN）基于非相邻像素生成监督，对纹理区域使用局部感知网络（LAN）并结合BNN输出进行选择性监督。
result: 在真实世界sRGB图像上，该方法优于现有最先进的自监督去噪方法，代码已开源。
conclusion: 空间自适应监督策略能有效提升真实场景下图像去噪性能，通过区域特性区分实现更精准的监督学习。
search_text: Spatially Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning for Real-World Image Denoising 用于现实世界图像去噪的空间自适应自监督学习 Significant progress has been made in self-supervised image denoising (SSID) in the recent few years. However, most methods focus on dealing with spatially independent noise, and they have little practicality on real-world sRGB images with spatially correlated noise. Although pixel-shuffle downsampling has been suggested for breaking the noise correlation, it breaks the original information of images, which limits the denoising performance. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective to solve this problem, i.e., seeking for spatially adaptive supervision for real-world sRGB image denoising. Specifically, we take into account the respective characteristics of flat and textured regions in noisy images, and construct supervisions for them separately. For flat areas, the supervision can be safely derived from non-adjacent pixels, which are much far from the current pixel for excluding the influence of the noise-correlated ones. And we extend the blind-spot network to a blind-neighborhood network (BNN) for providing supervision on flat areas. For textured regions, the supervision has to be closely related to the content of adjacent pixels. And we present a locally aware network (LAN) to meet the requirement, while LAN itself is selectively supervised with the output of BNN. Combining these two supervisions, a denoising network (e.g., U-Net) can be well-trained. Extensive experiments show that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art SSID methods on real-world sRGB photographs. The code is available at https://github.com/nagejacob/SpatiallyAdaptiveSSID. 近年来，自监督图像去噪（SSID）取得了重大进展。然而，大多数方法专注于处理空间独立的噪声，对于具有空间相关噪声的现实世界 sRGB 图像几乎没有实用性。尽管像素洗牌下采样被建议用于打破噪声相关性，但它破坏了图像的原始信息，从而限制了去噪性能。在本文中，我们提出了一个解决这个问题的新视角，即为现实世界的 sRGB 图像去噪寻求空间自适应监督。具体来说，我们考虑了噪声图像中平坦区域和纹理区域的各自特征，并分别为它们构建监督。对于平坦区域，可以安全地从非相邻像素导出监督，这些像素距离当前像素很远，以排除与噪声相关的像素的影响。我们将盲点网络扩展到盲区网络（BNN），用于对平坦区域提供监督。对于纹理区域，监督必须与相邻像素的内容密切相关。我们提出了一个本地感知网络（LAN）来满足要求，而 LAN 本身则通过 BNN 的输出进行选择性监督。结合这两种监督，可以很好地训练去噪网络（例如 U-Net）。大量实验表明，我们的方法在真实 sRGB 照片上的表现优于最先进的 SSID 方法。该代码可从 https://github.com/nagejacob/SpatiallyAdaptiveSSID 获取。 本文提出了一种空间自适应的自监督学习方法，用于处理真实世界sRGB图像中的空间相关噪声。 Junyi Li,Zhilu Zhang,Xiaoyu Liu,Chaoyu Feng,Xiaotao Wang,Lei Lei,Wangmeng Zuo cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Wu,Wei Sun,Dangyang Tu,Wei Lu,Xiongkuo Min,Ying Chen,Guangtao Zhai
title: MD-VQA: Multi-Dimensional Quality Assessment for UGC Live Videos
title_zh: MD-VQA：UGC直播视频多维度质量评估
abstract: User-generated content (UGC) live videos are often bothered by various distortions during capture procedures and thus exhibit diverse visual qualities. Such source videos are further compressed and transcoded by media server providers before being distributed to end-users. Because of the flourishing of UGC live videos, effective video quality assessment (VQA) tools are needed to monitor and perceptually optimize live streaming videos in the distributing process. In this paper, we address \textbf{UGC Live VQA} problems by constructing a first-of-a-kind subjective UGC Live VQA database and developing an effective evaluation tool. Concretely, 418 source UGC videos are collected in real live streaming scenarios and 3,762 compressed ones at different bit rates are generated for the subsequent subjective VQA experiments. Based on the built database, we develop a \underline{M}ulti-\underline{D}imensional \underline{VQA} (\textbf{MD-VQA}) evaluator to measure the visual quality of UGC live videos from semantic, distortion, and motion aspects respectively. Extensive experimental results show that MD-VQA achieves state-of-the-art performance on both our UGC Live VQA database and existing compressed UGC VQA databases.
summary: User-generated content (UGC) live videos are often bothered by various distortions during capture procedures and thus exhibit diverse visual qualities. Such source videos are further compressed and transcoded by media server providers before being distributed to end-users. Because of the flourishing of UGC live videos, effective video quality assessment (VQA) tools are needed to monitor and perceptually optimize live streaming videos in the distributing process. In this paper, we address \textbf{UGC Live VQA} problems by constructing a first-of-a-kind subjective UGC Live VQA database and developing an effective evaluation tool. Concretely, 418 source UGC videos are collected in real live streaming scenarios and 3,762 compressed ones at different bit rates are generated for the subsequent subjective VQA experiments. Based on the built database, we develop a \underline{M}ulti-\underline{D}imensional \underline{VQA} (\textbf{MD-VQA}) evaluator to measure the visual quality of UGC live videos from semantic, distortion, and motion aspects respectively. Extensive experimental results show that MD-VQA achieves state-of-the-art performance on both our UGC Live VQA database and existing compressed UGC VQA databases.
abstract_zh: 用户生成内容 (UGC) 直播视频在捕获过程中经常受到各种失真的困扰，因此呈现出不同的视觉质量。这些源视频在分发给最终用户之前由媒体服务器提供商进一步压缩和转码。由于UGC直播视频的蓬勃发展，需要有效的视频质量评估（VQA）工具来监控和感知优化直播视频的分发过程。在本文中，我们通过构建首个主观 UGC Live VQA 数据库并开发有效的评估工具来解决 \textbf{UGC Live VQA} 问题。具体来说，在真实的直播场景中收集了418个源UGC视频，并生成了3762个不同比特率的压缩视频，用于后续的主观VQA实验。基于构建的数据库，我们开发了一个 \underline{M}ulti-\underline{D}imensional \underline{VQA} (\textbf{MD-VQA}) 评估器，分别从语义、失真和运动方面衡量 UGC 直播视频的视觉质量。大量的实验结果表明，MD-VQA 在我们的 UGC Live VQA 数据库和现有的压缩 UGC VQA 数据库上都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MD-VQA工具，用于评估用户生成内容（UGC）直播视频的多维视觉质量。
AI.motivation: UGC直播视频在采集和压缩过程中存在多种失真，现有视频质量评估工具难以有效处理其多样化的视觉质量特性，需开发专用评估方法。
AI.method: 构建首个主观UGC直播VQA数据库（含418个源视频及3,762个不同码率压缩视频），开发从语义、失真和运动三个维度评估视频质量的MD-VQA工具。
AI.result: MD-VQA在本研究的UGC直播VQA数据库及现有压缩UGC VQA数据库中均达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MD-VQA通过多维评估框架有效解决了UGC直播视频质量评估难题，为直播流媒体优化提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: David Pershouse,Feras Dayoub,Dimity Miller,Niko Sünderhauf
title: Addressing the Challenges of Open-World Object Detection
title_zh: 应对开放世界物体检测的挑战
abstract: We address the challenging problem of open world object detection (OWOD), where object detectors must identify objects from known classes while also identifying and continually learning to detect novel objects. Prior work has resulted in detectors that have a relatively low ability to detect novel objects, and a high likelihood of classifying a novel object as one of the known classes. We approach the problem by identifying the three main challenges that OWOD presents and introduce OW-RCNN, an open world object detector that addresses each of these three challenges. OW-RCNN establishes a new state of the art using the open-world evaluation protocol on MS-COCO, showing a drastically increased ability to detect novel objects (16-21% absolute increase in U-Recall), to avoid their misclassification as one of the known classes (up to 52% reduction in A-OSE), and to incrementally learn to detect them while maintaining performance on previously known classes (1-6% absolute increase in mAP).
summary: We address the challenging problem of open world object detection (OWOD), where object detectors must identify objects from known classes while also identifying and continually learning to detect novel objects. Prior work has resulted in detectors that have a relatively low ability to detect novel objects, and a high likelihood of classifying a novel object as one of the known classes. We approach the problem by identifying the three main challenges that OWOD presents and introduce OW-RCNN, an open world object detector that addresses each of these three challenges. OW-RCNN establishes a new state of the art using the open-world evaluation protocol on MS-COCO, showing a drastically increased ability to detect novel objects (16-21% absolute increase in U-Recall), to avoid their misclassification as one of the known classes (up to 52% reduction in A-OSE), and to incrementally learn to detect them while maintaining performance on previously known classes (1-6% absolute increase in mAP).
abstract_zh: 我们解决了开放世界对象检测（OWOD）的挑战性问题，其中对象检测器必须识别已知类别中的对象，同时识别并不断学习检测新对象。先前的工作导致检测器检测新物体的能力相对较低，并且将新物体分类为已知类别之一的可能性很高。我们通过确定 OWOD 提出的三个主要挑战来解决这个问题，并引入 OW-RCNN，这是一种开放世界对象检测器，可以解决这三个挑战。 OW-RCNN 使用 MS-COCO 上的开放世界评估协议建立了一种新的技术水平，显示出检测新物体的能力大幅增强（U-Recall 绝对增加 16-21%），避免将其错误分类为已知类别之一（A-OSE 减少高达 52%），并逐步学习检测它们，同时保持先前已知类别的性能（mAP 绝对增加 1-6%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OW-RCNN方法，解决开放世界目标检测中新型物体识别能力弱、易误分类及持续学习困难的三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器在开放世界场景下对新型物体检测能力不足，且容易将其误判为已知类别，同时难以在保持原有性能的前提下实现增量学习。
AI.method: 通过设计新型特征学习机制与不确定性估计模块，OW-RCNN针对性解决新型物体识别、误分类抑制和增量学习三大核心问题。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上实现U-Recall提升16-21%，A-OSE降低52%，且保持原有类别mAP提升1-6%，建立新的SOTA基准。
AI.conclusion: OW-RCNN有效突破开放世界目标检测的技术瓶颈，在新型物体发现能力与模型鲁棒性方面取得显著进展。

authors_text: Clinton Ansun Mo,Kun Hu,Chengjiang Long,Zhiyong Wang
title: Continuous Intermediate Token Learning with Implicit Motion Manifold for Keyframe Based Motion Interpolation
title_zh: 使用隐式运动流形进行连续中间令牌学习，用于基于关键帧的运动插值
abstract: Deriving sophisticated 3D motions from sparse keyframes is a particularly challenging problem, due to continuity and exceptionally skeletal precision. The action features are often derivable accurately from the full series of keyframes, and thus, leveraging the global context with transformers has been a promising data-driven embedding approach. However, existing methods are often with inputs of interpolated intermediate frame for continuity using basic interpolation methods with keyframes, which result in a trivial local minimum during training. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to formulate latent motion manifolds with keyframe-based constraints, from which the continuous nature of intermediate token representations is considered. Particularly, our proposed framework consists of two stages for identifying a latent motion subspace, i.e., a keyframe encoding stage and an intermediate token generation stage, and a subsequent motion synthesis stage to extrapolate and compose motion data from manifolds. Through our extensive experiments conducted on both the LaFAN1 and CMU Mocap datasets, our proposed method demonstrates both superior interpolation accuracy and high visual similarity to ground truth motions.
summary: Deriving sophisticated 3D motions from sparse keyframes is a particularly challenging problem, due to continuity and exceptionally skeletal precision. The action features are often derivable accurately from the full series of keyframes, and thus, leveraging the global context with transformers has been a promising data-driven embedding approach. However, existing methods are often with inputs of interpolated intermediate frame for continuity using basic interpolation methods with keyframes, which result in a trivial local minimum during training. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to formulate latent motion manifolds with keyframe-based constraints, from which the continuous nature of intermediate token representations is considered. Particularly, our proposed framework consists of two stages for identifying a latent motion subspace, i.e., a keyframe encoding stage and an intermediate token generation stage, and a subsequent motion synthesis stage to extrapolate and compose motion data from manifolds. Through our extensive experiments conducted on both the LaFAN1 and CMU Mocap datasets, our proposed method demonstrates both superior interpolation accuracy and high visual similarity to ground truth motions.
abstract_zh: 由于连续性和异常的骨骼精度，从稀疏关键帧导出复杂的 3D 运动是一个特别具有挑战性的问题。动作特征通常可以从全系列关键帧中准确导出，因此，利用变压器的全局上下文一直是一种有前途的数据驱动嵌入方法。然而，现有方法通常使用带有关键帧的基本插值方法来输入插值中间帧以实现连续性，这会导致训练期间出现微不足道的局部最小值。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来制定具有基于关键帧的约束的潜在运动流形，其中考虑了中间标记表示的连续性质。特别是，我们提出的框架由用于识别潜在运动子空间的两个阶段组成，即关键帧编码阶段和中间令牌生成阶段，以及随后的运动合成阶段，用于从流形中推断和合成运动数据。通过我们在 LaFAN1 和 CMU Mocap 数据集上进行的广泛实验，我们提出的方法展示了卓越的插值精度和与地面真实运动的高度视觉相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键帧的运动插值框架，通过隐式运动流形学习连续中间 token 表示，以解决从稀疏关键帧生成复杂 3D 运动的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖基础插值技术处理关键帧生成中间帧，易陷入局部最优，难以保证运动连续性和骨骼精度。
AI.method: 框架分三阶段：关键帧编码阶段提取全局特征，中间 token 生成阶段构建隐式运动流形，运动合成阶段从流形中生成连续运动数据。
AI.result: 在 LaFAN1 和 CMU Mocap 数据集上，方法在插值精度和运动真实性上均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模运动流形与关键帧约束，所提框架有效提升了基于关键帧的运动插值质量与连续性。

search_text: Continuous Intermediate Token Learning with Implicit Motion Manifold for Keyframe Based Motion Interpolation 使用隐式运动流形进行连续中间令牌学习，用于基于关键帧的运动插值 Deriving sophisticated 3D motions from sparse keyframes is a particularly challenging problem, due to continuity and exceptionally skeletal precision. The action features are often derivable accurately from the full series of keyframes, and thus, leveraging the global context with transformers has been a promising data-driven embedding approach. However, existing methods are often with inputs of interpolated intermediate frame for continuity using basic interpolation methods with keyframes, which result in a trivial local minimum during training. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to formulate latent motion manifolds with keyframe-based constraints, from which the continuous nature of intermediate token representations is considered. Particularly, our proposed framework consists of two stages for identifying a latent motion subspace, i.e., a keyframe encoding stage and an intermediate token generation stage, and a subsequent motion synthesis stage to extrapolate and compose motion data from manifolds. Through our extensive experiments conducted on both the LaFAN1 and CMU Mocap datasets, our proposed method demonstrates both superior interpolation accuracy and high visual similarity to ground truth motions. 由于连续性和异常的骨骼精度，从稀疏关键帧导出复杂的 3D 运动是一个特别具有挑战性的问题。动作特征通常可以从全系列关键帧中准确导出，因此，利用变压器的全局上下文一直是一种有前途的数据驱动嵌入方法。然而，现有方法通常使用带有关键帧的基本插值方法来输入插值中间帧以实现连续性，这会导致训练期间出现微不足道的局部最小值。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来制定具有基于关键帧的约束的潜在运动流形，其中考虑了中间标记表示的连续性质。特别是，我们提出的框架由用于识别潜在运动子空间的两个阶段组成，即关键帧编码阶段和中间令牌生成阶段，以及随后的运动合成阶段，用于从流形中推断和合成运动数据。通过我们在 LaFAN1 和 CMU Mocap 数据集上进行的广泛实验，我们提出的方法展示了卓越的插值精度和与地面真实运动的高度视觉相似性。 本文提出了一种基于关键帧的运动插值框架，通过隐式运动流形学习连续中间 token 表示，以解决从稀疏关键帧生成复杂 3D 运动的挑战。 Clinton Ansun Mo,Kun Hu,Chengjiang Long,Zhiyong Wang cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Xingbin Liu,Huafeng Kuang,Xianming Lin,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji
title: CAT:Collaborative Adversarial Training
title_zh: CAT：协作对抗训练
abstract: Adversarial training can improve the robustness of neural networks. Previous methods focus on a single adversarial training strategy and do not consider the model property trained by different strategies. By revisiting the previous methods, we find different adversarial training methods have distinct robustness for sample instances. For example, a sample instance can be correctly classified by a model trained using standard adversarial training (AT) but not by a model trained using TRADES, and vice versa. Based on this observation, we propose a collaborative adversarial training framework to improve the robustness of neural networks. Specifically, we use different adversarial training methods to train robust models and let models interact with their knowledge during the training process. Collaborative Adversarial Training (CAT) can improve both robustness and accuracy. Extensive experiments on various networks and datasets validate the effectiveness of our method. CAT achieves state-of-the-art adversarial robustness without using any additional data on CIFAR-10 under the Auto-Attack benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/CAT.
summary: Adversarial training can improve the robustness of neural networks. Previous methods focus on a single adversarial training strategy and do not consider the model property trained by different strategies. By revisiting the previous methods, we find different adversarial training methods have distinct robustness for sample instances. For example, a sample instance can be correctly classified by a model trained using standard adversarial training (AT) but not by a model trained using TRADES, and vice versa. Based on this observation, we propose a collaborative adversarial training framework to improve the robustness of neural networks. Specifically, we use different adversarial training methods to train robust models and let models interact with their knowledge during the training process. Collaborative Adversarial Training (CAT) can improve both robustness and accuracy. Extensive experiments on various networks and datasets validate the effectiveness of our method. CAT achieves state-of-the-art adversarial robustness without using any additional data on CIFAR-10 under the Auto-Attack benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/CAT.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练可以提高神经网络的鲁棒性。以前的方法侧重于单一的对抗性训练策略，没有考虑不同策略训练的模型属性。通过回顾之前的方法，我们发现不同的对抗训练方法对于样本实例具有不同的鲁棒性。例如，使用标准对抗训练 (AT) 训练的模型可以对样本实例进行正确分类，但使用 TRADES 训练的模型则不能正确分类，反之亦然。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种协作对抗训练框架来提高神经网络的鲁棒性。具体来说，我们使用不同的对抗性训练方法来训练鲁棒模型，并让模型在训练过程中与其知识进行交互。协作对抗训练（CAT）可以提高鲁棒性和准确性。对各种网络和数据集的广泛实验验证了我们方法的有效性。 CAT 在自动攻击基准下无需使用 CIFAR-10 上的任何附加数据即可实现最先进的对抗鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/liuxingbin/CAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAT（Collaborative Adversarial Training）的协作对抗训练框架，通过结合不同对抗训练方法的优势来提升神经网络的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练方法仅关注单一策略，未考虑不同策略训练出的模型在样本实例上的鲁棒性差异。不同方法对同一样本可能产生不同的分类结果，因此需要一种协作机制来整合多种策略的优势。
AI.method: CAT框架通过使用多种对抗训练方法分别训练鲁棒模型，并在训练过程中让模型之间共享知识，实现协作学习。具体包括多模型交互与知识蒸馏等技术。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，CAT在Auto-Attack基准下达到最先进的对抗鲁棒性，且无需额外数据。实验表明该方法在多种网络和数据集上均有效。
AI.conclusion: 协作对抗训练通过整合不同方法的鲁棒性优势，能够同时提升模型的鲁棒性和准确性，为对抗训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ned Cooper
title: Would the Trees Dim the Lights? Adopting the Intentional Stance for More-Than-Human Participatory Design
title_zh: 树木会使灯光变暗吗？采用超越人类参与设计的有意立场
abstract: The 2019/20 Black Summer bushfires in Australia demonstrated the brutal and disastrous consequences of changing the technological world without considering linkages with the biophysical, ecological or human worlds. An emerging more-than-human design philosophy encourages designers to consider such interrelations between humans and non-human entities. Yet, the design research community has focused on situated or embodied experiences for designers, rather than developing processes to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities through participatory design. This paper explores how adopting the `intentional stance', a concept from philosophy, might provide a heuristic for more-than-human participatory design. Through experimentation with the intentional stance in the context of smart lighting systems, the paper demonstrates that the approach has potential for non-human entities from the ecological world, but less so for the biophysical world. The paper concludes by encouraging critique and evolution of the intentional stance, and of other approaches, to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities in everyday design.
summary: The 2019/20 Black Summer bushfires in Australia demonstrated the brutal and disastrous consequences of changing the technological world without considering linkages with the biophysical, ecological or human worlds. An emerging more-than-human design philosophy encourages designers to consider such interrelations between humans and non-human entities. Yet, the design research community has focused on situated or embodied experiences for designers, rather than developing processes to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities through participatory design. This paper explores how adopting the `intentional stance', a concept from philosophy, might provide a heuristic for more-than-human participatory design. Through experimentation with the intentional stance in the context of smart lighting systems, the paper demonstrates that the approach has potential for non-human entities from the ecological world, but less so for the biophysical world. The paper concludes by encouraging critique and evolution of the intentional stance, and of other approaches, to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities in everyday design.
abstract_zh: 澳大利亚 2019/20 年黑色夏季丛林大火证明了在不考虑与生物物理、生态或人类世界的联系的情况下改变技术世界所带来的残酷和灾难性后果。新兴的超越人类的设计理念鼓励设计师考虑人类和非人类实体之间的相互关系。然而，设计研究界一直关注设计师的情境或具体体验，而不是通过参与式设计开发流程来合法化非人类实体的观点。本文探讨了如何采用“意向立场”这一哲学概念，为超越人类的参与式设计提供启发。通过在智能照明系统背景下对意向立场进行实验，论文证明该方法对于生态世界的非人类实体具有潜力，但对于生物物理世界的潜力较小。本文最后鼓励对有意立场和其他方法的批评和演变，以合法化日常设计中非人类实体的观点。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过哲学中的'意向立场'概念，为非人类实体在参与式设计中提供合法性，以应对人类与自然世界关系断裂的问题。
AI.motivation: 2019/20年澳大利亚山火烧毁事件暴露了技术设计忽视生态与生物物理关联的后果，亟需建立包含非人类视角的设计方法论。
AI.method: 通过在智能照明系统场景中实验性应用'意向立场'理论，验证其对生态与生物物理领域非人类实体的适用性差异。
AI.result: '意向立场'在生态领域非人类实体（如树木）的参与式设计中展现潜力，但在生物物理领域（如材料属性）效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 需持续批判性反思'意向立场'等理论框架，发展更完善的方法论体系，以实现非人类实体在日常设计中的有效参与。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过哲学中的'意向立场'概念，为非人类实体在参与式设计中提供合法性，以应对人类与自然世界关系断裂的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 2019/20年澳大利亚山火烧毁事件暴露了技术设计忽视生态与生物物理关联的后果，亟需建立包含非人类视角的设计方法论。
ai_content.method: 通过在智能照明系统场景中实验性应用'意向立场'理论，验证其对生态与生物物理领域非人类实体的适用性差异。
ai_content.result: '意向立场'在生态领域非人类实体（如树木）的参与式设计中展现潜力，但在生物物理领域（如材料属性）效果有限。
ai_content.conclusion: 需持续批判性反思'意向立场'等理论框架，发展更完善的方法论体系，以实现非人类实体在日常设计中的有效参与。

search_text: Would the Trees Dim the Lights? Adopting the Intentional Stance for More-Than-Human Participatory Design 树木会使灯光变暗吗？采用超越人类参与设计的有意立场 The 2019/20 Black Summer bushfires in Australia demonstrated the brutal and disastrous consequences of changing the technological world without considering linkages with the biophysical, ecological or human worlds. An emerging more-than-human design philosophy encourages designers to consider such interrelations between humans and non-human entities. Yet, the design research community has focused on situated or embodied experiences for designers, rather than developing processes to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities through participatory design. This paper explores how adopting the `intentional stance', a concept from philosophy, might provide a heuristic for more-than-human participatory design. Through experimentation with the intentional stance in the context of smart lighting systems, the paper demonstrates that the approach has potential for non-human entities from the ecological world, but less so for the biophysical world. The paper concludes by encouraging critique and evolution of the intentional stance, and of other approaches, to legitimate the perspectives of non-human entities in everyday design. 澳大利亚 2019/20 年黑色夏季丛林大火证明了在不考虑与生物物理、生态或人类世界的联系的情况下改变技术世界所带来的残酷和灾难性后果。新兴的超越人类的设计理念鼓励设计师考虑人类和非人类实体之间的相互关系。然而，设计研究界一直关注设计师的情境或具体体验，而不是通过参与式设计开发流程来合法化非人类实体的观点。本文探讨了如何采用“意向立场”这一哲学概念，为超越人类的参与式设计提供启发。通过在智能照明系统背景下对意向立场进行实验，论文证明该方法对于生态世界的非人类实体具有潜力，但对于生物物理世界的潜力较小。本文最后鼓励对有意立场和其他方法的批评和演变，以合法化日常设计中非人类实体的观点。 本文探讨如何通过哲学中的'意向立场'概念，为非人类实体在参与式设计中提供合法性，以应对人类与自然世界关系断裂的问题。 Ned Cooper cs.HC
